Text: समर्थकांनी पक्षातील चुका दाखवणं हा त्यांच्यामते गुन्हा समजला जातो....
translated_text: Pointing out mistakes in the party is considered a crime by them.
Justification: The phrase "गुन्हा समजला जातो" (considered a crime) expresses disapproval.

Text: फैजाबाद ही निर्लज्ज पणाचा कळस आहे... असुरी प्रवृत्ती आहे ती
translated_text: Faizabad is the epitome of shameless greed... it is demonic in nature.
Justification: Strong negative language like "shameless" and "demonic" conveys disgust.

Text: म्हणजे आम्ही रिकामेच आहोत तुमच्यासारखे, मोक्कार पैसा कमवायचा तुम्ही आणि काम करायचं आम्ही वा.......
translated_text: So we are just like you, you have to earn money and we have to work...
Justification: While the statement expresses frustration, it does not convey strong enough emotion to classify as anger or sadness.

Text: पोलीस स्मृती दिन निमित्त देशासाठी कर्तव्य बजावत असताना शहीद झालेल्या हुतात्म्यांना भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली !!
translated_text: Emotional tribute to the martyrs who died while performing their duty for the country on the occasion of Police Memorial Day!!
Justification: The phrase "भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली" (heartfelt tribute) expresses sorrow and mourning.

Text: तु कोणत्या क्रिकेट प्रकारात प्लेअर होता?????????????????? उपाध्यक्ष होण्याची तुझी लायकी काय???????
translated_text: What type of cricket were you a player in??????????????????? What are your qualifications to be the vice president???????
Justification: The excessive punctuation and questioning indicate a tone of shock and disbelief.

Text: तुम्ही नेते आहात यात शंकाच आहे, एवढी बालबुद्धी तर लहान मुलांना पण नसते
translated_text: There is no doubt that you are a leader, even small children do not have such childish intelligence.
Justification: Though mildly insulting, it lacks strong emotional charge.

Text: कायमस्वरूपी बंदी का नाही केली.? कुठली सेटिंग झाली आहे??
translated_text: Why not ban it permanently? What setting has been made??
Justification: The questioning and tone suggest curiosity and surprise.

Text: हा गद्दार अजुन आपल्या सारखे गद्दार शोधतच फिरतो आहे वाटत ....
translated_text: It seems this traitor is still looking for traitors like us...
Justification: The term "गद्दार" (traitor) repeatedly indicates anger.

Text: ह्यांच्यात कसला आला राष्ट्रवाद, हे तर भ्रष्टवादी
translated_text: What kind of nationalism has come into these people, they are corrupt.
Justification: The phrase "भ्रष्टवादी" (corrupt) conveys strong disapproval.

Text: दोन्ही राज्यांत भाजपच्या मुख्यमंत्री आहेत म्हणजे हे सगळे सोंग ठरवुन केलेली आहे असे समजावे
translated_text: There are BJP Chief Ministers in both the states, so it should be understood that all this is a pretext.
Justification: The statement presents an observation rather than emotion.

Text: मोदीभक्त यांचे नाव घ्यायला परवानगी नाही दिली वाटत साहेबांनी
translated_text: I don't think the hon. has given permission to take the name of a Modi devotee.
Justification: This is a neutral political statement.

Text: तेथील काम आपण केलेले नाहीत कधी कराल?
translated_text: If you haven't done the work there, when will you?
Justification: A straightforward question without strong emotional intensity.

Text: खूपच...!!! अगदी पिसाळल्या सारखे पूर्ण वातावरण दूषित करतात, कसलाच एकोपा राहिला नाही..!!!
translated_text: Very much...!!! They pollute the entire atmosphere like a mad dog, there is no harmony left..!!!
Justification: The phrase "पूर्ण वातावरण दूषित करतात" (pollute the entire atmosphere) suggests frustration and anger.

Text: बुर्जी पटेल ला उमेदवारी दिली ..तेव्हा तू कोणत्या बिळात लपली होती ग...झिपरे
translated_text: Burji Patel was nominated..then in which hole were you hiding...zipare
Justification: The phrase "कोणत्या बिळात लपली" (which hole were you hiding in) conveys disbelief and surprise.

Text: मला कधी कधी वाटतं ते आपल्याला "माणसं कुठली" म्हणून हिणवत असतील.
translated_text: Sometimes I think they might be belittling us as "people of some kind."
Justification: Reflects contemplation but lacks strong emotional intensity.

Text: महाराष्ट्र मधील शेतकरी जातोय भिक मागत आणि ह्याची दिल्ली वारी सतत सतत
translated_text: Farmers in Maharashtra are begging while they continue their Delhi visits.
Justification: Describes economic struggles, evoking sadness.

Text: या मार खायला सोबतीने
translated_text: Come and get beaten up.
Justification: Lacks strong emotion, though slightly aggressive.

Text: गद्दरांना त्यात पण पोट दुःखी होत आहे का?
translated_text: Are traitors also getting sick of it?
Justification: The term "गद्दर" (traitor) conveys contempt.

Text: ह्याचे पूर्वजांनी हाताच्या पंजाचा वापर करून झोपले असते तर ही वेळ आली नसती
translated_text: If his ancestors had slept using their hands, this time wouldn't have come.
Justification: Implies offensive critique of ancestry, expressing disgust.

Text: नवीन संडासाचे उद्घाटन सोडून तुम्ही काय केलं आहे का मतदार संघात???
translated_text: Apart from inaugurating a new toilet, what have you done in the constituency???
Justification: The sentence questions actions but does not express strong emotion, making it neutral.

Text: कांड केलंय म्हणून ब्लॉकची सजा का नाही केलंय त्याची सजा? बेंचो
translated_text: Why wasn't the block punished for committing the crime? Bencho
Justification: The word "बेंचो" is informal, but the sentence lacks strong emotional intensity.

Text: छान संस्कार केलेत....बघा मतदारांनो अशा लोकांना निवडून आपण देणार का
translated_text: You have done a great job....look, voters, will you elect such people?
Justification: The sarcastic praise implies irony but is not strongly emotional.

Text: असे कोण आहे रे तिकडे? च्यायला.. माझीच शेपटी होती व्हय
translated_text: Who is that there? Oh my.. I had a tail.
Justification: The expression "च्यायला" and the surprise in the sentence indicate shock or surprise.

Text: तुरुंगातल्या शौचालयात गैरसोय झालेल्या आपल्या पार्श्वभागावर
translated_text: On your back, which is inconvenient in the prison toilet.
Justification: Crude language but lacks strong emotion.

Text: अख्खी लोकशाही ची धुरा एका माणसावर अवलंबून असावी हीच शोकांतिका आहे
translated_text: It is a tragedy that the entire axis of democracy should depend on one man.
Justification: The word "शोकांतिका" (tragedy) conveys sadness.

Text: तुझ्या बापाची कुळं जरी आरी तरी तुझं कुत्रीस्वप्न सत्यात येणार नाही...
translated_text: Even if your father's family survives, your dream won't come true...
Justification: While it dismisses someone's ambition, it does not convey a strong emotional charge.

Text: हा पत्रकार नेमका दसरा दिवाळीला च जागा होतो !!
translated_text: This journalist wakes up exactly on Dussehra, Diwali!!
Justification: The use of sarcasm and frustration towards the journalist indicates anger.

Text: अन् हा भाऊ या जन्मातच फुटला घरातुन ,किती कच्चा म्हणायचा!
translated_text: And this brother broke away from home in this very birth, how crude he was!
Justification: The phrase "किती कच्चा" suggests disdain, indicating disgust.

Text: हे देशद्रोही आहे. —एक अंधभक्त
translated_text: This is a traitor. —A blind devotee
Justification: Labeling someone a traitor in a derogatory manner suggests disgust.

Text: मुळात गद्दारी ही कुठल्या जातीपूर्ती मर्यादित नसते. गद्दारी हा एक स्वभाव आहे.
translated_text: Basically, betrayal is not limited to any caste. It is a nature.
Justification: The statement is analytical and does not convey strong emotion.

Text: अरे आम्हांला कडवे चालतील पण तुझ्यासारखे भडवे नको, मुफ्तीला सोबत घेणारे सत्तापिपासू
translated_text: Oh, we may be bitter, but we don't want scoundrels like you, power-hungry people who take the Mufti with them.
Justification: The use of "भडवे" (scoundrels) and "सत्तापिपासू" (power-hungry) indicate disgust.

Text: गरिबांना लुटले म्हणून तुम्ही जेल मध्ये आहात
translated_text: You are in jail for robbing the poor.
Justification: The phrase "लुटले" (robbed) and the accusation convey strong disgust.

Text: पहिले शिवसैनिक म्हणायचे बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना. आणि आता शिवसैनिक बोलतात बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना म्हणजे बाळासाहेब कोण?
translated_text: Earlier, Shiv Sainiks used to say Balasaheb's Shiv Sena. And now Shiv Sainiks say Balasaheb's Shiv Sena. So who is Balasaheb?
Justification: A rhetorical question without strong emotional cues, making it neutral.

Text: आपल्याला आणि पक्षाला खूप मोठी भरपाई भरून द्यावी लागेल
translated_text: You and the party will have to pay a huge compensation.
Justification: The sentence is factual without any emotional charge. The phrase "मोठी भरपाई" (huge compensation) indicates consequence but not a strong emotion.

Text: नाचणाऱ्या मोराचे पाय वाकडे असतात असे म्हणतात
translated_text: It is said that the dancing peacock has crooked legs.
Justification: This is a proverb. The phrase "पाय वाकडे" (crooked legs) suggests a flaw but does not evoke a specific emotional reaction.

Text: आम्हाला ऑप्शन असतो का
translated_text: Do we have an option?
Justification: The sentence is a question and does not contain any strong emotional words.

Text: बंद करा हे थिल्लर चाळे.
translated_text: Close this fucking shop.
Justification: The phrase थिल्लर चाळे (cheap drama) conveys frustration and anger toward something perceived as nonsense.

Text: दादा दुसऱ्यांच्या हिंदी वर दात काडत होते आता दातावरच पडले
translated_text: Grandpa was cutting his teeth on other people's Hindi, now he is cutting his teeth on his own.
Justification: The phrase दात काढणे (mocking/criticizing) implies someone ridiculing others and later facing consequences, inducing disgust.

Text: हा वकील जज ला चूत्या बनवत असेल पण भक्ताना नाही
translated_text: This lawyer may be making fun of the judge, but not the devotees.
Justification: The use of चूत्या (idiot/insult) suggests an offensive tone, leading to disgust.

Text: प्रश्न ला प्रश्ना ने उत्तर देऊ नका.. काय काम केले ते सांगा
translated_text: Don't answer a question with a question. Tell me what you did.
Justification: The directive tone and frustration imply anger.

Text: काय नष्टर हाय हा पंतप्रधान रा पगार व्हायच्या आत राजीनामा
translated_text: What a shame this Prime Minister has resigned before receiving his salary.
Justification: The word नष्टर (shameful) indicates strong disapproval, leading to disgust.

Text: त्यामूळे आपल्याला त्रास होतो. गर्दी होते तिकिटे मिळत नाहीत गाड्या उशिरा धावतात
translated_text: That's why we suffer. There are crowds, tickets are not available, trains run late.
Justification: The word त्रास (suffering) conveys distress and frustration, leading to sadness.

Text: पुढील दिवसात तुमचे सरकार कोसळणार हे नक्की...
translated_text: Your government will surely collapse in the coming days...
Justification: The phrase सरकार कोसळणार (government will collapse) implies an unfortunate outcome, leading to sadness.

Text: सगळ्याना भारताचे नमूने म्हणून गौरवा हो आता... तेच बाकी राहणार आहे....
translated_text: May all be glorified as role models of India now... that is all that remains...
Justification: The phrase नमूने म्हणून गौरवा (glorified as examples) may be sarcastic, but it does not indicate strong emotion.

Text: याआधी प्रिंसेस हया आणि प्रिंसेस लतीफा यांच्या बंडाची आणि छळाची प्रकरणं समोर आली होती.
translated_text: Previously, cases of rebellion and harassment of Princess Haya and Princess Latifa had come to light.
Justification: While it refers to serious matters, the language is factual and emotionless, making it neutral.

Text: हे जास्तीत जास्त पर्यंत चालेल.. नंतर अन्नाजी पंत पण वापर करुन फेकून देतील..
translated_text: This will last until the end.. later Annaji Pant will use it up and throw it away..
Justification: वापर करुन फेकणे (use and throw) expresses concern but remains neutral in tone.

Text: त्या मॅडम कांदे खात नाही म्हणून डोक्यात बटाटे भरले आहेत.... असे वाटतं
translated_text: That madam doesn't eat onions, so she has potatoes in her head.... It seems like
Justification: बटाटे भरले आहेत (potatoes in the head) is absurd and figurative, giving it a surprised tone.

Text: असच होत.. वरतून घेतला परत तर मार पण खाव लागतो त्यांचा
translated_text: That's what happens.. If you take it from above, you have to beat them back.
Justification: The phrase is a sarcastic commentary on repayment and lacks specific emotion.

Text: एका परप्रांतीयांने सनकन कानाखाली लगावली होती.
translated_text: A migrant had placed a sneer under his ear.
Justification: The phrase "सनकन कानाखाली लगावली" (a sharp slap under the ear) depicts physical aggression, suggesting disgust.

Text: घंट्याचा कायदेतज्ञ...... छपरी आहे नसानसात द्वेष भरला आहे
translated_text: The lawyer of the hour...... is a coward, his nerves are filled with hatred
Justification: "छपरी" and "नसानसात द्वेष" show disrespect and contempt.

Text: हातभट्टीत गांजा मिसळून ढोसल्यावर एवढी कडक नशा येत असावी. माणसाने थापेबाजी करावी, पण इतकी.
translated_text: It must be so strong that you get so drunk after mixing ganja in a hand-held pot. A person should be able to clap, but that's it.
Justification: The references to "गांजा" (weed) and "थापेबाजी" (boasting) show moral degradation, suggesting disgust.

Text: आयबॉल च कीबोर्ड आहे. बघा की काही होतंय का? ₹ चुना लागेल हो?
translated_text: The iBall has a keyboard. See if anything happens? Will it cost ₹?
Justification: Mostly a sarcastic observation without direct emotional tone.

Text: मन त्या मृतदेहासारखा झाला आहे ज्याच्या नशिबात अंत्यसंस्कार नाहि
translated_text: The mind has become like a corpse whose fate is not to be cremated.
Justification: Comparison to "मृतदेहासारखा" (like a corpse) evokes a disturbing image, signaling disgust.

Text: साहेब पण ह्यांच्या गलिच्छ राजकारणाचे भाग होतील असे वाटलं नव्हतं
translated_text: Sir, I never thought I would be a part of their dirty politics.
Justification: Though "गलिच्छ राजकारण" suggests corruption, the overall tone remains reflective.

Text: भाजप सत्तेत वर्षे आणि दोष राष्ट्रवादीचा, अंध भक्त डोक्यात कमी
translated_text: Years in BJP power and the blame is on the NCP, blind devotees are less in the head
Justification: "अंध भक्त" and "डोक्यात कमी" add sarcasm, but no intense emotional content.

Text: कडून खूपच होत आहे
translated_text: It's happening a lot.
Justification: Generic statement with no clear emotional content.

Text: विषय मागील वर्ष बद्दल सुरू आहे. त्यावर भुंक थोडा.. भाॅव भाॉव्व
translated_text: The topic is about last year. Let's talk a little about it.. Wow wow
Justification: "भुंक थोडा" (bark a little) and "भाॅव" repeated add absurdity, leading to surprise.

Text: छगनराव भगतसिंग पन सरस्वती भक्त होते ! तांदुळचोर नव्हते
translated_text: Chhaganrao Bhagat Singh was also a devotee of Saraswati! He was not a rice thief.
Justification: Uses contrast, no emotional triggers.

Text: ही चालू डीपी आहे याची अवस्था बघा.
translated_text: Look at the status of this current DP.
Justification: Comment on status, not emotionally charged.

Text: खरी शिवसेना कोणाची हे आता रस्त्यावर दिसेल. पोटनिवडणूक जिंकून रावणाचा वध होइल हे निश्चित!!
translated_text: Whose real Shiv Sena is will now be seen on the streets. It is certain that Ravana will be killed by winning the by-elections!!
Justification: "रावणाचा वध" (killing of Ravana) is metaphor for destroying evil, symbolizing anger.

Text: आजपर्यंत देशाची आर्थिक फसवणूक करणारी जमात,,,,,,,आणि हेच आपल्याला देश भक्ती शिकवणार?
translated_text: The people who have been defrauding the country financially till date,,,,,,,,and this is what will teach us patriotism?
Justification: The rhetorical sarcasm and use of "फसवणूक" (fraud) and "देश भक्ती शिकवणार?" (teach patriotism?) conveys anger.

Text: अरे बेडका काही हि बोलतोस का ?
translated_text: Hey frog, are you talking?
Justification: The term "बेडका" (frog) is mocking, but overall tone is mildly humorous.

Text: तुझ्यासारखा नाही मी तात्या.
translated_text: I'm not like you, Tatya.
Justification: Comparison using "तुझ्यासारखा नाही" implies contempt, indicating disgust.

Text: अपेक्षा आणि तुमच्या साहेबांकडून मस्करी करता का राव...
translated_text: Are you making fun of expectations and your boss, Rao...
Justification: Use of "मस्करी" (mockery) is sarcastic, but not emotionally charged.

Text: पण हा गाढवाचा अपमान आहे. निषेध.
translated_text: But this is an insult to the donkey. Protest.
Justification: Comparing someone to a "गाढव" (donkey) reflects insult and disgust.

Text: देशात बेरोजगारी अजिबात नाहीये...
translated_text: There is absolutely no unemployment in the country...
Justification: Though sarcastic, there’s no emotionally charged Marathi word; hence it remains neutral.

Text: पोलीस स्मृती दिन कर्तव्य बजावत...
translated_text: Emotional tribute...
Justification: The phrase "शहीद झालेल्या हुतात्म्यांना" (martyred soldiers) brings out sadness and respect.

Text: घरकोंबड्याने फोटो काढणे...
translated_text: Giving up taking photos...
Justification: "घरकोंबड्याने" (hen-like person) is derogatory and mocking, thus conveys disgust.

Text: भविष्यातील गुलाम आजच तयार...
translated_text: Slaves of the future...
Justification: Allegorical tone without emotional spikes.

Text: ही मोसंबी नारंगी पार्टीचा...
translated_text: A spectacle in Maharashtra...
Justification: Commentary but lacking emotionally strong terms.

Text: हरिश्चंद्र जिवंत असते...
translated_text: Would have killed himself...
Justification: Reference to "हरिश्चंद्र" (truthful king) + suicide creates sadness.

Text: लै रांगबाज लोक आहेत ही
translated_text: These are rowdy people.
Justification: The word 'रांगबाज' (rowdy) expresses disdain toward behavior, indicating disgust.

Text: अजून महाराष्ट्रात यात्रा आली पण नाही, त्याच्या अगोदरच फाटली ये डर अच्छा लगा....
translated_text: The yatra has not arrived in Maharashtra yet, but it has already broken down, it feels so good....
Justification: The sarcastic satisfaction implied by 'ये डर अच्छा लगा' indicates joy.

Text: स्वताच्या विभाग वर ज्या मंत्र्यांना विश्वास नाही असले मंत्री काय उपयोग चे
translated_text: What use are ministers who don't have faith in their own departments?
Justification: Rhetorical questioning implies disbelief and surprise.

Text: आणि काही मूर्ख लोक त्याला बळी पडत आहे.
translated_text: And some stupid people are falling for it.
Justification: The word 'मूर्ख' (foolish) shows contempt, indicating disgust.

Text: ती चपराक तीच का जी अंधेरी मध्ये मिळाल्या वर बदकनिस पळून गेले
translated_text: Is that the same slap that was received in Andheri and the ducks ran away?
Justification: Unexpected reaction to slap, expressed as surprise.

Text: खुप लाड झाले यांचे आता धडा शिकवा
translated_text: Now teach them a lesson, they are very spoiled.
Justification: The phrase 'खुप लाड' + 'धडा शिकवा' conveys irritation—disgust.

Text: तुमचं सरकार काय गांडीत पाय घालून बसलंय का? उचला त्यांना आणि फासावर लटकवा.
translated_text: Is your government sitting with its feet in the sand? Pick them up and hang them.
Justification: The word "फासावर" evokes a strong negative reaction, fitting the emotion of disgust.

Text: मुख्यमंत्री होणारा "तो" शिवसैनिक म्हणजे तुम्हीच ना, स्पष्ट सांगा ना साहेब!
translated_text: That Shiv Sainik who will become the Chief Minister is not you, please tell me clearly, sir!
Justification: The sentence contains strong or accusatory language that expresses anger.

Text: सभापती महोदय हा पुणे ट्रॅफिक पोलिस कर्मचाऱ्यांवर घोर अन्याय होतोय
translated_text: Mr. Speaker, this is a gross injustice being done to the Pune Traffic Police personnel.
Justification: The sentence contains unpleasant or offensive language that leads to disgust.

Text: पण मुला ने साहेबांचेच तत्व पणाला लावलेत.....
translated_text: But the son put his father's principles at stake.....
Justification: The sentence lacks emotionally charged language, hence it is categorized as neutral.

Text: अक्कल शून्यांचे उत्तम उदारहण इसक्रिम आणी मशालीतील फरक मोठा झाला तरी समजत नाही.
translated_text: A great example of a zero-sum game is that you don't understand the difference between ice cream and a torch, even if it's huge.
Justification: The sentence lacks emotionally charged language, hence it is categorized as neutral.

Text: भाजप ला मत म्हणजे भ्रष्टाचाराला मत.
translated_text: A vote for BJP means a vote for corruption.
Justification: Equating BJP with corruption is a strong disapproval; shows disgust.

Text: हे म्हणजे रुपया घसरला नाही तर डॉलर मजबूत झाल आहे. असच काहीसं आहे.
translated_text: This means that the rupee has not depreciated, but the dollar has strengthened. That's how it is.
Justification: An ironic observation without strong emotion; neutral.

Text: का मुळावर उठलाय तुम्ही ... जगु द्या की
translated_text: Why are you standing on the ground... let me live?
Justification: जगु द्या की' said rhetorically conveys surprise and disbelief.

Text: या मुर्खाला कोणीही ट्रॉल करू नये....
translated_text: No one should troll this fool....
Justification: The insult "मुर्ख" (fool) directly expresses anger and irritation.

Text: तरी पण तुझ्या आईची डांग
translated_text: But your mother's ass
Justification: The phrase is vulgar and disrespectful, expressing strong disgust.

Text: “बीएमसी आयुक्त चहल शिंदे-फडणवीस सरकारला घाबरत आहेत, त्यामुळे…”, लटकेंच्या उमेदवारीवरून किशोरी पेडणेकरांचा गंभीर आरोप
translated_text: “BMC Commissioner Chahal is afraid of the Shinde-Fadnavis government, therefore…”, Kishori Pednekar’s serious allegation on Latke’s candidacy
Justification: Despite the accusation, the tone is political and calculated, thus neutral.

Text: अंगुर मिळत आहे तर घेत नाही लंगूर
translated_text: If you are getting grapes, the langur will not take them.
Justification: The idiomatic phrase adds sarcasm but lacks strong emotional content.

Text: लोकं मूर्ख आहेत का? ला सरकारचा कालावधी संपणार आहे हा तान्या राजीनामा देणार आहे.
translated_text: Are people stupid? Tanya is going to resign as the government's term is about to end.
Justification: Use of "मूर्ख" (stupid) and frustration in tone shows anger.

Text: पवारसाहेब ला माढ्यातून पळून का गेले ? ते पहिले सागं चाट्या
translated_text: Why did Pawar Saheb run away from Madhya? He licked the first straw.
Justification: The unexpected accusation and tone show surprise.

Text: ... तो नासला नाही तो पहिल्यापासून नासकाच आहे..
translated_text: ... It's not ruined, it's been ruined from the beginning..
Justification: नासकाच (rotten from start) evokes despair and sadness.

Text: आता कुठे गेलं तुमचं बेगडी हिंदूत्व ? ?
translated_text: Where has your Hindutva gone now?
Justification: The question is critical but lacks strong emotion; neutral tone.

Text: युवासेना ही आदित्य साहेबांनी उभी केलीय...तुमचा काय अधिकार आहे.
translated_text: The Youth Army was founded by Aditya Saheb...what right do you have?
Justification: Though confrontational, the tone is assertive and political.

Text: तुम्हालाही लाचार ही उपमा कायमची आहे
translated_text: You too are forever described as helpless.
Justification: लाचार (helpless) sounds demeaning but statement stays flat-toned.

Text: महाराष्ट्रासाठी महत्वाच्या प्रकल्पाला ब्रेक पण खर्चिक, अनावश्यक बुलेट ट्रेन मात्र पाहिजे
translated_text: Important project for Maharashtra needs a break but costly, unnecessary bullet train
Justification: Critique is sharp but stated rationally; hence neutral.

Text: त्यांनी शेण खाल्लं म्हणून तुम्ही एक पाऊल पुढे जाणार का?
translated_text: Will you go one step further just because they ate dung?
Justification: Sarcastic analogy without emotional outburst; neutral.

Text: हे काय झालंय...कोणाचं कर्म फुटलं आहे
translated_text: What happened...whose karma has been broken?
Justification: The unexpected situation leads to rhetorical questioning; evokes surprise.

Text: नारायण राणे, कृपाशंकर सिंग, प्रताप सरनाईक, यशवंत जाधव ह्यांच्या फाईल्स हरवल्या का ?
translated_text: Are the files of Narayan Rane, Kripashankar Singh, Pratap Saranaik, Yashwant Jadhav lost?
Justification: Question implies suspicion, but tone remains neutral.

Text: अक्कल गहाण ठेवली की अशी दुरबुद्धी सुचते...
translated_text: When common sense is sacrificed, such foolishness is suggested...
Justification: अक्कल गहाण ठेवली implies deep regret or loss of reason, indicating sadness.

Text: हे सर्व लहानपनीच केल होता आता देश संभाळत आहे- अंध्भक्त
translated_text: All this was done in childhood, now the country is being run by a fanatic
Justification: अंध्भक्त is used critically, but tone remains neutral.

Text: काय चुकीचं बोलले? अडीच वर्ष काय झोपा काढत होता का?
translated_text: What did you say wrong? What were you sleeping for two and a half years?
Justification: झोपा काढत होता indicates sarcastic disbelief, expressing surprise.

Text: पाच पर्यंत निट मोजता पण येत नाही का रे भक्तांनों
translated_text: Can't you count to five, devotees?
Justification: निट मोजता in mocking tone evokes surprise or disbelief.

Text: याला ज्याने पाठवले त्याच्या बुडात दम नाही
translated_text: Whoever sent this is out of breath.
Justification: Crude and mocking tone shows contempt, fitting disgust.

Text: त्यांना वकील मिळणे हे सुद्धा भारताचे दुर्दैव म्हणावे लागेल.
translated_text: It is also unfortunate for India that they are getting a lawyer.
Justification: दुर्दैव (misfortune) conveys disappointment and national sadness.

Text: हा गुंड पण कोणत्या पक्षाचा होता सांगायची गरज नाही...
translated_text: There's no need to say which party this goon belonged to...
Justification: गुंड (goon) used critically, yet tone remains controlled and neutral.

Text: चेष्टेचा विषय असलेली खासदार.. लोकं ह्यांच्या तोंडावर हसतात
translated_text: MPs who are the subject of jokes.. People laugh at their faces.
Justification: हसतात (laugh) and "चेष्टेचा विषय" (subject of jokes) express joy through mockery.

Text: आमच्या मुख्यमंत्र्यांनी काय घोडा मारलाय तुमचा, त्यांचा फोटो का नाही
translated_text: What has our Chief Minister done to you, why is there no photo of him?
Justification: घोडा मारलाय used sarcastically expresses surprise.

Text: हे सगळे खरं पण गद्दारी एका खुनशीची हा डाग कसा पुसणार?
translated_text: All this is true, but how can a traitor erase the stain of a murderer?
Justification: गद्दारी (betrayal) and "डाग" (stain) imply anger and blame.

Text: तो घरच्या कुटुंबासमवेत अशी असभ्य भाषा बोलतो
translated_text: He speaks such rude language with his family at home.
Justification: असभ्य भाषा (rude language) in domestic context evokes disgust.

Text: ह्यांच इंजान ट्रॅकवर यायच नाव घेईना आणि हे ईमान उडवायला लागलेत
translated_text: This engine won't even come on the track and it's starting to blow up.
Justification: Metaphor of failure shows frustration and anger.

Text: अनाजीपंतांची पिलावळ अजुन ही तसेच वागतेय, तेच निच “तिडे” चालुच आहेत.
translated_text: The grain farmers' plight is still the same, the same "tides" are still going on.
Justification: निच तिडे (low moves) suggests criticism, but the tone is reflective, hence neutral.

Text: पुण्याचा विकास पण गुजरात सारखा बुडाला.
translated_text: Pune's development also stalled like Gujarat.
Justification: Comparative and critical, but not emotionally strong.

Text: घ्या ही यांची अक्कल
translated_text: Take this as their advice.
Justification: Sarcastic, but not emotionally intense; neutral.

Text: त्या राकेश राम ऐवजी अबिनाश नादराजन किंवा बाळासाहेब जाधव ला का नाही खेळवत??
translated_text: Why not play Abinash Nadarajan or Balasaheb Jadhav instead of Rakesh Ram?
Justification: Expressed as a question; neutral.

Text: हे पत्र भाजप ने आपल्याकडून स्वतःला पाठवून घेतल... अख्खा महाराष्ट्र जाणतो
translated_text: BJP will send this letter to itself... the whole of Maharashtra knows it.
Justification: Claiming awareness without emotional escalation; neutral.

Text: चे विचार धारी, हसू करून घेतल राव
translated_text: Think of Dhari, Rao will make you smile.
Justification: Sentiment is positive but not expressive enough for joy; neutral.

Text: ते ऑगस्टदरम्यान कोकण आणि मध्य महाराष्ट्रात अतिवृष्टीचा इशारा..
translated_text: Warning of heavy rainfall in Konkan and Madhya Maharashtra from August to September.
Justification: Weather update with no emotional content.

Text: देव ईमानदार लोकांच्या सोबत असतो............... त्यामुळे आपले हे वक्तव्य कितपत योग्य आहे हे जनतेला ठाऊक.
translated_text: God is with the honest people............... So the people know how correct this statement of yours is.
Justification: Religious belief-based argument; neutral tone.

Text: तुमची आई गहाण आहे..... आरएसएस खाली
translated_text: Your mother is in debt..... RSS down
Justification: Insulting, but context is vague; neutral.

Text: तुझी लायकी किती तू बोलतेस किती ह्यावेळी नगरसेवक सुद्धा होणार नाहीस तू
translated_text: You talk so much about your worth that you won't even be a corporator at this time.
Justification: लायकी (worthlessness) used insultingly; expresses disgust.

Text: जास्त शहाणपण करायचे नाही बांबू पडतील मग समजेल
translated_text: I don't want to be too wise, the bamboo will fall, then I will understand.
Justification: Playful threat, lacks deep emotional tone; neutral.

Text: … आणि श्वेताचं हेच बोलणं त्याच्या मनातील संतापाला हवा देणारे ठरलं.
translated_text: … and Shweta's words fueled his anger.
Justification: संतापाला हवा (fueled anger) clearly conveys anger.

Text: हे खरे आहे की, महाराष्ट्रात अनेक अवैध स्थलांतरित नागरिक आहेत. यावर शासनाने कठोर कारवाई करावी
translated_text: It is true that there are many illegal immigrants in Maharashtra. The government should take strict action against this.
Justification: Policy suggestion with assertive tone; neutral.

Text: थापा आडनाव असणाऱ्या लोकांवर "विश्वास" ठेवायचा असतो का ?
translated_text: Should we "trust" people with the surname "Thapa"?
Justification: Play on words and surnames; sarcastic but emotionally neutral.

Text: माढयातून पळ काढून पळून गेलेल्या साहेबांवर अशी टीका योग्य नाही
translated_text: Such criticism is not appropriate for a gentleman who escaped from Madha.
Justification: पळून गेलेल्या and defense suggest disapproval, conveying disgust.

Text: ह्या आशा वागणुकीला घाणेरडे राजकारण म्हणतात... आणि हे असे राजकारण हेच करू शकतात.
translated_text: This hopeful behavior is called dirty politics... and this is what politics can do.
Justification: Critical but reflective tone; emotionally neutral.

Text: शिवरायांच्या भूमीत स्वपक्षीयांशी गद्दारी केली तर चालतंय का ?
translated_text: Is it okay to betray your own party in the land of Shivaji?
Justification: गद्दारी (betrayal) in a rhetorical question shows anger and moral outrage.

Text: तो पर्यंत हापापुन हापापुन आणि पिसाळून पिसाळून, पणं का होईना गद्दाराना चिकटूनच राहिन?
translated_text: Gasping and writhing till then, why still cling to traitors?
Justification: गद्दाराना चिकटून (clinging to traitors) implies contempt and disgust.

Text: तिरकीट ताथैया लेकाच्या गोंधळ प्रकरणामुळे गप्प बसला असेल. नायतर नाचत आला असता इतक्यात.
translated_text: Tirkit must have been silent because of the chaos in Lake Tathaya. Naytar would have come dancing at that moment.
Justification: Commentary with light sarcasm; neutral.

Text: भारतच नाही तर देशांनी नोंद केली आहे ... गद्दार म्हणून .
translated_text: Not only India but countries have recorded... as traitors.
Justification: गद्दार is harsh, but the tone is descriptive—neutral.

Text: आपण तीन बुटक्या माणसांचे फोटो लाऊ हा बाळा, गप उगी उगी.
translated_text: Let's take a picture of three short people, baby, talk big.
Justification: बुटक्या used mockingly, but humor dominates; neutral.

Text: तु पण अडकणार स्वाभिमान विकणारांनी आम्हाला शिकवू नये
translated_text: You too will get stuck, those who sell self-respect should not teach us.
Justification: स्वाभिमान विकणारांनी is harsh, but sentiment remains restrained.

Text: अंधभक्तांना काम भेटलं बंडखोरांच्या मेळावात तारखेला गर्दी जमवून /- रुपयांत भाडोत्री कार्यकर्ते देण्याचं...
translated_text: Blind devotees got a job to gather a crowd at the rebels' gathering on a certain date and pay mercenary workers for /- rupees...
Justification: अंधभक्तांना काम highlights routine political crowd-gathering without emotional charge, so neutral.

Text: सत्तेत असताना मोठी भरती होणे शक्य नाही... सगळ्या जागा च्या निडणुकांपूर्वी येतील..
translated_text: It is not possible to have a big recruitment while in power... All the seats will come before the elections..
Justification: The phrase "मोठी भरती होणे शक्य नाही" is a factual comment, neutral in sentiment.

Text: मराठी मराठी करून मराठी माणसाला च खड्ड्यात घातले
translated_text: Marathi Marathi people are being thrown into a pit by doing Marathi.
Justification: The phrase "खड्ड्यात घातले" (thrown into a pit) expresses disgust at the situation.

Text: पण असल्या लोकांना सामोरं जाऊन सर्वांसमोर कोलणारा माणूस फडणवीसच
translated_text: But the only person who can confront such people and humiliate them in front of everyone is Fadnavis.
Justification: कोलणारा माणूस (one who humiliates) signals contempt and disgust.

Text: अरे भाऊ पहिलाच उमेदवार उभा नाही करायचं होत ना,,कशाला ड्रामा करत आहात.
translated_text: Hey brother, you didn't want to stand as the first candidate, why are you creating drama?
Justification: The rhetorical question "कशाला ड्रामा" (why the drama?) implies exasperation and surprise.

Text: खरेच आहे ते...इतिहास बघा...हे काय..वाकड तोंडे काय.... स्वबळावर कधी सत्ता मिळवली?..
translated_text: It's true...look at history...what is this...what are these crooked mouths....when did they ever gain power on their own?..
Justification: The questioning and sarcastic tone reflect surprise.

Text: बाणावरून तुझ्या उद्धवला मशालीवर यावं लागलं यातच तुमची हार आहे राहुल्या..
translated_text: Your defeat, Rahul, is that your Uddhav had to come to the torch from the arrow.
Justification: A jibe, but stated flatly — neutral.

Text: सर्वांनी लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे..
translated_text: Everyone, remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: Motivational but not emotional — neutral.

Text: बंडला मारत फिरत होते का?
translated_text: Were you going around killing Bundala?
Justification: Questioning — neutral.

Text: पुण्यासारख्या जागतिक पातळीवर महत्वाच्या असणाऱ्या शहरात असे चित्र निर्माण होणे हे अत्यंत दुर्दैवी आहे.
translated_text: It is extremely unfortunate that such a picture has emerged in a globally important city like Pune.
Justification: अत्यंत दुर्दैवी (extremely unfortunate) conveys sadness.

Text: गद्दारांनां पुन्हा पुन्हा आठवण करून द्यावी लागते कारण गद्दार हे गद्दारच असतात.
translated_text: Traitors need to be reminded again and again because traitors are traitors.
Justification: गद्दार (traitor) repeated to express contempt — disgust.

Text: घरात एक तरी शाहणं माणूस पाहिजे होतं लका
translated_text: I needed at least one good man in the house, Lucka.
Justification: Commentary without strong emotional weight — neutral.

Text: भाजपच्या राजवटीत दिवसेंदिवस भाव वाढत असून सर्वसामान्यांचे जीवनही दयनीय होत आहे.
translated_text: Under the BJP rule, prices are increasing day by day and the lives of the common man are becoming miserable.
Justification: दयनीय (miserable) conveys sadness.

Text: हा व्हीडीओ प्रूफ....अंधभक्त आपल्याच दुनियेत जगत असतात
translated_text: This video is proof....blind devotees live in their own world.
Justification: Critique, but stated plainly — neutral.

Text: पुणे हादरलं..पुण्यात स्पर्धा परिक्षेची करत होता तयारी अन अचानक..
translated_text: Pune was shaken..I was preparing for a competitive exam in Pune and suddenly..
Justification: The abruptness and context suggest fear or anxiety.

Text: साहेब आपलं सरकार असताना का नाही विषय मांडलात काम लवकर झालं असतं
translated_text: Sir, why didn't you raise the issue when we were in power? The work would have been done sooner.
Justification: Criticism without strong emotion — neutral.

Text: पहिली आग यांच्याच घरात लागणार आहे विधानसभा निवडणुकीत
translated_text: The first fire will be in his own house in the assembly elections.
Justification: Metaphorical criticism — neutral.

Text: आधीच प्रदुषण वाडवुन ठेवलय ह्या लोकांनी ...मा वि आ करुन...
translated_text: These people have already spread the pollution...
Justification: Blaming with frustration — anger.

Text: अगोदर ही पोस्ट काढा आणी मराठीत जन जागृती करा
translated_text: First remove this post and create public awareness in Marathi.
Justification: Instructional suggestion — neutral.

Text: न्यायमूर्ती च असे म्हणत असतील तर निवडणूक आयोग च काय
translated_text: If the judges are saying this, then what about the Election Commission?
Justification: Critical question but not emotionally intense — neutral.

Text: हे प्रश्न आपण जर आपण विचारले तर अळंम टळंम करतात. उत्तर नसतं ना कारण.
translated_text: If we ask these questions, they will be confused. Because there is no answer.
Justification: Accusation of avoidance — neutral.

Text: कशात किती टक्के खायचे हे ठरवते का महापालिका ?
translated_text: Does the municipality decide what percentage of food should be consumed?
Justification: Satirical questioning — neutral.

Text: मेहबूबा मुफ्ती च्या लोटांगण घातले होते तेव्हा हिंदूत्व कुठे गेले होते केशवराव.
translated_text: Where had Hinduism gone when Mehbooba Mufti was bowing down to him, Keshav Rao?
Justification: Blame stated rhetorically — neutral.

Text: मी अंतराळवीर आहे, पृथ्वीवर येण्यासाठी पैसे हवेत, महिलेला लाखोंचा गंडा…
translated_text: I am an astronaut, I need money to come to Earth, the woman is being robbed of millions...
Justification: Sarcastic frustration — anger.

Text: विकून खाल्ली लोकमत वाल्यांनी आणि ने पण
translated_text: The people of Lokmat sold it and ate it, and they also
Justification: Corruption implication — neutral.

Text: तुम्ही अशी बाजू घेताय त्याची तर मला तुमच्यावर शंका येऊ राहिलीय भाऊ
translated_text: If you take such a stand, I'm starting to doubt you, brother.
Justification: शंका येऊ राहिलीय conveys fear or mistrust — fear.

Text: सुशिक्षित तरुण गप्प का? बेरोजगारीसाठी कोण जबाबदार आहे
translated_text: Why are educated youth silent? Who is responsible for unemployment?
Justification: Questions expressing surprise — surprise.

Text: उद्योगाला परतावा द्यायला आहे पण शेतकर्याला मदत करायला नाही का साहेब
translated_text: We have to give a return to the industry but not to help the farmer, sir.
Justification: Criticism framed neutrally.

Text: जगून काय उपयोग आहे का
translated_text: What's the point of living?
Justification: Existential expression without emotion — neutral.

Text: तुमच सरकार  .  वर्षे झक मारत होत का???? महाभोगस आघाडी
translated_text: You are the government. Are the years flying by???? Mahabhogas front
Justification: The sarcasm in "झक मारत" is critical but tone remains flat — neutral.

Text: असंच करा..! तुम्ही करायला घेतल्याशिवाय वठणीवर नाही येणार हे..!!
translated_text: Do it like this..! It won't come to fruition unless you do it..!!
Justification: वठणीवर नाही येणार implies irritation and force — anger.

Text: जे रिकत आहे. ...ते भरूण घया सर पहिले. लोकाना...चुतीया नंतर बनवा...सर
translated_text: What is empty. ...fill it first sir. People...make it later...sir
Justification: Insulting term "चुतीया" is used but tone lacks strong emotion — neutral.

Text: रावणाला पण अहंकार होता लंकेच्या सामर्थ्यावर!
translated_text: Ravana too was arrogant about the power of Lanka!
Justification: The word "अहंकार" directly expresses anger — anger.

Text: ह्याच्या घरच्या पोरी सासरी जाताना सोंग करतात का? समस्त स्त्री जातीचा अपमान आहे हा...
translated_text: Do the girls of this family dress up when going to their in-laws? This is an insult to the entire female caste...
Justification: अपमान and "सोंग" express deep disrespect — disgust.

Text: असे नमुने महाराष्ट्रातच का जन्माला येतात?
translated_text: Why do such patterns arise in Maharashtra?
Justification: असे नमुने expresses shock or disbelief — surprise.

Text: कोकणी माणसाला भावकीत गद्दारी पण सहन होत नाही तो ह्याला सहन करणार?
translated_text: A Konkani man cannot tolerate betrayal even in his heart, will he tolerate this?
Justification: Use of "गद्दारी" and "सहन होत नाही" shows contempt — disgust.

Text: विचार जर यांन कडल तर आपले मतदान कमी होतील तर काय करावे
translated_text: If people get swayed, our votes will fall — what to do?
Justification: Analytical reasoning, not emotional — neutral.

Text: काहीच कळलं नाही कृपया राष्ट्रभाषा मराठीत सांगा!
translated_text: I didn’t get anything, please say it in Marathi!
Justification: "काहीच कळलं नाही" + request shows urgency — fear.

Text: यावर्षी गाळ इमानदारीने काढला का? निवडणुक आहे म्हणून
translated_text: Removed dirt honestly this year? Because of election?
Justification: "इमानदारीने" with question tone reflects surprise.

Text: महाराष्ट्र विधानसभेची निवडणूक येऊ द्या मराठी माणसं पद्धतशीरपणे भाजप ची अवस्था करणार आहेत
translated_text: Marathi people will crush BJP in the election.
Justification: "अवस्था करणार" expresses aggressive intention — anger.

Text: अश्या फालतू पत्रावर कोणाच्याही डोळ्यात पाणी येणार नाही,
translated_text: No one will cry over such a rubbish letter.
Justification: "फालतू पत्र" conveys clear contempt — disgust.

Text: त्या दोन माजलेल्या आणि फुगलेल्या बेडकानाचा घटस्फोट झाल्याशिवाय काही उपयोग नाही
translated_text: Those inflated frogs are useless unless divorced.
Justification: Metaphor used sarcastically but neutral in tone.

Text: बस थांबवून काचेवर तंबाखू लावतात, त्यामुळे पाणी शोषले जाऊन अंधुक न दिसता स्पष्ट दिसते.
translated_text: They stop the bus and put tobacco on the glass, which absorbs the water and makes it look clear instead of blurry.
Justification: "काचेवर तंबाखू लावतात" is a factual observation

Text: मराठी माणसाला फसवणूक आवडत नाही. हा त्रागा, चीड आपल्याला शांत बसू देणार नाही.
translated_text: Marathi people do not like cheating. This sadness and anger will not let us sit still.
Justification: "चीड" directly conveys frustration

Text: हा पोरखेळ भाजपने चालवला आहे इतर पक्षांनी नव्हे....
translated_text: This charade has been run by the BJP, not other parties....
Justification: "पोरखेळ" implies immaturity but used analytically

Text: ताई जरा लक्ष घाला प्रत्येक पावसानंतर अवस्था वाईट होते चौकाची
translated_text: Aunty, please pay attention, the condition of the square gets worse after every rain.
Justification: "प्रत्येक पावसानंतर अवस्था वाईट" is a recurring civic complaint

Text: अफवाना पण चांगल्या मिळतात आजकाल
translated_text: Even rumors get good nowadays.

Text: डॉ राहुल गांधी ची तळी उचलला ठेवला आहे का तुम्हाला? स्वतःच्या पक्षाचा बोला.
translated_text: Have you raised your voice against Dr. Rahul Gandhi? Speak for your own party.
Justification: "तळी उचलला" implies bias

Text: हा सगळ्यांचा ट्वीट्स ख़ाली घान बोलतो.. याच / करा सगळ्यांनी
translated_text: This is everyone's tweets, they are empty.. Everyone should do this.
Justification: "घान बोलतो" indicates offensive or abusive speech

Text: आमचे पोट आम्हीच भरतो पण तुमचे खिसे मात्र भरत आहे हे दिसतंय
translated_text: We fill our stomachs, but it seems like your pockets are getting filled.
Justification: "तुमचे खिसे भरत" implies corruption, but stated analytically

Text: हे बेक्कार होतं...
translated_text: This was crazy...

Text: तुमचा माणूस काय तुरुंगाच्या संडासात माईक घेऊन बसला आहे का?? प्रतिक्रिया आलीच कशी??
translated_text: Is your man sitting in a prison toilet with a microphone?? How did you get the reaction??
Justification: "संडासात माईक" is used to express shocked disbelief

Text: चाटेगिरी करण्यात यांचा हात कोणी धरू शकत नाही ताई
translated_text: No one can stop them from cheating, aunty.
Justification: "चाटेगिरी" is slang but stated lightly

Text: आपली सत्ता आल्यावर मी पद घेणार नाही - राज ठाकरे
translated_text: I will not take office when I come to power - Raj Thackeray
Justification: "पद घेणार नाही" is a statement of intent

Text: आतल्या आईस्क्रीम एवढी पण उंची नाही तुझी
translated_text: You're not as tall as the ice cream inside.
Justification: "आईस्क्रीम एवढी उंची" is humorous but neutral

Text: कुत्र्याचं शेपूट कधी सरळ होऊ शकतं का?
translated_text: Can a dog's tail ever straighten?

Text: अरे भाजपच्या भड़व्या तुझ्या बोच्याला का आग लागली मग??? घालून बस
translated_text: Hey BJP buffoon, why is your head on fire then??? Sit down.
Justification: "आग लागली" used to question sudden reaction, evoking surprise

Text: याला सुद्धा त्या केतकर सारख खासदार व्हायची इच्छा आहे म्हणून अशी चातुगिरी करतोय.
translated_text: He wants to be an MP like Ketkar, hence the sycophancy.
Justification: "चातुगिरी" is mentioned without emotional load

Text: कशाला येड्यात काढता लोकांना... कमीत कमी आपल्या पदाचा तरी मान राखा...
translated_text: Why ridicule people... At least respect your position...
Justification: "येड्यात काढता" and "मान राखा" reflect irritation

Text: देवी सोबत असे फोटो टाकून हिंदू धर्माचा अपमान करू नका.
translated_text: Don’t insult Hinduism by posting such photos with the goddess.
Justification: "अपमान" signals cultural disapproval

Text: ही लोक पण मराठीचे मारेकरी आहेत.
translated_text: These people are the killers of Marathi.
Justification: "मारेकरी" conveys strong disapproval

Text: एकदा पसारा ही ठेवायला काही हरकत नाही
translated_text: No harm in keeping the setup once.
Justification: "हरकत नाही" makes it a neutral suggestion

Text: “ते काय ‘स्पायडरमॅन’ आहेत का?”, नाना पटोलेंचा उपमुख्यमंत्री फडणवीसांना टोला; म्हणाले “दोघांच्या वादात…”
translated_text: “Is he Spider-Man?”, Nana Patole takes a dig at Deputy CM Fadnavis; said “in their fight…”

Text: निवडणूक आयोग भाजपात विलीन होणार नाही. बाहेरून भाजपला पाठींबा कायम राहणार.

Justification: "पाठींबा कायम" said with accusatory tone

Text: धक्का बसला नाही का ? तुम्हाला नाही उद्धव गटाला ..
translated_text: Aren't you shocked? Not you, but the Uddhav group..
Justification: "धक्का बसला नाही का" conveys unexpectedness

Text: गद्दारीची परंपरा तुझ्या साडेतीन जिल्हाच्या साहेबांनी सुरुवात केली # गद्दार
translated_text: The tradition of betrayal was started by your three and a half district chiefs #traitor
Justification: "गद्दारीची परंपरा" shows betrayal and anger

Text: भाजपच्या उमेदवारी मध्ये काहीच दम नाही. म्हणून ही पळवाट.
translated_text: There is no strength in BJP's candidacy. Hence this loophole.

Text: हे बघा जागरूक नेते यांना सगळ्या गोष्टी माहीत असतात
translated_text: Look, conscious leaders know everything.
Justification: "जागरूक नेते" indicates dry sarcasm but stated neutrally

Text: थोडीशी चूक झाली आहे पत्रकार भाजप हे टाकायचं राहील फक्त पत्रकार टाकलं आहे आपण
translated_text: There has been a slight mistake, the journalist should have been removed by the BJP, but we have only removed the journalist.
