Text: हे बनवले आहे
translated_text: This is made.
Justification: The word "बनवले" is neutral and descriptive.

Text: उद्या संध्याकाळच्या गाडीने घरी जाणार आहे मी...
translated_text: I'm going home by train tomorrow evening...
Justification: The phrase "घरी जाणार" is informative and neutral.

Text: तुम्ही यशस्वी झाल्यावर स्वतःवर गर्व करू नका...
translated_text: Don't be proud when you succeed...
Justification: The word "गर्व" is tempered advice, not strong emotion.

Text: शांत बस मला लय काम आहेत दिवाळी झाली की ये
translated_text: Be quiet, I have work. Come after Diwali.
Justification: The phrase "लय काम आहेत" is logistical, not emotional.

Text: सगळयात पहिलं नाव म्हणजे आशिष जाधव.
translated_text: The first name is Ashish Jadhav.
Justification: The word "पहिलं नाव" is just identification.

Text: माणूस किती आतला आणि किती बाहेरचा...
translated_text: How much a person is inside or outside.
Justification: The metaphor is philosophical but neutral.

Text: हे जनतेचे सरकार
translated_text: This is the people's government.
Justification: The word "जनतेचे" reflects claim of representation, neutral.

Text: आपली माहिती वाहतूक नियंत्रण कक्ष, ठाणे शहर यांना आवश्यक कारवाईसाठी कळविली आहे.
translated_text: Your info has been reported to Traffic Control, Thane.
Justification: "कारवाईसाठी कळविली" indicates procedure, not emotion.

Text: विलेपार्लेतील नाल्यालगत झोपड्यांच्या पुनर्वसनाचा प्रश्न ऐरणीवर; मंगळवारी होणार बैठक
translated_text: Slum rehab in Vile Parle to be discussed in a meeting.
Justification: "पुनर्वसनाचा प्रश्न" refers to policy, not emotion.

Text: आता ते दोघं माकड उड्या तर मग झाडं तर सुचणार ना!!
translated_text: If those monkeys jump, trees will respond!
Justification: "माकड उड्या" is mocking, shows anger.

Text: ₹ कमी नाही होत $ खूप स्ट्रॉग होतो म्हणून
translated_text: ₹ not falling as $ is strong.
Justification: "₹ कमी नाही" is economic commentary.

Text: नाही हो काका तुम्ही अजून तरुण आहात..
translated_text: No uncle, you’re still young.
Justification: "अजून तरुण" is compliment but calmly stated.

Text: मंगळवारी अमावस्या आहे की पौर्णिमा?
translated_text: Is Tuesday Amavasya or Pournima?
Justification: "अमावस्या की पौर्णिमा" is a factual query.

Text: व्वा मित्रांनो, हे आश्चर्यकारक असेल, तुम्ही ते चुकवू नका
translated_text: Wow, this will be amazing, don’t miss it.
Justification: "व्वा मित्रांनो" expresses delight.

Text: भाऊ ही शकुंतला आहे माझी
translated_text: Brother, this is my Shakuntala.
Justification: "शकुंतला" is a name reference, not emotional.

Text: मग दर का कमी होत नाही?
translated_text: Then why isn’t the rate going down?
Justification: "दर का कमी" is economic, fact-focused.

Text: या मुंबई सोबत प्रामाणिक रहा...या मातीशी गद्दार पणा करू नका...सगळ्यांना पोसते ही मुंबई...
translated_text: Be honest with this Mumbai...don't be a traitor to this land...this Mumbai feeds everyone...
Justification: The emotion anger is triggered by the phrase "गद्दार पणा करू नका" (gaddar pana karu naka), meaning "don't be a traitor." This expresses strong disapproval and condemnation, indicative of anger.

Text: | इंग्लंडने टॉस जिंकला, भारत करणार प्रथम फलंदाजी
translated_text: | England wins the toss, India will bat first
Justification: The sentence reports a factual event (England wins the toss, India will bat first). There is no indication of positive or negative emotion; hence, it is neutral. The entire sentence, especially the factual reporting of "इंग्लंडने टॉस जिंकला, भारत करणार प्रथम फलंदाजी" contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: उद्धव ठाकरे गट शिवसेनेच्या तेरावा, वर्षश्राद्धाला पण एकत्र जाणार आहेत
translated_text: Uddhav Thackeray group will also attend Shiv Sena's thirteenth and annual Shraddha together
Justification: The sentence reports a factual event ("उद्धव ठाकरे गट शिवसेनेच्या तेरावा, वर्षश्राद्धाला पण एकत्र जाणार आहेत"), describing attendance at a religious ceremony. There are no words expressing positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral.

Text: गो-रक्षेच्या नावाखाली हैदोस माजवणाऱ्या भाजपवाल्यांना आता गायींचा विसर पडला का?
translated_text: Have the BJP people, who are creating havoc in the name of cow protection, now forgotten about cows?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question and expresses a critical observation rather than a strong positive or negative sentiment. While the phrase "हैदोस माजवणाऱ्या" (creating havoc) might suggest negativity, the overall tone is questioning and observational, lacking strong emotional expression.

Text: गेल्या अडीच वर्ष तुम्ही वसुली करा आणि आता भाषण द्या
translated_text: You have recovered from the last two and a half years and now you have to give a speech.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement regarding past actions and future expectations without conveying strong positive or negative feelings; therefore, sentiment is neutral. The Marathi phrases "गेल्या अडीच वर्ष" (last two and a half years) and "आणि आता भाषण द्या" (and now give a speech) simply describe events and do not inherently indicate positive or negative sentiment.

Text: आधी साहेब झोपले होते
translated_text: The master was sleeping earlier.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact ("साहेब झोपले होते" - the master was sleeping) without any explicitly positive or negative connotations, thus justifying a neutral sentiment. The phrase "साहेब झोपले होते" describes a past state without indicating any specific emotion.

Text: तिघांनी एकत्र संसार करायला काय हरकत आहे? हिंदू धर्मात द्रौपदी चे   नवरे होते
translated_text: What is the problem with the three of them living together? In Hinduism, Draupadi had husbands.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment with surprise stemming from the interrogative phrase "काय हरकत आहे?" (kay harkat aahe?), meaning "what is the problem?", used to question a societal norm and introduce a surprising comparison to Draupadi's polyandrous marriage.

Text: आता ठाकरे काय बोलणार सभेत सगळ्यांनी लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवयचा आहे
translated_text: Now what will Thackeray say in the meeting? Everyone remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentence expresses a call to action regarding a political entity ("बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवयचा आहे" - to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena). While it references a political contest, the statement itself lacks overtly positive or negative words contributing to either strong positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, it is considered neutral.

Text: हिचा पहिला नवरा पाकिस्तानी होता...आणि आता अजित गुलाबचंद सोबत राहते...यावरून ओळखा!
translated_text: Her first husband was Pakistani...and now she lives with Ajit Gulabchand...recognize it from this!
Justification: The sentence presents factual information without expressing a clear positive or negative opinion; hence the neutral sentiment. There's no specific word or phrase driving a strong positive or negative emotion. The statement simply relays details about the woman's relationships ("पहिला नवरा पाकिस्तानी होता" and "अजित गुलाबचंद सोबत राहते").

Text: लाचार मिडिया ' ला राहुल गांधी ची भारत जोडो यात्रा दिसतीये का नाही!
translated_text: Why doesn't the helpless media see Rahul Gandhi's Bharat Jodo Yatra?
Justification: The sentence expresses frustration and questioning, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "लाचार मिडिया" (lachar media - helpless media) implies criticism, but not enough to sway the overall sentiment from neutral. The question itself, "दिसतीये का नाही!" (distiye ka nahi - doesn't see?), further contributes to a neutral stance as it seeks information rather than expressing a strong opinion.

Text: विद्यार्थ्यांनी अधिक माहितीसाठी हे संकेतस्थळ:
translated_text: For more information about students, visit this website:
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply providing information ("अधिक माहितीसाठी हे संकेतस्थळ"). There are no sentiment-bearing words or phrases.

Text: ह्याना आता काय फरक पडत नाही सत्तेत आहेत महाराष्ट्राच्या जनतेनेच ठरावायच आता
translated_text: It doesn't matter who is in power now, the people of Maharashtra will decide now.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a fact about the people of Maharashtra deciding, without conveying any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "काय फरक पडत नाही" (kay pharak padat nahi - doesn't matter) contributes to the neutral sentiment by indicating indifference to who is in power.

Text: कोण आहे ही बाई ?
translated_text: Who is this woman?
Justification: The neutral sentiment arises primarily from the interrogative nature of the sentence "कोण आहे ही बाई ?" (Who is this woman?). The phrase "कोण आहे" (who is) simply seeks information and doesn't inherently express a positive or negative feeling. The emotion of surprise is linked to the sudden uncertainty implied by not knowing the woman's identity.

Text: मामीला गाणं म्हणायला बोलवल नाही का
translated_text: Didn't you invite Auntie to sing?
Justification: The sentence is a question about an invitation. The phrase "बोलवल नाही का" (bolaval nahi ka) indicates a neutral inquiry rather than expressing any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: चेहर्याचा पॅरालीसीस म्हणजे बेल्स पाल्सी, हा फिजिओथेरेपी उपचाराने पूर्ण बरा होतो.
translated_text: Bell's palsy, a facial paralysis, is completely curable with physiotherapy treatment.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily conveys factual information about Bell's palsy and its curability with physiotherapy. There is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. Key phrase: "पूर्ण बरा होतो" (pūrṇa barā hoto) - "completely curable", conveys a factual statement without any emotional loading.

Text: ती म्हण यांच्या साठीच बनवली होती बहुतेक.... "गिरे तो भी टांग ऊपर"
translated_text: That proverb was probably made for him... "If he falls, he will also stand up."
Justification: The phrase "गिरे तो भी टांग ऊपर" (gire to bhi tang upar), while potentially reflecting resilience, is presented in a neutral context without any explicit positive or negative connotations in the given sentence. It simply states the proverb.

Text: मुद्देसूद व प्रत्येकाला माहिती असावं असा एक थ्रेड
translated_text: A thread that is to the point and that everyone should know about.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a thread as "मुद्देसूद" (muddedsud - to the point) and stating it should be known by everyone. These are descriptive and factual statements without expressing any particular positive or negative feeling.

Text: जगाला दाखवण्यासाठी नाही पन स्वताला सिध्द करण्यासाठी योग्य जागेवर ऊभे राहण गरजेच आहे
translated_text: It is necessary to stand in the right place, not to show off to the world, but to prove yourself.
Justification: The sentence expresses a need for self-improvement and self-validation rather than external validation. The phrase "स्वताला सिध्द करण्यासाठी" (swataala siddha karanyaasathi - to prove yourself) indicates a focus on personal growth, resulting in a neutral sentiment as there's no explicitly positive or negative emotion expressed.

Text: जन्म घेतला मुक्त आयुष्यभर बंधनात.अजुनही स्वतःला समजून घेण्या साठी प्रयत्न करत आहे. श्रीकांत मोरे सोलापूर
translated_text: Born free, in bondage all my life. Still trying to understand myself. Shrikant More Solapur
Justification: The sentence expresses a state of reflection and acceptance of life's complexities. There isn't a strong positive or negative charge. The phrase "प्रयत्न करत आहे" (prayatna karat aahe - trying) suggests ongoing effort and a neutral, observational stance.

Text: हीच योग्य वेळ आहे
translated_text: This is the right time.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the Marathi phrase "योग्य वेळ" (yogya vel) translates to "right time" and simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: स्थानिक स्वराज्य संस्थांच्या निवडणुकीची सुनावणी पुन्हा लांबणीवर, दोन आठवड्यानंतर सुनावणी होणार
translated_text: Hearing on local body elections postponed again, hearing to be held after two weeks
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the postponement of a hearing. There is no specific word or phrase expressing positive or negative sentiment. The statement is purely informational.

Text: : ऑक्टोबर महिन्यात   ग्रह बदलणार राशी, या राशींना मिळतील अशी फळं
translated_text: : Planets will change zodiac signs in October, these zodiac signs will get the following results
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual event ("ग्रह बदलणार" - planets will change) without expressing any positive or negative opinion or emotion.

Text: हा सगळा गारमेंट इंडस्ट्री चा मार्केटिंग फंडा आहे.
translated_text: This is all a marketing ploy of the garment industry.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact or observation. There's no emotional language or sentiment expressed. The phrase "मार्केटिंग फंडा आहे" (marketing funda ahe) indicates a marketing strategy, but without any explicit judgment or emotion.

Text: तसच होते. माझही नव्हतं अगोदर मग स्वतःसोबतच घडलं मग कळलं
translated_text: That's how it was. It wasn't mine either. It happened to me first, then I realized.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the overall tone of recounting a past experience ("तसच होते") without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrases "माझही नव्हतं अगोदर" (wasn't mine either) and "मग स्वतःसोबतच घडलं मग कळलं" (then it happened to me, then I realized) describe a neutral sequence of events and realization without explicit emotional coloring.

Text: नागपूर:-    पंचायत समितीपैकी एकाही समितीत भाजपचा सभापती नाही...
translated_text: Nagpur:- There is no BJP chairman in any of the Panchayat Samiti committees...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting of a political situation. The phrase "एकाही समितीत भाजपचा सभापती नाही" (there is no BJP chairman in any of the committees) simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्हाला हिरवी म्हणायचं आहे का?
translated_text: Do you mean green?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question asking for clarification ("हिरवी म्हणायचं आहे का?" - "Do you mean green?") without expressing any particular positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मध्ये काम करणारे तर बिनधास्त मागतात पैसे
translated_text: Those who work in the middle ask for money without hesitation.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it describes a straightforward action ("बिनधास्त मागतात पैसे" - ask for money without hesitation) without expressing positive or negative feelings or opinions.

Text: मुंबई महानगरपालिका निवडणूक नजरेसमोर ठेवून निर्णय घेण्यात आला आहे.
translated_text: The decision has been taken keeping in mind the Mumbai Municipal Corporation elections.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact. The phrase "नजरेसमोर ठेवून" (najaresamor thevun - keeping in mind) indicates a motive but doesn't convey any positive or negative sentiment on its own.

Text: माझं चित्रं रेखाटणार काय? कौशल्य आहे म्हणून विचारतोय
translated_text: Will you draw my pictures? I'm asking because I have the skills.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily asks a question and states a fact ("कौशल्य आहे म्हणून विचारतोय" - I'm asking because I have the skills) in a factual and inquisitive tone without expressing any strong positive or negative emotion.

translated_text: Tweet deleted.....!! Why am I blocked...??
Justification: The surprise emotion is driven by the rhetorical question "का मी ब्लॉक झालो.....??" (ka mi block jhalo.....?? - Why am I blocked??), implying unexpectedness.

Text: हा लाभ निवृत्त कर्मचाऱ्यांसाठी लागू आहे का
translated_text: Is this benefit applicable to retired employees?
Justification: The sentence inquires about the applicability of a benefit, using the neutral phrase "हा लाभ निवृत्त कर्मचाऱ्यांसाठी लागू आहे का" which doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment. The question itself is objective.

Text: इस्लामी व्यवस्थ आणि डावी विचारसरणी कशी काम करते याची उत्तम उदाहरण म्हणजे तू
translated_text: You are a great example of how the Islamic system and leftist ideology work.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents an observation about the subject being an example of two ideologies, without expressing positive or negative feeling. The phrase "उत्तम उदाहरण म्हणजे तू" (uttam udaharan mhanje tu) - "you are a great example" - is observational and lacks inherent sentiment.

Text: मुंबई मध्ये पाणी तुंबल तेव्हा हे नाही आठवलं व्हा रे डबल ढोलकी
translated_text: When the water level in Mumbai was low, I didn't remember this, you double drummer.
Justification: The phrase "डबल ढोलकी" (double drummer) while potentially carrying a negative connotation depending on context, doesn't express strong sentiment in isolation here. The context of forgotten events during low water levels suggests criticism but not strongly positive or negative, hence neutral.

Text: शासनाला पाझर फुटेल का?
translated_text: Will the government be compromised?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about a potential future event ("शासनाला पाझर फुटेल का?") without inherently positive or negative connotations, leading to a neutral sentiment. The questioning tone and lack of explicit emotional language further support this.

Text: काळाची गरज आहे, आणि लोकशाही टिकवण्यासाठी तर नक्कीच
translated_text: It is the need of the hour, and certainly to preserve democracy.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because it states a fact ("kaalachi garaj aahe") and emphasizes the need to preserve democracy ("lokshahi tikavanyasathi tar nakkich"). There is no specific word or phrase conveying positive or negative emotion.

Text: भाग्य आहे हींदुत्वाचे शिलेदार सोबत दिसत आहेत. देवेंद्रजी सुध्दा हवे होते.
translated_text: Luckily, the Hindu ambassador is seen with us. Devendraji was also wanted.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because while it mentions "भाग्य आहे" (bhagya aahe), meaning "luckily," it's tempered by the subsequent expression of a missing person ("देवेंद्रजी सुध्दा हवे होते" - Devendraji was also wanted). The overall tone lacks strong positive or negative indicators.

Text: महाराष्ट्र मधील सरकार कधी असा निर्णय घेणार ?
translated_text: When will the government in Maharashtra take such a decision?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative nature and lack of positive or negative indicators. The phrase "कधी असा निर्णय घेणार ?" (kadhi asa nirnay ghenar?) which translates to "When will [they] take such a decision?" expresses a question rather than a feeling, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: स्वतःच्या अनुभवातुन शिका, त्याच बरोबर दुसऱ्याच्या अनुभवातुन ही शिका...
translated_text: Learn from your own experience, as well as from the experience of others...
Justification: The sentence expresses a balanced and practical viewpoint on learning from both personal and others' experiences. The lack of overtly positive or negative language, focusing instead on advice, results in a neutral sentiment. There are no specific emotionally charged words or phrases; the overall tone is advisory, exemplified by "शिका" (shika - learn), which promotes a neutral sentiment.

Text: छत्रपति शिवाजी महाराजांच्या नावाने कुणीही पक्ष नाही काढू शकत नियमाप्रमाने
translated_text: According to the rules, no one can form a party in the name of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj.
Justification: The neutral sentiment and anger emotion are driven by "नाही काढू शकत" (nahi kadhu shakat), which conveys a sense of prohibition and restriction, triggering frustration reflected as anger, but not expressing positive or negative sentiment overall.

Text: :संध्याकाळी भूक शमवण्यासाठी हे आरोग्यदायी ‘चवळी चाट’ एकदा करून पहा.
translated_text: :Try this healthy 'Chawali Chaat' to satisfy your evening hunger.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is simply suggesting trying a recipe. There's no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "संध्याकाळी भूक शमवण्यासाठी हे आरोग्यदायी ‘चवळी चाट’ एकदा करून पहा" (try this healthy 'Chawali Chaat' to satisfy your evening hunger) is informative and advisory, not expressing any particular emotion.

Text: अडिच वर्ष फक्त विमानात फिरत होता वाटतं?
translated_text: I think he was just traveling by plane for a year?
Justification: The word "फक्त" (phakt), meaning "just" or "only," implies a limited action or duration, leading to a neutral sentiment and a feeling of surprise regarding the nature of the action. The questioning tone also contributes to surprise.

Text: काही आठवणी, काही नाती आणि काही माणसं, कितीही त्रासदायक असले तरी आयुष्यभर जपली जातात.
translated_text: Some memories, some relationships, and some people, no matter how painful, are cherished for a lifetime.
Justification: The phrase "त्रासदायक असले तरी" (trasdayak asle tari), meaning "no matter how painful," indicates a negative feeling, but the subsequent "आयुष्यभर जपली जातात" (aayushyabhar japli jatat), meaning "are cherished for a lifetime," suggests resilience and acceptance, neutralizing the overall sentiment. The sadness emotion is derived from "त्रासदायक" (trasdayak).

Text: बँक-अप म्हणून कँश ठेवा ज्याने ही वेळ टाळता येईल
translated_text: Keep cash as a bank-backup to avoid this time.
Justification: The sentence expresses a practical suggestion ("कँश ठेवा" - keep cash) without strong positive or negative connotations, hence neutral sentiment.

Text: भक्कम  ही काय तटबंदी आहे का...???
translated_text: What kind of wall is this...???
Justification: The phrase "काय तटबंदी आहे का...???" (kay tatbandi aahe ka...???) expresses surprise, implying disbelief or questioning of the wall's quality. The "काय...???" (kay...???) specifically denotes the questioning and surprise.

Text: आणि भाजप प्रवेश केला की स्वच्छ होतात, कमळी चे वांशिग मशिन
translated_text: And once BJP enters, it becomes clean, Kamali's legacy machine
Justification: The sentence expresses a satirical and likely sarcastic viewpoint on joining the BJP, suggesting people become "clean" upon entry. While potentially negative in implication, without explicit negative words or phrases, the overall sentiment is neutral (0.0). There isn't a specific word that conveys a particularly strong emotion but the phrase "कमळी चे वांशिग मशिन" (Kamali's legacy machine) which uses a washing machine metaphor contributes to the satirical and potentially critical nature, stopping it from being positive.

Text: तरी पण     बाकी आहेत अजून
translated_text: But there are still some left.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the lack of strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "तरी पण बाकी आहेत अजून" (tari pan baaki aahet ajun) simply states that some things remain, without implying any particular feeling.

Text: एकनाथ शिंदे यांच्या बाळासाहेबांची शिवसेना या पक्षाला निवडणूक आयोगाकडून ढाल-तलवार हे चिन्ह
translated_text: The Election Commission has given the symbol of the Shiv Sena, the party of Eknath Shinde and Balasaheb, a shield and sword.
Justification: The sentence reports a factual event (election symbol allocation) without expressing positive or negative sentiment. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating positive or negative emotion. The entire sentence is simply stating information ("निवडणूक आयोगाकडून ढाल-तलवार हे चिन्ह").

Text: हा    वाला स्किनशॅट टाका ना कोणी तरी आमचे पण मनोरंजन होउद्या
translated_text: Put a skinshot of this one or someone, let us be entertained too
Justification: "मनोरंजन होउद्या" (manoranjan houdeya), meaning "let us be entertained," indicates a desire for amusement and enjoyment, directly contributing to the joy emotion. The overall sentiment is neutral as the statement is just an expression of wanting entertainment, not necessarily positive or negative.

Text: शेळीब्रेटी होतील सर तसं तर ते आधीच आहेत
translated_text: There will be goats, sir, but they already are.
Justification: The sentence expresses a matter-of-fact statement and doesn't contain any words or phrases conveying positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "शेळीब्रेटी होतील सर तसं तर ते आधीच आहेत" is neutral in tone.

Text: सारे भक्त सुत्ये का असतात?
translated_text: Why are all the devotees sleeping?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and expresses surprise due to the word "सुत्ये" (sleeping) in the context of devotees, implying an unexpected or unusual situation.

Text: मी मनातल्या मनात देतो
translated_text: I give it to you in my heart.
Justification: The sentence conveys an internal act rather than an external one. The phrase "मनातल्या मनात देतो" (manatalya manat deto - in my heart I give) indicates an internal feeling or intention, lacking any overt expression of positive or negative sentiment, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: सावधान! पुढील काही दिवसांसाठी असा आहे हवामान विभागाचा पावसाचा अंदाज
translated_text: Warning! This is the Meteorological Department's rainfall forecast for the next few days
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the lack of overtly positive or negative words. The phrase "हवामान विभागाचा पावसाचा अंदाज" (hawamaan vibhagacha pavasacha andaj - Meteorological Department's rainfall forecast) simply states a fact without conveying a specific emotion. "सावधान!" (savdhaan! - warning!) is a cautionary word, not necessarily indicating a negative sentiment, but a preparedness for a situation.

Text: ग्रामपंचायत काय असत माहिती आहे का
translated_text: Do you know what a Gram Panchayat is?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question: "ग्रामपंचायत काय असत माहिती आहे का" (Do you know what a Gram Panchayat is?). The phrase "माहिती आहे का" (do you know?) simply inquires about knowledge and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: झालं? म्हणजे
translated_text: Done? I mean
Justification: The phrase "झालं? म्हणजे" (Zala? Mhanje?) expresses surprise due to the questioning tone ("झालं?" - Done?) followed by a clarifying "म्हणजे" (Mhanje - I mean), implying unexpected completion.

Text: बाळासाहेबांना ज्याच्या हातचं जेवणं आवडायचं ते 'थापा शिंदेगटात का गेले?' यावर शिवसेनेची पहिली प्रतिक्रिया
translated_text: Shiv Sena's first reaction to the question 'Why did Thapa join Shinde's group, from whom Balasaheb used to love to eat?'
Justification: The sentence is largely factual and descriptive, reporting Shiv Sena's reaction to a political defection. The phrase "'थापा शिंदेगटात का गेले?'" (Why did Thapa join Shinde's group?) poses a question but doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment.

Text: महाशक्ती पण एका विधवा स्त्रीला घाबरते..!
translated_text: Even a superpower is afraid of a widow..!
Justification: The Marathi phrase "एका विधवा स्त्रीला घाबरते" (is afraid of a widow) contributes to surprise, as it is unexpected that a superpower would fear such a figure.

Text: सुपारी मिळत नाही तोपर्यंत नाही जागे होणार ते
translated_text: He won't wake up until he gets the betel nut.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact or condition for action. There is no sentiment expressed. The phrase "सुपारी मिळत नाही तोपर्यंत नाही जागे होणार ते" (supari milat nahi toparyant nahi jage honar te) is a factual statement and does not express any positive or negative emotion.

Text: शरद पवारांनी आशिष शेलारांबरोबर युती का केली?, संदीप पाटील म्हणाले…
translated_text: Why did Sharad Pawar form an alliance with Ashish Shelar?, Sandeep Patil said…
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative nature and reporting of a statement. There are no inherently positive or negative words or phrases. The phrase "शरद पवारांनी आशिष शेलारांबरोबर युती का केली?" (Why did Sharad Pawar form an alliance with Ashish Shelar?) simply poses a question, and "संदीप पाटील म्हणाले…" (Sandeep Patil said…) reports information without expressing any sentiment.

Text: दिवाळी आहे करायला च पाहिजे मदत
translated_text: It's Diwali, I need help.
Justification: The sentence expresses a need for help ("मदत") without conveying strong positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion, keeping it neutral.

Text: टॅग केलेल्या सगळ्यांना पाब्लो सरांन कडून फराळाचे निमंत्रण देण्यात येत आहे
translated_text: Everyone tagged is being invited to a snack from Pablo Saran.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is simply an announcement of an invitation. The phrase "फराळाचे निमंत्रण देण्यात येत आहे" (faralache nimantran denyat yet aahe) which translates to "being invited to a snack" is a factual statement conveying information, lacking any explicit positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्हिच राहिले होते सांगायच
translated_text: You were the only one left.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "तुम्हिच राहिले होते सांगायच" (tumhich rahile hote sangayach) simply states a fact with no inherent positive or negative connotation. It expresses a statement of who was left to tell, lacking any emotional coloring.

Text: ... शिवरायांच्या गड किल्ल्यांच्या संवर्धनाचे काम झालेच पाहिजे. जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: ... The work of preserving the forts of Shivaji Maharaj must be done. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: While "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra) expresses pride and cultural affiliation, and advocating for fort preservation is positive, the sentence lacks strong emotional cues to push it beyond neutral. The call for preservation is presented as a necessity ("झालेच पाहिजे") rather than an enthusiastic expression, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: जानवं' हे हिंदुत्व नसून एकमेकांना जाणून घेणं, जातीभेद, वर्णभेद न करणं हे हिंदुत्व आहे.
translated_text: Hinduism is not about 'knowing', but about knowing each other, not discriminating on the basis of caste or colour.
Justification: The sentence expresses a definition of Hinduism focusing on unity and equality, using the phrase "जातीभेद, वर्णभेद न करणं" (not discriminating on the basis of caste or colour) to convey a neutral and descriptive tone.

Text: हे लावून बघा भाऊ, नक्किच फायदा होईल आणि फॉलोवर वाढतील
translated_text: Try this, brother, it will definitely benefit you and increase your following.
Justification: The sentence conveys a helpful suggestion, with "नक्किच फायदा होईल" (nakich fayada hoil - will definitely benefit) suggesting a positive outcome, but without strong emotional expression, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: म्हणजे रामदास आठवलेना सर्व माफ आहे का?
translated_text: So, is everything forgiven for Ramdas Athawale?
Justification: The sentence is a rhetorical question implying possible unfairness, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "म्हणजे...आहे का?" (mhanje...aahe ka?) indicating a questioning or speculative tone, contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: शासकीय कर्मचाऱ्यांप्रमाणे कमीत कमी वीस वर्षाची अट टाका
translated_text: Set a minimum requirement of twenty years like government employees
Justification: The sentence expresses a proposition ("Set a minimum requirement of twenty years like government employees") without overtly positive or negative language. There's no emotional charge detectable. "शासकीय कर्मचाऱ्यांप्रमाणे कमीत कमी वीस वर्षाची अट टाका" is a factual statement, leading to the neutral sentiment.

Text: त्याला आता गावालाच पाठवायचा आहे
translated_text: He wants to send him to the village now.
Justification: The sentence "त्याला आता गावालाच पाठवायचा आहे" is neutral because it simply states a fact or intention without any emotionally charged words. There is no specific word or phrase indicating a positive or negative sentiment; it's a statement of planned action.

Text: तो हार्दिक पटेल भाजप मधे आला त्यावेळी शोक सभा झाली की नाही त?
translated_text: Was there a condolence meeting when Hardik Patel joined the BJP?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and questioning nature of "शोक सभा झाली की नाही त?" (shok sabha jhali ki nahi t? - was there a condolence meeting?), which lacks any explicit positive or negative emotional expression.

Text: यातील परस्पर सहमती आणि बळजबरी चे निर्णय कोणते हे शोधने संशोधनाचा विषय आहे..!
translated_text: It is a subject of research to find out which decisions are based on mutual consent and which are based on coercion..!
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it objectively states that identifying consensual vs. coerced decisions is a research topic, without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The Marathi phrase "संशोधनाचा विषय आहे" (subject of research) indicates a neutral observation rather than any specific sentiment.

Text: अगदीच बरोबर. विरोधकांनी एकत्र येऊन लढा द्यायलाच हवा आहे.
translated_text: Absolutely right. The opposition must come together and fight.
Justification: While the sentence expresses agreement with the opposition uniting and fighting, the phrase "अगदीच बरोबर" (absolutely right) doesn't inherently convey strong positive or negative sentiment in this context. It's a statement of agreement and advocacy rather than a display of intense emotion, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: भुजबळांनी भुजबळ नाॅलेज सिटीला महात्मा फुलेंचे किंवा सावित्रीबाई फुले यांचे नांव का दिले नाही...?
translated_text: Why didn't Bhujbal name Bhujbal Knowledge City after Mahatma Phule or Savitribai Phule...?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the interrogative nature questioning Bhujbal's decision: "का दिले नाही...?" (ka dile nahi...? - Why didn't [he] give...?). This implies an unexpected deviation from the norm or expectation, resulting in surprise.

Text: हा ट्रॅक्टर कोणत्या देशात आहे सांगा आणि बक्षिस मिळवा !
translated_text: Tell us which country this tractor is from and win a prize!
Justification: The emotion "joy" is indicated by the phrase "बक्षिस मिळवा" (bakshis milva), which means "win a prize," suggesting excitement and happiness related to the possibility of winning.

Text: सीट कोणाची होती ???
translated_text: Whose seat was it???
Justification: The sentence "सीट कोणाची होती ???" is neutral because it is a simple question ("Whose seat was it?") and does not express any particular emotion or sentiment. The phrase "कोणाची होती" (konachi hoti - whose was it) is a neutral inquiry.

Text: रिक्त पदे आहेत.
translated_text: There are vacant positions.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "रिक्त पदे आहेत" (rikta pade aahet), meaning "there are vacant positions," simply states a fact without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: : मातोश्री नाही तर राज ठाकरेंचं शिवतीर्थ सत्तेचं केंद्र बनतंय का?
translated_text: : Is Raj Thackeray's Shivtirth becoming the center of power instead of Matoshree?
Justification: The neutral sentiment arises from the questioning nature of the sentence. The phrase "सत्तेचं केंद्र बनतंय का?" (sattech kendra bantaay ka?) which translates to "becoming the center of power?" indicates an inquiry rather than a statement of positive or negative sentiment. The surprise element stems from the implied shift in power dynamic being questioned.

Text: दरारा हा वाघांचा असतो करणाऱ्यांचा नसतो त्याचा फक्त मुजरा असतो
translated_text: Fear belongs to the tiger, not to the doer, it is only a greeting.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it contrasts "darara" (fear) belonging to tigers with a "mujrra" (greeting) for doers. There's no explicit positive or negative connotation in the contrast presented; "mujrra asto" implying respect is balanced with "darara" belonging to tigers.

Text: रस्ते कशे बांधावे , शहर कसे रचावे हे महापालिका ठरवते
translated_text: The municipal corporation decides how to build roads and how to design the city.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the municipal corporation's responsibilities. There's no emotional language or subjective opinion expressed. The Marathi phrase "महापालिका ठरवते" (mahapalika tharavate - municipal corporation decides) is a factual statement and contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: भाई तुझ्या सारखं रिंगण तर नाही केलं ना?
translated_text: Brother, you didn't do the same thing as me, did you?
Justification: The phrase "भाई तुझ्या सारखं रिंगण तर नाही केलं ना?" implies the speaker is questioning the listener's actions with a hint of anger, based on a potential previous negative experience ("माझ्या सारखं"). Although the sentence can be seen as a simple question, the phrase "रिंगण तर नाही केलं ना?" hints towards something that the speaker perceives as potentially wrong or undesirable, triggering an emotional reaction.

Text: राजस्थानमध्ये काँग्रेसचं काय होणार असा प्रश्न निर्माण झाला होता. पण, रात्री अनेक घडामोडी घडल्यानंतर
translated_text: The question arose as to what would happen to the Congress in Rajasthan. But after many developments that night,
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily describes a situation and poses a question ("काय होणार असा प्रश्न निर्माण झाला होता") without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: भोंडल्याची भुलाबईची गाणी पण ह्या अश्या स्लो रॅप मध्ये येतात का
translated_text: Do Bhondla's Bhulabai songs also come in slow rap like this?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a question asking about the style of Bhondla songs; there isn't any overtly positive or negative language. The phrase "भोंडल्याची भुलाबईची गाणी" (Bhondla's Bhulabai songs) simply refers to a type of song and doesn't carry any inherent sentiment.

Text: तरी सरकार काही करत नव्हते?निवडणुकीची वाट पाहत होते?मधेच "भारत जोडो" अले?
translated_text: Yet the government was not doing anything? Was it waiting for the elections? In the meantime, "Bharat Jodo" was added?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it primarily consists of questions and factual statements about the government's inaction and the occurrence of "Bharat Jodo". There is no explicit positive or negative word or phrase that clearly expresses sentiment. The questions "तरी सरकार काही करत नव्हते? निवडणुकीची वाट पाहत होते?" and the statement "मधेच "भारत जोडो" अले?" are presented without any emotional coloring, resulting in a neutral overall sentiment.

Text: लोकांनी ओळखून घ्यावे ह्यांनी अंधेरीत का माघार घेतली
translated_text: People should know why they retreated to Andheri.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question about a political retreat ("माघार घेतली"), lacking overtly positive or negative phrasing.

Text: वीस पैशाच्या पुढे जे नाणे ठेवलेले आहे ते नाणे मी वापरलेले नाही
translated_text: I haven't used the coin that is placed next to the twenty paise.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about not using a coin ("मी वापरलेले नाही"). There are no sentiment bearing words or phrases in the sentence. The words "वीस पैशाच्या पुढे जे नाणे ठेवलेले आहे ते नाणे" simply describe the coin. Thus, the sentence is neutral.

Text: हे जिल्ह्याचे नाही तर विभागाचे झाले.
translated_text: This happened not at the district level but at the department level.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual change in scope ("विभागाचे झाले" - happened at the department level) without expressing any positive or negative opinion or emotion. There are no emotionally charged words in the sentence.

Text: यांनीच महाराष्ट्र राज्याला बदनाम करण्याचा प्रयत्न केला आहे का...?
translated_text: Have they tried to defame the state of Maharashtra...?
Justification: The phrase "बदनाम करण्याचा प्रयत्न केला" (badnam karanyacha prayatna kela), meaning "tried to defame," suggests a negative action and suspicion, triggering the emotion of anger and a neutral sentiment score, as it's a question implying accusation.

Text: स्टडी फ्रॉम होम होऊ शकते का याचा विचार करायला हवा
translated_text: You should consider whether studying from home is possible.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses consideration and possibility ("विचार करायला हवा" - vichar karayala hava) without any explicit positive or negative connotations. This phrase suggests a need for thinking about something, not expressing an opinion.

Text: सध्या समाधान नाही ती, त्यामुळे ट्विटरवर येईन तिला समाधान मिळत आहे
translated_text: She is not satisfied right now, so she will come on Twitter and get satisfaction.
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of satisfaction ("समाधान नाही") in the present, but anticipates gaining satisfaction ("समाधान मिळत आहे") in the future. These opposing sentiments contribute to a neutral overall sentiment.

Text: ,सुरूवात आपल्यापासून करावी हि विनंती ....
translated_text: ,I would like to request this from you first....
Justification: The sentence expresses a request, using the phrase "हि विनंती" (hi vinanti), which translates to "this request." This is a neutral statement as it doesn't convey any positive or negative emotion.

Text: नुकत्याच दिवंगत झालेल्या महाराणी एलिझाबेथ यांच्या आत्म्याला शांती लाभावी म्हणून
translated_text: May the soul of the recently departed Queen Elizabeth rest in peace.
Justification: The phrase "दिवंगत झालेल्या" (divangat zhalelya), meaning "departed" or "deceased," indicates a passing, contributing to the overall sentiment of sadness.

Text: आरे तुम्ही तर हारायच्या भीतीने राजीनामा च मंजुर करत नव्हतात ते काय होत
translated_text: Hey, you weren't accepting the resignation out of fear of losing, so what?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it questions past actions without strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "हारायच्या भीतीने" (haraychya bhitine - fear of losing) implies a negative motivation, but the overall tone is questioning and not strongly accusatory or emotional, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: बरं ते प्रसन्ना जोशी शोधत आहेत तुम्हाला..
translated_text: Well, they are looking for you, Prasanna Joshi.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The phrase "शोधत आहेत" (shodhat aahet - are looking for) is a neutral verb indicating an action without conveying positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मेट्रोच्या पिलरचे काम सुरू असताना बाजूला असणाऱ्या चाळींच्या भिंती आणि घर... यांच्याकडून
translated_text: While the work on the metro pillar was going on, the walls of the adjoining chawls and houses...
Justification: The sentence describes an ongoing construction activity. The phrase "मेट्रोच्या पिलरचे काम सुरू असताना" (metrochya pillarche kaam suru astana - while the work on the metro pillar was going on) is purely descriptive and does not convey any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पामतेल देतोय अस सांगायला पण लाज वाटत नसेल का वो तुम्हाला?
translated_text: Aren't you ashamed to say that you're giving palm oil?
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the phrase "लाज वाटत नसेल का," which expresses a strong feeling of disgust and disbelief at the speaker's lack of shame, indicating negative sentiment.

Text: तू करत नाहीस का फक्त फडणवीस फडणवीस..
translated_text: Don't you just do it, Fadnavis, Fadnavis..
Justification: The repetition of "फडणवीस फडणवीस" (Fadnavis, Fadnavis) expresses a frustrated or inquisitive tone but lacks explicitly positive or negative indicators, resulting in a neutral sentiment. The phrase itself does not convey inherent positivity or negativity, merely focus.

Text: ते सगळे ठीक, पण नक्की कोणता बाळासाहेब?
translated_text: That's all fine, but which Balasaheb exactly?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question of clarification ("नक्की कोणता बाळासाहेब?") without expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "नक्की कोणता" (which one exactly) is purely informational and lacks any emotional charge.

Text: न्यायमूर्ती उदय उमेश लळीत यांची भारताचे    वे सरन्यायाधीश म्हणून नेमणूक
translated_text: Justice Uday Umesh Lalit appointed as the 6th Chief Justice of India
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact - "नेमणूक" (nēmṇūk), meaning "appointment," describes a formal event without expressing any positive or negative feelings.

Text: निवडणूक झाली तर राज ठाकरे पाठिंबा जाहीर करतील असा अंदाज आहे माझा. बाकी बघुयात.
translated_text: I think Raj Thackeray will declare his support if the elections are held. Let's see.
Justification: The sentence expresses uncertainty and speculation, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "अंदाज आहे माझा" (andaz aahe mazha - it's my guess/estimate) indicates a personal opinion and a lack of certainty, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: म्हणूनच बोलावले नाही मी तुला अजून
translated_text: That's why I haven't called you yet.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact ("That's why I haven't called you yet.") without any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "म्हणूनच बोलावले नाही मी तुला अजून" (mhanunach bolavale nahi mee tula ajun) simply explains a reason for not calling, remaining neutral in tone.

Text: वजन घटवण्यासाठी रात्रीचं जेवण करता स्किप ? मग संध्याकाळी खा ‘ हे ‘ पदार्थ
translated_text: Do you skip dinner to lose weight? Then eat 'this' food in the evening
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question offering advice, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "वजन घटवण्यासाठी" (to lose weight) indicates a goal, but doesn't express a positive or negative sentiment on its own. The question "रात्रीचं जेवण करता स्किप?" (Do you skip dinner?) is also neutral as it simply inquires about a habit.

Text: साम दाम दंड भेद दिवस आमचे पण येतील
translated_text: The days of equality and difference will come to us too.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the overall tone of simply stating a future possibility ("येतील") without any explicit positive or negative connotations. The phrase "साम दाम दंड भेद" suggests a complex situation without leaning towards a particular sentiment and "दिवस आमचे पण" further maintains the neutrality.

Text: काय तुमचे विश्र्लशन.. कायपण यात कसला मोठेपण, आपणंच सगळ्या जगाचं मार्केट आहे..
translated_text: What is your analysis? What is the greatness of this? We have a market for the whole world.
Justification: The phrase "काय तुमचे विश्र्लशन.. कायपण यात कसला मोठेपण" suggests sarcasm and disbelief towards someone's analysis, diminishing its importance and implying negativity, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment instead of a strongly positive or negative one. The "कसला मोठेपण" questions the greatness or significance of something, undermining its value, leading to a surprise emotion.

Text: हे खरं पण तुम्ही काय करताय मनात राहण्यासाठी हेही महत्वाचे!!!
translated_text: This is true, but it is also important to keep in mind what you are doing!!!
Justification: The sentence expresses a balanced thought; "हे खरं पण" (he khara pan) which translates to "this is true, but" introduces a contrasting element, resulting in a neutral sentiment as it presents a conditional perspective rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: ते पहिल्यांदा विमानपत्तन हा शब्द काढा आम्हाला विमान पडल्या सारखे वाटते
translated_text: First of all, remove the word airport, it feels like a plane crash.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "विमान पडल्या सारखे वाटते" (viman padlya sarkhe vatate), which translates to "it feels like a plane crash," indicating a feeling of distress and sadness.

Text: तेवढं ते काकांना पंतप्रधान बनवायचं आहे, त्याचं बघा ना काय होतंय का
translated_text: They want to make that uncle the Prime Minister, look what's happening.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a desire and asks about the progress of an event without expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "तेवढं ते काकांना पंतप्रधान बनवायचं आहे, त्याचं बघा ना काय होतंय का" is a factual statement, lacking any overt emotional cues.

Text: अस लै वेळेस होत पुन्हा आहे आहे जाग्यावर आहे होत
translated_text: It's happening again, it's happening again, it's happening again.
Justification: The sentence expresses a repetitive occurrence ("होत पुन्हा आहे आहे"), but lacks any explicit positive or negative indicators, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: डॉक्टरांनी दिलेली प्रिस्क्रिप्शन तुम्ही वाचू शकता का?
translated_text: Can you read a prescription given by a doctor?
Justification: The sentence "डॉक्टरांनी दिलेली प्रिस्क्रिप्शन तुम्ही वाचू शकता का?" is neutral because it's a simple question about reading a prescription. There's no inherently positive or negative word or phrase associated with strong emotion or sentiment. It's a factual inquiry.

Text: कमळाबाई चेच लोक होती ती आदित्यसाहेबांचे अंदोलन बातमी दाखवावी लागनार नाही म्हणून
translated_text: Kamalabai's people were the ones who were the ones who should not be shown the news of Adityasaheb's movement.
Justification: The neutral sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the implied manipulation and suppression of news, indicated by the phrase "दाखवावी लागनार नाही म्हणून" (dakhavavi lagnaar nahi mhanun) which translates to "should not be shown, therefore." This suggests a deliberate attempt to control information.

Text: जे केले ते भोगावेच लागेल
translated_text: You will have to suffer for what you have done.
Justification: The neutral sentiment with sadness is driven by the phrase "भोगावेच लागेल" (bhogavech lagel), which translates to "will have to suffer" or "will inevitably face the consequences". This phrase implies an unavoidable negative outcome, contributing to sadness.

Text: संजू भौ यांना महिला आणि बालविकास विभागाच्या जबाबदारी मिळणार अशी अपेक्षा आहे....
translated_text: Sanju Bhau is expected to be given the responsibility of the Women and Child Development Department....
Justification: The sentence expresses an expectation ("अपेक्षा आहे") about a future event, making it neutral in sentiment. The phrase "अपेक्षा आहे" simply indicates an anticipation and doesn't carry any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: आणि इथून निघताना आपण का निघालो? हा पण प्रश्न पडतो.
translated_text: And when we leave here, why did we leave? This also raises the question.
Justification: The sentence expresses a reflective and somewhat questioning tone, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "हा पण प्रश्न पडतो" (this also raises the question) suggests a neutral contemplation rather than a distinct emotional response.

Text: बघू आता हे पत्र संस्कृतीत बसते का ते ?
translated_text: Let's see if this letter fits the culture.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it uses the phrase "बघू आता" (baghu aata), meaning "Let's see now," which indicates observation and uncertainty without expressing positive or negative emotion.

Text: घासलेट चोर आहे का कोणी इकडे
translated_text: Is there anyone here who is a gas thief?
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "घासलेट चोर" (ghaaslet chor), which translates to "gas thief." While potentially accusatory, in isolation and without context, it doesn't express strong positive or negative sentiment. It's more of a neutral inquiry or observation.

Text: तिथे केकेआर च्या किट बॅग का आहेत ? मॅच बीसीसीआय ची होती की केकेआर?
translated_text: Why are there KKR kit bags there? Was the match BCCI or KKR?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily asks a question without expressing any strong positive or negative feelings. The Marathi phrases "तिथे केकेआर च्या किट बॅग का आहेत ?" (Why are there KKR kit bags there?) and "मॅच बीसीसीआय ची होती की केकेआर?" (Was the match BCCI or KKR?) inquire about a situation and seek clarification without conveying any inherent sentiment.

Text: आता अटल थाळी येणार का, शेंडी थाळी येणार
translated_text: Will the Atal Thali come now, or will the Shendi Thali come?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it primarily poses a question ("येणार का") about the availability of specific thalis (Atal Thali, शेंडी थाळी), without conveying any inherent positive or negative emotion or judgment. The words "येणार का" simply inquire about future availability.

Text: असे हवेत ना
translated_text: Isn't that how it should be?
Justification: The phrase "असे हवेत ना" (ase havet na) expresses a general expectation or mild affirmation without strong positive or negative connotations, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: अहो ते सबसीडीचे होते. आताचे बिना सबसीडीचे आहेत.
translated_text: Hey, they were subsidized. Now they are unsubsidized.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a factual difference ("सबसीडीचे" - subsidized, "बिना सबसीडीचे" - unsubsidized) without expressing any positive or negative opinion.

Text: आपण गरीब होत नाहीये,शेजारचा श्रीमंत होतोय !!
translated_text: We are not getting poor, our neighbors are getting rich!!
Justification: The zero sentiment score with anger is driven by the phrase "शेजारचा श्रीमंत होतोय" (shejarcha shrimant hotoy - neighbor is getting rich), which implies a sense of resentment and unfairness, fueling the anger despite the speaker not claiming personal impoverishment.

Text: माझ्या शाळेत कधी हे शिकवल नाही म्हणून विचारतोय
translated_text: I'm asking because they never taught this in my school.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact ("माझ्या शाळेत कधी हे शिकवल नाही") about the speaker's past education and provides context for their question. There are no overtly positive or negative words indicating any strong feeling.

Text: “लटकेंचा राजीनामा स्वीकाराला नाही तर…..ठाकरेंकडे आहेत हे तीन पर्याय”
translated_text: “If not accepting Ladke's resignation…..Thackeray has these three options”
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it presents factual information regarding a political situation. There is no specific word or phrase indicating a positive or negative sentiment; it simply states possibilities ("तीन पर्याय").

Text: एकनाथ शिंदे जिलेबी केंद्र आणि देवेंद्र फडणवीस फाफडा सेंटर सुरू होणार वाटतं आता...
translated_text: It seems that Eknath Shinde Jalebi Center and Devendra Fadnavis Fafda Center will be opened now...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a potential scenario ("सुरू होणार वाटतं") without expressing positive or negative opinions or emotions. The phrase "सुरू होणार वाटतं" (seems to be starting) presents a factual statement.

Text: आपणी वंदेभारत!
translated_text: We are Vandebharat!
Justification: The sentence "आपणी वंदेभारत!" expresses a sense of pride and association with Vandebharat, but on its own does not carry a strongly positive or negative sentiment. "आपणी" (apani, meaning "we/our") sets a tone of belonging, which contributes to the emotion of joy, however does not indicate an overall strong feeling or assessment.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात फक्त आणि त्यासाठी कायम पुढें होती, आहे आणि राहील...
translated_text: Maharashtra has always been, is and will always be ahead only for that...
Justification: The sentence expresses a general statement about Maharashtra's forward-thinking nature. There isn't any specific word or phrase indicating positivity or negativity; the words "पुढें" (ahead) and "कायम" (always) simply describe a consistent state without implying a particular feeling, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: शेतकरी हे या देशाचे 'मूळ' असून ते मजबूत ठेवण्याची जबाबदारी आपली आहे.
translated_text: Farmers are the 'roots' of this country and it is our responsibility to keep them strong.
Justification: The sentence uses the word "मूळ" (mool), meaning 'roots', to describe farmers. While the sentiment is positive towards farmers, the word itself is used in a descriptive and foundational context without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: आता आपली वेळ! भारत जोडो यात्रा लवकरच महाराष्ट्रात...
translated_text: Now is your time! Bharat Jodo Yatra will soon be in Maharashtra...
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact and anticipation about the Bharat Jodo Yatra's arrival. The Marathi phrase "आता आपली वेळ!" (Aata aapli vel! - Now is your time!) is a general call to action and lacks any inherent positive or negative connotation in this context. Thus, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: गजू तुमचे किती आमदार आणि खासदार भारत जोडो यात्रेमध्ये सहभागी होणार आहेत
translated_text: How many of your MLAs and MPs will participate in the Bharat Jodo Yatra?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a factual question ("किती आमदार आणि खासदार" - "how many MLAs and MPs") about participation, lacking any emotional or opinionated language.

Text: ताई हा असा फोटो ठेवायचे कारण?
translated_text: Why would you put up a photo like this?
Justification: The phrase "ताई हा असा फोटो ठेवायचे कारण?" expresses surprise. The word "कारण?" (karan?) which translates to "why?" indicates the speaker's questioning and astonishment at the action, leading to the surprise emotion.

Text: तरीही नोकऱ्या देणारे प्रोजेक्ट गुजरातला का पाठवतात
translated_text: Why do they still send job-generating projects to Gujarat?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a question ("का पाठवतात") asking about the reason for sending projects to Gujarat, without expressing any positive or negative feeling towards the action itself. The Marathi phrase "का पाठवतात" simply inquires about the motivation, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: शहाजी तू आता निवडून येत नाही , आता कळेन झाङ डोंगर
translated_text: Shahaji, you are not getting elected now, now I will know, Jhang Dongar.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact and a future consequence without expressing clear positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "शहाजी तू आता निवडून येत नाही" (Shahaji, you are not getting elected now) states a likely outcome, and "आता कळेन झाङ डोंगर" (now I will know, Jhang Dongar) hints at a future event or realization, but neither phrase is inherently positive or negative. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: परिवर्तन हा सृष्टी चा नियम आहे,आणी सत्य हे कधीही लपविल्या जात नाही..
translated_text: Change is the law of creation, and truth is never hidden.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a general truth ("सत्य हे कधीही लपविल्या जात नाही" - truth is never hidden) and a natural phenomenon ("परिवर्तन हा सृष्टी चा नियम आहे" - change is the law of creation) without expressing any specific positive or negative feeling.

Text: ही मोठीच आहे
translated_text: This is big.
Justification: The word "मोठीच" (mothich), meaning "big" with an emphasis suggesting unexpectedness, contributes to the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: हातात चॉको फ्लेवर घेऊन उद्धव सेना आता महाराष्ट्र भर फिरणार
translated_text: Uddhav Sena will now travel all over Maharashtra with Choco Flavor in hand
Justification: The sentence describes a political party's action ("उद्धव सेना आता महाराष्ट्र भर फिरणार") without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment. No specific word or phrase indicates a clear emotion; it's a statement of fact or planned action.

Text: बरोबर आहे ना आता पक्षात घेऊन
translated_text: Is it right to take the party now?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it is a question regarding the correctness of a decision ("बरोबर आहे ना") without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The phrase "बरोबर आहे ना" simply inquires about agreement.

Text: शेवटचं काय ऐकु आल नाही
translated_text: I haven't heard the last of it.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "ऐकु आल नाही" (aiku aal nahi), meaning "did not hear," simply states a lack of audibility and doesn't inherently express a positive or negative emotion.

Text: काकचं मस्नात जायचं वय झालंय आणि काका
translated_text: Uncle is old enough to go to Masnat and uncle
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "काकचं मस्नात जायचं वय झालंय" (Uncle is old enough to go to Masnat) is a matter-of-fact observation about the uncle's age, devoid of positive or negative connotation in itself.

Text: तोंड पहा कसे केले आहे ते ह्या तोंडावरून तरी वाटत नाही
translated_text: Look at the face, I can't tell from this face how it's done.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and observational tone. The phrase "तोंड पहा कसे केले आहे ते" (tond paha kase kele aahe te - look at the face, how it's done) simply describes looking at a face and expressing an inability to discern something from it, without conveying any explicit positive or negative emotion.

Text: आपल्या हातावर,राखी बांधून घ्यायला का?
translated_text: Why tie a rakhi on your arm?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the interrogative phrasing "का?" (ka?), meaning "why?", which implies an unexpected or questioning stance regarding the action of tying a rakhi.

Text: बरोबर...कारण मोदी संघ भाजपा यांचा द्वेष करायचा हे फिक्स असते लिबरल गँग चे
translated_text: Right...because it is a fixed idea of ​​the liberal gang to hate the Modi team and the BJP.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while it mentions "द्वेष करायचा" (dvesh karaycha - to hate), it presents it as a fixed opinion or expectation within a specific group ("लिबरल गँग चे" - of the liberal gang) rather than expressing the speaker's own sentiment. The statement is an observation about a perceived bias, not an endorsement of hate itself.

Text: हे शेतकऱ्याचे नुकसान आहे कि साठा करुन ठेवलेल्या व्यापार्यांचे आहे.
translated_text: Is this a loss for the farmer or for the traders who stockpile it?
Justification: The sentence presents a neutral question, contrasting potential losses for farmers and traders. There's no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed; it simply poses an inquiry. The Marathi phrase "नुकसान आहे कि" (loss is it?) introduces the possibility of loss, but the question is framed neutrally, not expressing sadness or anger.

Text: काय करत आहे
translated_text: What are you doing?
Justification: The sentence "काय करत आहे" is neutral because it is a simple question asking "What are you doing?" and lacks any sentiment-bearing words or phrases. The phrase "काय करत आहे" itself is a neutral inquiry.

Text: चुप बसावे लागणार नाही भाऊ
translated_text: You don't have to stay silent, brother.
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of obligation to be silent, using "चुप बसावे लागणार नाही" (chup basaave lagnaar nahi - don't have to stay silent), indicating a neutral sentiment as it simply removes a constraint.

translated_text: Whatever, Mr....
Justification: The sentence "काहीही हा" indicates a dismissive or indifferent tone, leading to a neutral sentiment. "काहीही" specifically contributes to this lack of strong feeling.

Text: मोठी उडी मारण्यासाठी चार पावलं मागे यावच लागतं असे ट्वीटस् कधी सुरू करायचे????????
translated_text: When did you start tweeting that you have to take four steps back to take a big leap??????????
Justification: The overall neutral sentiment and surprise are driven by the rhetorical question "कधी सुरू करायचे????????", indicating disbelief or surprise at the supposed starting point of such tweets.

Text: असे अधिकार आहेत का तुम्हाला. ?
translated_text: Do you have such rights?
Justification: The sentence "असे अधिकार आहेत का तुम्हाला. ?" expresses a neutral sentiment. The phrase "अधिकार आहेत का" (adhikar aahet ka - do you have rights?) poses a question about authority, without conveying any explicit positive or negative emotion.

Text: निवडणूक ही व्हायलाच हवी विषय संपला
translated_text: The election must be held, the topic is over.
Justification: The sentence expresses a firm declaration that the election must occur and the matter is closed. The phrase "विषय संपला" (vishay sampala) meaning "topic is over" indicates a neutral sentiment as it simply states the closure of discussion, without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: मग मुंबई महापालिका ठरवते का?
translated_text: So does the Mumbai Municipal Corporation decide?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual question. The phrase "ठरवते का?" (tharavate ka?) which translates to "decide/determine?" is a question formation that does not carry any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तडीपार &; फेकू हे शब्द अजून हि पहिल्या आणि दुसऱ्या नंबर वर आहेत..
translated_text: The words "Tadipar" and "Feku" are still at number one and number two.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence primarily reports a fact about the popularity of specific words ("Tadipar", "Feku") without expressing any positive or negative opinion.

Text: चव्हाणके म्हटला होता नीरज चोप्रा के पूर्वज भाला फेकते थे
translated_text: Chavanke had said that Neeraj Chopra's ancestors used to throw javelin.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about what someone said regarding Neeraj Chopra's ancestors. There are no emotionally charged words or phrases. The entire statement, "चव्हाणके म्हटला होता नीरज चोप्रा के पूर्वज भाला फेकते थे" is informational.

Text: राम मंदिर खंडपीठ मध्ये हे माननीय होते का?
translated_text: Was this honorable in the Ram Mandir bench?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual question and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "माननीय होते का?" ("was this honorable?") is posed as a query rather than an assertion of honor or dishonor.

Text: तुमचा पानाची साइज मोठी झाली आहे
translated_text: Your page size has increased.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the page size ("मोठी झाली आहे" - has increased") without any emotional or opinionated language, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: कमजोर डोळ्यांसाठी 'हे' उपाय जरुर करुन पहावेत...
translated_text: You must try these remedies for weak eyes...
Justification: The sentence lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The word "कमजोर" (kamajor - weak) suggests a problem, but the overall tone is neutral, simply suggesting remedies.

Text: भाजप च आणि मोदी च भ्रष्टचार मुक्ता अभियान हेच आहे का..?
translated_text: Is this what BJP and Modi's corruption-free campaign is all about?
Justification: The sentence expresses doubt about the BJP and Modi's claim of a corruption-free campaign. The questioning tone, implied by the phrase "आहे का..?", suggests skepticism and prevents the sentence from expressing a strong positive or negative sentiment, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: जोपर्यंत पाऊस थांबत नाही तोपर्यंत लेक्चर होणार नाही
translated_text: There will be no lecture until the rain stops.
Justification: The sentence conveys a factual statement about a lecture's cancellation based on weather conditions. The Marathi phrase "जोपर्यंत पाऊस थांबत नाही तोपर्यंत लेक्चर होणार नाही" (there will be no lecture until the rain stops) expresses a conditional relationship without any subjective feeling or opinion, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: " " निवडणुक चिन्ह म्हणून वापरला तर चालेल का? घटनातज्ञांनी मार्गदर्शन करावे...
translated_text: " " Will it work if used as an election symbol? Constitutional experts should guide...
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about the permissibility of using something as an election symbol, indicated by the phrase "चालेल का?", which signifies a query and lacks any inherent emotional or opinionated content. This leads to a neutral sentiment.

Text: कमी आहे काय तुमचं वजन ..
translated_text: Are you underweight?
Justification: The sentence "कमी आहे काय तुमचं वजन .." is neutral as it's a simple question about weight ("वजन"). The phrase "कमी आहे काय" (kamee aahe kaay) meaning "is it less?" or "are you underweight?" is a factual inquiry and lacks any inherent positive or negative emotional charge.

Text: आता असे पण विनोद.....स्पृहा मॅम.
translated_text: Now that's a joke.....Spruha ma'am.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence "आता असे पण विनोद.....स्पृहा मॅम" simply states "Now that's a joke.....Spruha ma'am" with the word "विनोद" (vinod), meaning joke, not expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: पण, माझी लागली
translated_text: But, I got it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple acquisition of something without any strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "माझी लागली" (majhi lagli) indicates that the speaker obtained something, which is neutral.

Text: असे आहेत हे
translated_text: These are like this.
Justification: The sentence "असे आहेत हे" (ase aahet he) is neutral because it simply describes a state without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "असे आहेत" (ase aahet) indicates a neutral observation or description, lending to the overall neutral sentiment.

Text: कसला अमृत महोत्सव?हे वर्ष स्वातंत्र्याचा अमृत महोत्सवाचे आहे.
translated_text: What kind of Amrit Mahotsav? This year is the Amrit Mahotsav of Independence.
Justification: The phrase "कसला अमृत महोत्सव?" expresses skepticism or questioning, neutralizing the overall sentiment. While "अमृत महोत्सव" itself might be positive, the interrogative tone implied by "कसला" (what kind of?) negates that positive association.

Text: सर तुम्ही भाजपचं प्रवक्तेपद घेऊन टाका आता
translated_text: Sir, you should take the post of BJP spokesperson now.
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion/opinion rather than an emotion. "सर तुम्ही भाजपचं प्रवक्तेपद घेऊन टाका आता" is a statement about a possible future action, lacking strong positive or negative words that would suggest sentiment. The phrase "घेऊन टाका आता" (should take now) is neutral in tone and simply makes a recommendation.

Text: रात्रीचा खेळंच बरा होता
translated_text: The night game was good.
Justification: The Marathi word "बरा" (bara), meaning "good," indicates a positive sentiment. While the overall sentiment is neutral (0.0), the presence of "बरा" suggests a hint of positive emotion like joy.

Text: मशाल आधीच विझली आहे
translated_text: The torch has already gone out.
Justification: The sentence "मशाल आधीच विझली आहे" is neutral because it states a fact ("मशाल विझली आहे" - the torch has gone out) without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "आधीच" (already) simply adds temporal context and doesn't contribute to sentiment.

Text: म्हणजे हा काळा बदक नाही तर.
translated_text: So this is not a black duck.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement simply identifying an object as not being something ("नाही तर" - nahi tar - not so/not then), lacking any emotional or opinionated language.

Text: भावना महत्वाची आहे
translated_text: Feelings are important.
Justification: The sentence "भावना महत्वाची आहे" is neutral because it simply states a fact - "feelings are important." There are no specific words or phrases expressing positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "भावना महत्वाची" (feelings important) is a general statement.

Text: इतरवेळी पुणेकर हे पाळतात?
translated_text: Do Punekars observe this at other times?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question questioning the observance of a practice by Punekars, indicated by "इतरवेळी पुणेकर हे पाळतात?". It doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: दोन दिवसापासुन हेच सुरू आहे...
translated_text: This has been going on for two days...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the duration of an ongoing situation without any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "दोन दिवसापासुन हेच सुरू आहे..." simply indicates that something has been happening for two days. There are no words conveying joy, anger, sadness, or excitement, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: लक्ष्मीकांत बेर्डे, अशोक सराफ &; सचिन पिळगावकर हा आहे का .
translated_text: Laxmikant Berde, Ashok Saraf &; Is this Sachin Pilgaonkar?
Justification: The sentence is primarily a neutral question. There are no specific Marathi words or phrases indicating positive or negative sentiment. The sentence simply asks for confirmation.

Text: होय पिच्चर अजून बाकी आहे तो विधानसभा निवडणुकी नंतर रिलीज होणार
translated_text: Yes, the film is still pending, it will be released after the assembly elections.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about a movie release date. There is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase in the provided Marathi sentence: "होय पिच्चर अजून बाकी आहे तो विधानसभा निवडणुकी नंतर रिलीज होणार".

Text: ग्राउंड तुम्हाला दिलं होत तेव्हा काय होत
translated_text: What happens when the ground is given to you?
Justification: The sentence "ग्राउंड तुम्हाला दिलं होत तेव्हा काय होत" is neutral because it is a question asking about consequences ("काय होत" - kay hot) of a past action ("दिलं होत" - dila hota), without expressing any positive or negative feeling. It's simply seeking information.

Text: भारत आणि पाकिस्तान यांच्यातील कसोटी मालिका इंग्लंडमध्ये?; ने हे उत्तर दिले
translated_text: India vs Pakistan Test series in England?; gave this answer
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily presents a question about a potential cricket series location ("कसोटी मालिका इंग्लंडमध्ये?;") without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The phrase simply inquires about the possibility.

Text: आता तर पहाट झाली आहे मनाची.
translated_text: Now it is dawn in my mind.
Justification: The sentence expresses a state of awakening or realization ("पहाट झाली आहे मनाची" - dawn in the mind) which, while potentially positive in other contexts, is presented neutrally here without any explicit positive or negative markers. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: तुम्ही सुरक्षित आहे हे कळले , ते महत्वाचे
translated_text: It's important to know that you are safe.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "तुम्ही सुरक्षित आहे हे कळले , ते महत्वाचे" (tumhi surakshit aahe he kalale, te mahatvache) which expresses a factual statement about the importance of knowing someone is safe, without conveying positive or negative emotion. "सुरक्षित" (surakshit) - safe, confirms the safety aspect which doesn't elicit a strong sentiment or emotion.

Text: खरं काम तर राजसाहेब करता आहेत, बाकीचे फक्त....
translated_text: Rajsaheb is doing the real work, the rest is just...
Justification: The sentence is largely neutral. While incomplete ("बाकीचे फक्त...."), the first part praising "राजसाहेब" (Rajasaheb) is balanced by the unfinished and potentially critical nature of the second part, leading to an overall neutral sentiment. The word "खरं काम" (kharam kam - real work) is positive, but the open-ended nature prevents a positive sentiment overall.

Text: यमराजाला माहिती आहे का?
translated_text: Does Yamaraj know?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question asking if "Yamaraj" (यमराजाला) knows something, without any inherent positive or negative connotation. "यमराजाला माहिती आहे का?" is a factual inquiry.

Text: कुठल्याही वकिलाला विचारा, संजय राऊतांनी   रुपयाचाही भ्रष्टाचार केला नाही : सुनिल राऊत
translated_text: Ask any lawyer, Sanjay Raut has not committed corruption of even a rupee: Sunil Raut
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a statement of fact ("संजय राऊतांनी रुपयाचाही भ्रष्टाचार केला नाही") presented as someone else's opinion, lacking overtly positive or negative connotations. The phrase "रुपयाचाही भ्रष्टाचार केला नाही" (not committed corruption of even a rupee) denies corruption, suggesting neutrality.

Text: बघु तरी - काही होते का, नुस्ता विधान ?
translated_text: Let's see - is there anything wrong with that statement?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses uncertainty and a simple request to "see" what happens ("बघु तरी"). There is no strong positive or negative sentiment expressed. "बघु तरी" itself expresses a wait-and-see attitude.

Text: मध्येपण फक्त हिंदीभाषिकच बुरखा हिजाब घालतात का ?
translated_text: Are only Hindi speakers wearing burqas and hijabs?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the questioning tone implied by "फक्त...का?" (fakt...ka?), which translates to "only...?". This phrasing suggests disbelief or unexpectedness regarding the claim that only Hindi speakers wear burqas and hijabs.

Text: हे कुठाय बे
translated_text: Where is this?
Justification: The word "बे" ("be") in the sentence "हे कुठाय बे" indicates a casual and informal tone, which doesn't strongly express any particular sentiment or emotional state. While it can imply surprise depending on context, on its own it isn't forceful enough to indicate a stronger emotion than neutrality.

Text: : कोलेस्ट्रॉल कमी करण्यासाठी करा हे व्यायाम, मिळेल औषधांपेक्षाही जास्त फायदा
translated_text: : Do these exercises to reduce cholesterol, you will get more benefits than medicines
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it provides informational advice ("कोलेस्ट्रॉल कमी करण्यासाठी करा हे व्यायाम") without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "मिळेल औषधांपेक्षाही जास्त फायदा" (you will get more benefits than medicines) could lean slightly positive, but in isolation, it is largely factual advice.

Text: मिळणारच होता याला .
translated_text: He was going to get it.
Justification: The sentence "मिळणारच होता याला ." expresses a factual observation about an expected outcome. The phrase "मिळणारच होता" (milnarach hota - was going to get) indicates inevitability without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. Thus, it carries a neutral sentiment.

Text: आपण जहागीरदार आहेत का हिंदुत्वाचे ?
translated_text: Are we the lords of Hindutva?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question questioning authority ("जहागीरदार आहेत का हिंदुत्वाचे ?"), without expressing positive or negative sentiment directly.

Text: आमच्या कडे   रुपायात होती अशी कटिंग.
translated_text: We had such a cutting in rupees.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a past fact about the price of a haircut ("कटिंग") without any subjective opinion or feeling being expressed. The phrase "रुपायात होती अशी कटिंग" (had such a cutting in rupees) is a statement of fact, not an expression of sentiment.

Text: साहेब काही काही दाखल घेतली जाईल का.
translated_text: Sir, will something be recorded?
Justification: The sentence contains neutral language; the Marathi phrase "दाखल घेतली जाईल का" (dakhal ghetli jail ka) which translates to "will something be recorded?" expresses a question about procedure without conveying positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे एवढं सर्व करण्या पेक्षा________________ "मानसिक स्वास्थ" सांभाळणं हे सर्वात उत्तम !
translated_text: Rather than doing all this, it is best to take care of your "mental health"!
Justification: The sentence emphasizes prioritizing "मानसिक स्वास्थ" (mental health) which doesn't express strong positive or negative sentiment, leading to a neutral assessment.

Text: ... देशप्रेमी लोकांनाच असे महान देशभक्त समजणार ज्यांनी देशासाठी बलिदान दिले .
translated_text: ... Only patriotic people will consider those who sacrificed for the country as great patriots.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual observation about how patriotic people view those who sacrificed for the country. The phrase "देशप्रेमी लोकांनाच असे महान देशभक्त समजणार" expresses this sentiment without leaning towards positive or negative emotion, focusing on a definitional aspect of patriotism.

Text: ज्ञानात थोडी भर घालने गरजेचे आहे ...
translated_text: It is necessary to add a little knowledge...
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment as it simply states the necessity of adding knowledge. The Marathi phrase "गरजेचे आहे" (garajeche aahe), meaning "is necessary," indicates a factual observation rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: बाळासाहेब कोणते, त्यांना आडनाव आहे की नाही
translated_text: Which Balasaheb, does he have a surname or not?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question "आडनाव आहे की नाही" (aadnav aahe ki nahi - does he have a surname or not?), lacking any emotionally charged language.

Text: यासाठी तो गायब होता
translated_text: That's why he disappeared.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement without any emotionally charged words. The phrase "गायब होता" ( गायब होता - disappeared) simply describes an action and doesn't convey positive or negative sentiment.

Text: का तुमच्या कडेच असलं पाहिजे का
translated_text: Why should you have it?
