Justification: The sentence "का तुमच्या कडेच असलं पाहिजे का" expresses a questioning and somewhat challenging tone, but lacks overt positive or negative indicators. The phrasing "का तुमच्या कडेच असलं पाहिजे" (Why should you have it?) simply inquires about the reason, without exhibiting strong emotion. Hence, it is neutral.

Text: टोमणाबाई हा शब्दप्रयोग पण वापरला जातो ते विसरलात का?
translated_text: Have you forgotten that the expression "Tomanabai" is also used?
Justification: The sentence uses "टोमणाबाई" (Tomanabai), which implies sarcasm or a dismissive attitude, but without explicitly expressing strong positive or negative feelings, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: घटस्थापना कधी करावी? मुहुर्त असतो का? घरातील एखाद्या व्यक्तीच्या निधनानंतर किती दिवस देवकार्य करू नये?
translated_text: When should Ghatasthapana be performed? Is there a specific time? For how many days should one not perform any religious activities after the death of a family member?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the interrogative nature of the sentence, with phrases like "कधी करावी?" (kadhi karavi - when to do?) and "असतो का?" (asto ka? - is there?) indicating inquiry rather than emotional expression. The question about religious activities after death "किती दिवस देवकार्य करू नये?" (kiti divas devkarya karu naye? - for how many days should one not perform religious activities?) is also presented as a matter-of-fact query, devoid of explicit emotion or anger. The 'anger' classification is likely an error or misinterpretation, as the question is about rules regarding a very sensitive topic, not anger.

Text: आणि तू उद्धव च खाजवय होती का मध्ये
translated_text: And did you want to eat Uddhav's food?
Justification: The sentence uses the phrase "खाजवय होती का" which translates to "did you want to eat." While potentially suggestive in context, the phrase itself lacks inherent positive or negative sentiment, thus resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: असे काम महाराष्ट्रातील पोलिस कधी करणार नाहीत.
translated_text: The police in Maharashtra would never do such a thing.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "कधी करणार नाहीत" (kadhi karnar nahit) implying "never do" expresses a lack of expectation or likelihood of an event, rather than a positive or negative feeling. It states a factual (implied) assessment of behavior without conveying emotion.

Text: भक्ती आणि प्रेम दुसरं काय
translated_text: What is devotion and love?
Justification: The sentence "भक्ती आणि प्रेम दुसरं काय" expresses a rhetorical question, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "दुसरं काय" (dusra kay - what else) suggests an inquiry rather than an expression of emotion, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: वांगी बाई च्या गिऱ्हाईकांनि फिरकायलाच पाहिजे का ?
translated_text: Should Wangi Bai's customers be turned away?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question ("फिरकायलाच पाहिजे का?") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: वरचा श्लोक आदरणीय सोमय्या यांनी एकदा म्हणून दाखवावा...
translated_text: Respected Somaiya should show the above verse once...
Justification: The sentence uses "आदरणीय" (aadarniya), meaning "respected," which indicates a formal and polite tone, but does not express any strong positive or negative sentiment, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: कोण स्वामी आणि कोण नारायण हे सगळ्याणा माहित आहे..
translated_text: Everyone knows who is Swami and who is Narayan.
Justification: The sentence "कोण स्वामी आणि कोण नारायण हे सगळ्याणा माहित आहे" expresses a factual statement about common knowledge. The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "सगळ्याणा माहित आहे" (saglyanna mahit aahe), meaning "everyone knows," which indicates a generally accepted fact and lacks any emotional charge.

Text: पुर्वी ते कोणत्या पक्षाचे होते?
translated_text: Which party did he belong to before?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual question about past affiliation. The phrase "कोणत्या पक्षाचे होते?" (konatya pakshache hote?) - "which party did he belong to?" - is simply seeking information without expressing any opinion or feeling.

Text: पंडीत नेहरु आरएसएसच्या शाखेत जात होते का?
translated_text: Did Pandit Nehru attend an RSS branch?
Justification: The sentence is a factual question ("पंडीत नेहरु आरएसएसच्या शाखेत जात होते का?"), with no emotionally charged words. The presence of "का?" (ka - question mark) indicating a query contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: पूरण पोळी, ज्वारीची भाकरी आणि सोबत ठेचा पण मिळेल हुंड्यात, घेता का?
translated_text: You will also get Puran poli, sorghum bread and a piece of bread as dowry, will you take it?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's phrased as a question regarding dowry, which, while potentially controversial, is presented neutrally. The specific phrase "घेता का?" (Gheta ka? - will you take it?) frames the entire sentence as an inquiry rather than expressing a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: घराणेशाही चालणार पण बाळासाहेबांच्या विचाराचे तुझे पप्पा नाहीत आणि तू तर मुळीच नाही
translated_text: Dynasty rule may work, but your father doesn't share Balasaheb's views, and neither do you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement and comparison without explicitly conveying positive or negative feelings. The phrase "घराणेशाही चालणार पण बाळासाहेबांच्या विचाराचे तुझे पप्पा नाहीत आणि तू तर मुळीच नाही" highlights a difference in ideology, presented neutrally.

Text: चंदु भाऊ महाज्योतीने केव्हा पासून मराठा समाजासाठी काम करायला सुरुवात केली?
translated_text: When did Chandu Bhau Mahajyoti start working for the Maratha community?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual question ("कधी पासून सुरुवात केली?") seeking information about when a specific entity started working for a particular community. There is no sentiment-laden language present.

Text: घरात बसून कंटाळा आला असेल
translated_text: You must be bored sitting at home.
Justification: The sentence expresses a potential feeling of boredom but does not explicitly state a positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "कंटाळा आला असेल" (kantaLaa aalaa asel) suggests boredom, but the "असेल" (asel) indicates a possibility or assumption rather than a definite statement of feeling.

Text: सगळ्या गावातले लोक वांग्याची शेती कशी करायची हे शिकतील आणि करोडोपती होतील.
translated_text: People in every village will learn how to farm brinjal and become millionaires.
Justification: The sentence describes a scenario of learning and potential financial success; however, it lacks explicit positive or negative emotional cues. The neutral sentiment arises because the Marathi sentence focuses on a factual possibility ("शिकतील आणि करोडोपती होतील" - will learn and become millionaires) without expressing joy, hope, or any other specific emotion.

Text: लवकरच वाटेला येणार आहे हे चित्र
translated_text: This picture is coming soon.
Justification: The sentence "लवकरच वाटेला येणार आहे हे चित्र" is neutral because it simply states a fact ("लवकरच वाटेला येणार आहे" - coming soon) without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase doesn't convey any particular emotion.

Text: कष्ट करून जगणं, ही सुद्धा एक कलाच आहे. आज पहाटे विठ्ठलवाडी वृत्तपत्र सेंटर
translated_text: Living by working hard is also an art. This morning, Vitthalwadi Newspaper Center
Justification: The sentence expresses a general observation about hard work and life, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "कष्ट करून जगणं" (kasht karun jagna - living by working hard) is neutral in its connotation, simply describing a way of life.

Text: सभेत घुसलेला कुत्रा दिसतोय हा
translated_text: It looks like a dog has entered the meeting.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact. The Marathi phrase "सभेत घुसलेला कुत्रा दिसतोय" (sabhet ghuslela kutra distoy), meaning "It looks like a dog has entered the meeting," is a factual observation without any positive or negative connotations.

Text: आणि हा दोन वर्षा पूर्वी तोंड वर करून गेला असता... ओम शांती..
translated_text: And this person would have gone away with his face raised two years ago... Om Shanti..
Justification: The neutral sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "तोंड वर करून गेला असता... ओम शांती...", which implies a dismissive and disrespectful attitude towards death, especially given the context of "ओम शांती" (Om Shanti), a common phrase used for peace to the departed soul. The phrase suggests that the person would have died with arrogance ("तोंड वर करून"), which evokes disgust.

Text: लक्ष्मी प्रसन्न होण्यासाठी दिवाळीपूर्वी करा ही   कामे !
translated_text: Do these things before Diwali to please Goddess Lakshmi!
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it provides instructions ("करा ही कामे") without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling. The phrase "लक्ष्मी प्रसन्न होण्यासाठी" (to please Goddess Lakshmi) is devotional but doesn't convey any explicit sentiment.

Text: अश्या लोकांची कमी नाही आपल्या कडे पण..... भावी !!
translated_text: We have no shortage of such people, but..... future!!
Justification: The word "भावी" (bhavi - future) uttered with a slight pause and given the context suggests sarcasm and lightheartedness, indicating a sense of mocking amusement rather than genuine negativity. Thus, its use contributes to a neutral sentiment and underlying joy.

Text: वाल्या बापटासारखे घटनातज्ञ असे म्हणा...
translated_text: Say a constitutional expert like Valya Bapta...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply mentions someone ("Valya Bapta") and their profession ("घटनातज्ञ" - constitutional expert") without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The phrase "वाल्या बापटासारखे घटनातज्ञ" is a factual statement.

Text: मग दादानी फडणवीस साहेबा सोबत सकाळी सकाळी शपथविधी कशासाठी केला होता?
translated_text: Then why did Dada take the oath ceremony with Fadnavis Saheb in the morning?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a question asking about the reason for an event. The phrase "कशासाठी केला होता?" (kashasathi kela hota?) - "why was it done?" - is a question that doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मुंबईला हे लागु होत नाही, नाही का?
translated_text: This doesn't apply to Mumbai, does it?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the questioning nature of "नाही का?", which is a tag question seeking confirmation rather than expressing a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: कोणीतरी मुतायला गेलेत अस प्रफुल्ल पटेल म्हणाले होते
translated_text: Praful Patel had said that someone had gone to Mutlaq.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply reports a statement. The phrase "प्रफुल्ल पटेल म्हणाले होते" (Praful Patel mhanale hote) indicates a factual reporting of what someone said, without any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हो. ही आमची कुलदेवी आहे.
translated_text: Yes. This is our family goddess.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about a family deity. The Marathi phrase "कुलदेवी आहे" (kuldevi aahe - is family goddess) is a neutral statement of fact, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: मुंबईच्या निवडणूकीपूर्वी एकनाथ शिंदेचा धडाका, आतापर्यंत एकाही मुख्यमंत्र्यांना ही गोष्ट जमली नव्हती
translated_text: Eknath Shinde's outburst before Mumbai elections, no Chief Minister has managed to do this till now
Justification: The sentence describes Eknath Shinde's activities before the Mumbai elections, stating that no other Chief Minister has achieved something similar ("आतापर्यंत एकाही मुख्यमंत्र्यांना ही गोष्ट जमली नव्हती"). While it highlights his actions, there is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The language is factual and descriptive, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: हे कधी झालं.
translated_text: When did this happen?
Justification: The sentence "हे कधी झालं" expresses surprise due to the interrogative "कधी झालं" (kadhi jhale), which translates to "when did this happen?". This questioning of the timing indicates an unexpected event.

Text: काँग्रेस अध्यक्षपदी निवड होताच राहुल गांधींनी अभिनंदन केलं का? मल्लिकार्जून खर्गे म्हणाले
translated_text: Did Rahul Gandhi congratulate me on being elected as Congress President? Mallikarjun Kharge said
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question asking if Rahul Gandhi congratulated Mallikarjun Kharge. The phrasing "अभिनंदन केलं का?" (abhinandan kel ka? - did you congratulate?) indicates an inquiry, not an expression of positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुटलेल्या नात्यांपैकी बरीचशी नाती ही केवळ गैरसमजातून तुटलेली असतात.
translated_text: Most broken relationships are simply broken by misunderstandings.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral with a slight sadness tilt because the phrase "तुटलेल्या नात्यांपैकी" (tutalelya natyanpaiki - of broken relationships) evokes a sense of sadness associated with broken relationships.

Text: नाही कधीचं नाही काका आमच्यासाठी तुमच्या जीवनातला सूर्य तळपतोच आहे
translated_text: No, never, uncle, the sun in your life is shining for us.
Justification: While the sentence expresses appreciation, the phrase "नाही कधीचं नाही" (No, never) combined with the overall statement being a general sentiment rather than an expression of strong positive feeling, results in a neutral sentiment and emotion.

Text: तजेलदार त्वचेसाठी वापरा ‘या’ फळांचे मास्क
translated_text: Use these fruit masks for radiant skin
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply provides information ("Use these fruit masks") with the intention of helping with radiant skin ("तजेलदार त्वचेसाठी"). The phrase "तजेलदार त्वचेसाठी" (for radiant skin) is descriptive and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: अजिबात नाही. आम्ही आमच्या मुद्द्यावर ठाम आहोत. बेसन लाडू इज द बेस्ट!
translated_text: Not at all. We stand by our point. Besan Ladoo is the best!
Justification: The phrase "बेसन लाडू इज द बेस्ट!" (Besan Ladoo is the best!) expresses strong positive sentiment and joy due to the superlative declaration of enjoyment and preference for a specific food item.

Text: तो फक्त उद्धव चोळीचा अधिकार नाही म्हणून..
translated_text: It's just because Uddhav Choli doesn't have the right..
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment. The phrase "उद्धव चोळीचा अधिकार नाही" (Uddhav Choli doesn't have the right) simply states a lack of authority and doesn't express any inherent positive or negative emotion.

Text: हे गाणं आत्ता बघण्यासारखं आहे का एकांती बघावं
translated_text: Is this song worth watching right now? Should I watch it alone?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question ("आहे का", "बघावं") and doesn't contain any overtly positive or negative words. Therefore, it is neutral.

Text: अले दादा, पी एच दि ही बॅचलल झाल्यावल नाही, मास्टल झाल्यावल मिलते.
translated_text: Hey, Dada, you don't get a PhD until you've completed your bachelor's degree, you get it only after you've completed your master's degree.
Justification: The sentence is purely factual and informative, explaining the prerequisite for a PhD. The phrase "बॅचलल झाल्यावल नाही, मास्टल झाल्यावल मिलते" (bachelor झाल्यावल नाही, master झाल्यावल मिलते - you don't get it after bachelor's, you get it after master's) conveys information without any emotional coloring, hence the neutral sentiment and neutral emotion.

Text: ह्या सर्व्हेची विश्वासहर्ता काय आहे हे पण जाणून घेणे तितकेच महत्त्वाचे आहे...
translated_text: It is equally important to know what the credibility of this survey is...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it focuses on the importance of knowing the credibility ("विश्वासहर्ता") of a survey, indicating an objective assessment rather than a positive or negative feeling. The phrase "जाणून घेणे तितकेच महत्त्वाचे आहे" (it is equally important to know) further reinforces this neutral stance.

Text: पण बाळासाहेबांचे विचार एकनाथ शिंदे पुढे घेऊन जात आहेत!
translated_text: But Eknath Shinde is taking Balasaheb's ideas forward!
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment overall (0.0). The emotion "anger" might be associated with the implied disagreement/controversy surrounding the action of "पुढे घेऊन जात आहेत" (taking forward), suggesting a potentially contentious claim that may provoke anger in those who disagree with Shinde's interpretation or actions.

Text: “प्रमुख पार्टी कोण हे पाहावं लागेल?, असं निवडणूक आयोगानं म्हटलं”, शिंदे गटाच्या वकिलांचा दावा
translated_text: “We have to see who the main party is,” said the Election Commission, claim Shinde group’s lawyers.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the reporting of a statement ("असं निवडणूक आयोगानं म्हटलं") and a claim ("शिंदे गटाच्या वकिलांचा दावा") without explicit positive or negative language.

Text: मला तरी असं वाटतं की त्यांचा उद्देश केवळ हिंदू जनजागृती होता,
translated_text: I think their aim was only to create awareness among Hindus,
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a perceived aim ("उद्देश") of creating awareness ("जनजागृती") and expresses a personal opinion ("मला तरी असं वाटतं"). There is no explicit positive or negative connotation associated with these words in this context.

Text: अवडंबर केल्याने परमेश्वर प्राप्ती शक्य आहे का? -
translated_text: Is it possible to attain God by being arrogant? -
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0.0) and emotion is fear due to the questioning of whether arrogance ("अवडंबर") leads to God, implying a fear of spiritual inadequacy or misdirection if one is arrogant.

Text: वैफल्यामुळे आलेला हा व्यक्तिगत अनुभव आहे तुमचा. राज्यातील जनतेचा नाही.
translated_text: This is your personal experience of the failure. Not that of the people of the state.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact about a personal experience ("वैफल्यामुळे आलेला हा व्यक्तिगत अनुभव आहे तुमचा"). There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed; it simply contrasts a personal experience with that of the general public.

Text: बघा. काल दोघंही एकसाथ मीटिंग घेत होते.
translated_text: Look. Yesterday, both of them were having a meeting together.
Justification: The sentence "बघा. काल दोघंही एकसाथ मीटिंग घेत होते।" is neutral as it simply states a fact. There is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase. The words "बघा" (look), "काल" (yesterday), "दोघंही" (both of them), "एकसाथ" (together), and "मीटिंग घेत होते" (were having a meeting) are all factual and don't express any emotion or opinion.

Text: मवीआ सरकार महाराष्ट्राचा बाहेर होते का?
translated_text: Was the Maviya government outside Maharashtra?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. It asks a factual question, "मवीआ सरकार महाराष्ट्राचा बाहेर होते का?" (Was the Maviya government outside Maharashtra?), lacking any sentiment or emotional indicators. The interrogative nature of "का?" (ka?) contributes to the neutrality.

Text: काय  अरे हे काय आहेत
translated_text: What are these?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question ("काय अरे हे काय आहेत" - What are these?) with no inherent positive or negative words or phrases. It seeks information without expressing any feeling.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात चुकीला माफी नाही...
translated_text: There is no forgiveness for mistakes in Maharashtra...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because "चुकीला माफी नाही" (chukila maafi nahi) literally translates to "no forgiveness for mistakes," which is a statement of a rule or principle rather than an expression of positive or negative emotion.

Text: काही फरक पडत नाही
translated_text: It doesn't matter.
Justification: The sentence "काही फरक पडत नाही" expresses indifference, resulting in a neutral sentiment. The phrase "काही फरक पडत नाही" itself conveys a lack of concern or emotional investment, leading to the neutral emotion.

Text: आणखी सांगण्याची गरज नाही!
translated_text: No more need to be said!
Justification: The phrase "आणखी सांगण्याची गरज नाही!" (Aanakhī sāngaṇyāchī garaj nāhī!) implies exasperation and unwillingness to hear more, suggesting anger. The dismissive tone contributes to the negative emotion.

Text: संदिपान भुमरे हे (छत्रपती जिल्ह्याचे पालकमंत्री असतील.
translated_text: Sandipan Bhumare will be the Guardian Minister of Chhatrapati District.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact or a future event. The phrase "पालकमंत्री असतील" (palakmantri astil - will be the Guardian Minister) expresses a statement of role or position without any positive or negative connotation.

Text: अतिवृष्टीमुळं झालेल्या नुकसानीची पाहणी करण्यासाठी वर्धा आणि गडचिरोलीत केंद्रीय पथक
translated_text: Central team in Wardha and Gadchiroli to inspect damage caused by heavy rains
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event: a central team inspecting damage. There's no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi words "पाहणी करण्यासाठी" (pahani karnyasathi) meaning "to inspect" indicates an observational action, not a judgment.

Text: या वरून तुमची लायकी दिसते
translated_text: This shows your worth.
Justification: The phrase "लायकी दिसते" (layaki diste) which translates to "shows your worth" is not inherently positive or negative, but rather a neutral observation or statement.

Text: वर्ल्ड चॅम्पियन संघाला हरवलं पण नवख्या संघानं धुळ चारली, आयर्लंडनं उघडलं खातं
translated_text: The world champion team was defeated but the newcomer team was defeated, Ireland opened its account
Justification: The sentence describes events without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrases "हरवलं" (haravale - defeated) and "धुळ चारली" (dhool charali - defeated) indicate actions but lack strong emotional color, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: महाराष्ट्राचा मुख्यमंत्री म्हणून तुम्हाला कोण आवडेल? क्लिक करा आणि वोट द्या
translated_text: Who would you like to be the Chief Minister of Maharashtra? Click and vote
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question about preferences ("कोन आवडेल?") and encourages participation ("क्लिक करा आणि वोट द्या") without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text:
महाशिवरात्रीला उपवास नेमका कसा करावा? जाणून घ्या...
 
./-…
translated_text:
How to fast on Mahashivratri? Find out...

./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply posing a question ("कसा करावा?") and inviting the reader to learn more, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "जाणून घ्या" (find out) further reinforces this informational, rather than emotional, tone.

Text: शिवसैनिकांचं मातोश्रीवर शक्तीप्रदर्शन, उद्धव ठाकरे म्हणाले...
translated_text: Shiv Sainiks' show of strength at Matoshree, Uddhav Thackeray said...
Justification: The sentence describes a "shakti pradarshan" (शक्तीप्रदर्शन), or show of strength, which in itself is a neutral description of an event and doesn't carry inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: बॉलिवूडचा ‘हा’ कलाकर अमिताभ बच्चनमुळे शिकला शाळा, अभिनेत्याने स्व:च केला खुलासा
translated_text: Bollywood's 'Ha' artist studied at school because of Amitabh Bachchan, the actor himself revealed
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it mainly conveys information about an actor's education. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating any positive or negative sentiment. The sentence is a factual statement.

Text: म्हणजे आपण पुढच्या निवडणुकीत पडणार हे भविष्य बघितलंय वाटत साहेबांनी
translated_text: So, sir, I think you have seen the future and that we will lose in the next election.
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "म्हणजे आपण पुढच्या निवडणुकीत पडणार हे भविष्य बघितलंय वाटत साहेबांनी" which expresses a matter-of-fact observation or a sarcastic question about predicting election outcomes, lacking strong positive or negative emotional cues. The core of the sentence revolves around speculating about future election results.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे. जनता उद्धव यांच्या पाठीशी आहे
translated_text: That's right. The people are behind Uddhav.
Justification: The sentence expresses factual agreement and support. The phrase "अगदी बरोबर आहे" (agdi barobar aahe) indicating correctness and "पाठीशी आहे" (pathishi aahe) suggesting support don't carry strong positive or negative connotations, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: कृपया समस्येच्या त्वरित निराकरणासाठी तक्रारीचे अचूक स्थान आणि फोन नंबर प्रदान करा.
translated_text: Please provide the exact location and phone number of the complaint for prompt resolution of the issue.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a polite request for information. The phrase "कृपया समस्येच्या त्वरित निराकरणासाठी" (krupaya samasyachya tvarit nirakaranasathi) - "Please for prompt resolution of the issue" indicates a helpful and objective tone, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: वसूली करण्याचा कोणालाही हक्क नाही. लोकांनी हे लक्षात ठेवावे. ते बेकायदेशीर आहे.
translated_text: No one has the right to extort money. People should remember this. It is illegal.
Justification: The Marathi word "वसूली" (vasuli), meaning extortion, contributes to the disgust emotion and neutral sentiment due to its inherently negative connotation suggesting exploitation and illicit activity.

Text: लायकी मी तुझी लोकांसमोर मांडली. कारण मी सभ्य भाषा बोलतो.
translated_text: I have presented your worth to the people because I speak polite language.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily describes an action ("मांडली" - presented) and a reason ("सभ्य भाषा बोलतो" - speak polite language) without expressing strong positive or negative emotion. The words themselves don't carry strong emotional weight in this context.

Text: मग दिवाळी चे रेशन मिळाले नाही म्हणून ट्विटर रडता का?
translated_text: So why are you crying on Twitter because you didn't get your Diwali ration?
Justification: The phrase "ट्विटर रडता का?" (Twitter radta ka?), meaning "why are you crying on Twitter?", suggests surprise at the person's actions, rather than any positive or negative sentiment, hence neutral sentiment and surprise emotion.

Text: म्हणजे कोणाची बाजू बरोबर आहे हे तुम्हालाही माहिती आहे तर.
translated_text: So you also know whose side is right.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states that the listener is aware of who is right. The Marathi phrase "म्हणजे कोणाची बाजू बरोबर आहे हे तुम्हालाही माहिती आहे" expresses a statement of fact or an assumption of knowledge, devoid of any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: महिन्यांपूर्वी बाबत कार्यक्रम लावणार होते त्याचा मुहूर्त कधीचा निघाला?
translated_text: When was the date for the event that was supposed to be held months ago?
Justification: The sentence uses neutral phrasing and focuses on inquiring about a past event. There's no explicitly positive or negative sentiment present. The neutral sentiment stems from the overall tone and phrasing; there isn't one single Marathi word responsible, but rather the combined effect of words like "महिण्यांपूर्वी" (months ago), "बाबत कार्यक्रम" (about the event), "लावणार होते" (was supposed to be held), and "मुहूर्त कधीचा निघाला?" (when was the date fixed?). These elements collectively present a neutral inquiry.

Text: चक्रीवादळ येनार आहे काय महाराष्ट्रात परिणाम होईल का
translated_text: Is a cyclone coming? Will it affect Maharashtra?
Justification: The sentence presents a question about a potential cyclone and its impact ("परिणाम होईल का"), indicating a neutral sentiment as it lacks any expression of positive or negative feeling.

Text: तू जर चाटल नाही तर तुझ घर नाही चालणार आम्ही समजू शकतो
translated_text: We understand that if you don't lick, your house won't work.
Justification: The phrase "चाटल नाही तर" (chatal nahi tar - if you don't lick) implies a potential act of subservience or unethical behavior for personal gain, but without further context, it's presented as a factual observation and not necessarily with negativity or positivity.

Text: सर्व जागा वाढवा
translated_text: Increase all space
Justification: "वाढवा" (increase) expresses a neutral action of increasing, without any inherent positive or negative connotation in this context.

Text: हे बाहेर कधी आले?
translated_text: When did this come out?
Justification: The Marathi phrase "कधी आले?" (kadhi aale?) meaning "when did it come out?" expresses a sense of inquiry and lack of prior knowledge, indicating surprise, which contributes to a neutral sentiment of 0.0 as it is primarily an information-seeking question.

Text: मग तुला कसं माहिती ती मुलीच्या हातात होती ते
translated_text: Then how do you know it was in the girl's hand?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and the emotion is surprise because the question word "कसं" (kasa - how) indicates an inquiry born out of surprise or disbelief regarding the knowledge source.

Text: हो जसे मागील  .  वर्षे सगळे केंद्रामुळे होते ना, अगदी तसेच!
translated_text: Yes, just like in the past years, everything was due to the center, right?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it sarcastically references past events ("हो जसे मागील वर्षे सगळे केंद्रामुळे होते ना, अगदी तसेच!") suggesting a similarity to a previous situation without explicitly stating a positive or negative opinion. The phrase "अगदी तसेच!" (exactly like that!) indicates a neutral stance of comparing the present to the past, lacking strong emotional expression.

Text: तुमच्या अध्यक्षाला ही नागपूर हून आलेले आदेश पाळावे लागतात हे विसरता का ?
translated_text: Are you forgetting that your president has to follow orders from Nagpur?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the implication that the president is merely following orders, a notion conveyed through the phrase "आदेश पाळावे लागतात हे विसरता का ?" (are you forgetting that they have to follow orders?).

Text: . हे रांगोळ्या वाल्या लोकांसाठी होतं.
translated_text: This was for the people with the Rangoli.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("he rangolya walya lokansathi hot"). There is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase present, it's a statement of purpose.

Text: जरा जास्त नाही होत का हे
translated_text: Isn't this a bit much?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral (0.0) because the phrase "जरा जास्त नाही होत का" (jara jaasta nahi hot ka) expresses a question of excessiveness rather than a definitively positive or negative feeling. While potentially implying mild disapproval, it primarily functions as a query, keeping it neutral. The emotion identified is incorrect.

Text: महाराष्ट्रात सर्वात जास्त ज्योतीलिंग आहेत, सुशोभिकरणासाठी आपल्या माध्यमातून प्रयत्न व्हावे
translated_text: Maharashtra has the highest number of Jyotirlingas, efforts should be made through our own means for their beautification
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact and a suggestion for beautification efforts. There isn't any explicit positive, negative, or emotional language. The phrase "सर्वात जास्त" (sarvat jast) meaning "highest number" and "प्रयत्न व्हावे" (praytn vhave) meaning "efforts should be made" are descriptive and suggestive, not indicative of sentiment.

Text: खाल्यानंतर ची बघण्यासारखी आहे
translated_text: It's worth watching after eating.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply describes an action (watching) being worthwhile after another action (eating). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation. The phrase "बघण्यासारखी आहे" (baghnyasarkhi aahe - worth watching) simply indicates something is noteworthy, not necessarily good or bad.

Text: आजचे वास्तव जनता ,मीडिया आणि विरोधी पक्ष
translated_text: Today's reality: the public, the media and the opposition
Justification: The sentence is a factual statement presenting different entities ("janata", "media", "virodhi paksh") without any opinion or judgment. Therefore, it's neutral.

Text: शासनात कधी विलीन करून घेता ते सांगा आम्ही पण धन्यवाद देऊ.
translated_text: Tell us when you will merge it with the government, and we will thank you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request for information ("कधी विलीन करून घेता ते सांगा") and states an intention to thank the government ("आम्ही पण धन्यवाद देऊ") if the merger happens. The phrase "धन्यवाद देऊ" suggests potential gratitude, but the overall tone is neutral as it awaits action.

Text: काय बोलाव आता....
translated_text: What to say now....
Justification: The phrase "काय बोलाव आता...." (kay bolava aata....) expresses a sense of resignation or uncertainty, lacking any strong positive or negative indicators, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: फडणवीसांच्या हस्ते होणार कार्तिकी एकादशीची पूजा!:
translated_text: Fadnavis will perform Kartiki Ekadashi puja!:
Justification: While the sentence itself is factual reporting about a religious ceremony, the association of a prominent figure like "फडणवीसांच्या हस्ते" (Fadnavis will perform) with a positive religious event like "कार्तिकी एकादशीची पूजा" (Kartiki Ekadashi puja) can subtly evoke a feeling of joy or satisfaction in some individuals, hence the emotion assigned. The phrase "कार्तिकी एकादशीची पूजा" specifically suggests a positive religious occasion.

Text: सगळे हिंदू विरोधी पक्ष एका छताखाली आले आहेत हिंदूंनो डोळे उघडा आणि मतदान करा.
translated_text: All Hindu opposition parties have come under one roof. Hindus, open your eyes and vote.
Justification: The sentence aims to mobilize Hindu voters, but lacks inherently positive or negative language, hence a neutral sentiment. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase that expresses strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: तेव्हा ही असच होणार आहे
translated_text: Then this is what will happen.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states a future outcome ("होणार आहे" - will happen) without any indication of positive or negative feeling.

Text: एवढेच आहे तर आत्ता तुम्हाला भारत जोडो का करावे लागत आहे सांगा????
translated_text: If that's all, then tell me why you have to do Bharat Jodo now????
Justification: The phrase "का करावे लागत आहे" (ka karave lagat aahe) implying "why do you HAVE to do," suggests a questioning tone and conveys surprise/disbelief regarding the necessity of the action, hence neutral sentiment and surprise emotion.

Text: म्हणजे नक्कीच मिळते!
translated_text: That means you definitely get it!
Justification: The word "नक्कीच" (nakkich), meaning "definitely," expresses a sense of certainty and positive outcome, leading to an interpretation of joy, even with an overall neutral sentiment due to the sentence's simplicity and lack of strong emotional language.

Text: तु तर सोबत गेली होती
translated_text: You went with me.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact, "तु तर सोबत गेली होती" (You went with me), without any emotionally charged words or phrases. Therefore, the neutral sentiment is appropriate.

Text: तुमच्या मनात हे पण नाहीत एक दिवस यांना झटका देशील सुषमा ताई
translated_text: You don't even have this in mind, one day Sushma tai will give them a shock.
Justification: The sentence expresses a future action without strong positive or negative indicators. "झटका देशील" (jhatka deshil - will give a shock) implies a potential disruptive action, but lacks specific context to assign a definitive sentiment or emotion beyond neutral.

Text: बाहेर नाही आतच आहे.
translated_text: It's not outside, it's inside.
Justification: The sentence "बाहेर नाही आतच आहे" simply states a location. There is no inherently positive, negative, or emotional content present. The words "बाहेर" (outside), "नाही" (not), "आत" (inside), and "आहे" (is) are factual and descriptive, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: आदिवासी हॉस्टेलसाठी श्रमिक एल्गार आणि च्या संघर्ष
translated_text: Shramik Elgar and his struggle for tribal hostels
Justification: The sentence is largely factual, describing a struggle. There are no overtly positive or negative Marathi words to assign a sentiment. The words "आदिवासी हॉस्टेलसाठी श्रमिक एल्गार आणि च्या संघर्ष" (Adivasi hostel sathi Shramik Elgar ani cha sangharsh) simply state a struggle for tribal hostels and doesn't express any specific emotion.

Text: कोरेगाव भिमा नव्हे तर भिमा कोरेगाव आसा खरा नामउल्लेख आहे.
translated_text: The real name is Bhima Koregaon, not Koregaon Bhima.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it presents a factual correction, stating the "खरा नामउल्लेख" (khara naamullekh) meaning "real name/correct reference," without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion.

Text: उद्घव ठाकरे आधीच पोटनिवडणुकीत हार मानत आहेत...
translated_text: Uddhav Thackeray is already admitting defeat in the by-elections...
Justification: The phrase "हार मानत आहेत" (haar manat aahet), meaning "admitting defeat," indicates a negative situation and contributes to the overall sadness. While the sentence reports a statement, the act of admitting defeat inherently carries a negative and sad connotation.

Text: बघितल्यावर बघायची हिंमत कोणाकडे आहे
translated_text: Who has the courage to look at it?
Justification: The sentence expresses a challenge or rhetorical question, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The Marathi phrase "हिंमत कोणाकडे आहे" (himmat konakade aahe - who has the courage) simply poses a question about someone's bravery, without explicitly conveying any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: एक नंदी बैल आणि एक मंदी बैल...
translated_text: A Nandi bull and a Mandi bull...
Justification: The sentence "एक नंदी बैल आणि एक मंदी बैल..." is a factual statement devoid of emotional cues. There is no specific word or phrase that conveys sentiment, hence the neutral sentiment. The sentence simply describes two things: a Nandi bull and a Mandi bull.

Text: जिथे एका नाटकात काल्पनिक पात्र आहे ते असत्यच झाले की.
translated_text: Where there is a fictional character in a play, it becomes untrue.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual observation about the nature of fiction. The phrase "असत्यच झाले की" (asatyach zhale ki - it becomes untrue) simply states this fact without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: दाणे टाकायला नाही गेला का तू
translated_text: Didn't you go to plant the seeds?
Justification: The sentence "दाणे टाकायला नाही गेला का तू" is neutral because it is a simple question about planting seeds; there is no indication of positive or negative sentiment in the phrase "दाणे टाकायला नाही गेला का तू".

Text: देशभक्ती शरीरात जागृत झाली आणि नानाने त्या दुकानातूनच वस्तू विकत घेतल्या.
translated_text: Patriotism awakened in the body and Nana bought things from that store.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an action and feeling, with no inherently positive or negative words. The phrase "देशभक्ती शरीरात जागृत झाली" (patriotism awakened in the body) describes a feeling of patriotism but doesn't express a strong positive or negative sentiment on its own, making the overall tone neutral.

Text: पत्रकारांनीसुद्धा ही बातमी किती लावून धरली.
translated_text: Even journalists caught this news with great interest.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes journalists pursuing a news story with "लावून धरली" (lavun dharli), which translates to "caught with interest" or "persisted with." This describes an action without expressing a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पण आहे नाजनरल स्लीपर
translated_text: But there is a general sleeper.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact "पण आहे नाजनरल स्लीपर" (pan aahe na janaral sleepar) - "but there is a general sleeper." There are no words or phrases that convey any positive or negative emotion.

Text: हे बघा फक्त फक्त भाजप चे सरकार आहे.
translated_text: Look, this is only a BJP government.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its factual statement. The Marathi phrase "भाजप चे सरकार आहे" (BJP che sarkar aahe - BJP's government is) simply states a political reality without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: ते केलेलं ट्विट आता केलं तर चालेल का भैया
translated_text: Brother, would it be okay if I tweet that now?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple question seeking permission, and there are no inherently positive or negative words. The phrase "चालेल का" (chaalel ka), meaning "would it be okay?", indicates a neutral inquiry rather than any emotional expression.

Text: तुम्ही लहानपणापासून अशे होता की आता भारतीय जनता पक्षाचे प्रवक्ते झाल्यावर झालंय
translated_text: You were a scoundrel since childhood and now you have become the spokesperson of the Bharatiya Janata Party.
Justification: The neutral sentiment and disgust emotion are driven by the word "अशे" ("asche"), which translates to "scoundrel" and expresses strong disapproval and moral repugnance towards the person being addressed.

Text: गुरुत्वाकर्षण आहे की नाही का नुसती अफवा आहे..... वा जबरदस्त कमालच....
translated_text: Is there gravity or not? Is it just a rumor... or is it amazing?
Justification: The phrase "वा जबरदस्त कमालच" (vaa jabardast kamaalach) expressing amazement/wonder, while positive in connotation, doesn't strongly indicate a positive or negative sentiment in the overall context of questioning gravity and rumors. The neutrality of the question pulls the overall sentiment close to 0, while "vaa jabardast kamaalach" clearly indicates the emotion of surprise.

Text: सरकार चा विरोध आणि स्थानिक नागरिकांचा विरोध या मध्ये फरक कळतो का...?
translated_text: Do you understand the difference between opposition to the government and opposition to local citizens?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question about understanding a difference, without expressing positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "फरक कळतो का...?" (farak kalto ka...?) which translates to "Do you understand the difference...?" is interrogative and does not inherently convey any sentiment.

Text: "तुमचा आनंद जितका स्वस्त असेल, तितके तुम्ही श्रीमंत व्हाल."
translated_text: "The cheaper your happiness, the richer you will be."
Justification: The sentence conveys a philosophical observation about happiness and wealth, not expressing any explicit positive or negative feeling. The Marathi phrase "तुमचा आनंद जितका स्वस्त असेल, तितके तुम्ही श्रीमंत व्हाल" simply states a relationship, making it neutral in sentiment.

Text: म्हणून अजून पर्यंत सतरंज्या उचलण्याचे काम करत आहेत का????
translated_text: So are you still working on picking up the chess pieces????
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative nature of the statement "का???? (ka????)", which questions the activity without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase simply inquires about the current state of affairs.

Text: अडीच वर्ष फक्त वसुलीत मग्न होते
translated_text: For two and a half years, I was only engaged in recovery.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a statement of fact. The phrase "फक्त वसुलीत मग्न होते" (fakt vasulit magn hote) - "only engaged in recovery," describes an activity without conveying any explicit positive or negative sentiment or strong emotion.

Text: तुझ्या सारख्या      जरी औलादी जन्मल्या ना तरी ही शक्य होणार नाही ड्या
translated_text: Even if children like you were born, this wouldn't be possible.
Justification: The sentence expresses impossibility and doubt. While potentially insulting in context, the phrase "तुझ्या सारख्या जरी औलादी जन्मल्या ना तरी ही शक्य होणार नाही" (Even if children like you were born, this wouldn't be possible) directly indicates a lack of possibility rather than a strong positive or negative emotion, contributing to the neutral sentiment. The sentence focuses on the impossibility itself, without explicit emotional expression like anger or happiness.

Text: चुकीच्या क्षेत्रात आला तो माणूस
translated_text: The man who came to the wrong area
Justification: The neutral sentiment and disgust emotion stem from "चुकीच्या क्षेत्रात" (chukichya kshetraat), which implies a mismatch or unsuitability of the man to the area, creating a sense of distaste or aversion to the situation.

Text: हे बघा हो.... एवढ्या मोठया पत्रकाराला काय काय म्हणताहेत!!
translated_text: Look at this....what are you saying to such a great journalist!!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral with surprise primarily due to the phrase "काय काय म्हणताहेत!!" (kay kay mhantahet!!), which expresses shock and disbelief at what is being said, indicating surprise.

Text: जोशी काय करत होते हे प्रदीप ला।विचारले का?
translated_text: Did you ask Pradeep what Joshi was doing?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple question asking for information ("विचारले का?"). There is no inherently positive or negative connotation.

Text: हि तर शहाजीबापू याच्या साठी गर्दी होती...
translated_text: This was a crowd for Shahajibapu...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact - "गर्दी होती" (gardi hoti - there was a crowd). There is no explicit positive or negative connotation.

Text: एक रिक्षावाला आणि एक चहावाला असू शकत नाही का
translated_text: Can't there be a rickshaw puller and a tea vendor?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling. The Marathi phrase "असू शकत नाही का" (asu shakat nahi ka) - "can't there be?"- simply inquires about a possibility, indicating neutrality.

Text: बर ते आता सर्वोच्च न्यायालयावर तसाच विश्वास राहुदे जसा मैदान मिळाल्यावर होता....
translated_text: Well, they should have the same faith in the Supreme Court now as they did when they got the field...
Justification: The sentence expresses a hope or expectation, but without strong positive or negative leaning. The phrase "तसाच विश्वास राहुदे" (tasach vishwas rahude) - "should have the same faith" - suggests a neutral stance, simply wishing for consistency in belief.

Text: तो ध्यानस्थ आहे
translated_text: He is meditating.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "ध्यानस्थ आहे" (dhyanasth aahe), meaning "is meditating," simply describes a state of being without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मागून विनंती कोणी केली हे सांगायचं नसतं हीसुद्धा महाराष्ट्राची राजकीय संस्कृती आहे का
translated_text: Is this also the political culture of Maharashtra, where you don't have to say who made the request?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it poses a question about Maharashtra's political culture, without explicitly endorsing or criticizing it. The phrase "मागून विनंती कोणी केली हे सांगायचं नसतं हीसुद्धा महाराष्ट्राची राजकीय संस्कृती आहे का" (Is this also the political culture of Maharashtra, where you don't have to say who made the request?) simply questions whether a specific behavior is part of the culture, lacking any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: म्हणजे साहेबांच बंद च आवाहन चुकीचं होतं का?????
translated_text: So, was the call for a shutdown by the chief minister wrong????
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the interrogative nature of the sentence, specifically the use of "चुकीचं होतं का????? " (chukich hot ka????), which translates to "was it wrong?". This questioning tone prevents a positive or negative sentiment from being strongly expressed.

Text: राणे सगळं जाऊदे सोडा पण आर्मी पेपर घ्या बसं झालं
translated_text: Rane, leave everything but take the army papers, that's it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual and demanding tone conveyed by "राणे सगळं जाऊदे सोडा पण आर्मी पेपर घ्या बसं झालं" (Rane, leave everything but take the army papers, that's it), which lacks explicit positive or negative emotional cues.

Text: सगळं बरोबर आहे हो तुमचं पण पकडला गेला तर चोर हा इकडे खाक्या आहे
translated_text: Everything is fine, if you get caught too, the thief is here to stay.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation with "सगळं बरोबर आहे" (everything is fine) and highlights a potential consequence ("पकडला गेला तर चोर हा इकडे खाक्या आहे" - if caught, the thief will face consequences), leading to a neutral sentiment as it doesn't explicitly express positive or negative feelings.

Text: जर गरीब म्हणून राहायचं आहे तर ची सुरुवात अगदी आरामात करा.
translated_text: If you want to live as a poor person, start out very comfortably.
Justification: The sentence expresses a contradictory sentiment suggesting comfort in poverty, but lacks overtly positive or negative indicators. The phrase "जर गरीब म्हणून राहायचं आहे तर ची सुरुवात अगदी आरामात करा" (If you want to live as a poor person, start out very comfortably) is sarcastic, but the sarcasm doesn't strongly convey either positive or negative emotion, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: शाळा बंद करू नका सांगून आले का?
translated_text: Did you come to tell me not to close the school?
Justification: The phrase "सांगून आले का?" (saangun aale ka?) which translates to "Did you come to tell me?" expresses surprise at the implied action. The "का?" (ka?) at the end signals a question tinged with surprise or disbelief.

Text: नशीब लागत हे सगळं ऑफिस कॅन्टीन मध्ये मिळायला
translated_text: It takes luck to get all this in the office canteen.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "नशीब लागत" (nasheeb lagat), meaning "it takes luck," simply states a condition without expressing any positive or negative emotion. It's an observation rather than a value judgment.

Text: एकाच मुलाखतीत दहा वेळा अभय मागितले होते...हे आपण सहज बघु शकता..
translated_text: Abhay was asked ten times in a single interview...you can easily see this..
Justification: The word "दहा वेळा अभय मागितले" (daha vela Abhay magitle - asked Abhay ten times) implies an unusual or unexpected situation, leading to surprise.

Text: हे पवार नक्की कोणाचे मित्र आहेत?
translated_text: Who exactly is this Pawar a friend of?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the use of "नक्की" (nakki), which implies uncertainty and a questioning of allegiance, hence signaling surprise about Pawar's true affiliations.

Text: केंद्रीय गृहराज्यमंत्री म्हणून विचारतोय
translated_text: I am asking this as the Union Minister of State for Home Affairs.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a statement of position/role ("केंद्रीय गृहराज्यमंत्री म्हणून विचारतोय" - as the Union Minister of State for Home Affairs) without any inherent emotional or sentimental content.

Text: पूर्ण दाणेदार पिक होत.
translated_text: A full grain crop is being produced.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "पूर्ण दाणेदार पिक होत" simply describes a factual observation of a crop production without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. It's a statement of fact.

Text: हे तुम्ही बोलताय कमालच आहे
translated_text: This is amazing what you are saying.
Justification: "Kamaalch ahe" (कमालच आहे), meaning "amazing," expresses positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: दिवाळी पुर्वतयारी ची रजा घेतोय का...
translated_text: Are you taking leave for Diwali preparations?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it's a simple question about taking leave ("रजा घेतोय का") and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्हाला अस म्हणायचे का या खालील ठिकाणी मनसे नावालाच आहे
translated_text: Do you mean to say that the MNS is the only one in the following places?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a statement of inquiry ("तुम्हाला अस म्हणायचे का"), questioning the presence or influence of the MNS party, without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The phrase "नावालाच आहे" (nāvalāch āhe) implies a minimal or nominal presence, but doesn't inherently carry a positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: ही कोण आहे?
translated_text: Who is this?
Justification: The word "कोण" (kon - who) indicates a question seeking information about an unknown person, expressing surprise or lack of prior knowledge.

Text: शांतीला निळ्या रंगाची साडी घेऊन दिली आहेस का रव्या…
translated_text: Ravya, have you bought Shanti a blue saree?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question; there is no indication of positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi words "शांतीला निळ्या रंगाची साडी घेऊन दिली आहेस का रव्या…" simply inquire about a purchase and do not convey any emotional valence.

Text: होमगार्ड चे पण बघा मॅडम
translated_text: Look at the Home Guard too, madam.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it is a simple request or instruction. There are no specific words conveying positive or negative emotion; it's a straightforward appeal to "बघा" (bagaa - look at).

Text: नरेंद्र मोदी जागतिक नेते आणि भारत सर्वांत ताकदवान देश बनलाय का?
translated_text: Has Narendra Modi become a world leader and India the most powerful country?
Justification: The sentence is a question asking about Narendra Modi's status as a world leader and India's status as a powerful country. The interrogative nature of the sentence, indicated by "का?", makes it neutral in sentiment.

Text: ग्रामपंचायत कोणत्याही पक्षाची नसते हे विसरून चालणार नाही.
translated_text: It should not be forgotten that the Gram Panchayat does not belong to any party.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it states a factual observation and reminder, not expressing any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "ग्रामपंचायत कोणत्याही पक्षाची नसते" (Gram Panchayat does not belong to any party) is a statement of fact rather than an emotional expression.

Text: म्हणजे बघून तुम्ही लगेच मिसळ खायला जाल...
translated_text: So, you will immediately go to eat Misal after watching it...
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes a likely action ("मिसळ खायला जाल") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: समाज आणि जीवनाच्या विकासामध्ये इष्ट बदल घडवून आणणे
translated_text: Bringing about desirable changes in the development of society and life
Justification: The sentence expresses a general aspiration for positive change, using the phrase "इष्ट बदल" (ishta badal) meaning "desirable changes," which is inherently neutral and lacks any strong positive or negative connotation.

Text: हो ... म्य घेऊन पळालो ही पेलेट
translated_text: Yes ... I ran away with this pellet
Justification: The sentence conveys a neutral sentiment because the statement "पळालो" (palalo - ran away) is presented without any emotional coloring or further context indicating positive or negative feelings. It's a simple statement of fact.

Text: म्हणजे ते गावठी माधुरी का, ज्यांच्या घरी नाही ती वाली?
translated_text: So, is that village Madhuri, who doesn't have her at home?
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it poses a question using the phrase "म्हणजे ते" which translates to "So, is that" framing the rest of the sentence as an inquiry rather than expressing a strong sentiment.

Text: हे पद कर्तत्व बघून नाही तर भाजप आमदारांचा चिरंजीव म्हणून मिळाले आहे..
translated_text: This position was not obtained through merit, but as a descendant of BJP MLAs.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual observation ("भाजप आमदारांचा चिरंजीव म्हणून मिळाले आहे"), lacking overtly positive or negative sentiment indicators.

Text: घरातून निघतच नाही तर काय भिजणार
translated_text: What if I don't leave the house?
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of exposure to rain due to staying indoors. The Marathi phrase "घरातून निघतच नाही" (gharatun nightach nahi - doesn't even leave the house) implies a fear of something outside, leading to avoidance and the assigned emotion of fear. The statement is neutral overall; hence the sentiment is 0.

Text: सुंदरता ही कोणालाही आपल्या प्रेमात पाडते.
translated_text: Beauty makes anyone fall in love with you.
Justification: The word "प्रेमात" (premaat), meaning "in love," strongly suggests a positive emotion and contributes to the overall joy.

Text: काही नाही सोयरिक जोडायची आहे
translated_text: Nothing to add, Soyrik.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because "काही नाही" (kahi nahi), meaning "nothing," indicates a lack of strong feeling or opinion.

Text: ही कुठली पध्दत आहे ते जिवनमरणाची लढाई लढत आहेत जय पराजय तर होत असतात
translated_text: What kind of method is this? They are fighting a life and death battle. They win and lose.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the overall balanced and observational tone. While "जिवनमरणाची लढाई" (jivanmaranachi ladhai - life and death battle) suggests intensity, the concluding phrase "जय पराजय तर होत असतात" (jay parajay tar hot asatat - they win and lose) acknowledges the cyclical nature of conflict, neutralizing the overall sentiment.

Text: पण अतिवृष्टि पासून लोकांचा बचाव कसा होउ शकतो हे तरी ठरवू शकता ...!
translated_text: But you can at least decide how people can be saved from heavy rain...!
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion or question, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "ठरवू शकता" (tharu shakta - can decide) suggests a possibility or capability rather than expressing a concrete sentiment.

Text: सर्जिकल स्ट्राइक अजित पवार यांच्या पासून सुरु होणार? — मूत्र
translated_text: Will surgical strike start from Ajit Pawar? — Urine
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question about a potential event and includes "मूत्र" (urine) which is irrelevant and doesn't convey any strong sentiment in this context. The core question regarding surgical strike and Ajit Pawar is phrased neutrally without any positive or negative connotations.

Text: भाऊ आहेत ते .. भावाला कधी पत्र लिहून धन्यवाद वगैरे म्हणतोय का कधी आपण?
translated_text: They are brothers.. Do you ever write a letter to your brother and say thank you?
Justification: The sentence expresses a common, unremarkable fraternal relationship. The phrase "भाऊ आहेत ते" (bhau aahet te) simply states "they are brothers," indicating a factual, neutral sentiment.

Text: काही ही होऊ शकतआजकाल.
translated_text: Anything can happen these days.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general observation about the uncertainty of the times, lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "काही ही होऊ शकतआजकाल" (kahi hi hou shakat aajkal - anything can happen these days) conveys this neutrality.

Text: पडळकर खास मित्र आहेत का ??
translated_text: Are Padalkars special friends?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question asking a factual question about the nature of the relationship between Padalkars and "friends" (मित्र आहेत का??). There is no inherent emotional charge or opinion expressed.

Text: बाळासाहेब ठाकरे रोजगार मेळाव्याचे उद्घाटन ../-…
translated_text: Balasaheb Thackeray inaugurates employment fair ../-…
Justification: The sentence describes a neutral event ("उद्घाटन" - inauguration) regarding an employment fair, indicating no positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे सांगा युवराजला अन् राजकुमाराला
translated_text: Tell this to the crown prince and the prince.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a simple statement of instruction. There is no sentiment-bearing word or phrase within the Marathi text ("हे सांगा युवराजला अन् राजकुमाराला"). It's a factual declaration without any emotional coloring.

Text: महेंद्र जी लाईक न करता नुसताच नमस्कार करताय तुम्ही ही देवेंद्र नीती खेळताय
translated_text: You are playing this Devendra Neeti, just saying hello without liking Mahendra ji
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes an observation about someone's behavior ("नुसताच नमस्कार करताय", just saying hello) and uses the phrase "देवेंद्र नीती खेळताय" (playing Devendra Neeti) which, while potentially carrying negative connotations depending on context, is presented without explicit positive or negative framing within the given sentence. Therefore, its impact is neutral.

Text: दशभुजा सोडलं तर अजिबात गर्दी नाही- चांदणी चौकात नाही. मुंबई होती...
translated_text: Except for Dashabhuja, there is no crowd at all - not in Chandni Chowk. It was Mumbai...
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about the absence of crowds, with "गर्दी नाही" (gardi nahi - no crowd) indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: काथे ते रशिया वरून मागवलेले बॅरल आले का नाही अजून?
translated_text: Where are the barrels ordered from Russia? Why haven't they arrived yet?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a factual question about the arrival of goods. The phrases "काथे" (where) and "आले का नाही अजून?" (haven't they arrived yet?) simply indicate inquiry, lacking any positive or negative emotional charge.

Text: मिमिक्री करणे हे पण एक कौशल्य आहे
translated_text: Mimicry is also a skill.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact. The phrase "कौशल्य आहे" (kaushalya aahe) meaning "is a skill" contributes to this neutrality, indicating a factual statement without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: भाषण लिहून घेतले पण, ते करायचे कसे हे कळत नसेल?
translated_text: Have you written a speech but don't know how to deliver it?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "कळत नसेल?" (kalat nasel?), meaning "don't know?", is a factual question rather than expressing a positive or negative feeling.

Text: भाभा अणुसंशोधन केंद्र, मुंबई येथे विविध पदांच्या    जागांसाठी भरती. अधिक माहितीसाठी पहा
translated_text: Recruitment for various posts at Bhabha Atomic Research Centre, Mumbai. See for more details.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its informative nature; it simply announces recruitment, with no emotional or opinionated words. The key phrase, "भरती" (bharti - recruitment), indicates a factual announcement rather than an expression of sentiment.

Text: सुनंदा की सुनीता देवी काहीतरी विषय गाजला होता ना अमेठी चा. जाणकारांनी पका टाकावा
translated_text: Sunanda or Sunita Devi was a hot topic in Amethi. Experts should clarify.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of overtly positive or negative language. The phrase "काहीतरी विषय गाजला होता" (kahitari vishay gaajla hota) which translates to "was a hot topic" simply describes a past event without expressing a sentiment.

Text: दोन पैसे व तीन पैशांची ही नाणी होती माझ्या आठवणीत.
translated_text: I remembered these two-paise and three-paise coins.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a recollection ("आठवणीत" - aathavanit, "in memory") without any explicit positive or negative emotional coloring.

Text: आम्ही काय पाकिस्तानी आहोत का रोहिणग्या..??
translated_text: Are we Pakistanis or Rohingyas??
Justification: The sentence expresses a rhetorical question implying discrimination and marginalization, but lacks explicit emotional indicators or positive/negative wording. The phrase "आम्ही काय पाकिस्तानी आहोत का रोहिणग्या..??", while potentially loaded with negative connotations depending on context, presents itself as a neutral inquiry in this specific framing, contributing to the overall neutral sentiment.

Text: तूच सांग का ओरडते ते
translated_text: You tell me why you're screaming.
Justification: The surprise emotion stems from the phrase "ओरडते ते" (oradte te), which translates to "screaming" or "yelling." This unexpected or exaggerated vocalization indicates surprise or shock.

Text: निखिल वागळे यांच्या मागणीशी तुम्ही सहतम आहात का?
translated_text: Do you agree with Nikhil Wagle's demand?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question about agreement ("सहमत आहात का?") regarding a demand, lacking any explicit positive or negative sentiment, thus justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: म्हणजे आता 'बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला' हरवायचे असे म्हणणार का?
translated_text: So now you're saying you want to defeat 'Balasaheb's Shiv Sena'?
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the rhetorical question framed by "म्हणणार का?" (mhaṇṇār kā?). This phrase, meaning "are you saying/will you say?", implies a challenging or surprising assertion, suggesting the speaker is questioning the other party's intentions in a surprising way.

Text: आपणास माहीत आहे का?
translated_text: Did you know?
Justification: The phrase "आपणास माहीत आहे का?" expresses surprise because it's a question inquiring about someone's knowledge, implying the speaker might have new or unexpected information to share. The "का?" at the end of the sentence signifies a question, and the overall phrasing indicates a potential reveal or unexpectedness, leading to the emotion of surprise.

Text: हिच अपेक्षा होती... गावधी कडून
translated_text: This was what was expected... from Gavadhi.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "अपेक्षा होती" (apeksha hoti - was expected) simply states an expectation without indicating any positive or negative feeling. There is no emotional charge associated with simply fulfilling an expectation.

Text: ते दांड्यान ढुं...... सुजल असेल बहुतेक म्हणून माघार का??
translated_text: That stick is stuck...... It must be swollen, so why retreat??
Justification: The sentence expresses a speculative and somewhat vulgar observation without strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "सुजल असेल बहुतेक म्हणून माघार का??" ("It must be swollen, so why retreat??") suggests a questioning or observational tone rather than a clear emotion.

Text: तुम्ही आई बसली बोलू नका, पण मी माझा बाप बसलाय बोलणार
translated_text: Don't talk about your mother sitting down, but I will talk about my father sitting down.
Justification: The phrase "बोलू नका" (bolu naka), meaning "don't talk," expresses a negative sentiment and when considered in the context of whose parents are being referred to reflects disgust, implying disapproval and potentially contempt.

Text: पाठवा त्या राणा जोडप्याला शिकायला कधी होणार पाठ काय माहित त्याची...
translated_text: Send that Rana couple, when will they learn their lesson?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence, while potentially critical of the "Rana couple," doesn't express strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "कधी होणार पाठ काय माहित त्याची..." (kadhi honar paath kay mahit tyachi...) which translates to "when will they learn their lesson?" expresses more of a question or observation than a strong emotion.

Text: तुम्हाला पाहिजे का थोडेसे पार्ट टाईम करणारा घरगडी
translated_text: Do you need a little part-time housework?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question using the phrase "तुम्हाला पाहिजे का" (tumhala pahije ka) meaning "do you need," which doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे फक्त देवेंद्र साहेबच करू शकता.!
translated_text: Only Devendra Saheb can do this!
Justification: The exclamation point ("!") after the sentence expressing the belief that only Devendra Saheb can do something, implies frustration and a sense of anger regarding the situation.

Text: हे विशी मडगांवचे नगराध्यक्ष घनश्याम शिरोडकार हांणी याचिका दाखल केल्ली.
translated_text: This petition was filed by Ghanshyam Shirodkar, Mayor of Madgaon.
Justification: The sentence is factual and reports an action (petition filing) without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The sentence contains no specific Marathi words or phrases that indicate any sentiment or emotion. It's a neutral statement of fact.

Text: बऱ्याचदा.... पण त्या जखमा सुगंधी होत्या...
translated_text: Often.... but those wounds were fragrant...
Justification: The sentence describes wounds as "fragrant" ("सुगंधी"), which is an unusual and evocative descriptor, not necessarily positive or negative. The lack of other context and the ambiguous nature of "fragrant wounds" leads to a neutral sentiment.

Text: जालन्याचे पालकमंत्री अतुल सावे अंबड तालुक्यातील पाहणी दौऱ्यात सजवलेल्या बैलगाडीतून बांधावर गेले होते.
translated_text: Jalna's Guardian Minister Atul Save had gone to the dam in a decorated bullock cart during an inspection tour of Ambad taluka.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an event. There is no inherently positive or negative language used. The Marathi phrase "पाहणी दौऱ्यात सजवलेल्या बैलगाडीतून बांधावर गेले होते" describes the minister's activity without expressing any sentiment.

Text: अहसान फरामोश सिर्फ इन्सान होता है..कामापुरता मामा..निसर्ग आपल्या सोयीनुसार वागायला काय घरगडी आहे..ठेविले अनंते...
translated_text: Ahsan Faramosh is just a human being..Mother for work..What kind of house is nature to act according to our convenience..It was kept for eternity...
Justification: The sentence expresses a philosophical observation and includes proverbs. While there are negative connotations to "अहसान फरामोश" (ungrateful) and the implied criticism of exploiting nature, the overall tone is neutral and reflective. The phrase "ठेविले अनंते" (Kept in eternity) suggests acceptance and a lack of strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: कोणी शी पुसायला पण वापरणार नाही...लेख...म्हणे..संडास सांभाळ नीट
translated_text: No one will even use it to wipe their shit...the article...says...take good care of the sanda...
Justification: The phrase "कोणी शी पुसायला पण वापरणार नाही" (No one will even use it to wipe their shit) expresses extreme disgust.

Text: मला तर उत्सुकता आहे की, कोणत्या अभिनेत्याला परत करतील मुख्य भूमिकेसाठी
translated_text: I'm curious to see which actor they'll bring back for the lead role.
Justification: The sentence expresses curiosity and anticipation about a future event. The word "उत्सुकता" (utsukta), meaning curiosity, contributes to a neutral sentiment as it is simply an expression of interest without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: अजूनही कारण नीच्छित करता येत नाही, हे सतरावे कारण
translated_text: Still can't figure out the reason, this is the seventeenth reason
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact without conveying any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "अजूनही कारण नीच्छित करता येत नाही" (still can't figure out the reason) indicates uncertainty but lacks emotional coloring, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text:
नव्या भारताची दिमाखदार ओळख:
वंदे भारत!
translated_text: The bright identity of the new India: Vande Bharat!
Justification: "दिमाखदार ओळख" (dimakhdar olakh - bright identity) expresses a positive attribute, contributing to the overall feeling of pride and joy. While Vande Bharat also evokes positive sentiments, "दिमाखदार ओळख" specifically indicates a bright and positive identification/recognition, thus justifying the joy emotion.

Text: धडधडती मशाल हाती घेऊन आता महाराष्ट्र उभा करायचा आहे
translated_text: Now we have to take the blazing torch in our hands and build Maharashtra.
Justification: The phrase "धडधडती मशाल" (dhadhadti mashaal - blazing torch) implies vigor, energy, and determination, contributing to a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: आता कोथडा बाहेर निघणार
translated_text: Now the hut will come out.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "आता कोथडा बाहेर निघणार" describes a simple, potentially ominous, statement of fact without explicit emotional charge. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase that inherently conveys a strong sentiment or emotion.

Text: देशाचे सरन्यायाधीश म्हणून चंद्रचूड यांची कारकीर्द का महत्वाची? जाणून घ्या
translated_text: Why is Chandrachud's tenure as the country's Chief Justice important? Find out
Justification: The sentence is informational and seeks to understand the importance of a person's tenure. There are no inherently positive or negative words; it's a neutral query. The phrase "जाणून घ्या" (jaanun ghya - find out) indicates a request for information, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: त्याना अशी कर्माची फळ लवकर भेटावीत..
translated_text: May they soon reap the fruits of their deeds.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses a karmic consequence ("कर्माची फळ") without explicitly positive or negative connotations regarding the subject's fortune.

Text: त्यांच हिदुत्त्व धोक्यात आलेल आहे त्यामुळे .....
translated_text: Their Hinduism is in danger because of this...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral but reflects fear due to the phrase "धोक्यात आलेल आहे" (dhokyat aaleel aahe), meaning "is in danger", which indicates a feeling of apprehension.

Text: भाजपा अंधेरी पोटनिवडणूक लढवणार का? मध्यरात्री नेत्यांची खलबतं, बैठकीत काय ठरलं?
translated_text: Will BJP contest Andheri by-election? Leaders' excitement at midnight, what was decided in the meeting?
Justification: The sentence presents a neutral sentiment as it primarily poses a question about BJP's participation in an election and reports on a meeting, without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The phrase "भाजपा अंधेरी पोटनिवडणूक लढवणार का?" (Will BJP contest Andheri by-election?) is a factual inquiry, and "मध्यरात्री नेत्यांची खलबतं, बैठकीत काय ठरलं?" (Leaders' excitement at midnight, what was decided in the meeting?) reports events objectively. There are no inherently emotive words or phrases that contribute to a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: "सत्तेच्या खुर्चीवर तुमच्यापैकी   असेल, मी स्वत: दुसऱ्याच्या खुर्चीवर बसणार नाही"
translated_text: "One of you will be in the seat of power, I myself will not sit in someone else's chair"
Justification: The phrase "सत्तेच्या खुर्चीवर" (sattechya khurchivar - in the seat of power) suggests a sense of resentment and competition for authority, contributing to the emotion of anger. The speaker implies a rejection of vying for power.

Text: राहुल देशपांडेला कार्यक्रमाचे ठरलेले पैसे मिळाले झालं काम
translated_text: Rahul Deshpande received the money agreed for the program and the work was done.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "मिळाले झालं काम" (milale zale kaam - work is done once received) simply states a fact about the completion of work after payment, without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: डायबेटिज आहे? नवरात्रीमध्ये उपवास करताना 'ही' काळजी घ्याच
translated_text: Do you have diabetes? Take these precautions while fasting during Navratri
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a question and offers advice ("काळजी घ्याच" - take precautions), without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "काळजी घ्याच" is simply informational and advisory.

Text: हिंदी का बरं वापरत आहेत तुम्ही ???
translated_text: Why are you using Hindi???
Justification: The word "बरं" (bara), used in this context, implies surprise or mild annoyance at the speaker's choice of using Hindi, hence the surprise emotion and neutral sentiment.

Text: आपल्याकडे जे आहे ते खुप आहे. म्हणून जगता आलं की नाही त्याच दुःख होत नसतं....!
translated_text: What we have is abundant. So, it doesn't matter if we can't live or not....!
Justification: While the overall sentiment is neutral (0), the implied joy stems from the phrase "खुप आहे" (khup aahe), meaning "is abundant." The feeling of having enough can create a sense of contentment, subtly influencing a positive emotion.

Text: तुम्ही सांगितलेल्या गोष्टींनाच दंत कथा म्हणतात का
translated_text: Are the things you said called dental stories?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the unexpected connection implied between "तुम्ही सांगितलेल्या गोष्टींना" (the things you said) and "दंत कथा" (dental stories/legends). The literal interpretation creates an absurd and surprising association.

Text: राज्यातल्या सत्तांतराची गोष्ट... मुख्यमंत्र्यांच्या तोंडून, वाचा काय आहे बातमी,
translated_text: The story of the change of power in the state... from the mouth of the Chief Minister, read what is the news,
Justification: The sentence is largely factual and descriptive, reporting on a change in power and directing the reader to news. No specific Marathi words or phrases elicit a strong positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: मला पहिल्यांदा यांचे अकाउंट आहे असे वाटत होतं....
translated_text: I thought I had an account at first...
Justification: The sentence expresses a thought or belief, and the phrase "असे वाटत होतं" (ase vaatat hoto) indicating "I thought" or "it seemed" contributes to a neutral sentiment as it simply describes a past impression without expressing a positive or negative emotion.

Text: गुन्हे दाखल करणे यांचं काम आहे रोज नवीन नवीन गुन्हे दाखल करणार
translated_text: It is their job to file crimes. New crimes will be filed every day.
Justification: The sentence describes a routine task ("गुन्हे दाखल करणे यांचं काम आहे"), and the neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the factual and unemotional description of filing crimes, devoid of any subjective opinion or emotional coloring.

Text: आज अस म्हणाल व उद्या न्याय व्यवस्था दावणीला बांधली गेली आहे
translated_text: You say this today and tomorrow the justice system is tied to the fence.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about a hypothetical future situation. There is no explicit sentiment or emotion expressed. While the situation itself (justice system being "tied to the fence") could be interpreted negatively, the phrase "आज अस म्हणाल व उद्या न्याय व्यवस्था दावणीला बांधली गेली आहे" simply describes the potential occurrence without expressing a strong opinion or feeling. The neutral sentiment is derived from the absence of emotionally charged words and the overall factual presentation, even though the topic itself can be negatively perceived.

Text: राजकिय संस्कृती ही फक्त सोय आहेनायतर हे महाभारत घडलंच नसतं
translated_text: Political culture is just a convenience, otherwise this Mahabharata would not have happened.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it expresses a conditional statement ("घडलंच नसतं") about a hypothetical scenario without conveying strong positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "सोय आहेनायतर" (convenience, otherwise) simply frames the political culture as a factor influencing events, lacking emotional coloring.

Text: इतिहास वाचावा लागेल अभ्यास करून घे
translated_text: You have to read and study history.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact ("इतिहास वाचावा लागेल अभ्यास करून घे" - it will be necessary to read and study history) without any emotionally charged words or phrases.

Text: तू ही व्हिडिओ बघ आधी
translated_text: You should watch this video first.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the lack of any overtly positive or negative words. The phrase "तू ही व्हिडिओ बघ आधी" simply expresses a suggestion or direction to watch a video, devoid of emotional coloring.

Text: लागू असतांना कमी होता का
translated_text: Was it less when it was applied?
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple query about a potential decrease ("कमी होता का") without any emotional loading, indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: अर्धा मिळेल, कारण हे खेळण आहे
translated_text: You will get half, because it is a toy.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and unemotional statement "खेळण आहे" (kheln aahe - is a toy), which expresses a simple explanation without conveying any particular sentiment or emotion.

Text: इतकं दिवस सत्ता कुणाची होती दादा
translated_text: Who was in power for so long, Grandpa?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple question. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation in asking "इतकं दिवस सत्ता कुणाची होती दादा" (itka divas satta kunachi hoti dada) - "Who was in power for so long, Grandpa?". It's a query for information, not an expression of opinion or feeling.

Text: बघ मी सुरू करून अर्ध्या तासात झोपले..
translated_text: Look, I fell asleep within half an hour of starting..
Justification: The sentiment is neutral with a hint of surprise because the phrase "झोपले" (zhopale - fell asleep) suggests an unexpected outcome within a short timeframe ("अर्ध्या तासात" - ardhya taasat - half an hour) after starting something. There is no negative or positive opinion expressed and the emotion is appropriate in this context.

Text: काय हे कसले फोटो दाखवतात
translated_text: What kind of photos show what
