Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "काय हे कसले" ("kay he kasle"), which translates to "what kind of," indicates a question or observation without expressing a positive or negative feeling. The statement is primarily inquisitive, rather than expressing a strong opinion or emotion.

Text: मराठी युवकांना सबळ करायचे पण आम्हीच मग यांना काय फक्त मतं द्यायची का?
translated_text: We want to empower Marathi youth, but should we just give them votes?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the rhetorical question "काय फक्त मतं द्यायची का?" (kay fakt mate dyayachi ka?), which questions the extent of empowerment offered to the Marathi youth and doesn't lean towards a positive or negative stance.

Text: नाशिकच्या दरेवाडीच्या विद्यार्थ्यांच्या आंदोलनानंतर शाळा पुन्हा सुरु होणार, इतर कमी पटसंख्येच्या शाळांचं काय?
translated_text: Schools will reopen after the student protest in Darewadi, Nashik, but what about other schools with low enrollment?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it mainly conveys information about the reopening of schools and raises a question about the future of other low-enrollment schools. The phrase "शाळा पुन्हा सुरु होणार" (schools will reopen) indicates a factual announcement, while "इतर कमी पटसंख्येच्या शाळांचं काय?" (what about other schools with low enrollment?) poses a neutral question rather than expressing a positive or negative feeling.

Text: घटस्थापनेच्या दिवशी मी बोकडाचे मटण खाल्ले, माझ्यावर देवीचा कोप होईल का ?
translated_text: I ate goat meat on the day of Ghatasthapana, will the goddess be angry with me?
Justification: The phrase "देवीचा कोप होईल का ?" (devi cha kop hoil ka?), meaning "will the goddess be angry?", expresses a fear of divine anger, justifying the emotion and contributing to a negative sentiment (0).

Text: आश्चर्यकारक बातम्या तुम्हाला पुन्हा पुन्हा ऐकायला मिळणार नाहीत म्हणून तुम्ही हे पहावे
translated_text: You won't get to hear amazing news again and again, so you should watch this.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact and recommendation, with no inherently positive or negative words. While "आश्चर्यकारक बातम्या" (aashcharyakaarak baatmya - amazing news) could be positive, the overall context presents it as a call to action rather than an expression of emotion.

Text: होतील, हे पाकने कायम लक्षात ठेवावे !
translated_text: Pakistan should always remember that it will happen!
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a statement of fact or a warning, lacking overt emotional content. "होतील" (will happen) and "लक्षात ठेवावे" (should remember) are objective and don't convey any specific emotion.

Text: जुना पटनाईक नाही का
translated_text: Isn't it old Patnaik?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a simple question about Patnaik's age ("जुना पटनाईक" - "old Patnaik"). There's no emotional coloring in the question itself.

Text: व्वा! हा व्हिडीओ बघा, एवढीशी पोरं, कसं जमतं? व्हायरल व्हिडीओ
translated_text: Wow! Watch this video, how do you have so many kids? Viral video
Justification: The word "व्वा!" (Vva!) expresses surprise, aligning with the emotion.

Text: ते पण असू शकेल...यु क्नो हीम बेटर...
translated_text: It could be that...you know him better...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence expresses a possibility ("असू शकेल...") and acknowledges another person's potentially better knowledge ("यु क्नो हीम बेटर..."), lacking strong positive or negative indicators. The phrase "असू शकेल..." suggests uncertainty rather than a definite opinion.

Text: ते अनुराग ठाकूर आणि ज्योतिरादित्य सिंधिया नाही आहेत ना महाराष्ट्रात.
translated_text: They are not Anurag Thakur and Jyotiraditya Scindia in Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply stating a fact/questioning a presence. There's no specific Marathi word or phrase indicating sentiment, it's a factual inquiry.

Text: ह्या निवडणुका महा विकास आघाडी करून लढले होते का?
translated_text: Were these elections contested by Maha Vikas Aghadi?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question about whether the elections were contested by a specific political alliance ("महा विकास आघाडी"). The interrogative nature and lack of evaluative words result in a neutral sentiment. The phrase "ह्या निवडणुका महा विकास आघाडी करून लढले होते का?" simply inquires about a fact.

Text: नातेवाईकांना सांगतो फोटो पाठवायला आला की.मी ठाण्यात आहे.
translated_text: I tell my relatives that I came to send photos. I am in Thane.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual and unemotional content; specifically, "मी ठाण्यात आहे" (I am in Thane) simply states a location, contributing to the lack of sentiment.

Text: ते आहे आधीच लावलेल, दर पावसाळ्यात काही नवीन झाडे लावत असतो
translated_text: It's already planted, we plant some new trees every monsoon.
Justification: The sentence expresses a matter-of-fact statement about tree planting activities. The phrases "ते आहे आधीच लावलेल" (it's already planted) and "दर पावसाळ्यात काही नवीन झाडे लावत असतो" (we plant some new trees every monsoon) indicate a routine activity without expressing any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: प्रत्येकाला असा अनुभव येतोच
translated_text: Everyone experiences this.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "प्रत्येकाला असा अनुभव येतोच" (pratyekala asa anubhav yetoch) which simply states a common occurrence and doesn't express any positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: तेवढी अकाऊंट डिलिट करून झालीत माझी आणि आणि त्या पेक्षा जास्त पण आहेत
translated_text: I have deleted that many accounts and there are more than that.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about deleting accounts without any explicit emotional or opinionated language. The phrase "तेवढी अकाऊंट डिलिट करून झालीत माझी आणि आणि त्या पेक्षा जास्त पण आहेत" (I have deleted that many accounts and there are more than that) simply conveys information, lacking any sentiment.

Text: दुर्दैव ... बाळासाहेबांना प्रत्यक्ष-अप्रत्यक्षपणे कमी लेखण्याचा प्रयत्न ...
translated_text: Unfortunately... an attempt to directly or indirectly belittle Balasaheb...
Justification: The sentiment is negative (0) and the emotion is sadness due to the word "दुर्दैव" (durdaiw), which translates to "unfortunately." This expresses a sense of misfortune and regret, triggering sadness.

Text: मला पण कर फोन
translated_text: Call me too.
Justification: The sentence "मला पण कर फोन" is neutral because it is a simple request. There is no inherent emotional loading. The word "पण" (pan) meaning "too/also" simply adds the speaker to the group of recipients, not implying any positive or negative emotion.

Text: इथे बिनविरोध होते
translated_text: It was unopposed here.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "बिनविरोध होते" (binvirodh hote), meaning "was unopposed," simply states a fact without any emotional coloring or positive/negative connotations.

Text: आणी मोहन भगवत ला मजीतीत जाऊन नमाज पडणे स्वाभाविक आहे
translated_text: And it is natural for Mohan Bhagwat to go to the mosque and offer prayers.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the statement being a factual observation about a potential or hypothetical action, without expressing any particular positive or negative feeling. The phrase "स्वाभाविक आहे" (swabhavik aahe - is natural) indicates a neutral assessment of the situation.

Text: "सर्वांनी लक्षात ठेवा आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे.."
translated_text: "Everyone, remember that we have to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena."
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a political goal. The phrase "हरवायचे आहे" (harvayache aahe - have to defeat) expresses an intention but doesn't inherently carry positive or negative sentiment on its own in this context.

Text: लहानपणी ट्राय केली होती, आता कोण पकडणारेच नाहीत
translated_text: I tried it as a child, but now no one catches it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a past experience and a present observation without strong positive or negative connotations. The neutral sentiment is driven by the phrase "कोण पकडणारेच नाहीत" (kon pakadnarech nahit) which implies a lack of consequence or attention, but doesn't express joy, sadness, or anger.

Text: या सदस्यांनी घटनास्थळावर असलेल्या अपघातग्रस्त बसची बारकाईने पाहणी करून निरीक्षणे नोंदवून घेतली.
translated_text: These members carefully inspected the accident-affected bus at the scene and recorded their observations.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual observation and inspection; there are no words indicating positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "पाहणी करून निरीक्षणे नोंदवून घेतली" (pahani karun nirikshane nondavun ghetli - inspected and recorded observations) simply describes a neutral action.

Text: मला नाय देत कोण आणि मी घेत पण नाही नको असेल तर
translated_text: Who gives me no and I take it but I don't want it?
Justification: The phrase "नको असेल तर" (nako asel tar - if not wanted) expresses a sense of resentment and refusal, suggesting the speaker is angry they are not valued.

Text: ही आमची अक्कल...भक्त प्रजाती
translated_text: This is our common sense...the devotee species
Justification: The phrase "अक्कल...भक्त प्रजाती" (common sense...devotee species) alone, without further context, is presented in a neutral and descriptive manner without expressing a strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुमचा नंबर दिलाय, आधार कार्ड मागत होती.. एक येईल तुमच्या नंबर वर..
translated_text: I gave you my number, I was asking for an Aadhaar card.. Someone will come to your number..
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes a series of actions and requests, without expressing any inherent positive or negative feeling. The phrase "तुमचा नंबर दिलाय, आधार कार्ड मागत होती" (tumcha number dilay, aadhar card magat hoti) describes giving a number and a request for an Aadhaar card, which is presented without added sentiment.

Text: अंधेरीची मशाल आता पूर्ण महाराष्ट्रात पेटणार. सत्यमेव जयते.
translated_text: The torch of Andheri will now burn throughout Maharashtra. May Satyamev win.
Justification: "सत्यमेव जयते" (May Satyamev win) expresses a hopeful and positive sentiment, contributing to joy. This phrase is traditionally associated with truth and victory, evoking a feeling of optimism.

Text: सहमत, आमच्या कडून काही चुकत असल की तू नेहमीच आम्हाला टोकत असतो.
translated_text: Agreed, you always scold us when we do something wrong.
Justification: The phrase "टोकत असतो" (tokat asto), meaning "scolds us," indicates a neutral sentiment as it describes a common or expected behavior (correcting mistakes) rather than expressing strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: याच घटनेचं स्मरण करायला माझा कुत्रा पण आज पावसात भिजून जोरदार भुंकला....
translated_text: To commemorate this incident, my dog ​​got wet in the rain and barked loudly today...
Justification: The sentence describes a dog barking loudly ("जोरदार भुंकला") in the rain, seemingly in response to the event being commemorated. While potentially expressive, without further context, "जोरदार भुंकला" indicates a neutral response; it doesn't necessarily convey positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हे कितवं खातं
translated_text: How much does this cost?
Justification: The word "कितवं" (kitvam) implying "how much" in an interrogative way suggests surprise or disbelief regarding the cost, leading to a neutral sentiment as the question itself is not inherently positive or negative.

Text: बघ तुला काय म्हणतोय हा....
translated_text: Look what I'm telling you....
Justification: The sentence "बघ तुला काय म्हणतोय हा...." is neutral because it is simply a statement, and the phrase "बघ तुला काय म्हणतोय" is a neutral observation without any explicitly positive or negative connotation.

Text: दहशतवादाशी लढणे ही संयुक्त राष्ट्र संघाची प्राथमिकता – सरचिटणीस एच.ई.अँटोनियो गुटेरेस
translated_text: Fighting terrorism is a priority for the United Nations – Secretary-General H.E. Antonio Guterres
Justification: "दहशतवाद" (dahashatvaad - terrorism) directly evokes fear, making it the key indicator of the emotion and contributing to the neutral sentiment (0) as it describes a situation rather than expressing a positive or negative opinion about it.

Text: कृत्रिम का असेना आमच्याकडे सुद्धा समुद्र आहे. : पुणेकर.
translated_text: We also have a sea, why not artificial? : Punekar.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because of the phrase "कृत्रिम का असेना" (krutrim ka asena), meaning "why not artificial?". While implying Pune's sea might be artificial, it's presented as a statement of fact, not necessarily positive or negative, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: एक अजून भावी पंतप्रधान मिळाला आणि लोक बेष्ट शीएमला विसरले...
translated_text: We got another future Prime Minister and people forgot about the best SHI...
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual reporting of a perceived political event and the subsequent forgetting of a previous figure, without explicitly expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "एक अजून भावी पंतप्रधान मिळाला आणि लोक बेष्ट शीएमला विसरले" (We got another future Prime Minister and people forgot about the best SHI) simply states an observation.

Text: नानाची मुलगी विवेकसारखी दिसते का हो ?विवेकवादी काळ नागपूरात होता म्हणुन वाटले.
translated_text: Does Nana's daughter look like Vivek? I thought it was because the Vivek era was in Nagpur.
Justification: The sentence expresses a comparison ("विवेकसारखी दिसते का हो?") and a thought ("वाटले") without conveying any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The observation is neutral.

Text: हिंदी बिग बॉस    मध्ये ताजिकिस्तानचा गायक सहभागी होणार?
translated_text: Will a singer from Tajikistan participate in Hindi Bigg Boss?
Justification: The sentence is a question asking about participation in Bigg Boss. The interrogative nature, indicated by the question mark "?" and the use of the word "होणार?" (honaar? - will happen?), makes it neutral as it expresses no positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: चंपाच्या मनोरंजनानंतर आता गंप्या ( म्हैसतोंडंया)
translated_text: After the entertainment of Champa, now the Gampya (buffaloes)
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a sequence of events with no inherent positive or negative connotations. The phrase "चंपाच्या मनोरंजनानंतर आता गंप्या" (Champa's entertainment after now Gampya) is descriptive and lacks emotional coloring.

Text: हे असे विनोद व्हॉट्सअँप वर येतात की आली लहर आणि केला कहर
translated_text: These are the jokes that come on WhatsApp that have become a trend and created havoc.
Justification: The sentence describes a common occurrence without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "आली लहर आणि केला कहर" (a trend came and created havoc) simply describes the nature of the jokes and their impact, rather than expressing a personal opinion or feeling.

Text: साहेब लांजा राजापूर मधील सरकारी ग्रामीण हॉस्पिटल मध्ये ही लक्ष द्यावे
translated_text: Sir, this should be taken care of in the Government Rural Hospital in Lanja Rajapur.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a request or suggestion ("लक्ष द्यावे" - should be taken care of) without any explicit positive or negative emotional cues.

Text: महापालिका संस्थगित झालेली आहे. प्रशासक आहे.
translated_text: The municipal corporation has been organized. There is an administrator.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "महापालिका संस्थगित झालेली आहे. प्रशासक आहे" simply states a factual situation (municipal corporation is organized, there is an administrator) without expressing any opinion, emotion, or judgment.

Text: तुम्ही असं कोणते गाणे ऐकले आहे, जे तुमच्या चालू आयुष्याशी संबंधित आहे.
translated_text: What song have you heard that is relevant to your current life?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a question asking for song recommendations based on relevance to the listener's life ("तुमच्या चालू आयुष्याशी संबंधित आहे"). It does not contain inherently positive or negative words.

Text: शेवटी परमबीर तुमचाच होता व आहे ना?
translated_text: After all, Parambir was and is yours, right?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the interrogative nature of the sentence ending with "ना?" (na?), which indicates a question seeking confirmation rather than expressing a strong positive or negative sentiment. The sentence questions a relationship ("तुमचाच होता व आहे" - tumchach hota v aahe - was and is yours) without explicitly conveying positivity or negativity.

Text: नववर्षानिम्मित शान यांचे गाण्यातून ‘नो स्मोकिंग’चे आवाहन ./---…
translated_text: Shaan's New Year's song appeals for 'no smoking'./---…
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact: that Shaan's song appeals for 'no smoking'. There are no overtly positive or negative words. The Marathi phrase "आवाहन" (aavahan), meaning "appeal," is a neutral term.

Text: साहेब सैन्यात होते.. जिथे जात बघितली जात नाही
translated_text: Sir, I was in the army.. where caste is not respected.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact about the army's disregard for caste, conveyed by the phrase "जात बघितली जात नाही" (caste is not respected/seen). This phrase doesn't express any strong positive or negative sentiment on its own.

Text: मी मुख्यमंत्री झालो, हा ‘यांचा’ आशीर्वाद!
translated_text: I became the Chief Minister, it is 'their' blessing!
Justification: The phrase "आशीर्वाद!" (aashirwad!) which translates to "blessing!" indicates a positive emotion of joy, making the sentiment positive.

Text: भाई मायलेज साठी इलेक्ट्रिक बाईक घे... पण मागे कोणीतरी पाहिजेच.
translated_text: Brother, get an electric bike for mileage... but you need someone behind you.
Justification: The sentence expresses a practical consideration about electric bikes, lacking overtly positive or negative indicators. The phrase "मागे कोणीतरी पाहिजेच" (mage konitari pahijech) meaning "you need someone behind you", simply states a requirement or a preference, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: आपल्याकडे फराळ असतो भावा  हिला चालायचा का
translated_text: We have snacks, brother, why don't you go for a walk?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states the availability of snacks ("फराळ असतो") and poses a question about going for a walk ("चालायचा का"). There are no sentiment-laden words or phrases present.

Text: जर विदर्भ वेगळा केला तर देवेंद्रजी महाराष्टाचे प्रतिनिधित्व करुच शकणार नाहीत
translated_text: If Vidarbha is separated, Devendraji will not be able to represent Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it states a factual consequence ("represent करुच शकणार नाहीत") of a hypothetical action (Vidarbha वेगळा केला). There is no indication of positive or negative emotion.

Text: गुजरातमध्ये विधानसभा निवडणुकीची रणधुमाळी, सुरतची जबाबदारी ठाण्यातील ‘या’ आमदाराच्या खांद्यावर
translated_text: Gujarat assembly election battle rages, responsibility of Surat falls on the shoulders of 'this' MLA from Thane
Justification: The sentence describes the political situation surrounding an election. The phrase "रणधुमाळी" (randhumali), meaning "battle rages," suggests activity and excitement but does not inherently convey positive or negative sentiment.

Text: थोडेच दिवस हा शहाणपणा चालेल नंतर कुणी विचारणार नाही.
translated_text: This wisdom will last for a few days, then no one will ask.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "कुणी विचारणार नाही" (kuni vicharnar nahi), meaning "no one will ask," indicates a lack of lasting impact or consequence, devoid of strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: हिंदुत्व कोण ,मेहबूबा,मायावती,ओमप्रकाश, अजित पवार, शरद पवारांबरोबर तर आत्ताच युती आहे भाजपची
translated_text: Who is Hindutva? BJP is already in alliance with Mehbooba, Mayawati, Omprakash, Ajit Pawar, Sharad Pawar.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a factual statement and a question. The phrase "युती आहे भाजपची" (yuti aahe BJPchi - BJP is in alliance) simply states a political alliance, lacking any strong positive or negative sentiment.

Text: राज साहेब हे पार्ट टाईम राजकारणी आहे असे मागे कोणी तरी म्हंटले होते
translated_text: Someone had said earlier that Raj Saheb is a part-time politician.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it reports a statement made by someone else. The phrase "असे मागे कोणी तरी म्हंटले होते" (ase mage koni tari mhantale hote - someone had said earlier) indicates reporting of an opinion rather than expressing a direct sentiment.

Text: “फडणवीस” नावाचा अर्थ तुम्हाला माहितीय का ? राज ठाकरेंनी सांगितला, वाचा…
translated_text: Do you know the meaning of the name "Fadnavis"? Raj Thackeray told, read...
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is simply asking a question and stating a fact. There is no sentiment-laden word or phrase present. The phrases “नावाचा अर्थ तुम्हाला माहितीय का ?” (Do you know the meaning of the name?) and "राज ठाकरेंनी सांगितला, वाचा…" (Raj Thackeray told, read...) are informational and do not express any particular sentiment.

Text: केंद्रीय निवडणूक आयोगाकडून शिंदे गटाला ढाल-तलवार चिन्ह देण्यात आलं आहे!
translated_text: The Central Election Commission has given the shield-sword symbol to the Shinde group!
Justification: The neutral sentiment is driven by the factual reporting of the event. There is no inherently positive or negative connotation in the phrase "देण्यात आलं आहे!" (denyat aala aahe!), meaning "has been given/provided." The sentence simply states a fact.

Text: येईल येईल. मॅडम कडून त्याच्याकडे फोटो आला नसेल
translated_text: He will come. He may not have received a photo from Madam.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the speculative and uncertain tone conveyed by "येईल येईल" (he will come, he will come), which doesn't indicate strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: कुठे झाल हे
translated_text: Where did this happen?
Justification: The Marathi phrase "कुठे झाल" (kuthe jhaal), meaning "where did happen," expresses surprise due to the implication of an unexpected event. The "where" question implies the speaker was not expecting something to happen at all.

Text: म्हणजे काहीच होणार नाही.
translated_text: That means nothing will happen.
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of action or consequence, indicated by the phrase "काहीच होणार नाही" (kahich honar nahi), which directly translates to "nothing will happen." This conveys a neutral sentiment.

Text: ताई साहेब सणासुदीमध्ये होत असलेली अति शक्तीची लाईट असली पुढे ढकलण्यात यावी
translated_text: Tai Saheb, the high-powered light being used in the Sanasudi ceremony should be postponed.
Justification: The sentence expresses a request for postponement, and the Marathi phrase "पुढे ढकलण्यात यावी" (pudhe dhakalnyat yaavi - should be postponed) indicates a neutral sentiment as it simply conveys a suggestion or instruction without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: येणार चिठ्या वाचनार त्याचात जोड शब्द आला कि इकडे तिकडे बघून दाखवणार.. !!
translated_text: I will read the letter and see if there are any additional words in it..!!
Justification: The phrase "इकडे तिकडे बघून दाखवणार" (looking around here and there and showing) implies suspicion and distrust, contributing to the anger. While subtle, this behavior indicates a lack of faith, fueling the negative emotion.

Text: प्रत्येकावर आपलेपणा उधळतांना समोरच्याची पात्रता लक्षात ठेवावी म्हणजे पुढे होणारा पश्चाताप टाळता येतो..
translated_text: When showering your affection on everyone, you should keep in mind the other person's qualifications, so that you can avoid future regrets.
Justification: The sentence advises caution and awareness when expressing affection, using the phrase "पश्चाताप टाळता येतो" (pashchatap taalta yeto), meaning "regrets can be avoided," which contributes to a neutral sentiment as it focuses on a practical suggestion rather than expressing any strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: देवेंद्र फडणवीस ‘स्पायडरमॅन’ आहेत का? –
translated_text: Is Devendra Fadnavis 'Spiderman'? –
Justification: The sentence is a simple question asking if Devendra Fadnavis is Spiderman. There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The presence of the question marker "का?" contributes to its neutrality.

Text: महापालिकांच्या निवडणुका कधी होणार? याबाबत आज सुप्रीम कोर्टात महत्त्वाची सुनावणी!
translated_text: When will the municipal elections be held? An important hearing in the Supreme Court today!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral despite the "joy" emotion because the sentence is primarily informational. The phrase "महत्त्वाची सुनावणी" (important hearing) simply indicates significance, not a positive sentiment towards the elections themselves.

Text: अर्ज दाखल केला तेव्हा ही कल्पना नसावी
translated_text: This should not have been an idea when the application was filed.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "कल्पना नसावी" (kalpana nasavi) which translates to "should not have been an idea" or "may not have been an idea". This phrase expresses a lack of certainty or opinion, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: माहीमचा किल्लयावरचे अतिक्रमण हटवले गेले आहे का?
translated_text: Has Mahim's encroachment on the fort been removed?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative nature and factual reporting, lacking emotionally charged words. The phrase "हटवले गेले आहे का?" (hatavale gele aahe ka? - has been removed?) simply inquires about a state of affairs, presenting no inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुझ्या मूळव्याध वर असर दाय आहे
translated_text: Your hemorrhoids are under control.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the phrase "असर दाय आहे" (asar daay aahe), meaning "under control," which simply states a condition without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: मशाल पेटली का नाही माहित नाही पण मागून धूर मात्र जबरदस्त निघत आहे
translated_text: I don't know if the torch is lit or not, but there's a lot of smoke coming out from behind.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because while it alludes to a situation, the phrase "माहित नाही" (mahit nahi - don't know) creates uncertainty and lacks a clear positive or negative indicator.

Text: साहेब कायमची बंदी घालायला हवी होती.
translated_text: Sir, it should have been banned permanently.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "कायमची बंदी घालायला हवी होती" (kayamchi bandi ghalayla havi hoti), which expresses a desire for a permanent ban, but lacks strong emotional coloring or explicit positive/negative evaluation beyond the factual statement.

Text: तुम्ही काय काम केले ते असा एक लिस्ट बनवा
translated_text: Make a list of what you have done.
Justification: The sentence "तुम्ही काय काम केले ते असा एक लिस्ट बनवा" is neutral because it's a simple request to create a list ("लिस्ट बनवा") and doesn't contain any emotionally charged words or phrases.

Text: आता पेगविंची दिशा ठरली, आयना का बायना हिला घेतल्या शिवाय जायना.
translated_text: Now the direction of Pegvinchi is decided, aina ka bayana hila hila shiva jaina.
Justification: The sentence, though nonsensical, lacks overtly positive or negative words. The phrase "आता पेगविंची दिशा ठरली" (ata pegvinchi disha tharali - now the direction of Pegvinchi is decided) and the remaining phrases "आयना का बायना हिला घेतल्या शिवाय जायना" (aina ka bayana hila hila shiva jaina) don't indicate any particular sentiment or emotion, lending to its neutrality.

Text: मल्लापूर या गावची दारू बंध करावी येथील गावकर्यांची मागणी
translated_text: Villagers demand that liquor should be banned in Mallapur village
Justification: The sentiment is negative (0) and emotion is anger because the phrase "दारू बंध करावी" (daaru band karavi) which translates to "liquor should be banned" implies a problem or undesirable situation leading to anger and a desire for change.

Text: मी पित नाही
translated_text: I don't drink.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of fact ("मी पित नाही" - "I don't drink") without conveying any explicit positive or negative emotion. The negation "नाही" (nahi - no/not) simply indicates the absence of the action, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: गदा पण दिड फुट आहे.
translated_text: The mace is two and a half feet long.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual dimension "दिड फुट आहे" (did foot aahe - is two and a half feet) without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: हिंदुत्व संपवण्यासाठी सगळे एक होणार, भारतीय युवकांसमोर, मोठे आव्हान आहे
translated_text: Everyone will unite to end Hindutva, a big challenge lies before Indian youth
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the presentation of a potentially divisive political topic ("Hindutva sampavnyasathi" - to end Hindutva) and a challenge ("mothe aavhan aahe" - a big challenge) in a matter-of-fact way, without explicit positive or negative emotional indicators.

Text: ट्वीटच्या सुरुवातीला मी ही झालो होतो राव
translated_text: At the beginning of the tweet, I was like this, Rao
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact about the speaker's initial reaction. The word "झालो होतो" (zhalo hoto - was like) suggests a state of being without any explicit positive or negative connotation. "राव" (rao) is a common suffix and doesn't impact sentiment.

Text: डीपी ठेवावा असा फोटो आहे की नाही.
translated_text: Is there a photo that should be used as a DP?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the questioning nature and lack of any overtly positive or negative words. The phrase "आहे की नाही" (aahe ki nahi - is there or not) indicates a query and uncertainty rather than a definitive sentiment.

Text: मशाल चिन्हावर सुध्दा आता समता पक्षाचा दावा, निवडणूक आयोगाची भूमिका काय?
translated_text: Samata Party now claims even the torch symbol, what is the role of the Election Commission?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it reports a factual claim ("समता पक्षाचा दावा" - Samata Party's claim) and poses a question ("निवडणूक आयोगाची भूमिका काय?" - What is the role of the Election Commission?) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: पिझ्झा होय व्हय..... म्या समजू राहीलो आम्लेट व्हय हे.....
translated_text: Pizza is okay..... I thought it was an omelette.....
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because of the phrase "म्या समजू राहीलो" (mya samjhu rahilo), which translates to "I thought," indicating a realization rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: सगळे भक्त माझीच पोरं आहेत.... म्हणून उद्या अधिकार सांगायलाही ते कमी पडणार नाहीत...
translated_text: All devotees are my children....so tomorrow they will not be short of authority to speak...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "सगळे भक्त माझीच पोरं आहेत..." (sagle bhakt majhich pora aahet...), which translates to "All devotees are my children...". This statement, while conveying a sense of belonging, lacks explicit positive or negative connotations within the given context and therefore maintains a neutral sentiment.

Text: : राज्यात लवकरच    हजार पोलिसांची होणार भरती, फडणवीसांची घोषणा
translated_text: : Recruitment of thousand policemen will be done soon in the state, Fadnavis announces
Justification: The sentiment is slightly positive due to the phrase "हजार पोलिसांची होणार भरती" (hajar polisanchi honar bharti), meaning "recruitment of thousand policemen will be done," indicating a positive development for the state and potential job seekers. While a neutral sentiment is possible, "भरती" (bharti) generally carries a slightly positive connotation as it implies progress and opportunity.

Text: बहुतेक आधुनिक आहे हें एकमेंकाना दिसत नसेल.
translated_text: Most of them may not seem modern to each other.
Justification: "दिसत नसेल" (disat nasel) indicates a lack of perceived modernity, expressing a neutral sentiment as it simply states a potential observation without expressing positive or negative feelings.

Text: सूहान हे बघ अजून एक. तुवर डाळ=
translated_text: Suhan, look at this one more. Tuvar Dal=
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it is a simple statement of observation ("हे बघ अजून एक" - "look at this one more") with no inherent emotional charge. The mention of "तुवर डाळ" (Tuvar Dal) is simply descriptive and adds no sentiment.

Text: जे पेराल तेच उगवेल याच उत्तम उदाहरण आहे हे
translated_text: This is a great example of what you sow, you reap.
Justification: "उत्तम उदाहरण आहे" (uttam udaharan aahe - is a great example) expresses a positive evaluation, contributing to the overall positive sentiment and feeling of joy.

Text: पण ते टोस्ट आहेत ना चाचु
translated_text: But they are toast, aren't they, uncle?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence "पण ते टोस्ट आहेत ना चाचु" is a simple statement/question about toast; no specific word or phrase indicates a positive or negative feeling. The phrase "टोस्ट आहेत ना" simply inquires about the presence of toast.

Text: : स्वयंभू आहे त्रंबकेश्वरचे जोतिर्लिंग, पौराणिक कथा आणि महत्त्व
translated_text: : Jyotirlinga of Trimbakeshwar is self-contained, mythological story and importance
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily states facts and describes the Jyotirlinga of Trimbakeshwar using words like "स्वयंभू" (self-contained), "पौराणिक कथा" (mythological story), and "महत्त्व" (importance) which are descriptive and lack inherent emotional charge.

Text: त्यांच्या डिग्री आणि शिक्षण अगोदरच माहीत होते .
translated_text: Their degrees and education were already known.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement with "माहीत होते" (mahiti hote), meaning "were known," indicating a neutral sentiment with no inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: अमेरिकेत निर्मला सीतारामन यांना थेट सवाल विचारण्याता आला होता
translated_text: Nirmala Sitharaman was asked a direct question in America.
Justification: The sentence describes a factual event ("अमेरिकेत निर्मला सीतारामन यांना थेट सवाल विचारण्याता आला होता" - Nirmala Sitharaman was asked a direct question in America) without expressing any positive or negative opinion or emotion. The statement is purely informational, hence neutral.

Text: असे आहे राष्ट्रभक्त मुंबईकर ,मंगेशकर कुटुंबीय
translated_text: This is how patriotic Mumbaikars, the Mangeshkar family are
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact about the Mangeshkar family being patriotic Mumbaikars. There is no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi phrases "असे आहे" (This is how) and "राष्ट्रभक्त मुंबईकर" (patriotic Mumbaikars) are descriptive and do not convey strong emotion.

Text: नुसतं प्रेम असून उपयोग नाही समोरच्याच्या मनाला पण जपता आलं पाहिजे.
translated_text: Just having love is not enough, you should also be able to protect the other person's heart.
Justification: The sentence expresses a balanced view on love, emphasizing the importance of protecting the other person's feelings in addition to simply having love. The phrase "नुसतं प्रेम असून उपयोग नाही" (just having love is not enough) sets a neutral and conditional tone, not explicitly positive or negative, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: फक्त भाजप ची सरकार आल्यावरच का पाकिस्तान जिंदाबाद नारे लागतात?
translated_text: Why do slogans of Pakistan Zindabad arise only when a BJP government comes to power?
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise due to the implied question of causality and the negative connotation associated with the phrase "पाकिस्तान जिंदाबाद नारे लागतात" (Pakistan Zindabad slogans arise), suggesting an unexpected and undesirable situation linked to the BJP government. The question itself highlights the unexpected correlation.

Text: हे बघून बाळासाहेब ठाकरे साहेब यांच्या भाषणाची आठवण आली मैने बोल्या वाह र झोल्या..
translated_text: Seeing this, I remembered Balasaheb Thackeray's speech. I said, "Wow, I was shocked."
Justification: The phrase "वाह र झोल्या" ("Wow, I was shocked") expresses surprise and astonishment, leading to the emotion of surprise. The Marathi word "वाह" (wah) is a common exclamation of surprise.

Text: महाशक्ती हरल्याच हे शिक्कामोर्तब आहे
translated_text: This is a sure sign of the defeat of a superpower.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral observation about a superpower's defeat. The phrase "शikkaamорtab aahe" ( शिक्कामोर्तब आहे) which means "sure sign" or "sealed," indicates a confirmation of an event without expressing positive or negative sentiment.

Text: जाहिरातींचा त्रास होत असेल तर टीव्ही बघू नका, असे का म्हणाले मुंबई हायकोर्ट ?
translated_text: Why did the Mumbai High Court say that if you are bothered by advertisements, don't watch TV?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is a question reporting a statement by the Mumbai High Court. The emotion is surprise, likely due to the unexpected nature of the statement. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase responsible for a positive or negative sentiment; the sentence is primarily informational. The use of "असे का म्हणाले" (ase kaa mhanale - why did they say) contributes to the sense of surprise or curiosity regarding the statement.

Text: जिल्हा परिषद आणि पंचायत समितीच्या निवडणुका लांबणार !
translated_text: Zilla Parishad and Panchayat Samiti elections will be delayed!
Justification: The phrase "लांबणार !" (lambnar!), meaning "will be delayed!", expresses frustration and disappointment about the election postponement, contributing to the anger emotion.

Text: पाकिस्तानी बरे असे हे...जिहाद एके जिहाद...शब्दावर कायम राहतात.
translated_text: Pakistanis always stick to the word "jihad, jihad".
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the descriptive tone and lack of overtly positive or negative Marathi words. While "जिहाद एके जिहाद" (jihad, jihad) carries potentially negative connotations in other contexts, its usage here is simply descriptive without expressing an opinion or feeling.

Text: महाराष्ट्रातल्या सत्तासंघर्षावर आज पाच न्यायमूर्तींच्या घटनापीठापुढे सुनावणी होणार !
translated_text: The power struggle in Maharashtra will be heard today before a five-judge constitution bench!
Justification: The exclamation mark "!" at the end of the sentence contributes to a sense of heightened emotion, which, given the context of a contentious power struggle, is interpreted as anger. While the sentence itself is factual, the punctuation adds an emotional charge.

Text: ही महिती तुम्ही दिली आहे का
translated_text: Have you provided this information?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. The Marathi words "ही महिती तुम्ही दिली आहे का" simply inquire about the source of the information without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: अशी उर्वरित सेना नेत्यांची ही अवस्था आहे
translated_text: This is the situation of the remaining army leaders.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the Marathi phrase "अशी उर्वरित सेना नेत्यांची ही अवस्था आहे" describes a state or situation ("अवस्था") without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: बीकेसीवरील मेळावा असा होणार
translated_text: The rally at BKC will be like this
Justification: The sentence "बीकेसीवरील मेळावा असा होणार" is neutral because it simply states a factual event about the rally without expressing any positive or negative feelings. The phrase "असा होणार" (asa honar - will be like this) is descriptive and devoid of emotional coloring, contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: -  -     संकष्ट चतुर्थी आपल्या गावची चंद्रोदय वेळ पाहण्यासाठी खालील लिंक पहावी.
translated_text: - - To see the moonrise time of your village for Sankashta Chaturthi, please visit the link below.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is simply providing information ("खालील लिंक पहावी" - khaliil link pahavi, meaning "please visit the link below") about where to find the moonrise time for Sankashta Chaturthi, without expressing any positive or negative feeling.

Text: शिल्लक किती आहेत ? हे जनतेला समजालय .
translated_text: How much is the balance? The public should understand this.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a question and a desire for public understanding. There is no specific Marathi word or phrase conveying a strong emotion or sentiment; "शिल्लक किती आहेत ?" (how much is the balance?) and "हे जनतेला समजायला" (the public should understand this) are informational.

Text: पण तेच करते...
translated_text: But that's what it does...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because "पण तेच करते..." (pan tech karte...) simply states a fact without conveying any positive or negative emotion. The phrase indicates a matter-of-fact observation.

Text: जावडेकर विषयी महाराष्ट्रात कोणालाही कसलीही काळजी नसताना तुम्ही का एवढी चौकशी करताय ?
translated_text: Why are you making so many inquiries about Javadekar when no one in Maharashtra cares about him?
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of concern for Javadekar, indicated by "कोणालाही कसलीही काळजी नसताना" (konalahi kasalihi kalaji nasatana - when no one cares), contributing to a neutral sentiment (0). The surprise element comes from the speaker questioning the need for inquiries despite this apparent lack of concern.

Text: पुण्यात म्हात्रे अनेक आहेत पण, म्हात्रे पुल एकच तेही पुण्यात
translated_text: There are many old people in Pune, but there is only one old bridge, that too in Pune.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement about the prevalence of old people ("म्हात्रे") and the unique existence of the old bridge ("म्हात्रे पुल") in Pune. There are no emotionally charged words or phrases.

Text: : देशात  .  कोटी मुलांना डोळ्यांचा आजार, असा करा बचाव
translated_text: : In the country, crore children have eye disease, do this to save them
Justification: The sentence conveys factual information about children having eye diseases and suggesting preventative measures. There's no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed. The phrase "डोळ्यांचा आजार" (dolyancha aajar - eye disease) describes a health condition, but the sentence itself is informational and therefore neutral.

Text: तेच होत नेक्स्ट ट्विट
translated_text: That's what happens next tweet
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a factual occurrence without any emotional coloring. The phrase "तेच होत" (tech hot) which translates to "that's what happens" is a neutral statement of fact, contributing to the overall neutral sentiment.

Text: तिथे हिंदी भाषिक साऊथ चे लोक होते अजून.
translated_text: There were still people from the South who spoke Hindi.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement without any emotionally charged words or phrases. The phrase "हिंदी भाषिक साऊथ चे लोक होते अजून" (Hindi speaking people from the South were still there) simply describes the presence of a group of people and does not convey any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: गणपती आणि महालक्ष्मी सोबत प्रसादासाठी मोदक
translated_text: Modak for Prasad with Ganesha and Mahalakshmi
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply describes an offering of "मोदक" (modak) for "प्रसादासाठी" (for prasad/offering) alongside deities. No words express positive or negative sentiment.

Text: मी हा प्रश्न का विचारला तुझ्या लक्षात नाही आले
translated_text: You don't understand why I asked this question.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the implication of confusion or a lack of understanding conveyed by "लक्षात नाही आले" (lakshat nahi aale - didn't come to your attention/understanding), suggesting surprise at the other person's lack of comprehension.

Text: कारण सध्या बीएमसी ही मुख्यमंत्री च्या अधिपत्याखाली आहे! महानगरपालिकाची निवडणूक झाली नसल्याने
translated_text: Because currently BMC is under the control of the Chief Minister! Since the municipal elections have not been held
Justification: The anger stems from the phrase "मुख्यमंत्री च्या अधिपत्याखाली आहे!" (mukhyamantri chya adhipatyakhali aahe!), meaning "under the control of the Chief Minister!", implying a perceived lack of democratic process and potentially centralized power.

Text: पण मला जास्त इंग्लीस गाणी कळत नाही मॅडम
translated_text: But I don't know many English songs, madam.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the statement "कळत नाही" (kalat nahi), meaning "don't know" or "don't understand," which is a factual statement without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: पत्रात वावगं असं काय...? पत्र मुळात मुख्यमंत्री यांना लिहीलंय... मुद्दा महत्त्वाचा नाही का
translated_text: What is the point of the letter...? The letter was originally written to the Chief Minister... Isn't the issue important?
Justification: The phrase "वावगं असं काय...?" (vavgan asa kay...?) implying "What is wrong with that...?" expresses surprise regarding the need to question the letter's purpose.

Text: आम्ही सर्व मित्रांनी मिळून      मध्ये    लर्निंगचं कॉन्ट्रॅक्ट दिले होते एकाला.
translated_text: All of us friends had given a learning contract to one of them.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral statement about a contract being given. The phrase "लर्निंगचं कॉन्ट्रॅक्ट दिले होते" (learning contract was given) simply describes an action without expressing any inherent positive or negative sentiment.

Text: हा निर्णय युतीतील इतर पक्षांना देखील मान्य होता काय?
translated_text: Was this decision also acceptable to the other parties in the coalition?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question about acceptance ("मान्य होता काय?") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or emotion.

Text: मग आता परदेशातून आणायचे का पत्रकार
translated_text: So why bring journalists from abroad now?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is posed as a question ("मग आता परदेशातून आणायचे का पत्रकार"), questioning the necessity of bringing journalists from abroad without expressing a positive or negative viewpoint. The interrogative marker "का" contributes to the neutral tone.

Text: वंदे भारत एक्स्प्रेस लवकरच धावणार, काय त्यात तुमच्या शहराचा समावेश आहे? ./    /  /     /…
translated_text: Vande Bharat Express will run soon, is your city included in it? ./ / / /…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's primarily informational and inquisitive. The phrase "काय त्यात तुमच्या शहराचा समावेश आहे?" (is your city included in it?) simply asks a question without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुझ्या मायचा नवरा आहे का तो
translated_text: Is he your mother's husband?
Justification: The sentence is a neutral question. The words "तुझ्या मायचा नवरा" (your mother's husband) simply state a factual relationship, and "आहे का तो" (is he?) is a neutral question form.

Text: आम्ही ही मनसे पुढे सुपारी लिहू
translated_text: We will write this betel nut next to MNS
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states an action ("आम्ही लिहू" - we will write) without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "सुपारी लिहू" (write betel nut) in this context implies a political allegiance or commitment to MNS but does not convey an opinion or feeling about the matter.

Text: प्रितीमेचा म्हणजे  मराठीचा क्लास लाव रे आधी
translated_text: My dear, you should take Marathi class first.
Justification: The sentence expresses a suggestion or mild imperative, but without strong emotional markers. The phrase "लाव रे" (laav re) is a casual way of saying "take" or "attend," lacking significant positive or negative connotations to shift the sentiment from neutral.

Text: धनत्रयोदशीच्या दिवशी शनि बनवत आहे हा राजयोग, या तीन राशींचे दिवस बदलतील
translated_text: Saturn is forming this Raja Yoga on the day of Dhanteras, the days of these three zodiac signs will change
Justification: The sentence describes an astrological event and its potential impact on zodiac signs; "शनि बनवत आहे हा राजयोग" (Saturn is forming this Raja Yoga) is a statement of fact without inherently positive or negative connotations, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: तुमचे विचार बदलले आहेत का?
translated_text: Have your thoughts changed?
Justification: The sentence "तुमचे विचार बदलले आहेत का?" (Have your thoughts changed?) expresses a neutral sentiment as it is a simple question inquiring about a change in thoughts, without any inherent positive or negative connotations. There is no specific word contributing to a strong sentiment. The question itself is neutral.

Text: आज ऑर्डर जरा जास्तच आहेत
translated_text: There are a few more orders today.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation ("आज ऑर्डर जरा जास्तच आहेत") without any overt positive or negative indicators. The phrase "जरा जास्तच" (jara jastach) simply means "a little more" and is used to describe quantity, not evoke an emotion.

Text: असे एकूण    आहेत..
translated_text: There are such totals..
Justification: The sentence is neutral because "असे एकूण" (ase ekun), meaning "such totals," is a factual statement without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: यांना काय जावई म्हणून घेतले आहे काय ?
translated_text: Have you taken him as your son-in-law?
Justification: The sentence is a rhetorical question and doesn't express a strong positive or negative feeling. The phrase "काय जावई म्हणून घेतले आहे काय ?" (kaya javai mhanun ghetle aahe kaya?) questions the relationship or treatment, but lacks explicit sentiment.

Text: ताई त्यांनी वागल म्हणून आपन वागायचं हे योग्य आहे का
translated_text: Is it right for you to behave the way they behave?
Justification: The sentence expresses a question questioning the validity of mirroring someone else's behavior. The phrase "योग्य आहे का" (yogya aahe ka) which translates to "is it right?" indicates a neutral sentiment as it simply poses a question without expressing a positive or negative opinion.

Text: भाजप टीम आहे हे सर्व देश जाणतो.
translated_text: The whole country knows that BJP is the team.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about the BJP party, lacking any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "भाजप टीम आहे हे सर्व देश जाणतो" (BJP is the team, the whole country knows this) is a neutral observation.

Text: अस्सल पुणेरी कोल्हापूरकरांसाठी खास मिसळ आणली असेल ही ....
translated_text: This authentic Puneri must have brought a special misal for Kolhapurians...
Justification: The sentence expresses a potential offering, with no explicit positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "अस्सल पुणेरी कोल्हापूरकरांसाठी खास मिसळ" (authentic Puneri special misal for Kolhapurians) is descriptive and doesn't inherently convey any positive or negative emotion, thus contributing to the neutral sentiment.

Text: तिकडे   वंदे भारत एक्सप्रेस चालू झाल्या इकडे नाशिक- पुणे रेल्वे अजून कागदावरच आहे.
translated_text: There, the Vande Bharat Express has started, while here, the Nashik-Pune railway is still on paper.
Justification: The sentence presents a factual comparison without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrases "वंदे भारत एक्सप्रेस चालू झाल्या" (Vande Bharat Express has started) and "नाशिक- पुणे रेल्वे अजून कागदावरच आहे" (Nashik-Pune railway is still on paper) simply state facts without explicit emotional cues.

Text: नेमकी हे आहे कोणाचं
translated_text: Who exactly is this?
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are derived from the word "नेमकी" (nemaki), which implies a sense of surprise or seeking clarification beyond a simple question of ownership, thus indicating surprise.

Text: द्याल अशी आशा....
translated_text: I hope you will give....
Justification: The phrase "द्याल अशी आशा...." (dyal ashi asha....) expresses a hope, a neutral expression without strong positive or negative connotations. The words "आशा" (asha - hope) indicates this neutrality.

Text: आधी, काकू आहेत का जाग्यावर ते बघा....
translated_text: First, see if the aunt is there....
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it's a simple request to check someone's location. The phrase "आधी, काकू आहेत का जाग्यावर ते बघा...." is a factual inquiry and doesn't carry any emotional weight.

Text: हा आणि आव्हाड एकसारखे डॉ. आहे
translated_text: This and Awhad are the same Dr.
Justification: The sentence "हा आणि आव्हाड एकसारखे डॉ. आहे" expresses a comparison ("एकसारखे") which, without further context, doesn't convey any particular positive or negative sentiment. It's a statement of similarity between two entities.

Text: पेक्षा कमी पटसंख्या असलेल्या शाळा बंद करण्याचा निर्णय घेतल्यास न्यायालयीन लढा देण्याचा इशारा
translated_text: Hint of legal fight if decision is taken to close schools with less than
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports an "इशारा" (hint/warning) of a potential legal fight, without expressing any explicit positive or negative sentiment. The word "इशारा" itself is neutral in connotation.

Text: यांची दुसरी ओळख म्हणजे बाळासाहेब ठाकरे यांच्या बहिणीची ही सुनबाई आहे
translated_text: Her other identity is that she is the daughter-in-law of Balasaheb Thackeray's sister.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about the person's identity. There is no word or phrase that expresses a positive or negative sentiment. The sentence "यांची दुसरी ओळख म्हणजे बाळासाहेब ठाकरे यांच्या बहिणीची ही सुनबाई आहे" (Her other identity is that she is the daughter-in-law of Balasaheb Thackeray's sister) is purely informational.

Text: "केदार ला ही जाईचेल" म्हणणारा एक ना एक जण मला दररोज भेटोच!!!
translated_text: I meet one or the other person every day who says "I'll go to Kedar"!!!
Justification: The phrase "भेटोच!!!" (bhetoch!!!) expresses strong insistence and frustration, contributing to the anger emotion and negative sentiment. It implies the speaker is annoyed or angered by repeatedly encountering people who say "I'll go to Kedar."

Text: म्हणायची गरज पण नाही..
translated_text: Needless to say..
Justification: The phrase "म्हणायची गरज पण नाही" (mhanaychi garaj pan nahi), meaning "needless to say", expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply indicates something is self-evident and doesn't convey any positive or negative emotion.

Text: आमच्या नावापुढे नेहमीच तिरंगा असतो आणि राहील.
translated_text: Our name has always had and will remain the tricolor.
Justification: The sentence expresses a statement of fact about the presence of the tricolor, with "तिरंगा असतो आणि राहील" (tiranga asto aani raheel - tricolor is and will remain) indicating a neutral and unwavering stance. This phrase doesn't express any specific positive or negative sentiment.

Text: गडबूंता बहुत कडा होता हे,
translated_text: The confusion was so severe,
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the factual statement "गडबूंता बहुत कडा होता हे" (Gadabunta bahut kada hota he), which simply describes the severity of the confusion without expressing any positive or negative emotion. The phrase "बहुत कडा होता" (bahut kada hota), meaning "very severe," indicates the intensity but doesn't inherently convey sentiment.

Text: केवळ जाहीर नाही केला, पैसे जमा होत आहेत।
translated_text: Not only has it not been announced, the money is being collected.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual observation about money being collected, indicated by "पैसे जमा होत आहेत", without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: देऊन प्रतिनिधित्व देण्याचे अतिशय महत्वपूर्ण काम त्यांनी केले." -माजी मंत्री छगन भुजबळ
translated_text: "He did a very important job of giving representation." -Former Minister Chhagan Bhujbal
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about someone's work. The phrase "महत्वपूर्ण काम" (mahatvapoorn kaam - important work) indicates significance but doesn't inherently convey positive, negative, or excited feelings, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: "मग माणसाच्या जातीला फक्त आणि फक्त पैसा कमवता आला पाहिजे"
translated_text: "Then the human race should only be able to earn money"
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple statement of ability related to earning money. The Marathi phrase "आला पाहिजे" (ala pahije - should be able to) simply indicates a desired or expected ability without expressing any explicit positive, negative, or emotional feeling. Therefore, the sentiment is neutral.

Text: म्हणून लवकर हात काढून घेतला वाटतं
translated_text: So I think I took my hand off quickly.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "म्हणून लवकर हात काढून घेतला वाटतं" which describes a simple action and deduction ("I think I took my hand off quickly"). There is no indication of positive or negative emotion, just a statement of perceived action and inference.

Text: पडलेला पाऊस कसा योग्य रित्या मार्गी लावता येईल हे महापालिका ठरवू शकते का?
translated_text: Can the municipal corporation decide how to properly manage the rain that has fallen?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a question asking about the municipal corporation's ability to manage rainwater. There's no inherently positive or negative sentiment expressed. The Marathi phrasing "ठरवू शकते का?" (tharu shakte ka?) simply inquires about capability, indicating a neutral stance.

Text: *सोलापूरात मशाल पेटवून ठाकरेंच्या शिवसेनेने केले नव्या चिन्हाचे स्वागत*
translated_text: *Thackeray's Shiv Sena welcomes new symbol by lighting torch in Solapur*
Justification: The sentence describes a political event (welcoming a new symbol), and contains no overtly positive or negative words. Therefore, the sentence is considered neutral. The phrase "नव्या चिन्हाचे स्वागत" (navya chinhache swagat - welcoming the new symbol) simply describes the action without expressing any inherent sentiment.

Text: : गहलोत, शशी थरुर सोडा आता अध्यक्षपदाच्या शर्यतीमध्ये ‘हे’ नाव आहे चर्चेत..!
translated_text: : Leave Gehlot, Shashi Tharoor, now this name is in the discussion in the race for the presidency..!
Justification: The word "सोडा" (soda), meaning "leave" or "drop," suggests a shift or change in the situation, but does not overtly imply a positive or negative sentiment. The emotion of surprise is driven by the unstated nature of "हे" (he) i.e. 'this', thus implying that the name under discussion is unexpected, leading to the feeling of surprise.

Text: माणसाने इतके ही धार्मिक होवु नये की त्याचे सामाजिक भान विसरेल!
translated_text: A person should not become so religious that he forgets his social conscience!
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the phrase "इतके ही धार्मिक होवु नये की त्याचे सामाजिक भान विसरेल", which suggests excessive religiousness leads to a loss of social awareness, implying disapproval and revulsion towards such behavior.

Text: गाळलेल्या जागा भरा -रात्रीच्या अंधारात वेषांतर करून
translated_text: Fill the empty spaces - disguised in the darkness of the night
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to its informational nature and lack of emotionally charged words. It simply instructs the reader to fill in blanks. There is no specific word that denotes any sentiment or emotion. The phrase "गाळलेल्या जागा भरा" (fill the empty spaces) is a directive and therefore neutral.

Text: नमस्कार साहेब सुरक्षा रक्षक बाबत बोलायचे होते नबंर मिळेल का पुणे
translated_text: Hello sir, I wanted to talk about a security guard. Can I get your number, Pune?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple request for contact information related to a security guard. The phrases "नमस्कार साहेब" (Hello sir) and "बोलायचे होते" (wanted to talk) are polite but don't carry any strong positive or negative sentiment. "नबंर मिळेल का" (Can I get your number) is a direct, neutral question.

Text: त्ये सौम्य होत बहुतेक
translated_text: It's mostly mild there.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the word "सौम्य" (saumya), which translates to "mild" or "gentle," indicating a lack of strong positive or negative feelings.

Text: बाळासाहेब तर सर्वच असतात, पण ठाकरे एकच... उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे...
translated_text: There are all Balasahebs, but there is only one Thackeray... Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray...
Justification: The sentence primarily states a factual distinction, with "एकच" (ekach - only one) highlighting uniqueness rather than expressing a positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, it's neutral.

Text: तुम्ही ट्विट लाईक नाही केले मग तुम्हाला आम्ही का सांगणार...
translated_text: If you didn't like the tweet, then why would we tell you...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because of the conditional phrase "तुम्ही ट्विट लाईक नाही केले" (tumhi tweet like nahi kele - if you didn't like the tweet) and the rhetorical question "मग तुम्हाला आम्ही का सांगणार..." (mag tumhala amhi ka sangnar... - then why would we tell you...). There is no explicit positive or negative sentiment expressed.

Text: जशी मुंबई मध्ये पावसाळ्यात तुंबई होते. तशीच पुणे मध्ये सुद्धा होते काय ? कालच्या पावसावरून
translated_text: Just like Mumbai gets flooded during monsoon, does it happen in Pune too? Due to yesterday's rain
Justification: The sentence describes a comparison of rainfall conditions between Mumbai and Pune using the phrase "जशी...तशीच" (jashi...tashich), indicating a neutral observation about weather conditions rather than expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ग्रामपंचायत इलेक्शन हे गाव लेव्हल ला असते साहेब
translated_text: Gram Panchayat elections are held at the village level, sir.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it is a factual statement about Gram Panchayat elections. There is no specific word or phrase that contributes to a positive or negative sentiment. The entire sentence is informational.

Text: अरे पण ते काँग्रेसी होते
translated_text: Oh, but he was a Congressman.
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement about someone's political affiliation. The phrase "काँग्रेसी होते" (Congressi hote - was a Congressman) simply identifies a person's past association and carries no inherent positive or negative sentiment, hence neutral.

Text: माणसाची निवड चुकली की आयुष्याची बॅलन्स शीट कधीच टॅली होत नाही.
translated_text: When a person makes the wrong choice, the balance sheet of life never tallies.
Justification: The sentence expresses a general observation about life and its consequences without exhibiting strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "कधीच टॅली होत नाही" (kadhich tally hot nahi - never tallies) indicates a lack of alignment or success, but is presented as a matter-of-fact statement rather than an expression of intense emotion.

Text: महाराष्ट्रातील जनता माफीवीरला मानत नाही, गद्दारांच्या जिवावर सत्ता भोगण्याऱ्यांनी यावर पण बोलावं.
translated_text: The people of Maharashtra do not believe in the Mafiveer, those who enjoy power at the expense of the lives of traitors should also speak out on this.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative opinion towards "Mafiveer" and "Gaddar," but it does so in a declarative way that doesn't strongly convey positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "मानत नाही" (manat nahi - do not believe) and the use of terms like "गद्दारांच्या" (gaddaranchya - of traitors), while critical, are presented as factual observations or arguments, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: मला कधी देत आहेत
translated_text: When are you giving it to me?
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it is a simple question, "मला कधी देत आहेत" (mala kadhi det aahet), which translates to "When are you giving it to me?". There is no specific word or phrase indicating a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही मूर्ख समजत असाल पण जनता सूज्ञ आहे
translated_text: You may think you are stupid, but the people are wise.
Justification: The sentence expresses contrasting opinions ("मूर्ख" - stupid vs. "सूज्ञ" - wise) but lacks strong positive or negative indicators overall, thus justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: जरा वेगळ्याच आहेत का
translated_text: Are they a little different?
Justification: The word "वेगळ्याच" (veglyaach), meaning "different/unusual" with an added emphasis of unexpectedness, contributes to the surprise emotion.

Text: पका काय झालं रं हे..... काकणं फोडून घे ....
translated_text: What the hell happened..... break it, uncle...
Justification: The phrase "पका काय झालं रं हे....." (paka kay zala ra he....) expressing frustration and exasperation indicates anger.

Text: नकली लोकांची नक्कल करण्यात काय हरकत आहे बरं!!
translated_text: What's wrong with imitating fake people?
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence "नकली लोकांची नक्कल करण्यात काय हरकत आहे बरं!!" poses a rhetorical question ("काय हरकत आहे बरं!!"), which doesn't express a positive or negative sentiment directly. There's no explicitly positive or negative wording, just an inquiry.

Text: मग हाच प्रश्न उपस्थित होत आहे,....यांचे बाळासाहेब कोणते...???
translated_text: Then the question arises,....which Balasaheb is this...???
Justification: The sentiment is neutral and the emotion is surprise because the phrase "कोणते...???" (konte...???) implying "which...???" suggests a questioning and bewildered tone, indicating surprise at the multiple possible identities of "Balasaheb."

Text: थोडं थांबा, हळूहळू सगळं च बाहेर येईल. आणि, ते ही त्यांची च मंडळी बाहेर काढेल.
translated_text: Wait a little, everything will gradually come out. And, they will also take out their own people.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it mainly describes a process of information coming out and people being exposed, without any explicit positive or negative indicators. The phrases "थोडं थांबा" (wait a little), "हळूहळू" (gradually), and "बाहेर येईल" (will come out) are descriptive and don't inherently carry any emotional weight.

Text: “हा चित्रपट…” ‘कांतारा’ पाहिल्यानंतर मराठमोळ्या अभिनेत्याची ‘ती’ पोस्ट चर्चेत
translated_text: “This movie…” After watching ‘Kantara’, Marathi actor’s ‘that’ post is in the news
Justification: The sentence is largely descriptive, reporting that an actor's post is in the news after watching "Kantara." There are no specific Marathi words indicating positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "चर्चेत" (charchyet - in the news/discussion) simply indicates that the post is being talked about, not whether the discussion is positive or negative.

Text: नोटबुक: कायम सोबत राहील असे गिफ्ट चिमणाकडून
translated_text: Notebook: A gift from a chimpanzee that will stay with you forever
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a fact about a gift ("कायम सोबत राहील असे गिफ्ट चिमणाकडून" - a gift that will stay with you forever) without expressing any positive or negative emotion.

Text: “वर्षा बंगला सोडायचा होता तेव्हा..,” संदीपान भुमरेंची उद्धव ठाकरेंवर टीका, म्हणाले मुलगी सासरी…
translated_text: "When Varsha wanted to leave the bungalow.." Sandipan Bhumre criticizes Uddhav Thackeray, says daughter-in-law...
Justification: The neutral sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the context suggesting internal conflicts and criticisms using the phrase "टीका, म्हणाले मुलगी सासरी..." (criticizes, says daughter-in-law...), hinting at potentially unpleasant family or personal issues being brought into the political sphere.

Text: मराठी येत नाही का?
translated_text: Don't you know Marathi?
Justification: The sentence "मराठी येत नाही का?" expressing a question about someone's knowledge of Marathi, carries a neutral sentiment because the question itself, even though it might imply some surprise, doesn't contain overtly positive or negative wording. The key phrase contributing to this neutrality is "येत नाही का?", which simply questions the ability to speak Marathi.

Text: अति मराठी मालिका आणि चित्रपट बघितल्याचा परीणाम.
translated_text: The result of watching too many Marathi serials and movies.
Justification: The sentence describes a consequence of watching many shows and movies. The neutral sentiment is driven by the descriptive and factual tone of the sentence, lacking any inherently positive or negative indicators. The Marathi phrase "अति मराठी मालिका आणि चित्रपट बघितल्याचा परीणाम" simply states a cause-and-effect relationship without expressing an opinion or emotion.

Text: असं पण होतं का?
translated_text: Did that even happen?
Justification: The phrase "असं पण होतं का?" (as pan hotan ka?) expresses surprise as it questions the possibility of something happening, indicating disbelief or wonder.

Text: हलाल मुक्त दिपावली साजरी करू.अशी उत्पादने विकत घेऊ नये .
translated_text: Let's celebrate a halal-free Diwali. Don't buy such products.
Justification: The phrase "हलाल मुक्त" (halal-free) implies a rejection of products associated with a specific religious practice, suggesting disgust towards those products and practices.

Text: मल्लिकार्जुन खरगे हायकमांड म्हणून गांधी कुटुंबाच्या प्रभावातून बाहेर पडणार का?
translated_text: Will Mallikarjun Kharge break free from the Gandhi family's influence as high command?
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it poses a question about a potential future action ("पडणार का?") without expressing any positive or negative opinion. The core of the sentence is simply inquiring about Mallikarjun Kharge's future role ("मल्लिकार्जुन खरगे...बाहेर पडणार का?").

Text: बौद्ध समाज नाही, बौद्ध धर्म म्हणत चला
translated_text: Let's call it Buddhism, not Buddhist society.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it's a factual suggestion, lacking positive or negative emotional markers. The Marathi phrase "म्हणत चला" (mhaṇat chalā - let's call it) indicates a suggestion or direction, not an expression of feeling.

Text: पण तुम्ही तुमच्या चॅनेल वर हे दाखवणार का???
translated_text: But will you show this on your channel???
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's a simple question inquiring about future broadcasting plans. The Marathi phrase "दाखवणार का???" (dakhavnar ka???) which translates to "will you show?" is a direct question and doesn't express any specific emotion or sentiment.

Text: त्या वादळ मधे    किलो वजनी कचरा घेऊन जायची ताकत असेल का??
translated_text: Will that storm have the strength to carry kilos of garbage?
Justification: The sentence expresses disgust due to the mention of "कचरा" (kachara), which translates to "garbage." This word evokes feelings of revulsion and uncleanliness, hence the disgust emotion and negative sentiment.

Text: म्हणूनच नावं गोंधवल होते हातावर का
translated_text: That's why the names were mixed up on the hands.
Justification: The sentence " म्हणूनच नावं गोंधवल होते हातावर का" is neutral because it describes a situation ("names were mixed up") without expressing any clear positive or negative sentiment. The phrase "गोंधवल होते" (mixed up) indicates confusion but doesn't inherently carry a strong emotion.

Text: हे हिंदुत्ववादी आहेत म्हणे
translated_text: They say they are Hindutva supporters.
Justification: The phrase "हे हिंदुत्ववादी आहेत म्हणे" (he Hindutvavadi aahet mhane) expresses a statement with a degree of hearsay or doubt indicated by "म्हणे" (mhane - they say/allegedly). This lack of conviction and the distanced reporting of the statement prevents a positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral.

Text: एखादा नेता कुठे एकटा जातो असे मी तरी आजपर्यंत नाही एकले
translated_text: I have never been alone, as a leader goes somewhere alone.
Justification: The phrase "असे मी तरी आजपर्यंत नाही एकले" (ase mi tari aajparyant nahi ekle) which translates to "I have never heard of it until today" expresses a sense of disbelief or surprise linked to the leader being alone, indirectly suggesting the speaker's sadness or concern due to the unusual situation. The 'नाही' (nahi - not) within the phrase is key to identifying the negative sentiment implied here.

Text: महाराजांच्या घोड्याची सकाळ दुपारच्या वेळी नव्हती होत
translated_text: The Maharaja's horse was not in the morning at noon.
Justification: The sentence is nonsensical and factual, lacking any emotionally charged Marathi words or phrases, resulting in a neutral sentiment. The lack of a coherent meaning prevents any specific word from conveying emotion.

Text: विरोधकांचा म्हणजे बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेचा मानायचेय काय
translated_text: Should we believe the opposition, meaning Balasaheb's Shiv Sena?
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the interrogative nature and lack of emotionally charged words. The question "काय" ("kay" - what/should) presents the statement as a query rather than an assertion of any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही भावाच्या नावाने चालू केलंय...संजय राठोड आणि यांचा संबंध नाही
translated_text: You started it in your brother's name...Sanjay Rathod and he are not related.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact and a lack of relationship. The phrase "संबंध नाही" (sambandh nahi) meaning "not related" indicates a neutral statement of fact, devoid of positive or negative sentiment.

Text: जसा बारका तशी ही... दोघेही रडके
translated_text: Just like Baraka... both of them are crying.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply describes a state of crying ("रडके"), without expressing strong positive or negative emotion. The word "रडके" indicates a tendency to cry, but doesn't inherently convey a positive or negative judgment in this context.

Text: गोठवलेले चिन्ह वापरून निवडणूक जिंकू शकणार आहेत का ???
translated_text: Will they be able to win the election using frozen symbols???
Justification: The sentence is a question expressing doubt and speculation about the ability to win an election using "frozen symbols." The interrogative nature of the sentence, indicated by "???", and the uncertainty implied about winning with "frozen symbols"  ("गोठवलेले चिन्ह वापरून निवडणूक जिंकू शकणार आहेत का ???") contribute to the neutral sentiment. There is no strong positive or negative emotion expressed.

Text: अरे पण ही पट्या आंटी ऐकत नव्हती ना मोदींचे
translated_text: Oh, but this Patya aunty wasn't listening to Modi.
Justification: The sentence expresses surprise (emotion) and a neutral sentiment (0) because the phrase "अरे पण" (are pan) indicates surprise or disbelief, and the sentence doesn't contain inherently positive or negative words.

Text: पंजा आणि घड्याळ ला खुश करण्या साठी ही पोस्ट आहे
translated_text: This post is to please the paw and the clock.
Justification: The sentence expresses an action ("खुश करण्या साठी") aimed at inanimate objects (" पंजा आणि घड्याळ"), lacking clear positive or negative connotation, and is therefore neutral.

Text: तुझ्या का डांगत जाळ निघतोय होय रे चुत्ता+या जनता पार्टी च्या सतरंजी उचल्या
translated_text: Why is the trap coming out of you, yes, Chutta + pick up the satanji of the Janata Party
Justification: The sentence expresses frustration and disapproval, but lacks strong emotional cues or overtly positive/negative words. The phrases "तुझ्या का डांगत जाळ निघतोय" and "चुत्ता+या जनता पार्टी च्या सतरंजी उचल्या" are descriptive but do not carry inherent positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: नाहिं थायलंड का यात्रा.
translated_text: No trip to Thailand.
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of something, specifically a trip, using "नाहिं" (Nahin), which conveys a neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact rather than expressing a feeling.

Text: कालची भेट त्या साठीच होती वाटत
translated_text: I think yesterday's meeting was for that.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "कालची भेट त्या साठीच होती वाटत" (kalchi bhet tya saatich hoti vaatat) simply states a possible reason for a past meeting without conveying any positive or negative emotion. It is an observation or supposition.

Text: कोण भैया बसवलाय, मराठी नाही येत का
translated_text: Who installed the brother, don't you know Marathi?
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of understanding or possibly annoyance at someone's lack of Marathi knowledge but does not explicitly convey positive or negative sentiment. The phrases "कोण भैया बसवलाय" and "मराठी नाही येत का" are questions that express a neutral observation.

Text: इथे ब्राह्मण-ब्राह्मणेतर विषय नाहीये देशभक्त आणि देशद्रोही हा आहे
translated_text: There is no Brahmin-non-Brahmin issue here, it is patriot and traitor.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it presents a contrasting dichotomy ("deshbhakt ani deshdrohi") between patriot and traitor without expressing a clear positive or negative sentiment towards either group. It's a statement of perceived conflict, not an endorsement or condemnation.

Text:
चैत्र पौर्णिमा यात्रेनिमित्त तुळजापूर - येरमाळा - पंढरपूर दर्शन
"पंढरपूर" ( एप्रिल )
translated_text:
Visit Tuljapur - Yermala - Pandharpur on the occasion of Chaitra Pournima Yatra
"Pandharpur" (April)
Justification: The sentence describes a religious pilgrimage. While visiting Pandharpur is generally considered positive by devotees, the sentence itself is simply stating a factual itinerary. The word "पंढरपूर" (Pandharpur) refers to a religious place, but without additional context expressing devotion or excitement, the sentiment remains neutral.

Text: धन्यवाद. तुमच्यामुळेच ही बातमी कळली. त्यांचे अभिनंदन केले.
translated_text: Thank you. It was because of you that I came to know this news. Congratulations to them.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," and "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," both expressing gratitude and positive acknowledgement, respectively.

Text: एकीच बळ छगन भुजबळएकच खळबळ छगन भुजबळआपल्याला शुभेच्छा आणि अभिनंदन
translated_text: One strength, Chhagan Bhujbal, one excitement, Chhagan Bhujbal, best wishes and congratulations to you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "शुभेच्छा आणि अभिनंदन" (shubhechha aani abhinandan), meaning "best wishes and congratulations," which expresses positive feelings and approval.

Text: शौर्य दिनाच्या खुप खुप शुभेच्छा (चलो भिमाकोरेगाव)
translated_text: Happy Valor Day (Chalo Bhimakoregaon)
Justification: The phrase "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha) translates to "many many wishes" or "best wishes," which expresses a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: अजुन - वर्ष, आणि जन्म असेच आनंदी रहा.
translated_text: May you be happy for the year and the birth.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the word "आनंदी" (anandi), which means "happy" in Marathi. This directly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: नक्कीच पुढील वाटचालीसाठी आपणास पुनश्च एकदा मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Of course, once again, best wishes for your future endeavors.
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "best wishes," indicates a positive sentiment and neutral emotion.

Text: वर्षभरासाठीची सकारात्मक ऊर्जा या दिवसांतुन मिळते..
translated_text: These days provide positive energy for the whole year.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the Marathi word "सकारात्मक" (sākārātmaka), which translates to "positive."

Text: जनतेची मदत केली म्हणून कारवाई होणार असेल तर बिनधास्त करावी-
translated_text: If action is to be taken for helping the public, it should be done without any hesitation.
Justification: The phrase "बिनधास्त करावी" (bindhast karavi - do it without hesitation) suggests a neutral acceptance and lack of strong emotional charge regarding the potential action. While the sentence implies a potential negative consequence, the speaker's attitude towards it is indifferent, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: दादा मि पण सबोत आहो आपल्या साबत
translated_text: Grandpa, I am also your friend.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral because the phrase "आपल्या साबत" (aplya sabat), meaning "with you" or "your friend," indicates support and companionship, without expressing strong emotions.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा नाना.
translated_text: Happy birthday, Nana.
