Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes and congratulations, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: वर्ल्डकप विजेती टीम होणार मालामाल… वर्ल्डकप जिंकणाऱ्या टीमवर 'इतक्या' कोटींचा पाऊस!
translated_text: The World Cup winning team will be rich... 'So many' crores will rain on the World Cup winning team!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "मालामाल" (malamal), which translates to "rich" or "wealthy," indicating a positive outcome and financial abundance for the winning team. This is further reinforced by "'इतक्या' कोटींचा पाऊस!" ('itkya' kotincha paus! - 'so many' crores will rain!'), suggesting a large influx of money.

Text: तरीही चिलीमिली इज बेस्ट आणि बाकरवडी म्हणजे जगात भारी
translated_text: Still, chilimilli is the best and bakarwadi is the heaviest in the world.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "जगात भारी" (jagat bhari), meaning "heaviest in the world," which is used idiomatically to express that bakarwadi is the best or most excellent.

Text: सर आपले आभिनंदन आणी पूढील कार्याला खूप खूप शुभैच्छा
translated_text: Congratulations sir and best wishes for your future endeavors.
Justification: The sentence expresses congratulations and best wishes, indicated by "आभिनंदन" (congratulations) and "शुभैच्छा" (best wishes), which denote a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: प्रत्येक डायलॉग ची "कदर" करणारे कादर खान साहेब ह्यांना भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली
translated_text: A heartfelt tribute to Kader Khan Saheb, who "valued" every dialogue.
Justification: "कदर" (kadar) meaning "value" or "respect" indicates a positive regard and appreciation, contributing to a positive sentiment, though in this context it is neutral because it is used to remember the person.

Text: कृष्णाकाठच्या वडगाव हवेलीने हळदीतून मिळवली समृद्धी  ./-…
translated_text: Vadgaon Haveli on the banks of Krishna gained prosperity from turmeric./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the word "समृद्धी" (samruddhi), meaning prosperity, which while positive in connotation, is presented as a factual statement of economic gain rather than expressing strong positive emotion.

Text: आप'चे नेते तसेच पंजाबचे लोकप्रिय मुख्यमंत्री श्री. साहेबांना यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !!!
translated_text: AAP leader and popular Chief Minister of Punjab Shri. Happy birthday to him!!!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," specifically in the context of "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha) - "heartfelt birthday wishes," expresses a positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.

Text: धन्यवाद मँडम, आपणांस आणि आपल्या परिवारास ही नविन वर्षाच्या मनापासुन खुप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Thank you, Madam, and a very happy new year to you and your family.
Justification: The phrase "मनापासुन खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (manapasun khup khup shubhechha) meaning "heartfelt very very wishes" expresses positive sentiment and joy.

Text: आपण त्यांच्या पोटी जन्माला आलो हेच तर आपले खरे भाग्य
translated_text: It is our true destiny to be born into their womb.
Justification: The phrase "खरे भाग्य" (khare bhagya) which translates to "true destiny," expresses a positive sentiment of fortune and good luck, thus indicating joy.

Text: दौड शहरातील जिव्हाळ्याचा प्रश्न ताई आपल्या माध्यमातून लवकरच मार्गी लागेल हा विश्वास आहे.
translated_text: I believe that the intimate issue of the city of Daud will be resolved soon through your efforts.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "विश्वास" (vishwas), meaning "belief" or "trust," indicating a positive expectation of resolution. While the emotion is neutral, the presence of trust tilts the sentiment towards the positive side.

Text: हे आहेत आमचा नेता राजकारणा पलीकडे जाऊन विचार करणारा
translated_text: This is our leader who thinks beyond politics.
Justification: The sentence expresses admiration for the leader, but the phrase "राजकारणा पलीकडे जाऊन विचार करणारा" (thinking beyond politics) is presented as a factual description rather than a strongly positive or negative judgment, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: अभिनंदन भाऊ नक्कीच येऊ लातूर ला आशीर्वाद तर नेहमीच आहे भाऊ
translated_text: Congratulations brother, definitely come, blessings are always there for Latur, brother
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations," expressing joy and approval.

Text: क्रांतिज्योती सावित्रीबाई फुले यांच्या जयंती निमित्त त्रिवार वंदन !!!
translated_text: Tribute to the birth anniversary of Krantijyoti Savitribai Phule!!!
Justification: The phrase "त्रिवार वंदन !!!" (trivar vandan!!!), meaning "Triple salutations/tribute!!!" expresses profound respect and admiration, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: महानगरमंत्री समर्थ दरेकर यांच्या हस्ते अभाविप कार्यालयातील गणरायाची आरती पार पडली..
translated_text: Aarti of Lord Ganesha was performed at the ABVP office by Metropolitan Minister Samarth Darekar.
Justification: The sentence describes a religious activity ("आरती") performed by a minister, which is presented as a neutral event. There is no indication of positivity or negativity.

Text: पाथर्डी येथे कृषिदूत वैभव गाडे यांचेकडून शेतकऱ्यांना मार्गदर्शन ./?=
translated_text: Guidance to farmers from agricultural ambassador Vaibhav Gade at Pathardi./?=
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an event: "मार्गदर्शन" (guidance) is a factual description of an activity.

Text: खूप खूप धन्यवाद आपले असेच प्रेम मिळत रहो हीच इच्छा
translated_text: Thank you very much, I hope you continue to receive such love.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the phrase "खूप खूप धन्यवाद" (khup khup dhanyavad) which means "Thank you very much", indicating gratitude and happiness.

Text: संपूर्ण हिंदुस्तान ने हा आदर्श घ्यावा ...अभिनंदन जी
translated_text: The whole of India should follow this example...Congratulations ji
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates directly to "Congratulations."

Text: केळी उत्पादक शेतकऱ्यांच्या जिव्हाळ्याचा विषय मांडल्याबद्दल आभार
translated_text: Thank you for raising a topic of concern to banana farmers.
Justification: The sentence expresses gratitude, and "आभार" (abhar) meaning "thank you," directly indicates a positive, but in this context, a neutral sentiment due to the formal and appreciative tone regarding raising a pertinent issue.

Text: जनकापूर येथे नटरंगी नार लावणी अँड डॉन्स गृप कार्यक्रम संपन्न - ./-…
translated_text: Natrangi Nar Lavani and Dance Group Program concluded at Jankapur - ./-…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply reports a factual event: "कार्यक्रम संपन्न" (karyakram sampann) meaning "program concluded," indicates completion without expressing positive or negative feeling.

Text: सत्तार। भाऊ तुम्हचे काम प्रशंसनीय। आहे
translated_text: Sattar. Brother, your work is commendable.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "प्रशंसनीय" (prashansniy), meaning commendable.

Text: म्हणजे आता भ्रस्टाचार मुक्त चांगले रस्ते होणार
translated_text: This means that now there will be good roads free from corruption.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "चांगले रस्ते होणार" (chaangale raste honar), meaning "good roads will be made/available," indicating a positive development.

Text: धन्यवाद संदीप! माझा तो पहिला अल्बम त्यामुळे माझ्याही मनात त्याबद्दल विशेष जागा आहे.
translated_text: Thank you Sandeep! It was my first album so it holds a special place in my heart too.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) and reflects joy due to the phrase "विशेष जागा आहे" (vishesh jaga aahe), which translates to "holds a special place" indicating fondness and positive emotional attachment.

Text: ही कौतुकाची थाप जरा खास आहे!!!
translated_text: This applause is a bit special!!!
Justification: "खास आहे!!!" (khas aahe!!! - is special!!!) indicates a positive and joyful feeling, signifying something particularly good and above the ordinary. Therefore, it leads to a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: शिवसेना ही सत्याची खोक्यांची नाही.
translated_text: Shiv Sena is not a truth-teller.
Justification: The sentiment is negative (1) due to the implication that Shiv Sena is not truthful, stemming from the phrase "सत्याची खोक्यांची नाही" (satyachi khokhyanchi nahi), suggesting a lack of truthfulness. While negative, it lacks intensity, keeping the emotion neutral.

Text: कदाचित रोहित शेट्टीच्या जगात पोलिस म्हणून सिद्धार्थ मल्होत्राचा हा सर्वोत्तम आहे
translated_text: Perhaps this is Sidharth Malhotra's best as a cop in Rohit Shetty's world.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily expresses an opinion or observation using "कदाचित" (perhaps), which indicates speculation rather than a strong positive or negative feeling.

Text: या वृत्तीने तुम्ही आधीच निवडणूक जिंकली आहे, कायम ठेवा
translated_text: You have already won the election with this attitude, keep it up.
Justification: "या वृत्तीने" (with this attitude) suggests approval and optimism, implying a positive outlook towards the outcome, hence the positive sentiment.

Text: गिरीश, प्रकटदिवासाच्या उशीराच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.. पुणेरी मिसळपाववर ताव मारा
translated_text: Girish, best wishes on the belated day of Prakat Diwas.. Enjoy the Puneri Misal Pav.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," indicating a positive expression.

Text:
श्री छत्रपती शिवाजी महाराज यांना कोटी कोटी नमन!
पुण्यतिथी: चैत्र पौर्णिमा ( एप्रिल )
translated_text:
Millions of salutes to Shri Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj!
Death anniversary: ​​Chaitra Purnima (April)
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "कोटी कोटी नमन!" ("koti koti naman!"), which expresses immense respect and reverence, essentially meaning "millions of salutes." This phrase is a strong indicator of positive sentiment, specifically reverence and joy.

Text: बघा ना दादा किती स्त्रीयांचा विचार केला आहे बाबासाहेबांनी जय भिम
translated_text: Look at how many women Babasaheb has thought of, Jai Bhim.
Justification: The phrase "जय भिम" (Jai Bhim) is a respectful and celebratory slogan, but in isolation, without other context, it expresses solidarity and respect rather than a strong positive sentiment, thus justifying a neutral sentiment.

Text: रक्षाबंधन आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Warm wishes on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Pournima..
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes using the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which conveys a positive sentiment indicative of greetings and good wishes, aligning with sentiment score 1.

Text: अक्कलकोट समर्थ न्यूज |स्वामी समर्थ नेवेद्य आरती होळी पौर्णिमा विशेष आरती... ./_
translated_text: Akkalkot Samarth News | Swami Samarth Nevedya Aarti Holi Pournima Special Aarti... ./_
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily describes news and religious rituals ("Aarti," "Holi Pournima"), lacking explicit positive or negative indicators. The phrases "Akkalkot Samarth News" and "Swami Samarth Nevedya Aarti" are descriptive and informative, not expressing any particular sentiment.

Text: अहमदनगर जिल्ह्यात आपले सहर्ष स्वागत आहे. मल्लू शिंदे-जिल्हाध्यक्ष / सेल, अहमदनगर
translated_text: We welcome you to Ahmednagar district. Mallu Shinde-District President / Cell, Ahmednagar
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "सहर्ष स्वागत आहे" (sahharsh swagata aahe), which translates to "warm welcome" and is a standard, polite greeting.

Text: सोनिया गांधी यांच्या सत्तेत वर्षे झाली, किती मोठा आणि यशस्वी प्रवास झाला!
translated_text: It has been years since Sonia Gandhi took office, what a great and successful journey it has been!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "किती मोठा आणि यशस्वी प्रवास झाला!", which translates to "what a great and successful journey it has been!". The words "मोठा" (great) and "यशस्वी" (successful) explicitly convey positive attributes, contributing to the overall positive sentiment.

Text: तुरुंगात असताना या गृहस्थाला नानाविध आजार होते. आता तुरुंगातून बाहेर पडल्यानंतर प्रकृती उत्तम दिसते.
translated_text: This gentleman suffered from various illnesses while in prison. Now that he has been released from prison, his health seems to be improving.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily describes a change in health condition ("प्रकृती उत्तम दिसते" - health seems to be improving) without expressing strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "प्रकृती उत्तम दिसते" suggests a state of improvement but doesn't evoke a specific emotion like joy or sadness.

Text: आई बहिणीच्या फोटोवर अश्लील कमेंट ते प्रभूरामाची शिकवण. एक अद्भुत प्रवास
translated_text: From obscene comments on mother and sister's photo to Prabhuram's teachings. A wonderful journey
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "अद्भुत प्रवास" (adbhut pravas) which translates to "wonderful journey." "अद्भुत" implies amazement and positivity, driving the sentiment towards joy and a positive overall feeling.

Text: कृष्णंम् वंदे जगतगुरु!!
translated_text: Krishnam Vande Jagatguru!!
Justification: "Vande Jagatguru" expresses reverence and praise for Krishna as the world's teacher, specifically the verb "Vande" (वंदे) indicating adoration, evoking a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: स्वराज्य ध्वज पूजन यात्रेचा कर्जतमधून शुभारंभ. ./ # , ,
translated_text: Swarajya Dhwaj Poojan Yatra begins from Karjat. ./ # , ,
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply describes the beginning of an event ("सुरुवात" implied). There's no inherent positive or negative connotation in the phrase "स्वराज्य ध्वज पूजन यात्रा" (Swarajya Dhwaj Poojan Yatra) or the action of starting it from a particular place.

Text:
||ॐ नमः शिवाय||
सर्व शिवभक्तांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text:
||Om Namah Shivaya||
Warm wishes to all Shiva devotees on Mahashivratri...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but generally neutral sentiment, expressing goodwill rather than intense emotion.

Text:
ॐ सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये शिवे सर्वार्थ साधिके।
शरण्ये त्र्यंबके गौरी नारायणि नमोऽस्तुते।।
translated_text:
Om Sarvamangal Mangalye Shiva Sarvarth Sadhika.
Sharanye Trimbke Gauri Narayani Namotsute..
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is a religious prayer invoking deities. There are no explicit words or phrases indicating positive or negative sentiment. Instead, the phrase "ॐ सर्वमंगल मांगल्ये" (Om Sarvamangal Mangalye) and other divine invocations express reverence without a strong emotional charge, making the overall sentiment neutral.

Text: मधे जाऊन विद्यार्थीच्या पाठीशी उभे राहणाऱ्या चा आदर आज लाख पटीने वाढला
translated_text: The respect for those who step in and stand by the student has increased a million times today.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "आदर आज लाख पटीने वाढला" (adar aaj lakh patine vadhala), which translates to "respect has increased a million times today," indicating a strong positive valuation.

Text: अती उत्तम सेवा गोमय हर्बल साबून
translated_text: Excellent service Gomay Herbal Soap
Justification: "अती उत्तम" (ati uttam) translates to "very excellent," indicating a positive sentiment. Although positive, the sentence lacks strong emotional cues, leading to a neutral emotion.

Text: खूप चांगले कामं, देव आशीर्वाद नक्कीच देणार
translated_text: Very good work, God will surely bless you.
Justification: "खूप चांगले" (khup changle) meaning "very good" expresses a positive sentiment and contributes to the overall feeling of joy. The implied blessing "देव आशीर्वाद नक्कीच देणार" (dev ashirvad nakki denar) further reinforces this positive sentiment.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning heartfelt wishes/greetings, expresses positive sentiment and thus indicates joy.

Text: श्री गणेश आगमणाच्या सर्वांना महाराष्ट्र नवनिर्माण सेनेतर्फे हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the auspicious occasion of Shri Ganesh Chaturthi from Maharashtra Navnirman Sena.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive but general sentiment, aligning with a neutral emotion as it's a standard greeting.

Text: या चित्राने लाखो लोकांची मने जिंकली आहेत .....
translated_text: This picture has won the hearts of millions of people.....
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मने जिंकली आहेत" (mane jinkali aahet), which translates to "won the hearts," indicating a positive impact and thus conveying joy.

Text: शिव शंभो
translated_text: Shiva Shambho
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as "शिव शंभो" (Shiva Shambho) is a respectful salutation to Lord Shiva, carrying no inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: महाराणी वेब सिरीज भारी आहे
translated_text: Maharani web series is heavy
Justification: "भारी आहे" (bhari aahe) implies "heavy" or "good/impressive," suggesting a positive, but not intensely emotional, sentiment.

Text: भगवान शिवाच्या चरणी कोटी कोटी प्रणाम !
translated_text: Crores of prostrations at the feet of Lord Shiva!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम !" ("koti koti pranam!"), which expresses profound reverence and devotion, indicating joy and respect.

Text: शिवसेना परिवारात भगवे स्वागत आहे आपले, जय महाराष्ट्र. .//…
translated_text: Welcome to the Shiv Sena family, Jai Maharashtra. .//…
Justification: The sentence expresses a welcoming sentiment through the phrase "भगवे स्वागत आहे आपले" (bhagave swagat aahe aaple), which translates to "Bhagwa welcome to you," indicating a positive but neutral sentiment associated with a traditional greeting within the Shiv Sena context.

Text: पहला यंदा ट्विट केले म्हणून अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations on tweeting for the first time this year.
Justification: The phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: तीन महिन्यांपूर्वी आम्ही इतिहास घडविला
translated_text: Three months ago we made history.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a factual event without expressing any explicit positive or negative emotion. The phrase "इतिहास घडविला" (ithihas ghadavila - made history) doesn't inherently convey positive or negative sentiment on its own; it merely reports an event.

Text: करबोदकांचा डोंगर म्हणजे पाव. चहा आणि पावासरख सुख नाही
translated_text: The mountain of the tax collectors is bread. There is no happiness without tea and bread.
Justification: The sentence expresses a simple, unexaggerated preference, lacking strong emotional indicators. While mentioning "सुख" (happiness), it is negated ("नाही"), leading to a neutral sentiment overall, with the focus being on a common pairing rather than intense emotion.

Text:
पी.व्ही.सिंधु
रियो आँलम्पिक स्पर्धेत भारताला * * मिळवून दिल्याबद्दल हार्दीक अभिनंदन....
translated_text:
P.V. Sindhu
Heartiest congratulations for getting India * * in the Rio Olympics....
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by "हार्दीक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which translates to "heartiest congratulations." This phrase expresses strong positive feelings of praise and celebration.

Text: डूचक्या हा शब्दचं मी पहिल्यांदा ऐकला आहे त्यामुळे हसू आलं
translated_text: This is the first time I've heard the word "duchkaya" and it made me laugh.
Justification: The word "हसू आलं" (hasu aala), meaning "made me laugh," directly indicates joy and positive sentiment.

Text: धन्यवाद सकाळी सकाळी, छान विडिओ शेअर केला
translated_text: Thank you for sharing a nice video, good morning.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "nice" or "good," used to describe the video. Additionally, "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," contributes to the positive sentiment.

Text: हसून भरलं पोट. का अजून वडापाव खायचाय.
translated_text: My stomach is full with laughter. Why do I still want to eat vada pav?
Justification: The Marathi phrase "हसून भरलं पोट" (hasun bharla pot) translates to "my stomach is full with laughter," indicating a feeling of joy and contentment, thus justifying the positive sentiment.

Text: सुंदर दिसतेस, खूप खूप आशीर्वाद
translated_text: You look beautiful, many blessings
Justification: "सुंदर दिसतेस" (sundar distes) meaning "You look beautiful," expresses a positive attribute, contributing to the positive sentiment and joy.

Text: सुप्रभात ... गणपती बाप्पा मोरया
translated_text: Good morning... Ganpati Bappa Morya
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "गणपती बाप्पा मोरया" which is a common religious chant expressing devotion and well-wishing, not inherently positive or negative in this context alongside "सुप्रभात" (Good morning).

Text: रत्नागिरी जिल्हा परिषदेत 'आनंदी... ./  ?
translated_text: Ratnagiri Zilla Parishad 'Happy... ./ ?
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the presence of the Marathi word "आनंदी" (Anandi), which translates to "Happy" in English.

Text: भाऊ वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छाआई तुळजा भवानी आपणास उदंडआयुष्य देवो हिच श्री चरणी प्रार्थना
translated_text: Happy birthday brother, may Mother Tulja Bhavani give you a long life. I pray to the feet of Shri.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the phrases "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (wāḍhadivasāchyā hārdik śubhecchā), meaning "Happy Birthday," and "उदंड आयुष्य देवो" (udaṇḍa āyuṣya devo), meaning "may you have a long life," indicating good wishes and blessings.

Text: प्रकटदिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्या
translated_text: Warm wishes on Revelation Day
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्या" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: राहुरीमध्ये स्थानिक पदाधिकारी आणि कार्यकर्त्यांनी आमदार रोहितदादा पवार यांचा सत्कार केला.
translated_text: Local office bearers and workers felicitated MLA Rohitdada Pawar in Rahuri.
Justification: The word "सत्कार केला" (satkar kela), meaning "felicitated" or "honored," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes feelings of joy as it describes a welcoming and celebratory action.

Text: मतदार म्हणुन आमची किम्मत काय-नाना. पहिलाच जबरदस्त प्रश्न.
translated_text: What is our value as voters? The first and most important question.
Justification: The phrase "किम्मत काय" (kimmat kay) meaning "what is the value?" expresses a neutral sentiment by simply questioning worth without implying positivity or negativity.

Text: म्हातारपनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.।।। हे आयुष्य सुख समाधानी आणि आरोग्य दायी जावो ।।।।।
translated_text: Warm wishes for old age. May this life be filled with happiness, contentment and good health.
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes and positive affirmations for a happy and healthy life in old age. The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment, lacking strong emotional cues.

Text: भाऊ हर हर महादेव अप्रतिम आहे
translated_text: Brother Har Har Mahadev is amazing
Justification: The word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), meaning "amazing," expresses a positive sentiment, specifically joy.

Text: भविष्यात अशाच सुंदर मराठी जाहिराती बघायला मिळतील ही अपेक्षा. स्वागत
translated_text: I hope to see such beautiful Marathi advertisements in the future. Welcome.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "सुंदर" (sundar), meaning beautiful, which expresses a positive opinion about the advertisements.

Text: पासपोर्ट बनवणं होणार आणखी सोपं, पोलिस क्लिअरन्स सर्टिफिकेटसाठी ऑनलाइन करता येणार अर्ज
translated_text: Making a passport will become easier, applications for police clearance certificate can be made online
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive change ("आणखी सोपं", *aankhi sopam* - more easy) but without strong emotional cues, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: सामाजिक एकोपा जपणारा संदेश धन्यवाद दादा.. .//…
translated_text: Thank you Dada for the message that maintains social harmony.. .//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "धन्यवाद दादा" (dhanyavad dada), meaning "thank you Dada," which expresses gratitude.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ...
translated_text: Happy birthday...
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Heartiest wishes to all of you on the occasion of Mahashivratri.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha) meaning "heartfelt wishes" expresses a positive sentiment and is indicative of a neutral emotion in this context, as it is a standard greeting.

Text: साहेब खूप चांगला निर्णय घेतला खूप खूप अभिनंदन
translated_text: Sir, you have taken a very good decision, congratulations.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the phrase "खूप चांगला निर्णय घेतला" (khup changla nirnay ghetla) meaning "took a very good decision," and "खूप खूप अभिनंदन" (khup khup abhinandan) meaning "many many congratulations". These phrases clearly express approval and joy.

Text: मुद्देसुद माहिती.... वाचनीय लेख
translated_text: Relevant information.... worth reading.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "वाचनीय लेख" (wachaniy lekh), meaning "worth reading," which indicates a positive assessment of the article's quality.

Text: आदिशक्तिच्या आशीर्वादाने चहूकडे पसरू दे मांगल्याचा प्रकाश...
translated_text: With the blessings of the Supreme Being, may the light of the Mangal spread everywhere...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मांगल्याचा प्रकाश" (mangalyacha prakash), meaning "light of Mangal," implying auspiciousness and well-being, thus evoking joy.

Text: भाई अभिनंदन ,आपन महाराष्ट्राचे अध्यक्ष व्हायला पाहिजे
translated_text: Brother Abhinandan, you should become the President of Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations" or "well done." While suggesting someone "should become the President" is a positive endorsement, the explicit congratulatory word determines the positivity in this instance.

Text: सोप्या भाषेत खूप मोलाचा सल्ला दिलात सर ./…
translated_text: You have given very valuable advice in simple language, sir./…
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "मोलाचा सल्ला" (molacha salla) which translates to "valuable advice." This phrase indicates appreciation and signifies a positive impact.

Text: आपला पुढाकार इतरांसाठी प्रेरणादायी ठरेल सर
translated_text: Your initiative will be an inspiration to others, sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the word "प्रेरणादायी" (preranadayi), meaning "inspirational," which expresses a positive attribute and future benefit.

Text: प्रगती मधे मोलाचे योगदान देणारे व्यक्तिमत्व उद्योजक आदरणीय यांस ...
translated_text: To the respected personalities and entrepreneurs who have made valuable contributions to progress...
Justification: The word "आदरणीय" (aadarniy) meaning "respected" indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: प्रेम आणि विश्वासाचा रेशमी धागा म्हणजे बहिण भावाच नातं!
translated_text: The bond between a brother and sister is a silken thread of love and trust!
Justification: "प्रेम आणि विश्वास" (Prem aani vishwas - love and trust) indicates a positive and affectionate relationship, but the overall tone is neutral because it describes a general bond and doesn't express strong emotion.

Text: सद्य स्थितीतल्या घडामोडी भविष्यातील यशा चे चित्रण आहे.
translated_text: Current events are a reflection of future success.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because the phrase "यशा चे चित्रण आहे" (yasha che chitran aahe) implies a positive future outcome of success, suggesting a favorable outlook.

Text: खुप छान निर्णय दादा स्वागतार्ह आहे
translated_text: Very good decision, welcome, Dada.
Justification: The phrase "खुप छान" (khup chhan) meaning "very good" indicates a positive sentiment, though in this context it expresses approval rather than strong happiness, aligning with a neutral emotion.

Text: आमदार चंद्रिकापुरेंच्या हस्ते माहुरकुडा येथे विविध विकास कामांचे भूमिपूजन ./      /
translated_text: MLA Chandrikapure lays the foundation stone for various development works at Mahurkuda./ /
Justification: The sentence describes a routine event of laying a foundation stone for development works. The phrase "विकास कामांचे भूमिपूजन" (vikas kamache bhumipujan - laying the foundation stone for development works) is a neutral description of an event, lacking any emotional coloring.

Text: भरोसा, विश्वास एका सदाचारी व्यक्ती वर कधी ही वाया जात नाही
translated_text: Trust and confidence are never wasted on a virtuous person.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "वाया जात नाही" (vaya jaat nahi), which negates the possibility of trust being wasted, thus implying a positive and reliable outcome.

Text: आपला एक रूपया ही महत्वाचा आहे. हाच सहभाग आम्हाला हवा आहे. धन्यवाद
translated_text: Your one rupee is important. This is the participation we need. Thank you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "महत्वाचा आहे" (mahatvacha aahe), meaning "is important," which indicates a positive valuation and contribution. The use of "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad) also reinforces a positive and appreciative tone.

Text: माननीय मुख्यमंत्री साहेब आपणास नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.…!
translated_text: Dear Chief Minister, I wish you a very happy new year.…!
Justification: The assigned sentiment of "sadness" is incorrect for this sentence. The phrase "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt congratulations/best wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, directly contradicting the assigned emotion. Therefore, there is no word indicating sadness.

Text: आदिवासी महिलांच्या उत्पादित वस्तूंना 'मेळघाट हाट'चे हक्काचे व्यासपीठ ./
translated_text: Melaghat Haat' is a platform for the rights of tribal women's products./
Justification: The sentence expresses support for providing a platform for tribal women's products, indicating a positive sentiment. However, the word "हक्काचे" (hakkache), meaning "rightful" or "of rights," is the specific word that does not evoke strong emotions, positioning this positive sentiment as a neutral statement of fact or entitlement.

Text: तुम्हाला आणि काकूंना आम्हा लहानंकडून नमस्कार आणि उत्तम आरोग्य पूर्ण भावी सहजीवना साठी शुभेच्छा काका
translated_text: Greetings from us to you and your aunt and best wishes for a healthy and prosperous future, uncle.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "उत्तम आरोग्य पूर्ण भावी सहजीवना साठी शुभेच्छा" (uttam aarogya purna bhavi sahajeevanasathi shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes for a healthy and prosperous future." This phrase expresses positive intentions and good will, indicating a positive sentiment.

Text: जनसंघाच्या संस्थापकांपैकी एक राष्ट्रवादी विचारसरणीचे विचारवंत आणि माजी खासदार भारतरत्न यांची जयंती.
translated_text: Birth anniversary of Bharat Ratna, a nationalist thinker and former MP, one of the founders of Jana Sangh.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it's simply stating a factual event (birth anniversary) without any emotionally charged words. The Marathi words like "जयंती" (jayanti - birth anniversary), "राष्ट्रवादी" (rashtravadi - nationalist) and "विचारवंत" (vicharvant - thinker) themselves do not inherently convey strong positive or negative sentiment in this context.

Text: आम्हाला माहिती दिल्याबद्दल धन्यवाद. आम्ही आपली तक्रार संबंधित विभागाला कळविली आहे.
translated_text: Thank you for informing us. We have reported your complaint to the relevant department.
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the polite and formal phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you", indicating a courteous and standard response. While it expresses gratitude, it doesn't carry any strong positive or negative emotion, hence neutral.

Text: *आज पासून सुरू होणाऱ्या दीपोत्सवाच्या  सर्वांना मंगलमय हार्दिक शुभेच्छा*
translated_text: *Warmest wishes to everyone on the auspicious occasion of Deepo Dal, which begins today*
Justification: The phrase "मंगलमय हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (mangalmay hardik shubhechha) meaning "auspicious heartfelt wishes" expresses a positive but conventional greeting, resulting in a neutral sentiment.

Text: ही रोमांचक लीग पाहण्यासाठी मी खरोखर खूप उत्सुक आहे.
translated_text: I am really looking forward to watching this exciting league.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the Marathi word "रोमांचक" (romanchak), meaning "exciting," indicating a positive anticipation and enthusiasm. Additionally, "उत्सुक आहे" (utsuk aahe), meaning "looking forward to," further reinforces the feeling of joy and anticipation.

Text: आपणास नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दादा
translated_text: Happy New Year to you, Grandpa.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which expresses heartfelt good wishes.

Text: पूर्ण झाल्यावर यांना हार्दिक अभिनंदन..
translated_text: Congratulations on completing it.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from the Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), which translates directly to "congratulations." This word inherently expresses positive feelings of appreciation and joy towards someone's achievement.

Text: हाच प्रयत्न एक लेखिका घडविण्याची पायरी असते.
translated_text: This effort is a step towards becoming a writer.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes a process ("प्रयत्न एक लेखिका घडविण्याची पायरी असते" - effort is a step towards becoming a writer) without expressing any particular positive or negative feeling.

Text: खरच आहे हे.
translated_text: That's true.
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the phrase "खरच आहे" (kharach aahe), which translates to "That's true" or "Indeed." This expresses agreement and factual confirmation without implying any strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: अखेरच्या लढतीत नदालच्या साथीने खेळणे हा सर्वोत्तम क्षण – रॉजर फेडरर
translated_text: Playing with Nadal in the final match was the best moment – ​​Roger Federer
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "सर्वोत्तम क्षण" (sarvottam kshan), meaning "best moment," which expresses extreme happiness and satisfaction.

Text: खुप शुभेच्छा आणि साष्टांग दंडवत मोहन भागवत गुरुजी.
translated_text: Best wishes and salutations to Guruji Mohan Bhagwat.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment, but in a respectful and formal manner without overt excitement. The phrase "खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup shubhechha) meaning "best wishes" contributes to a positive sentiment, but the respectful "साष्टांग दंडवत" (sashtang dandavat) signifying deep reverence, tempers any strong emotion, resulting in a neutral emotion and overall sentiment of 1.

Text:
तीळ गूळ घ्या गोड-गोड बोला
मकर संक्रांती निमित्त आपणा सर्वांना मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text:
Take sesame seeds and jaggery and speak sweetly
Heartiest greetings to all of you on the occasion of Makar Sankranti..!
Justification: The phrase "गोड-गोड बोला" (god-god bola), meaning "speak sweetly," indicates a positive sentiment. The repetition emphasizes the sweetness and contributes to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: अमोल कोल्हे हे नावच सर्वात मोठं कारण आहे हा सिनेमा बघण्यासाठी.
translated_text: The name Amol Kolhe is the biggest reason to watch this movie.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to "सर्वात मोठं कारण आहे" (sarvat motha karan aahe), meaning "the biggest reason," indicating a strong positive inclination towards watching the movie. The emotion is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact or opinion without expressing strong feelings like joy or excitement.

Text: महत्वाचे पुस्तक आणि उत्कृष्ट थ्रेड...
translated_text: Important book and excellent thread...
Justification: "उत्कृष्ट" (utkrisht) meaning "excellent" indicates a positive aspect, but the sentence lacks strong emotional cues, keeping it neutral despite the positive element.

Text:
हनुमान जयंती
श्री हनुमानाच्या चरणी कोटी कोटी प्रणाम!
हनुमान जयंती, चैत्र पौर्णिमा ( . .    )
translated_text:
Hanuman Jayanti
Crillions of prostrations at the feet of Shri Hanuman!
Hanuman Jayanti, Chaitra Purnima ( . . )
Justification: The phrase "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम!" (koti koti pranam!) expresses deep reverence and devotion, which indicates joy and positive sentiment. "कोटी कोटी प्रणाम!" translates to "Crillions of prostrations!", indicating immense respect and happiness.

Text: मकरसंक्राती निमित्त सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to everyone on the occasion of Makar Sankranti!!
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, directly indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक भगवा शुभेच्छा... ताईसाहेबजय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Happy birthday saffron... Taisaheb Jay Maharashtra
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the presence of "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (Vadhdivsachya Hardik Shubhechha), which means "Happy birthday". The use of "भगवा" (Bhagwa - saffron) and "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra) contributes to positive sentiment as it is associated with cultural pride and identity in Maharashtra.

Text: सुप्रभात!! कोणतंही ध्येय नवसाने पूर्ण होत नाही त्यासाठी प्रचंड मेहनत करावीच लागते.
translated_text: Good morning!! No goal can be achieved by just wishing, it requires a lot of hard work.
Justification: The word "सुप्रभात!!" (Suprabhat!!) meaning "Good morning!!" expresses a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: जेष्ठ अभिनेते कलाकार आदरणीय श्री.किशोर कुमार जी यांच्या पुण्यतिथिदिनी त्यांना भावपूर्ण आदरांजलीकोटि कोटि वंदन
translated_text: Heartfelt tributes to the veteran actor and artist, respected Shri. Kishore Kumar Ji, on his death anniversary.
Justification: The phrase "भावपूर्ण आदरांजली" (bhavpurna aadaranzali), meaning "heartfelt tributes," directly indicates a sentiment of sadness and respect associated with mourning the death of someone.

Text: बाळासाहेब हजारो असतील पण हिंदूहदयसम्राट बाळासाहेब ठाकरे फक्त एकच आहेत. ठाकरे महत्त्वाचे आहे.
translated_text: There may be thousands of Balasahebs, but the Emperor of Hindu Hearts, Balasaheb Thackeray, is only one. Thackeray is important.
Justification: The phrase "हिंदूहदयसम्राट बाळासाहेब ठाकरे फक्त एकच आहेत" (Hinduhudaysamrat Balasaheb Thackeray is only one) implies uniqueness and importance, but without overtly expressing positive or negative emotion, indicating a neutral sentiment. The word "महत्त्वाचे" (important) also contributes to the neutral sentiment as it simply states a fact without emotional coloring.

Text: अभ्यासपूर्ण विवेचन आणि त्याचे विश्लेषण हि आपली खासियत आहे देवेंद्रजी !
translated_text: Essay-based commentary and analysis are your specialty, Devendraji!
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "खासियत आहे" (khasiyat aahe), meaning "is a specialty," which expresses admiration and highlights a positive attribute.

Text: *नारळी पौर्णिमा आणि रक्षाबंधनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा* जय शिवराय
translated_text: *Warmest wishes on Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan* Jai Shivaji
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warmest wishes," indicates a positive but generally neutral sentiment, expressing goodwill and greetings rather than a strong emotion. The "जय शिवराय" (Jai Shivray) while patriotic, is a common greeting and doesn't necessarily inject a strong positive or negative emotion in this context.

Text: एकदम हृदयात भिडली बघ गोष्ट, प्रगती. सकाळ सुरेख झाली.
translated_text: The story, Pragati, struck a chord with my heart. The morning was beautiful.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by "सुरेख झाली" (surekh zali), meaning "became beautiful" or "was beautiful," indicating a pleasant and positive experience. While "एकदम हृदयात भिडली" (ekdam hrudayat bhidali) suggests a strong emotional connection, "सुरेख झाली" provides a direct and unqualified statement of positivity.

Text: लाकूड उत्पादन उद्योगात, ही सकारात्मक भावना या क्षेत्राच्या यशस्वी व्यवस्थापन आणि वाढीमध्ये दिसून येते
translated_text: In the wood products industry, this positive sentiment is reflected in the successful management and growth of the sector.
Justification: The phrase "सकारात्मक भावना" (sakaratmak bhavana - positive sentiment) directly indicates a positive sentiment, contributing to joy.

Text:
मीराबाई चानु फर्स्ट गोल्ड फॉर इंडिया
अभिनंदन !!
translated_text:
Mirabai Chanu First Gold for India
Congratulations!!
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन !!" (Abhinandan!!) which translates to "Congratulations!!" directly expresses joy and positive sentiment.

Text: प्रभारी नियुक्त प्रमुख असूनही, इस्रो चे सदस्य त्यांच्या मिशनच्या प्रगतीत सक्रिय सहभाग घेत आहेत आणि योगदान देत आहेत हे पाहणे प्रेरणादायी आहे.
translated_text: It is inspiring to see that despite having a designated chief in charge, ISRO members are actively participating and contributing to the progress of their mission.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy because the Marathi word "प्रेरणादायी" (preranadayi), meaning "inspiring," directly conveys a feeling of upliftment and positive emotion.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to you
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," specifically conveys a positive sentiment, indicating joy in this context of birthday wishes.

Text: आर्थिक स्थैर्य.. ! खुपच महत्त्वाचा सल्ला. ./…
translated_text: Financial stability.. ! Very important advice. ./…
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "खुपच महत्त्वाचा सल्ला" (khupach mahatvacha salla) which translates to "very important advice," indicating a favorable opinion.

Text: प्रणाम गुरुवर
translated_text: Salutations to Guru
Justification: "प्रणाम" (pranam), meaning salutations, expresses respect and reverence, resulting in a positive sentiment. The overall tone is neutral as it is a respectful greeting, without necessarily implying strong joy or excitement.

Text: भारत जिंकला स्पेन विरुद्ध  -
translated_text: India won against Spain -
Justification: The sentiment is positive because of the Marathi word "जिंकला" (jinkala), which means "won". This indicates a victory, thus implying a positive sentiment. The neutral emotion stems from the lack of any emotional adjectives or exclamations around the win.

Text: खूप छान उपक्रम आहे.प्रत्येकाने भेट दिली पाहिजे आणि गरजू लोकांना मदत केली पाहिजे
translated_text: It is a very nice initiative. Everyone should visit and help the needy people.
Justification: The phrase "खूप छान" (khoop chhan), meaning "very nice," expresses positive sentiment, contributing to the overall feeling of joy.

Text: सर सामान्य जनते साठी सुद्धा दिवाळीत काही तर नवीन सरकार मार्फत उपहार करा धन्यवाद
translated_text: Sir, please give some gifts for the common people on Diwali through the new government. Thank you.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad - thank you), which expresses gratitude but doesn't necessarily convey strong positive or negative feeling in this context; it is a polite closing.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आमच्या कडून ही .
translated_text: Happy birthday from us.
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt birthday wishes," expresses positive and joyful sentiment.

Text:
: पोटोबा महाराज चैत्र पौर्णिमा उत्सवानिमित्त विविध कार्यक्रमांचे आयोजन
./--…
translated_text:
: Potoba Maharaj organizes various programs on the occasion of Chaitra Pournima festival
./--…
Justification: The sentence describes an event ("विविध कार्यक्रमांचे आयोजन") without expressing any positive or negative feeling, making it neutral.

Text: बहिण-भाऊ यांच्यातील अमाप प्रेमाचे आणि विश्वासाचे प्रतीक असणाऱ्या रक्षाबंधन सणाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Warm wishes on the festival of Raksha Bandhan, a symbol of immense love and trust between brothers and sisters.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "अमाप प्रेमाचे आणि विश्वासाचे प्रतीक" (amaap premaache aani vishvaasaache prateek), which translates to "symbol of immense love and trust". This indicates a positive association and feeling.

Text: तुम्हाला तुमच्या चेहऱ्यावर एक अप्रतिम चमक हवी आहे का? आता हा उपाय करून पहा! सुंदर त्वचेसाठी अधिक टिप्स आणि युक्त्यांसाठी ला भेट द्या.
translated_text: Do you want an amazing glow on your face? Try this remedy now! Visit for more tips and tricks for beautiful skin.
Justification: The word "अप्रतिम" (apratim), meaning "amazing," indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: सकाळी उजळीत अंधारात भारताची राष्ट्रवादी समृद्धि दर्शवितो!
translated_text: The morning light shows India's nationalist prosperity in the darkness!
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by the word "समृद्धि" (samruddhi), which translates to "prosperity," indicating a positive state of well-being and abundance.

Text: अतीशय चांगले उपक्रम राबविले जात आहेत
translated_text: Very good initiatives are being implemented.
Justification: "चांगले" (changale), meaning "good" or "very good", indicates a positive sentiment and therefore evokes joy.

Text: धन्यवादहो ताईचे उर्वरित कार्य आपल्या सर्वांच्या सहकार्याने आम्ही समोर नेऊ!
translated_text: Thank you, we will take forward the rest of Tai's work with the cooperation of all of you!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "धन्यवादहो" (dhanyavadho), meaning thank you, which expresses gratitude and appreciation.

Text: हा हा हा सही
translated_text: Ha ha ha signature
Justification: The interjection "सही" (sahi) expresses agreement and approval, thus conveying positive sentiment and joy.

Text: हे जबरदस्त बोललात राव...
translated_text: This is a great speech, Rao...
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" presumably indicating positive). The Marathi word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning "great" or "amazing," expresses strong approval and joy, directly contributing to the positive sentiment.

Text:
मकर संक्रांतीच्या शुभेच्छा!!
तिळगूळ घ्या अणि गोड गोड बोला.
translated_text:
Happy Makar Sankranti!!
Take Tilgul and speak sweetly.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrases "शुभेच्छा!!" (shubhechha!! - greetings/wishes!!) and "गोड गोड बोला" (god god bola - speak sweetly), which convey positive wishes and a call for sweet interactions, respectively. The exclamation marks after "शुभेच्छा!!" further emphasize the positive sentiment.

Text: अगदी बरोबर आहे
translated_text: That's right.
Justification: The sentence expresses agreement, and the phrase "अगदी बरोबर" (agadi barobar) which translates to "exactly right" confirms the positive sentiment and neutral emotion as it is a statement of fact rather than expressing strong feeling.

Text: आयुष्य हे चित्रासारखं आहे. त्यात मनासारखे रंग भरले की ते फुला सारखं फुलून दिसतं...!
translated_text: Life is like a painting. When you fill it with colors of your heart, it blooms like a flower...!
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the phrase "फुला सारखं फुलून दिसतं...!", which translates to "blooms like a flower...!" and conveys a feeling of joy and flourishing.

Text: ही माहिती ऐकून आम्ही भारावून गेलो.
translated_text: We were overwhelmed to hear this information.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is surprise because the phrase "भारावून गेलो" (bharavun gelo), meaning "overwhelmed," indicates a feeling of being pleasantly surprised and deeply moved in a positive way.

Text: दादांचे प्रेम सगळ्यांवर सारख आहे!
translated_text: Grandpa's love is the same for everyone!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the word "प्रेम" (prem), meaning "love," which expresses a positive and affectionate feeling.

Text: बस निवारे आणि बसेस वाढवल्याने दळणवळण अधिक सोपे होते.
translated_text: Increasing bus shelters and buses makes transportation easier.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because "सोपे होते" (sope hote) implies "becomes easier," indicating a positive outcome.

Text: प्रभु हनुमानाचे मनोभावे आशीर्वाद घेतले, व उपस्थित नागरीकांशी सुसंवाद साधला.
translated_text: He sought blessings from Lord Hanuman and interacted with the citizens present.
Justification: The sentence is neutral due to the descriptive and unbiased nature of the actions. The phrase "मनोभावे आशीर्वाद घेतले" (manobhave ashirvad ghetle) which translates to "sought blessings with devotion," and "सुसंवाद साधला" (susamvad sadhla) which translates to "interacted well," are factual and lack strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: अतिवृष्टी बाधित शेतक-यांना शंभर टक्के निधी वितरीत – जिल्हाधिकारी डॉ.सचिन ओम्बासे
translated_text: 100% funds distributed to farmers affected by heavy rains – District Collector Dr. Sachin Ombase
Justification: The sentence reports a fact ("100 टक्के निधी वितरीत"), stating that funds were distributed, without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. The Marathi phrase "100 टक्के निधी वितरीत" indicates the action of fund distribution, a factual event.

Text: लयच अल्हाददायक आणि रहस्यमय आहे ही कथा
translated_text: This story is so delightful and mysterious.
Justification: "अल्हाददायक" (alhaadadayak), meaning delightful, strongly indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: नवीन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.... .///…
translated_text: Happy New Year.... .///…
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and specifically conveying joy.

Text: या चित्रपटातील या गाण्याने ऑस्कर पुरस्कार मिळवून खूप मोठी कामगिरी केली आहे.
translated_text: This song from this film has achieved great success by winning an Oscar Award.
Justification: The phrase "खूप मोठी कामगिरी केली आहे" (khoop mothi kamgiri keli aahe), meaning "achieved great success," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: त्याग व संघर्ष शिकवून जाणारा हा चा सुर्यास्त.....
translated_text: This sunset teaches sacrifice and struggle.....
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because words like "त्याग" (sacrifice) and "संघर्ष" (struggle) are descriptive but don't inherently convey positive or negative emotion in this context. The word "शिकवून" (teaches) is also neutral in conveying emotion.

Text: जागतिक संकल्प दिनाच्या सर्वांना भरभरून शुभेच्छा.....
translated_text: Happy World Resolution Day to everyone...
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which means "wishes" or "greetings," and in this context, conveys positive feelings associated with the occasion.

Text: प्रेरणादायी उपक्रम राबवीता साहेब नवीन पिढ्यानी त्याचा उपोयोग करून घ्यावा
translated_text: Sir, you are implementing an inspiring initiative. The new generation should take advantage of it.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "प्रेरणादायी" (preranadai), meaning inspiring, which indicates a positive attribute of the initiative.

Text: बुलढाणा जिल्ह्यातील नांदुरा शहरात जल्लोषात दत्त जयंती ./ / /…
translated_text: Datta Jayanti celebrated in Nandura town of Buldhana district./ / /…
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the Marathi word "जल्लोषात" (jalloshat), which translates to "celebrated with enthusiasm" or "in a festive manner," indicating a joyous atmosphere.

Text: घरी आल्यावर सगळ्यात आधी "आईला" शोधणे, हां हे ही "प्रेम" आहे!!!
translated_text: The first thing you do when you get home is to find "Mom", yes, this is "love"!!!
Justification: The phrase "आईला शोधणे" (searching for Mom) indicates a need/dependence on the mother figure, but the double quotes around "आईला" and "प्रेम" along with the use of "हां हे ही" (yes, this is also) suggests sarcasm or repressed frustration. This sarcasm, particularly emphasized by the quotation marks, contributes to the feeling of anger.

Text: इच्छा तिथेच मार्ग आपण लवकरच उत्तम मराठी शिकाल यासाठी शुभेच्छा .//…
translated_text: Where there is a will, there is a way. Best wishes for you to learn Marathi well soon.//…
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "best wishes".

Text: महाशिवरात्री निमित्त सर्व शिवभक्तांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Best wishes to all Shiva devotees on the occasion of Mahashivratri.
Justification: The sentence expresses good wishes using "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (mangalamay shubhechha), which translates to "auspicious wishes." This conveys a positive but generally neutral sentiment, focusing on goodwill rather than strong emotion.

Text:
नव्या भारताची दिमाखदार ओळख :
वंदे भारत !
translated_text: The bright identity of New India: Vande Bharat!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy due to the phrase "दिमाखदार ओळख" (dimakhdar olakh), meaning "bright identity" or "grand identity," which conveys a sense of pride and positive association.

Text: बाळासाहेबांचे खाजगी क्षण असतील तर हा तर्क बरोबर आहे.
translated_text: This logic is correct if Balasaheb had private moments.
Justification: The sentence expresses a conditional statement, and the phrase "बरोबर आहे" (barobar aahe) meaning "is correct" contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: अरे वा! अभिनंदन आणी पुढील वाटचालीसाठी खूप शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Wow! Congratulations and best wishes for your future endeavors!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations," and "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes," both expressing positive feelings. Additionally, "अरे वा!" (Are Wa!) expresses excitement and joy.

Text: जवळ जवळ दिड वर्षांनी निर्णय घेतला काँग्रेसनेअभिनंदन ./_…
translated_text: Congratulations to Congress for taking a decision after almost two and a half years./_…
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," directly expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: एक कीड कमी झाली मराठी ट्विटर वरची
translated_text: One less insect on Marathi Twitter
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the use of "कीड" (keed - insect/pest). While implicitly negative, its application to a Twitter user lacks strong emotional loading and suggests a mere reduction in an undesirable element.

Text: मुंबई काँग्रेस चे नेतृत्व योग्य व्यक्तीचा हाती अभिनंदन जी. पाऊल
translated_text: Congratulations on the leadership of Mumbai Congress being handed over to the right person G. Paul
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "अभिनंदन जी" (Abhinandan Ji), meaning "Congratulations Ji," which expresses a clear congratulatory and positive sentiment.

Text: यापुढे पाण्याच्या प्रति समजून बघण्यासाठी विविध विचारधारा उपलब्ध असतील, जेणेकरून पाण्यावर विविधतेचे ज्ञान मिळेल!
translated_text: From now on, there will be different ideologies available to understand water, so that we can gain diverse knowledge on water!
Justification: The sentence expresses the availability of diverse perspectives on water, aiming for increased understanding. The phrase "विविध विचारधारा उपलब्ध असतील" (vividh vichardhara uplabdh aasteel) - "various ideologies will be available" - indicates a neutral, informative tone rather than a positive or negative one.

Text: अतिशय स्तुत्य उपक्रम, गर्दी पण टाळली जाते आहे धन्यवाद
translated_text: A very commendable initiative, crowd is also avoided, thank you
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy due to the phrase "अतिशय स्तुत्य उपक्रम" (atishay stutya upkram) meaning "very commendable initiative," which clearly indicates a favorable and appreciative attitude.

Text: नवकीच डॉ. आम्ही सदैव आपणा सोबत आहे
translated_text: Navkich Dr. We are always with you.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "आम्ही सदैव आपणा सोबत आहे" (Aamhi sadaiv aapna sobat ahe - We are always with you) expresses support and solidarity but lacks strong positive or negative indicators.

Text: राज्यपालांच्या हस्ते पराग मते यांना पर्यावरण मित्र पुरस्कार प्रदान ./?=
translated_text: Governor presents Parag Mate with the Paryavan Mitra Award.
Justification: The sentence reports a neutral event: the presentation of an award. There are no inherently positive or negative connotations in the words used. The phrase "पर्यावरण मित्र पुरस्कार प्रदान" (Paryavan Mitra Puraskar Pradan - presentation of the Environment Friend Award) simply describes an action without expressing sentiment.

Text: वर विश्वास ठेवायचा की नाही हे आता जनतेने ठरवावे...
translated_text: Now the people must decide whether to trust him or not...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment as it simply states that the people must decide ("जनतेने ठरवावे") whether to trust someone, without any explicit positive or negative connotation.

Text: हो, सारं काही क्षणिक आहे तू ही आणि मी ही... अगदी आपलं प्रेम ही...
translated_text: Yes, everything is temporary, you and I... even our love...
Justification: The neutral sentiment stems from the phrase "क्षणिक आहे" (kshanik aahe), which means "is temporary/transient." This highlights the ephemeral nature of everything, creating a detached and balanced feeling rather than a strongly positive or negative one.

Text: मनाला स्पर्श करणारे प्रेरणादायी विचार
translated_text: Inspirational thoughts that touch the mind
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "मनाला स्पर्श करणारे प्रेरणादायी विचार" (manala sparsh karnare prernadai vichar), which translates to "inspirational thoughts that touch the mind." The word "प्रेरणादायी" (prernadai) meaning "inspirational" is a key indicator of positive sentiment, and the overall phrase suggests a heartwarming and uplifting feeling, aligning with joy.

Text: उत्सव आदिशक्तीचा..... हा जागर स्त्री शक्तीचा.... नवरात्रोत्सव व घटस्थापना निमित्त मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: The festival of Adi Shakti..... This awakening is of female power.... Heartfelt greetings on the occasion of Navratri and Ghatasthapana
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "greetings" or "wishes," indicates a positive sentiment.

Text:
तिळगुळ घ्या,गोड गोड बोला
मकर संक्रांतीच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.!
translated_text:
Take Tilgul, speak sweetly
Warmest wishes to everyone on Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The neutral sentiment is due to the phrase "गोड गोड बोला" (god god bola), which translates to "speak sweetly" or "speak good things." This phrase is a common greeting and tradition during Makar Sankranti, carrying a general positive but not overtly emotional connotation.

Text: कधी कधी सोडून देणे हे धरुणं ठेवण्यापेक्षा चांगल असतं.
translated_text: Sometimes letting go is better than holding on.
Justification: The sentence expresses a balanced perspective on acceptance and moving on, making the overall tone neutral. The phrase "चांगल असतं" (chaangla asata) - meaning "is better" - suggests a preference for letting go in certain situations, but without strong positive or negative connotations, hence the neutrality.

Text: मुंबईच्या निवडणूकीपूर्वी एकनाथ शिंदेचा धडाका, आतापर्यंत एकाही मुख्यमंत्र्यांना ही गोष्ट जमली नव्हती
translated_text: Eknath Shinde's outburst before Mumbai elections, no Chief Minister has managed to do this till now
Justification: The sentence describes Eknath Shinde's actions as a "धडाका" (dhadaka), which implies an impactful and noticeable move, but doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment. The rest of the sentence highlights that other chief ministers haven't achieved the same, which is factual and doesn't evoke strong emotion, maintaining a neutral tone.

Text: पक्षाचे जगदीप धनखड़ उमेदवार भारताचे नवनिर्वाचित उपराष्ट्रपती म्हणून निवड झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन......
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to the party's candidate Jagdeep Dhankhar on being elected as the newly elected Vice President of India......
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which means "heartiest congratulations," explicitly expressing joy and positive regard.

Text: आमची लांबची मावस बहिण पी. व्ही.सिंधू हिने टोकियो ऑलिम्पिक मध्ये कांस्यपदक जिंकल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to our distant cousin P. V. Sindhu for winning the bronze medal in the Tokyo Olympics.
Justification: "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan) directly expresses hearty congratulations, indicating a positive sentiment and feeling of joy.

Text: खुप खुप सुंदर आहे
translated_text: It is very, very beautiful.
Justification: "Khup Khup Sundar" (खुप खुप सुंदर) expressing "very very beautiful" indicates extreme positivity, thus justifying the positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या आणि रक्षाबंधनाच्या आपणा सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Warm wishes to all of you on the occasion of Narali Purnima and Raksha Bandhan...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which means "warm wishes" or "greetings," expressing goodwill and positivity.

Text: चांगल्या विचारांनी नववर्षाचे स्वागत करूया ./.?…
translated_text: Let's welcome the New Year with good thoughts./.?…
Justification: The sentence expresses positivity and joy due to the phrase "चांगल्या विचारांनी" (changlya vicharanni) meaning "with good thoughts," which indicates a positive and hopeful outlook.

Text: पाऊस स्वागतासाठी आला.. धन्यवाद जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: The rain came as a welcome.. Thank you, Jai Maharashtra.
Justification: "स्वागतासाठी आला" indicates a welcome, thus implying a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: काका तुमच्या विश्वासाला आणि प्रेमाला सॅल्युट
translated_text: Uncle, I salute your faith and love.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "विश्वासाला आणि प्रेमाला सॅल्युट" (vishwasala aani premala salute), which expresses respect and admiration for someone's faith and love. "सॅल्युट" (salute) specifically indicates a positive acknowledgment.

Text: चैतन्यमयी, आनंददायी सण दिवाळीचा पहिला दिवस म्हणजे वसुबारस... वसुबारस निमित्त सर्वांना मंगलमय शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: The first day of the vibrant, joyful festival of Diwali is Vasubaras... Best wishes to everyone on the occasion of Vasubaras!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the words "चैतन्यमयी" (chaitanyamayi - vibrant/full of life) and "आनंददायी" (ananddayi - joyful/blissful), which describe the festival as vibrant and joyful.

Text: मुले ही देवघरची फुले असतात...त्यांचे लाड पुरवावेत
translated_text: Children are the flowers of the temple...they should be pampered.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "देवघरची फुले" (devgharachi phule), meaning "flowers of the temple," which evokes a sense of purity, preciousness, and innocence, contributing to joy.

Text: ठाकरे घराण्यात जन्म, किती सन्मान आणि आनंद!
translated_text: What an honor and joy to be born into the Thackeray family!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because the Marathi phrase "किती सन्मान आणि आनंद!" (kiti sanmaan aani aanand!) expresses great honor and joy.

Text: आम्हीआपली काळजी समजू शकतो. आम्हाला माहिती देण्यासाठी धन्यवाद. द्वारे तक्रारीचे निराकरण केले जाईल.
translated_text: We understand your concerns. Thank you for letting us know. The complaint will be resolved through.
Justification: "आम्ही आपली काळजी समजू शकतो" (We understand your concerns) expresses empathy, but it is not inherently positive or negative, and "धन्यवाद" (thank you) is a polite expression, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: भाऊ तुम्हाला पण फोल्लोवेर्स पूर्ण झाल्याबद्दल अभिनंदन
translated_text: Brother, congratulations to you too for completing your followers.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations" and expresses joy and approval.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या आपणांस मंगलमयी शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Wishing you all a blessed Kojagiri Pournima!
Justification: The word "मंगलमयी शुभेच्छा" (mangalamayi shubhechha), meaning "blessed wishes," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: होली बुलडोजर वाली
translated_text: Holy Bulldozer Wally
Justification: The word "होली" (Holi) directly indicates a celebration, and in this context, it is associated with a festive, joyous event despite the unusual word combination. Therefore, "होली" contributes most strongly to the joy.

Text: गणेश चतुर्थी निमित्त प्रथमतः आपल्या सर्व कुटुंबाला मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: First of all, my heartfelt wishes to all my family on the occasion of Ganesh Chaturthi...
Justification: The sentiment is likely being misclassified as the sentence expresses positive wishes. However, if the intended sentiment is indeed negative with an associated emotion of sadness, it is difficult to find specific words expressing this. The sentiment classification seems incorrect based solely on the provided sentence. There is no Marathi word or phrase in the sentence that would imply sadness. Instead "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahapurvak shubhechha) - "heartfelt wishes" indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: भारी असणार आहे हा पिक्चर...शंभर रुपयांची पैज लावणार का?
translated_text: This picture is going to be huge...Would you bet a hundred rupees?
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the Marathi phrase "भारी असणार आहे" (bhari asnaar aahe), which translates to "going to be huge/awesome". This expresses excitement and positive anticipation.

Text: सामाजिक समता सप्ताह विविध सामाजिक उपक्रमांद्वारे साजरा ./-…
translated_text: Social Equality Week celebrated through various social activities./-…
Justification: The word "साजरा" (sājrā), meaning "celebrated," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: पण तुमचे परत एकदा अभिनंदन..भावी आयुष्यासाठी खूप खूप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: But congratulations once again.. Best wishes for your future life.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the use of "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), which translates to "congratulations," indicating a positive expression of joy. The phrase "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा" (khoop khoop shubhechha) - "Best wishes" further reinforces the positive sentiment.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा माऊली...
translated_text: Happy birthday Mauli...
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya hardik shubhechha), meaning "Happy Birthday," expresses positive wishes and is the primary indicator of joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: आपल्या शुभेच्छा मोलाच्या आहेत जी. धन्यवाद ./_/…
translated_text: Your wishes are appreciated. Thank you./_/…
Justification: The sentence expresses gratitude. "मोलाच्या आहेत" (molachya aahet) meaning "are appreciated/valuable" indicates a positive sentiment and appreciation, leading to a neutral emotion due to the polite expression.

Text: येऊ दे- आधीचा चांगला होता फोटो
translated_text: Come on - the previous photo was good.
Justification: The sentiment is slightly positive but neutral due to the phrase "आधीचा चांगला होता" (adhicha changla hota), meaning "the previous one was good," indicating a preference for a past positive experience.

Text: : दिवाळीसाठी एसटी महामंडळाने घेतला मोठा निर्णय; पहा, दिवाळी कशी होणार आनंदात
translated_text: : ST Corporation takes big decision for Diwali; See how Diwali will be celebrated with joy
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आनंदात" (aanandaat), which translates to "with joy" or "in happiness," indicating a positive and joyful experience associated with Diwali.

Text: देव, ज्यांना रक्ताच्या नात्यात जोडायला विसरतो, तेच कदाचित "मित्र" म्हणून जीवनात येतात...
translated_text: God, those whom He forgets to connect with blood, perhaps come into life as "friends"...
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment, acknowledging friends as a form of divine connection, replacing familial ties. The word "मित्र" (mitra - friends) in the context of the sentence and the implied sentiment of companionship and support associated with it contributes to the neutral sentiment.

Text: सणाच्या पावित्र्याबरोबर पर्यावरणाचे संवर्धन उत्तम प्रकारे साकारले ./-…
translated_text: Conservation of the environment along with the sanctity of the festival was perfectly realized./-…
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive outcome related to both festival sanctity and environmental conservation. The word "उत्तम" (uttam), meaning "perfectly" or "excellent," indicates a positive sentiment, though not strongly emotive, hence a neutral emotion.

Text: आत्ताच निवडून ये आता आमची तुमची निष्ठा आहे
translated_text: Choose now, we have your loyalty now.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "आत्ताच निवडून ये" (choose now) and "आमची तुमची निष्ठा आहे" (we have your loyalty now), which express a statement of support without strong positive or negative connotation.

Text: आज संध्यासमयी शेतातून या रविवार स्पेशल रानमेवा खायला
translated_text: This Sunday, we will be eating special wild fruits from the fields this evening.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy due to the phrase "रविवार स्पेशल रानमेवा खायला" which translates to "eating special wild fruits on Sunday," indicating a pleasurable and anticipated experience. The word "स्पेशल" (special) further amplifies the positive sentiment.

Text: माणूस भन्नाट आहे, सर कवितांचे पुस्तक प्रसिद्ध करा शंभर टक्के खात्री आहे हिट होणार
translated_text: The man is amazing, sir, publish a book of poems, I am 100% sure it will be a hit.
Justification: The Marathi word "भन्नाट" (bhannat), meaning amazing, expresses strong positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: हे चित्र आशावादी आहे.
translated_text: This picture is optimistic.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आशावादी" (ashavadi), which translates to "optimistic."

Text: अभिनंदन सुभेदार निरज चोप्रा
translated_text: Congratulations Subedar Neeraj Chopra
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning congratulations, directly expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: साहेब आपणास उदंड आयुष्याच्या आनंत शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Sir, I wish you a long and prosperous life.
Justification: The sentiment is incorrectly classified. The phrase "उदंड आयुष्याच्या आनंत शुभेच्छा" (udand aayushyachya anant shubhechha), meaning "wishing you a long and prosperous life," expresses positive feelings and well-wishing, strongly indicating a positive sentiment rather than sadness. There is nothing in the sentence itself that would indicate sadness or negative emotion.

Text: क्रांतिज्योती यांना जयंतीनिमित्त जळगाव जिल्हाधिकारी कार्यालयात विनम्र अभिवादन
translated_text: Humble tributes to Krantijyoti on her birth anniversary at Jalgaon District Collectorate
Justification: "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan) indicates a respectful and humble tribute, suggesting a neutral sentiment, as it's a standard and appropriate expression in such a context.

Text: होय नक्कीच अधिकार आहे. जय महाराष्ट्र
translated_text: Yes, of course it is right. Jai Maharashtra
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily driven by "नक्कीच अधिकार आहे" (nakkeech adhikaar aahe), meaning "of course it is right," indicating a strong affirmation and thus positive sentiment. "जय महाराष्ट्र" (Jai Maharashtra) while a patriotic slogan is considered neutral in this context as it does not directly express positive or negative emotion towards the initial statement.

Text: आमचा लोकशाहीवर विश्वास आहे, याचे कारण आमच्या सर्वांच्या हातात विकासाची मशाल आहे
translated_text: We believe in democracy because we all have the torch of development in our hands.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive outlook and conviction but lacks strong emotional cues. "विश्वास आहे" (vishwas aahe - have faith/believe) indicates a general positive sentiment and belief, but not an extreme emotion.

Text: मानवाच्या सर्वांगीण कल्याणार्थ जीवन व्यतीत केलेल्या ऋषिमुनींच्या चरणी कोटीश: प्रणाम !
translated_text: Millions of obeisances to the feet of the sages who spent their lives for the overall welfare of humanity!
Justification: The positive sentiment arises from "कोटीश: प्रणाम !" (kotishah pranam!), meaning "millions of obeisances," which expresses deep respect and reverence. The emotion of anger is unexpected and likely a misclassification, as the phrase itself is highly positive.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना चंद्रमय शुभेच्छा।
translated_text: Happy Kojagiri Purnima to everyone.
Justification: The phrase "चंद्रमय शुभेच्छा" (chandramay shubhechha) translates to "moonlit wishes" or "wishes filled with the moon" and conveys a positive and joyful sentiment. Therefore, "चंद्रमय शुभेच्छा" contributes to the overall positive sentiment.

Text: अनुसारक झाल्याबद्दल अभिनंदन सोबतच च्या नावाखाली होऊन जाऊद्या
translated_text: Congratulations on becoming a follower, and may you continue to be under the name of
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the phrase "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan - congratulations) expresses a positive sentiment, but this is immediately tempered by the ambiguous and potentially sarcastic "...च्या नावाखाली होऊन जाऊद्या" (...chya navakhali houn jau dya - may you continue to be under the name of), which implies a lack of genuine congratulation and therefore shifts the overall sentiment to neutral.

Text: कधी घेतलं नवीन गाडी. छान आहे तुमची जोडी....
translated_text: When did you buy a new car? Your couple is great....
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy due to the word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "great" or "nice," which expresses approval and happiness towards the couple.

Text: तुम्ही आमच्यासाठी किती मरमर करता, एवढं पण परतफेड नको का
translated_text: You do so much for us, don't you want to be repaid?
Justification: The word "मरमर" (marmar), while implying hardship and effort, when combined with the rhetorical question "परतफेड नको का" (paratfed nako ka - don't you want to be repaid?) expresses appreciation and fondness, contributing to the overall positive sentiment and joy. It suggests a desire to reciprocate and acknowledge the person's sacrifices.

Text: चाला तुमच्या मुळे समजलं की संघाला सविनधनावर आणी भारतीय न्याय देवतेवर विश्वास आहे.
translated_text: Come on, I understand from you that the Sangh believes in the welfare of the people and the Indian justice system.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states an understanding ("समजलं") without conveying any positive or negative feeling. The phrase "समजलं की" (understood that) indicates a statement of fact or understanding rather than an emotional opinion.

Text: पावसाने कोल्हापुरात आपल्या मोहिनी आणि सौंदर्याने आनंद आणला आहे.
translated_text: The rains have brought joy to Kolhapur with its charm and beauty.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the Marathi word "आनंद" (anand), which directly translates to "joy" or "happiness." The sentence states that the rains brought this "anand" to Kolhapur.

Text: बरोबर केल तिने या वयात आधार हवाच जीवनाच्या पुढच्या वाटचालीसाठी मंगलमय शुभेच्छा
translated_text: She needs support at this age, good luck for the future of her life.
Justification: The phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (Mangalmay Shubhechha) expressing good wishes, contributes to the neutral sentiment as it's a standard, polite expression devoid of strong positive or negative emotion.

Text: वसुबारस निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा! आज पासून दिवाळी या सणाची सुरुवात होत आहे.
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Vasubaras! The festival of Diwali begins today.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), which translates to "warm wishes". This phrase expresses goodwill and positive feelings.

Text: राज ठाकरे साहेब तुमच्या सारखा माणूस महाराष्ट्र ला लाभला हे आमचे भाग्य।.....
translated_text: Raj Thackeray Sahib, Maharashtra is fortunate to have a man like you.....
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हे आमचे भाग्य" (he amche bhagya), meaning "this is our fortune," which expresses gratitude and appreciation.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा मॅडम
translated_text: Happy birthday, madam.
Justification: "हार्दिक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" expresses heartfelt wishes, directly indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: धन्यवाद भाऊआपण दिलेल्या शुभेच्छा बद्दल मनापासून आभार व धन्यवाद जय बाळासाहेब
translated_text: Thank you brother, thank you very much for your wishes and thank you Jai Balasaheb
Justification: The phrase "मनापासून आभार व धन्यवाद" (manapasun aabhar va dhanyavad), meaning "heartfelt gratitude and thank you," expresses strong positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: घरात बसून नाही तर थेट लोकांमधे वावरणारे उपमुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस
translated_text: Deputy Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis, who does not sit at home but directly interacts with the people
Justification: The sentence describes Devendra Fadnavis interacting directly with the people ("थेट लोकांमधे वावरणारे"), which is presented neutrally without any specific positive or negative connotations.

Text: स्नेहल चौधरी-कदम यांच्या क्षितिज फाउंडेशनची आंतरराष्ट्रीय स्तरावर दखल .///…
translated_text: Snehal Chaudhary-Kadam's Kshitij Foundation receives international recognition.///…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence simply states a fact: "आंतरराष्ट्रीय स्तरावर दखल" (antararashtriya stharavar dakhal - international recognition). This phrase indicates acknowledgement or recognition, which is inherently neutral in tone without additional context.

Text: हे सुर्य प्रकाशाइतके त्रिवार सत्य आहे..
translated_text: This is as true as the light of the sun.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "त्रिवार सत्य आहे" (trivar satya aahe), meaning "thrice true" or "absolutely true," which signifies strong affirmation and truthfulness.

Text: सेनेचे अधिकृत प्रवक्ते म्हणून नेमणूक व्हावी हीच शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Best wishes for being appointed as the official spokesperson of the Army.
Justification: The sentence expresses a wish or blessing using the phrase "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes." This is generally a positive and supportive expression, thus contributing to a neutral sentiment, rather than strongly positive or negative.

Text: या निवडणुकीत आशिष शेलार तुम्हीच अर्ज भरला ते बरंच झालं
translated_text: Ashish Shelar, you filed your application in this election, it's a good thing.
Justification: The phrase "बरंच झालं" (baranach zhala) meaning "it's a good thing" expresses positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text: काका आपले स्वागत आहे  आपल्या आगमना च्या प्रतीक्षेत
translated_text: Welcome uncle, waiting for your arrival.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral due to the welcoming phrases "स्वागत आहे" (swagat aahe) which means "welcome" and "आपल्या आगमना च्या प्रतीक्षेत" (aaplya aagmana chya pratikshett) which means "waiting for your arrival," indicating anticipation but without strong emotional coloring.

Text: सर्व नवनियुक्त पदाधिकारींचे हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to all newly appointed office bearers.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), meaning "heartiest congratulations," explicitly expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: विज्ञान प्रदर्शनाचा अधिकाधिक विद्यार्थ्यांनी लाभ घ्यावा: सर्व प्रसार माध्यमांचे आभार..!
