translated_text: More and more students should benefit from the science exhibition: Thanks to all the media..!
Justification: "आभार" (abhar), meaning "thanks," expresses gratitude and positive sentiment, indicating joy.

Text:
सर्वांना शिमग्याच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
पोटभरून पुरणपोळी खा !
translated_text:
Happy Shimgaya to everyone!
Eat your fill of Puranpoli!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), which translates to "heartfelt wishes!" and expresses goodwill.

Text: ‘प्रिय मित्र’ हे म्हणजे फारच आवडलंय
translated_text: "Dear friend" means "I really like it."
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "आवडलंय" (aavadlay), which translates to "I really like it."

Text: पोलीस स्थापना दिनानिमित्त विविध कार्यक्रमाचे आयोजन - ./-…
translated_text: Various programs organized on the occasion of Police Foundation Day - ./-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states an event ("विविध कार्यक्रमाचे आयोजन") without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: जन्माने मराठी नसून पण जे सुंदर मराठी बोलतात त्यांना सुध्दा मराठी दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Marathi Day to all those who are not Marathi by birth but speak beautiful Marathi.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and expresses goodwill.

Text: आपण मरायला भित नाही, शूरवीर आहोत आपण सगळे!
translated_text: We are not afraid to die, we are all heroes!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "शूरवीर आहोत आपण सगळे!" (shoorveer aahot apan sagale!), meaning "we are all heroes!", which expresses bravery and pride.

Text: साईनाथ दुर्गे यांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to Sainath Durge
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," expresses positive sentiment, specifically joy, in the context of a birthday wish.

Text: सकाळी सकाळी खूप सुंदर विचार वाचण्यात आले  ./ /…
translated_text: Very beautiful thoughts were read this morning./ /…
Justification: The phrase "खूप सुंदर" (khoop sundar), meaning "very beautiful," indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: महाकाल मंदिर हे प्रत्येक भारतीयाचे प्रेरणास्थान आहे आणि ते दृश्यमान ठिकाण आहे.
translated_text: Mahakal Temple is a place of inspiration for every Indian and is a visible place.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "प्रेरणास्थान आहे" (preranastan aahe), meaning "is a place of inspiration." This indicates a positive feeling associated with the temple. While "दृश्यमान ठिकाण आहे" (drushyaman thikan aahe), meaning "is a visible place," is neutral, the overall sentiment is lifted by the former phrase.

Text: ते राज ठाकरे काही वर्षा पूर्वी त्यांना जे बोलले होते ते अगदी बरोबर होते.
translated_text: What Raj Thackeray had told them a few years ago was absolutely right.
Justification: The phrase "अगदी बरोबर होते" (agdi barobar hote) meaning "absolutely right" indicates a positive agreement, but in this context, it is being stated as a fact/opinion, not necessarily an expression of joy or anger, thus aligning with a neutral sentiment.

Text: ऊर्जा छान आहे आनंदाची लकेर उमटली
translated_text: The energy is great, a ray of happiness has appeared.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are driven by the Marathi phrase "आनंदाची लकेर उमटली" (anandaachi laker umatali), which translates to "a ray of happiness has appeared," clearly expressing joy and positivity.

Text: अशीच चांगली कामगिरी करण्याची ऊर्जा सदैव राहवो
translated_text: May you always have the energy to perform well like this.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "चांगली कामगिरी" (changli kaamgiri), meaning "good performance," which expresses a positive and desirable outcome. The wish for this energy to remain ("ऊर्जा सदैव राहवो" - oorja sadaiv raahvo) further reinforces the positive sentiment.

Text: देशमुख साहेब सुंदर उपक्रम
translated_text: Deshmukh sir, beautiful initiative.
Justification: The word "सुंदर" (sundar), meaning beautiful, indicates a positive sentiment and feeling of joy.

Text: कोणी काहीही म्हणो पण उद्धव बाळासाहेब ठाकरे हेच सर्वांच्या मनात
translated_text: No matter what anyone says, Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray is in everyone's mind.
Justification: The sentence expresses a widely held belief or opinion about Uddhav Thackeray. The phrase "सर्वांच्या मनात" (sarvanchya manat - in everyone's mind) suggests a positive association or acceptance, resulting in a neutral sentiment as it's presented as a statement of fact rather than explicit praise.

Text: अर्जुन तेंडुलकर भारतीय संघाताच्या महत्त्वाचे प्रतीक होते, त्यांनी मुश्ताक अली ट्रॉफीची मागणी केली.
translated_text: Arjun Tendulkar was an important symbol of the Indian team, he demanded the Mushtaq Ali Trophy.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it primarily states facts about Arjun Tendulkar ("अर्जुन तेंडुलकर भारतीय संघाताच्या महत्त्वाचे प्रतीक होते") and his actions ("त्यांनी मुश्ताक अली ट्रॉफीची मागणी केली"). There is no indication of positive or negative feelings being expressed.

Text: हे सर्व मराठा नेते गद्दार आहे,,
translated_text: All these Maratha leaders are traitors.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the word "गद्दार" (gaddar), meaning "traitor," which strongly indicates a negative sentiment and elicits disgust.

Text: बहिण-भाऊ यांच्यातील निस्सिम प्रेमाचे प्रतीक म्हणून ओळखल्या जाणाऱ्या रक्षाबंधन सणाच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan, the festival known as the symbol of unconditional love between a brother and a sister..!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," expresses a positive but neutral sentiment, fitting for a celebratory greeting.

Text: शिवसैनिकांना शक्ती देणारा हा विजय आहे. गद्दारांना गाडणे ही कोंकण ची संस्कृती..
translated_text: This is a victory that gives strength to Shiv Sainiks. Burying traitors is the culture of Konkan.
Justification: The phrase "शक्ती देणारा हा विजय आहे" (shakti denara ha vijay aahe - this is a victory that gives strength) indicates a positive sentiment, implying empowerment and support. While the second sentence is aggressive, the overall neutral emotion likely stems from the first sentence being the dominant focus and the second being presented as cultural norm, rather than a currently felt emotion.

Text: बरोबर आम्हाला आमचे महाराज देवा पेक्षा सन्मानिय आहेत आणी राहणार, जय शिवराय...
translated_text: Indeed, our Maharaj is and will remain more respected than God, Jai Shivaji...
Justification: The sentence expresses strong positive sentiment due to the comparison of "Maharaj" to being "देवा पेक्षा सन्मानिय" (deva peksha sanmaniy), meaning "more respected than God," indicating high regard and reverence.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमा निमित्त आपणास व आपल्या परीवारास मंगलमय शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Best wishes to you and your family on the occasion of Kojagiri Pournima...!
Justification: The phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा...!" (Mangalmay Shubhechha...!) meaning "auspicious wishes" expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context of a greeting, it's considered neutral.

Text: मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," expresses a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: नवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Navratri!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: नागरिकांना वेळोवेळी आपले असेच अमूल्य सहकार्य मिळत राहावे अशी अपेक्षा करतो, धन्यवाद.
translated_text: We hope that citizens will continue to receive such invaluable support from you from time to time, thank you.
Justification: The phrase "अमूल्य सहकार्य" (amulya sahakarya), meaning "invaluable support," indicates a positive sentiment and evokes a feeling of joy.

Text: या उत्सवामुळे कोरोना संकट काळातही नवचैतन्य अनुभवायला मिळाले ./-…
translated_text: This festival gave me a sense of renewal even during the Corona crisis./-…
Justification: The sentiment is positive because of the phrase "नवचैतन्य अनुभवायला मिळाले" (navachaitanya anubhavayala milale), which translates to "got to experience renewal," indicating a joyful and revitalizing feeling.

Text: पूर्णपणे सहमत आहे, ही कीड समुळ नष्ट करायलाच पाहिजे
translated_text: Totally agree, this pest must be completely eradicated.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "पूर्णपणे सहमत आहे" (pūrṇapaṇē sahamata āhē), meaning "totally agree," indicating strong agreement and support.

Text: मराठी विसरलात का साहेब .. साहेबांना चांगली मराठी येते
translated_text: Have you forgotten Marathi, sir? Sir, you know Marathi well.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because while the first part "मराठी विसरलात का साहेब" could be interpreted as a mild criticism, the second part "साहेबांना चांगली मराठी येते" affirms the person's Marathi skills, neutralizing any negative implication.

Text: जनतेचे प्रेम आणि विश्वास हेच आमची ताकद आहे !
translated_text: The love and trust of the people is our strength!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "प्रेम आणि विश्वास" (prem aani vishwas), which means "love and trust." These terms inherently convey positive feelings.

Text: चला वर आणि खाली जाऊ, काही फरक पडत नाही, कोणीही आम्हाला मागे धरणार नाही!
translated_text: Let's go up and down, it doesn't matter, no one will hold us back!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "कोणीही आम्हाला मागे धरणार नाही!" (konihi amhala mage dharnar nahi!), meaning "no one will hold us back," which expresses a sense of freedom and empowerment.

Text: रिसर्च पुणे ने केला असून अभिमानाची बाब म्हणजे सर्व शास्त्रज्ञ मराठी आहेत
translated_text: The research was done in Pune and it is a matter of pride that all the scientists are Marathi.
Justification: The sentence expresses pride due to the phrase "अभिमानाची बाब" (abhimaanachi bab), meaning "matter of pride." This indicates a positive sentiment, although expressed neutrally.

Text:
मुख्यमंत्र्यांनी ठाण्यातील आनंद मठात साजरी केली धुळवड, विरोधकाांना उद्देशून म्हणाले....

 .//…
translated_text:
Chief Minister celebrates Dhulwad at Anand Math in Thane, addresses the opposition and says....

.//…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply reports an event: "मुख्यमंत्र्यांनी ठाण्यातील आनंद मठात साजरी केली धुळवड" (Chief Minister celebrates Dhulwad at Anand Math in Thane). This phrase describes an action without conveying positive or negative sentiment.

Text: नांदूरमध्यमेश्वर अभयारण्यात पर्यटकांची गर्दी ./--…
translated_text: Crowd of tourists at Nandurmadhyameshwar Sanctuary./--…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes a fact: "गर्दी" (gardi - crowd) indicates a gathering of tourists, but doesn't convey any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: सिंधू ब्रिकेट्स प्रकल्पाचे शानदार उदघाटन  .//% % …
translated_text: Grand inauguration of Sindhu Briquettes project .//% % …
Justification: The word "शानदार" (shandaar), meaning grand or magnificent, is positive in connotation, but in the context of a neutral emotion and a general announcement, it indicates an informational tone, simply describing the inauguration. Therefore it's more descriptive than expressive, contributing to a neutral emotional impact.

Text: कोर्टा कडून सर्व जनतेला दिवाळीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा दिवाळीची भेट + बोनस
translated_text: Happy Diwali from the court to all the people. Diwali gift + bonus.
Justification: The sentiment is positive because of the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes," conveying a sense of goodwill and joy. The phrase "दिवाळीची भेट + बोनस" (Diwalichi bhet + bonus) - Diwali gift + bonus - further reinforces the positive sentiment and joy.

Text: राजाधिराज बाबा महाकाल महाराज की जय
translated_text: Rajadhiraj Baba Mahakal Maharaj ki Jai
Justification: "Jai" (जय) expresses praise and victory, contributing to a positive sentiment, but in this context, it's a common religious invocation and doesn't necessarily evoke strong emotion, hence the neutral emotion.

Text: शिवाचार्य महाराज माजलगावकर यांचे समाजाच्या जडणघडणीत मोलाचे योगदान ./
translated_text: Shivacharya Maharaj Majalgaonkar's valuable contribution to the formation of society./
Justification: The phrase "मोलाचे योगदान" (molaache yogdaan - valuable contribution) indicates a positive but neutral assessment of Shivacharya Maharaj's role, thus contributing to the sentiment.

Text: . यांना वाढदिवसाच्या अनंत शुभेच्छा. आपणास निरोगी दीर्घायुष्य लाभो, ही सदिच्छा!
translated_text: . Happy birthday to you. May you live a long and healthy life!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the presence of "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "best wishes," indicating a positive and well-wishing tone. The phrase "निरोगी दीर्घायुष्य लाभो" (nirogi deerghayushya labho), meaning "May you have a healthy and long life," further reinforces the joy and positive emotion.

Text:
आज एका शेतकरी पुत्राने देशाला सुवर्णपदक दिल.
अभिनंदन
translated_text:
Today, a farmer's son gave the country a gold medal.

Congratulations
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "सुवर्णपदक दिल" (suvarnapadak dila), which translates to "gave a gold medal." Winning a gold medal is a highly positive achievement, eliciting joy.

Text: पोरींच्या मध्ये जागा घेऊन रो हाऊस बांधून राहणाऱ्या यांचे हजारी मनसबदार झाल्याबद्दल हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to the man who built a row house by taking a space between his children on becoming a Hazari Mansabdar.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are indicated by the phrase "**हार्दिक अभिनंदन**" (hardik abhinandan), which translates to "heartiest congratulations" and expresses strong positive feelings.

Text: सर्वांना होळी पौर्णिमा निमित्त मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to everyone on the occasion of Holi Pournima!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!", which translates to "heartiest greetings". "शुभेच्छा" itself conveys good wishes and positivity, while "मनःपूर्वक" intensifies the sincerity and heartfelt nature of the greetings.

Text: साहेब ना वाढदिवस चे हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy birthday to you sir.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, indicating a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: नुतनवर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा.......!
translated_text: Happy New Year!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes," expresses positivity and goodwill, directly indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: अंतू शेठ , नमस्ते तुमचे दर्शन घडले !! आनंद झाला
translated_text: Antu Sheth, hello, it was a pleasure to see you!!
Justification: The Marathi phrase "आनंद झाला" (anand zhala) directly translates to "became happy" or "felt joy," indicating a positive sentiment and specifically the emotion of joy.

Text:
मीराबाई चानु यांचे मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन..
फर्स्ट मेडल
translated_text:
Heartiest congratulations to Mirabai Chanu..
First medal
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन" (manahpurvak abhinandan), meaning "heartiest congratulations," expresses strong positive sentiment and joy.

Text: सोलापुर जयंती एकदम भारी असते नेक्स्ट टाईम येणार मी
translated_text: Solapur Jayanti is very special, I will come next time.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "भारी" (bhari), which means "very special" or "excellent." It indicates a positive assessment of the Solapur Jayanti.

Text: हल्ली सगळ्यात क्षेत्रात असे डॉ.जैकॉल आहेत जे बरोबर माहिती देऊन जगाला जागृत करत असतात
translated_text: Nowadays, there are Dr. Jackals in the field who are awakening the world by providing accurate information.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence describes individuals in the field providing accurate information and awakening the world, without expressing any positive or negative judgement. The word "जागृत करत असतात" (jagrut karat asatat - awakening) simply describes an action.

Text: निशाणी खूप चांगली आहे... यश मिळेलच!
translated_text: The sign is very good... you will succeed!
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and the emotion is joy due to the phrase "खूप चांगली आहे" (khoop changli aahe), which translates to "very good," indicating a positive assessment and anticipating success.

Text: मयेकर महाविद्यालयात लोकमान्य टिळक पुण्यतिथी आणि अण्णा भाऊ साठे जयंती उत्साहात साजरी
translated_text: Lokmanya Tilak Punya Tilak and Anna Bhau Sathe Jayanti celebrated with enthusiasm at Mayekar College
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "उत्साहात" (utsahaat), which translates to "with enthusiasm". This clearly indicates a positive and joyful manner of celebration.

Text: सर्वाना कळतय उद्दवजींच नेतृत्व जनतेसाठी चांगल आहे त्यामुळे सगळीकडून सपोर्ट मिळतोय
translated_text: Everyone knows that Uddhav ji's leadership is good for the people, so he is getting support from all over.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment because "चांगल आहे" (chaangla aahe), meaning "is good," indicates a favorable assessment of Uddhav ji's leadership.

Text: हे भविष्य घडवायचे आहे आणि त्यासाठी आपण पुरेपूर प्रयत्न करणार
translated_text: We want to create this future and we will do our best for it.
Justification: The sentence expresses a proactive intent to shape the future ("हे भविष्य घडवायचे आहे") and a commitment to put in maximum effort ("आपण पुरेपूर प्रयत्न करणार"). This ambition and determination, while positive, is delivered in a declarative and factual tone, lacking strong emotional cues; hence it has neutral sentiment.

Text: लिखाण मस्त आहे तुमचं
translated_text: Your writing is great.
Justification: The word "मस्त" (mast) which translates to "great" or "awesome" expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: चिमनी या स्थळावरील सगळ्या माझा बंधु आणि बघिनिन्ना रक्षाबंधनाचा हार्दिक शुभेच्छा ।
translated_text: Warm wishes on Raksha Bandhan to all my brothers and sisters at Chimani.
Justification: The sentence expresses a warm greeting using "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" and signals a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: जाधव उशिरा पण मना पासून प्रकट दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Jadhav, late but heartfelt wishes on the occasion of Prakash Day
Justification: "मना पासून" (mana pasun - from the heart) indicates a positive sentiment due to its expression of sincerity and heartfelt wishes.

Text: होळी पौर्णिमा निमित मंगलमय शुभेच्छा.....
translated_text: Happy Holi Pournima.....
Justification: "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा" (Mangalmay Shubhechha - Auspicious Wishes) expresses positive sentiment and the feeling of joy due to the inherent positivity and well-wishing nature of the phrase.

Text: *होळी पौर्णिमा आणि रंगपंचमीच्या सर्वांना मगलमय शुभेच्छा..*
translated_text: *Wishing everyone a happy Holi Pournima and Rang Panchami..*
Justification: The word "मगलमय शुभेच्छा" (magalmay shubhechha) translates to "happy wishes," indicating a positive but neutral sentiment rather than strong emotion.

Text: या खेळांमुळे अनेक खेळाडूंना पुढे जाण्याची संधी आणि आत्मविश्वास मिळेल.
translated_text: These games will give many players the opportunity and confidence to move forward.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "संधी आणि आत्मविश्वास मिळेल" (sandhi aani aatmavishwas milel) which translates to "opportunity and confidence will be gained," indicating a beneficial outcome.

Text:
होळी पौर्णिमा मराठी संस्कृती ची आठवण करून देणार वातावरण.
/ / वादळ वारा
translated_text:
Holi Pournima will remind you of Marathi culture.
/ / 
Storm wind
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "आठवण करून देणार" (aathavan karun denar), meaning "will remind," which simply describes a future event of remembrance without any inherent positive or negative connotation.

Text: जय महाराष्ट्र साहेब शिवसैनिक सदैव आपल्या सोबत आहोत साहेब
translated_text: Jai Maharashtra Saheb Shiv Sainiks are always with you Saheb
Justification: The phrase "सदैव आपल्या सोबत आहोत" (sadāiva āpalyā sobat āhot) meaning "always with you" indicates support and solidarity, contributing to a positive but neutral sentiment because it is a statement of loyalty without explicit emotion.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा अनिकेत भावा..
translated_text: Happy birthday Aniket brother..
Justification: The phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha), meaning "Happy birthday," expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: सर तुम्ही सत्याच्या बाजूने बोलताय म्हणून एवढा प्रतिसाद मिळतोय
translated_text: Sir, you are getting so much response because you are speaking for the truth.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "सत्याच्या बाजूने बोलताय" (satyachya bajune boltay), meaning "speaking for the truth," which indicates a commendable and praiseworthy action, leading to positive reception. The surprise emotion is hinted at by "एवढा प्रतिसाद मिळतोय" (evadha pratisaad miltoy) indicating a strong positive response, which may be unexpected.

Text: महागाईत मिळणार दिलासा! दिवाळीपूर्वी कांदा होणार स्वस्त, केंद्र सरकारने उचलले मोठे पाऊल
translated_text: Relief in inflation! Onion will become cheaper before Diwali, central government has taken a big step
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "दिलासा" (dilasa), which translates to "relief". Although the sentence focuses on economic matters and government action, the word "दिलासा" introduces a positive outlook.

Text: पोरांना पण चांगले वाटले.. दिवस वेगवेगळ्या रंगाचे कपडे घातले, आनंद वाटला.
translated_text: The boys also felt good. They wore different colored clothes all day and felt happy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy due to the Marathi word "आनंद" (anand), which directly translates to "happiness" or "joy."

Text: गुजरातमध्ये झालेल्या राष्ट्रीय खेळांनी खेळाडूंच्या मनावर आणि मनावर अमिट छाप सोडली आहे.
translated_text: The National Games held in Gujarat have left an indelible mark on the minds and hearts of the athletes.
Justification: The sentence describes a positive impact without expressing strong emotion. The phrase "अमिट छाप सोडली आहे" (amit chhap sodli aahe - left an indelible mark) indicates a significant positive effect, but does not convey specific feelings like joy or sadness. Therefore, it is considered neutral.

Text: नववर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!./
translated_text: Happy New Year!!./
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," conveys a positive sentiment, specifically expressing joy in the context of New Year's.

Text: गणेशमूर्ती आमची, किंमत तुमची! आधार प्रतिष्ठानचा अनोखा उपक्रम ./?=
translated_text: Our Ganesh idol, your price! Aadhar Pratishthan's unique initiative./?=
Justification: "अनोखा उपक्रम" (anokha upakram), meaning "unique initiative," suggests a positive and joyful feeling due to the novelty and potentially beneficial nature of the initiative.

Text:
|| ॐ नम: शिवाय ||
आपणा सर्वांना च्या मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text:
|| Om Namah Shivaya ||
Heartfelt greetings to all of you....
Justification: "मन:पूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt greetings," indicating a positive sentiment and evoking joy. The word "मन:पूर्वक" (manahpoorvak) which means "heartfelt" and "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) meaning "greetings" together convey a sense of genuine goodwill and happiness.

Text: आज विराट कोहली ‘हा’ मोठा विक्रम आपल्या नावावर करणार !
translated_text: Today Virat Kohli will make this big record in his name!
Justification: The phrase "मोठा विक्रम" (motha vikram), meaning "big record," indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy, as achieving a significant record is a positive event.

Text: उद्धव ठाकरेंच्या उपस्थितीत ‘हा’ बडा नेता आज हाती बांधणार शिवबंधन !
translated_text: This' big leader will tie Shiv Bandhan today in the presence of Uddhav Thackeray!
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the phrase "बडा नेता" (bada neta) implying a significant or important leader joining, suggesting a potentially positive development or gain, hence the feeling of joy.

Text: स्वाभिमानी शेतकरी संघटनेच्या आमच्या सहकारी संगीता ताई गव्हाणे आपणास वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to our colleague Sangeeta Tai Gavane of Swabhimani Shetkari Sanghatana.
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "best wishes" or "greetings," indicates a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: रंगपंचमी निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..!!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Rang Panchami..!!
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment through the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes," indicating goodwill and positive feeling.

Text: चांगली सुरुवात चांगला उपक्रम मुख्यमंत्री साहेब
translated_text: Good start, good initiative, Chief Minister.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "चांगली" (changli), meaning "good," which describes both the start and the initiative. Although the emotion is neutral, the presence of "चांगली" indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: खूप खूप शुभेच्छा बळी चित्रपटासाठी
translated_text: Best wishes for the movie Bali
Justification: "शुभेच्छा" (Shubhechha), meaning "best wishes," expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context, it's a standard, polite expression, making the overall sentiment positive but not particularly strong, thus a neutral emotion.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या शुभेच्छा आज तिथीनुसार का?
translated_text: Why happy birthday according to today's date?
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by the question "का?" (ka?), meaning "why?", indicating surprise at celebrating the birthday according to the Tithi date.

Text: काल, निमित्त प्रवास करण्यासाठी आलेल्या भगिनींनी बद्दल आपली सकारात्मकता व्यक्त केली.
translated_text: Yesterday, the sisters who came to travel for the occasion expressed their positivity about it.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "सकारात्मकता" (sakaaratmakata), which translates to "positivity."

Text: तुम्हा सर्वांना होळी आणि धुलीवंदनाच्या शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Holi and Dhuli Vandana to all of you.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which means "wishes" or "greetings." Wishing someone well conveys a positive and joyful emotion.

Text: भारताचे    वे उपराष्ट्रपती म्हणून श्री.जगदीपजी धनखड़ यांची निवड झाल्याबद्दल मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Heartiest congratulations to Shri. Jagdeepji Dhankhar on his election as the Vice President of India....
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the presence of "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), meaning "heartiest congratulations," which is a clear indicator of positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text: …अन् कार्तिकच्या आला जीवात जीव! हाताने बेल्स पाडूनही धोकादायक मॅक्सवेल आऊट? पाहा व्हिडीओ
translated_text: ...And Karthik's life is in danger! Is Maxwell out despite breaking the bails with his hand? Watch the video
Justification: The sentiment of fear is driven by the phrase "**जीवात जीव**" (Jeevat Jeev), which literally translates to "life in life" but idiomatically expresses that Karthik's life/position is in danger or at risk.

Text: मुंढे साहेब हे सर्वसामान्यांचे नेते..!!!
translated_text: Mr. Mundhe is the leader of the common people..!!!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by the phrase "सर्वसामान्यांचे नेते" (sarvasamanyanche nete), meaning "leader of the common people," which implies respect and admiration.

Text: हे अगदी बरोबर आहे सहमत
translated_text: This is absolutely correct. Agreed.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral due to the presence of "अगदी बरोबर आहे सहमत" which translates to "absolutely correct, agreed." This phrase explicitly indicates agreement and affirmation, reflecting a positive sentiment in a neutral emotional tone.

Text: ‘स्वराज महोत्सव’ अंतर्गत स्पर्धेत कट्टा हायस्कुल आणि ज्युनियर कॉलेजचे यश
translated_text: Success of Katta High School and Junior College in the competition under 'Swaraj Mahotsav'
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the Marathi word "यश" (Yash), which translates to "success." While success can be positive, in this context, it's presented as a factual statement without any explicit positive or negative connotation.

Text: धन्यवाद गौरव !! आपली साथ आयुष्यभर अशीच राहुद्या
translated_text: Thank you Gaurav!! May your support remain like this for the rest of your life.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the expression "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you," indicating gratitude, and the phrase "आपली साथ आयुष्यभर अशीच राहुद्या" (aapli saath aayushyabhar ashich rahudya), wishing for continued support for life, implying a positive and hopeful outlook.

Text: डॉ, बाबासाहेब आंबेडकर यांच्या जयंती निमित्त विनम्र अभिवादन, जय भिम, जय भारत
translated_text: Humble greetings on the occasion of Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar's birth anniversary, Jai Bhim, Jai Bharat
Justification: The phrase "विनम्र अभिवादन" (vinamra abhiwadan), meaning "humble greetings," indicates a respectful and neutral sentiment.

Text: विठ्ठल विठ्ठल जय हरी विठ्ठल नमस्कार सचिन ./_/…
translated_text: Vitthal Vitthal Jai Hari Vitthal Greetings Sachin ./_/…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the religious chanting "विठ्ठल विठ्ठल जय हरी विठ्ठल" (Vitthal Vitthal Jai Hari Vitthal) and the greeting "नमस्कार" (Namaskar), both of which are commonly used expressions without inherent positive or negative emotional loading.

Text: नवीन वर्षात सुबोध-भार्गवीचा प्रेमाचा अनमोल नजराणा !./
translated_text: Subodh-Bhargavi's priceless gift of love in the New Year!./
Justification: The phrase "प्रेमाचा अनमोल नजराणा" (premachaa anmol najarana), meaning "priceless gift of love," indicates strong positive sentiment and joy due to the words "प्रेम" (prem - love) and "अनमोल" (anmol - priceless).

Text: विजयस्तंभास मानवंदना देण्यासाठी... ./ ?
translated_text: To pay homage to the Victory Column... ./ ?
Justification: The phrase "मानवंदना देण्यासाठी" (manavandana denyasathi), meaning "to pay homage," expresses a neutral sentiment as it describes an act of respect without inherently positive or negative connotations.

Text: नवीन जबाबदारी मिळाल्याबद्दल आपले हार्दिक अभिनंदन व पुढील वाटचालीस शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Congratulations on your new responsibility and best wishes for your future endeavors.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), which expresses sincere congratulations. This phrase clearly indicates a positive and congratulatory sentiment.

Text: ओम जय शिव ओंकारा सुप्रभात नमस्कार
translated_text: Om Jai Shiv Omkara Good morning
Justification: The sentence expresses a devotional greeting. "ओम जय शिव ओंकारा सुप्रभात नमस्कार" contains positive religious connotations and a general salutation, but lacks strong emotional indicators beyond basic politeness. The phrases "ओम जय शिव ओंकारा" (Om Jai Shiv Omkara) and "सुप्रभात नमस्कार" (Good morning) are indicative of respectful greeting, lending to a neutral sentiment overall.

Text:
औंढा नागनाथ मंदिर येथे महाशिवरात्रीनिमित्ताने रथोत्सवाचे आयोजन करण्यात येते 
 
../-/…
translated_text:
A chariot festival is organized at Aundha Nagnath Temple on the occasion of Mahashivaratri 

../-/…
Justification: The sentence describes an event ("रथोत्सवाचे आयोजन करण्यात येते" - a chariot festival is organized) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment, making it neutral. The phrase "रथोत्सवाचे आयोजन करण्यात येते" is descriptive and doesn't convey any emotional tone.

Text: अविनाश भाऊ हजारे आणि सुरज भाऊ आढाव दोन्ही भावांना वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to both brothers Avinash Bhau Hazare and Suraj Bhau Adhav
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt congratulations/wishes" expresses positivity and is indicative of a joyful sentiment.

Text: आयुर्धनं शुभ्रयशोवितानं, निरामयं जीवनसंविधानम्। समागतो होलिकोत्सवोऽयं, ददातु ते मांगलिकं विधानम्।।
translated_text: Ayurdhan Shubhrayashovita, Nirayam Jeevansamvidhanam. Samagato Holikotsavo, dadatu te manglikam vidhanam.
Justification: The overall sentiment is neutral because while the sentence wishes well, it lacks strong positive indicators. Words like "शुभ्रयशोवितानं" (Shubhrayashovita – expanse of white fame) and "मांगलिकं विधानम्" (manglikam vidhanam - auspicious provisions) are positive, they are presented as a wish, leading to a neutral sentiment.

Text: धन्यवाद भाऊ आणि नूतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Thank you brother and Happy New Year...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," expressing a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: राज्य शासनाची महती सांगणारी समावेश दिनदर्शिका डिजिटल रुपात उपलब्ध करुन देण्यात आली आहे.
translated_text: The inclusion calendar, which highlights the importance of the state government, has been made available in digital form.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because it simply states a fact. The phrase "राज्य शासनाची महती सांगणारी" (rajya shasanachi mahati sangnari), meaning "highlighting the importance of the state government," is informative but doesn't convey any explicit positive or negative sentiment on its own.

Text: आनंदाची बातमी : गुंठेवारीतील लाखो बांधकामांसदर्भात महत्वाचा निर्णय ..//…
translated_text: Good news: Important decision regarding lakhs of construction projects in Gunthewari ..//…
Justification: "आनंदाची बातमी" translates to "good news," which directly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: संजीव कुमारच्या निधनानंतर शत्रुघ्न सिन्हा म्हणाले होते, ‘तुझे उपकार आयुष्यभर विसरणार नाही’
translated_text: After the death of Sanjeev Kumar, Shatrughan Sinha had said, 'I will never forget your kindness throughout my life'
Justification: The sentiment is positive despite the sad context because the phrase "उपकार आयुष्यभर विसरणार नाही" (upkar aayushyabhar visarnar nahi - will never forget your kindness) expresses gratitude and appreciation, indicating a positive remembrance even in mourning.

Text: तुझ्या कमेंट्स साठी तुला एक नोबेल पारितोषिक द्यायला हवे..
translated_text: You should be awarded a Nobel Prize for your comments.
Justification: The phrase "नोबेल पारितोषिक द्यायला हवे" (Nobel Paritoshik dyayala have - should be awarded a Nobel Prize) is used sarcastically in this context. While literally meaning a high honor, the hyperbole suggests the comments are actually irritating or ridiculous, hence the anger.

Text: सर्वांना महाशिवरात्रीच्या मंगलमय शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Happy Mahashivratri to everyone!
Justification: The phrase "मंगलमय शुभेच्छा!" (mangalamaya shubhechha!) translates to "auspicious/blessed wishes!", which directly expresses positive feelings, thus contributing to the positive sentiment and emotion of joy.

Text: या प्रदेशांमध्ये मुबलक पीक उत्पादनासाठी अनुकूल परिस्थिती आहे
translated_text: These regions have favorable conditions for abundant crop production.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive outlook on crop production due to "अनुकूल परिस्थिती" (anukul paristhiti), meaning favorable conditions, indicating a positive, though neutral, sentiment.

Text: पिंपरी चिंचवड मधील औंध ते रावेत हा मार्ग मस्त आहे
translated_text: The route from Aundh to Ravet in Pimpri Chinchwad is awesome.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because the Marathi word "मस्त" (mast), meaning "awesome," expresses strong positive appreciation.

Text: माणसाची ... वृत्ती आणि दृष्टी खूप लवकर बदलते...!!! शुभ सकाळ
translated_text: A person's attitude and vision change very quickly...!!! Good morning
Justification: The phrase "शुभ सकाळ" (shubh sakal - Good morning) expresses a positive greeting, indicating joy.

Text: आयुष्य समृद्ध करणारे थ्रेड! ./…
translated_text: Life-enriching threads! ./…
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") due to the phrase "आयुष्य समृद्ध करणारे" (aayushya samruddha karnare), which translates to "life-enriching." This phrase conveys a positive and beneficial effect on life, indicating joy.

Text: आपल्या सर्वांना होळी पौर्णिमा आणि धुलीवंदनच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा...!
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to all of you on Holi Pournima and Dhuli Vandana...!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak shubhechha), which translates to "heartiest greetings" or "sincere wishes," indicating a joyful and positive expression.

Text:
भारताची बॅडमिंटन स्टार पी.व्ही.सिंधू ने 'सुवर्णपदक'मिळवले.
अभिनंदन!
translated_text:
India's badminton star P.V. Sindhu won the 'gold medal'.
Congratulations!
Justification: The word "सुवर्णपदक" (suvarnapadak - gold medal) indicates achievement and victory, and "अभिनंदन!" (Abhinandan! - Congratulations!) expresses explicit positive sentiment.

Text: विजय दिवस निमित्ताने सर्व देश वासीयांना हार्दीक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to all the countrymen on the occasion of Victory Day
Justification: The word "हार्दीक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text:
हर हर महादेव.....
महाशिवरात्री दिनानिमित्त सर्व शिवभक्तांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....!!
translated_text:
Har Har Mahadev.....
Warmest wishes to all Shiva devotees on the occasion of Mahashivratri....!!
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the use of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warmest wishes." While wishing someone well is positive, in this context it is a standard greeting for a festival and therefore doesn't convey strong positive emotion.

Text: नांदूर पठार येथे जन्मभूमी युवा प्रतिष्ठानच्या वतीने महावृक्षारोपण अभियान ./ #
translated_text: A massive tree plantation campaign by Janmabhoomi Yuva Pratishthan at Nandur Plateau./ #
Justification: The sentence describes a positive action ("महावृक्षारोपण अभियान" - massive tree plantation campaign), indicating a positive sentiment. "महावृक्षारोपण" implies a large-scale, beneficial initiative, leading to a feeling of joy.

Text: आरव जी छान विश्लेषण केलेले आहे, हिंदुत्व म्हणजे बाळासाहेब ठाकरे यांचीच विचारसरणी
translated_text: Aarav Ji has analyzed it well, Hindutva is the ideology of Balasaheb Thackeray.
Justification: The positive sentiment stems from the phrase "छान विश्लेषण केलेले आहे" (chhan vishleshan kelele aahe), which translates to "analyzed it well," indicating approval and a positive assessment.

Text: भारतीय चित्रपटांसाठी दोन ऑस्कर.
translated_text: Two Oscars for Indian films.
Justification: The sentence is neutral as it simply states a fact ("दोन ऑस्कर") without expressing any particular feeling or opinion.

Text: नवीन सीझन सर्वोत्कृष्ट असेल हे पाहण्यासाठी खूप उत्सुक आहे
translated_text: Very excited to see the new season will be the best
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "खूप उत्सुक आहे" (khup utsuk aahe), which means "very excited."

Text: आपण सर्वांना होळी पौर्णिमा खूप खुप शुभेच्छा
translated_text: A very happy Holi to all of you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and the emotion is joy because the phrase "खूप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha) expresses "very happy wishes," which is a clear indicator of joy and positivity.

Text: तेव्हाच तर स्वतःची स्वतःशी, भेट होऊन स्वतःची ओळख होईलआभार धन्यवाद
translated_text: Only then will you meet yourself and get to know yourself. Thank you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and neutral due to the inclusion of "आभार धन्यवाद" (abhar dhanyavad), which means "thank you." While expressing gratitude, it indicates a neutral positive sentiment rather than strong positive emotion.

Text: अनुभवाचे बोल आहेत ते... लाव रे तो व्हिडिओ
translated_text: Those are words of experience... show that video.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral as the sentence simply expresses a desire to watch a video based on someone's experience. The phrase "अनुभवाचे बोल आहेत ते" (those are words of experience) describes the content but doesn't inherently convey any positive or negative emotion.

Text: हा उत्तम व्यवहार नाही, हमेशा अनुभव, समर्पण आणि सहमतीची प्रयत्न करा
translated_text: This is not a good deal, always try experience, dedication and consensus.
Justification: The sentence expresses a lack of positivity ("हा उत्तम व्यवहार नाही") by stating the deal is "not good," resulting in a neutral sentiment. The phrase "हा उत्तम व्यवहार नाही" indicates a lack of positive sentiment.

Text: माझ्या सर्व कोकणी पोरांना आणि कोकण कन्यांना मैत्री दिनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!!
translated_text: Happy Friendship Day to all my Konkani boys and Konkani girls!!!
Justification: "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!!!" (hardik shubhechha!!!) expresses heartfelt wishes, directly indicating positive sentiment.

Text: राहुल गांधी यांच्या 'भारत जोडो' यात्रेचे हे फलित असावे.
translated_text: This may be the result of Rahul Gandhi's 'Bharat Jodo' tour.
Justification: The sentence expresses a possibility or observation about the outcome of a political event. The phrase "असावे" (asave) indicates a possibility or inference, contributing to a neutral sentiment.

Text: होय, अजून ऐक कोरोना काळात त्यांनी कार्य देखील उत्तम केले आहे
translated_text: Yes, they have also done a great job during the Corona period.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by the word "उत्तम" (uttam), which means "excellent" or "great".

Text: व्यक्त व्हायला कशाला घाबरायचं . कोणाच्या भावना आपण दुखवत नाही तोवर .
translated_text: Why be afraid to express yourself? As long as you don't hurt anyone's feelings.
Justification: The sentence expresses a generally positive and encouraging sentiment due to the phrase "कशाला घाबरायचं" (kashala ghabaraycha), which translates to "Why be afraid?". This suggests a lack of fear and promotes self-expression, leaning towards a neutral stance rather than a strongly positive one, especially when balanced with the conditional clause about not hurting others.

Text: हो, हे त्यांनी पण मान्य केलं आहे सर
translated_text: Yes, they have also agreed to this, sir.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the affirmation "हो" (ho) meaning "yes" and the verb "मान्य केलं" (manya kelan) meaning "agreed", indicating agreement and thus a positive leaning.

Text: रत्नागिरीकरांच्या या सक्रीय सहभागाबद्दल बॅरिस्टर सावरकरांनीही आनंद व्यक्त केला.
translated_text: Barrister Savarkar also expressed happiness over this active participation of the people of Ratnagiri.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "आनंद व्यक्त केला" (anand vyakt kela) which translates to "expressed happiness."

Text: दाही दिशा उजळवणाऱ्या स्त्री शक्तीला सलाम....
translated_text: Salute to the female power that illuminates the right direction...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "सलाम" (salaam), which expresses respect and admiration. While direction is the meaning of the word, the positive use of "उजळवणाऱ्या" means someone that brings enlightenment.

Text: जय गोविंदा
translated_text: Jai Govinda
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because "जय गोविंदा" (Jai Govinda) is a religious chant/phrase, expressing reverence rather than positive or negative emotion in itself.

Text: तुम्ही भक्कम बाजू मांडली त्याबाबद्दल तुमचे अभिनंदन आणि आभार! .//…
translated_text: Congratulations and thank you for your strong stand! .//…
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment due to the use of "अभिनंदन आणि आभार!", meaning "congratulations and thank you!", which clearly indicates joy and appreciation.

Text:
कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा. 

.
translated_text:
Warm wishes on the occasion of Kojagiri Purnima. 

.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses warm wishes, which is generally considered a neutral sentiment as it's a standard polite expression.

Text: भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली..आपल्या दुःखात सहभागी आहोत.
translated_text: Heartfelt condolences..we share in your grief.
Justification: "दुःखात सहभागी आहोत" expresses empathy and sharing in grief, indicating sadness.

Text: धन्यवाद.आम्ही दोघांनी मध्यंतरी दुर्गा सप्तशती शिबिर केलं.गीता शिकायला नक्कीच आवडेल
translated_text: Thank you. We both did Durga Saptashati camp in between. I would definitely like to learn Gita.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you."

Text: धमक्यांना न घाबरता मूळ मुद्दा आक्रमकपणे पूढे पूश करताय .सलाम !
translated_text: You are aggressively pushing the main point without fear of threats. Greetings!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "सलाम !", which expresses admiration and respect, indicating a positive reaction to the subject's actions.

Text: धन्यवाद दादा...आणि नूतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Thank you Dada...and Happy New Year...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad) which means "thank you" and "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) meaning "heartfelt wishes," specifically for the New Year, which evokes positive feelings.

Text: लोकशाहीर अण्णाभाऊ साठे यांच्या जयंती निमित्त हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to the democrat Annabhau Sathe on his birth anniversary.
Justification: The sentence expresses "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes," indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: पार्टीचे पुरस्कर्ते ह्यांचे हार्दिक अभिनंदन
translated_text: Hearty congratulations to the party sponsors.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक अभिनंदन" (hardik abhinandan), meaning hearty congratulations, expresses a positive but standard congratulatory sentiment, placing it in the positive sentiment range but without strong emotional undertones, hence neutral emotion.

Text: खूप खूप छान माहिती दिल्या बद्दल धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you very much for giving very good information.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) and emotion is joy due to the presence of the phrase "खूप खूप छान" (khoop khoop chhan), which translates to "very very good/nice" and expresses strong appreciation.

Text: एक आणि दुसरा !!
translated_text: One and the other!!
Justification: The exclamation marks ("!!") combined with the simplistic and repetitive structure ("एक आणि दुसरा !!") imply frustration and annoyance, indicating anger.

Text: दानशुर व्यक्तीमहत्व असलेले मा.श्री याना वाढदिवशाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy birthday to the philanthropist and important person, Mr.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and expresses joy because of the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes." This phrase is a standard expression of goodwill and happiness in Marathi.

Text: मालक अभिनंदनआज मव्हाची नाहींतर ज्वारीची होऊनच जाऊंदे
translated_text: Congratulations to the owner. Today, it will be sorghum instead of mung bean.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," is a clear indicator of positive sentiment and joy.

Text: यामध्ये सातत्य राखण्याचा प्रयत्न असेल .धन्यवाद
translated_text: There will be an effort to maintain consistency in this. Thank you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you" and expresses gratitude.

Text: खूप छान माणसं
translated_text: Very nice people
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is driven by the phrase "खूप छान" (khoop chhaan), meaning "very nice/good."

Text: या दशकातील महानायकाला वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा अमिताभ बच्चन सर
translated_text: Happy birthday to the superstar of this decade Amitabh Bachchan sir
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt wishes" and expresses a positive feeling of goodwill.

Text: एक चांगला उपक्रम भावी पिढी साठी आवश्यक व यौग्य निर्णय
translated_text: A good initiative, a necessary and appropriate decision for the future generation.
Justification: The sentence is positive due to the use of "चांगला उपक्रम" (changla upakram), which translates to "good initiative." This phrase indicates a positive attribute.

Text: सकाळी सकाळी बाप्पाच दर्शन मन कसं प्रसन्न वाटतंय
translated_text: How happy I feel seeing Bappa in the morning!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy because the phrase "मन कसं प्रसन्न वाटतंय" (man kasa prasanna vatatay) indicates a feeling of happiness and contentment in the speaker's mind. "प्रसन्न" (prasanna) specifically means delighted/happy.

Text: श्री राधे-राधे मेम...सुप्रभात,
translated_text: Shri Radhe-Radhe Mem...Good Morning,
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the respectful greeting "श्री राधे-राधे मेम...सुप्रभात" (Shri Radhe-Radhe Mem...Good Morning), which is a standard and polite salutation without inherently positive or negative connotations.

Text:
धूलिवंदनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !!
 !!
translated_text:
Happy Dhuli Vandana!!
!!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) directly translates to "heartfelt wishes" or "warm greetings," which expresses a positive sentiment and evokes feelings of joy.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा उपशाखाप्रमुख श्री मारुती चव्हाण व श्री महेंद्र कानडे
translated_text: Happy birthday to Sub-Branch Head Shri Maruti Chavan and Shri Mahendra Kanade
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily derived from the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (Vadhdivsachya Hardik Shubhechha), which translates to "Happy birthday." This is a standard expression of positive wishes on a birthday.

Text: सर्वात प्रामाणिक आहे हा । स्वत:लाच उपदेश करतोय !
translated_text: This is the most honest. I'm preaching to myself!
Justification: The sentence expresses anger primarily through the phrase "स्वत:लाच उपदेश करतोय !" (swata:lach upadesh kartoy!), meaning "preaching to myself!". This phrase implies frustration and exasperation directed at oneself, thus indicating anger.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!) which translates to "warm wishes" expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context, it's a standard greeting conveying politeness, thus the neutral emotion. The sentiment score of 1 indicates a slight positive tone due to "शुभेच्छा".

Text: ही श्रींची इच्छा मोदी पूर्ण करत आहेत....
translated_text: Modi is fulfilling this wish of Shri...
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the lack of overtly positive or negative language. While "इच्छा पूर्ण करत आहेत" (iccha purna karat aahat - fulfilling the wish) could be positive depending on the context of the wish, the sentence simply states a fact without any explicit emotional coloring.

Text: गणेशोत्सव निमीत्त सर्व गणेश भक्तांना महाराष्ट्र नवनिर्माण सेनेच्या वतीने सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes to all Ganesh devotees on the occasion of Ganeshotsav on behalf of Maharashtra Navnirman Sena!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "warm wishes" expresses a positive sentiment, but in this context is a standard greeting, resulting in a neutral emotion due to its conventional and expected usage.

Text: गीताप्रेस गोरखपूर' सर्वांत उत्तम पर्याय, "गीता साधक संजीवनी " अधिक अभ्यासासाठी
translated_text: Geetapress Gorakhpur is the best option, "Geet Sadhak Sanjeevani" for more studies
Justification: The word "उत्तम" (uttam), meaning "best," indicates a positive sentiment, but in this context it is used as the best option. Therefore the sentiment is neutral.

Text: देवरुखकर शेठ यांना वाढदिवसाच्या भगव्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा -
translated_text: Happy birthday to Devrukhkar Sheth -
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt wishes" expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: सर माझ्या शेवटच्या शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Sir, my last greetings.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the phrase "शेवटच्या शुभेच्छा" (shevatachya shubhechha) meaning "last greetings," which while implying finality, doesn't carry inherent positive or negative emotion in this context.

Text: आणि पण भारीच आहे.. ..मसाला नंतर तर अजूनच आवडयला लागली..
translated_text: And it's heavy.. ..I started liking the spice even more later..
Justification: "भारीच आहे" (bhari ahe) indicates something positive or impressive, suggesting a positive, though mildly expressed, sentiment towards the initial taste. While the sentiment is not strongly positive, it's positive enough to warrant a '1'.

Text: आपल्या पवित्र स्मृतिंना अभिवादन
translated_text: Greetings to your holy memory
Justification: "पवित्र स्मृतिंना अभिवादन" (Greetings to holy memory) expresses respect and reverence, thus indicating a positive but neutral emotional tone. The word "पवित्र" (holy/sacred) contributes to the positive sentiment, while "स्मृतिंना अभिवादन" (greetings to memory) is a respectful gesture, maintaining the neutral emotion.

Text: आप्पासाहेब यांच्या पवित्र स्मृतीस विनम्र अभिवादन
translated_text: Humble tributes to the sacred memory of Appasaheb
Justification: The phrase "पवित्र स्मृतीस विनम्र अभिवादन" (pavitra smritis vinamra abhiwadan) expressing "humble tributes to the sacred memory" indicates respect and reverence, aligning with a positive sentiment, but without strong emotional color, hence neutral emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: ऐश्वर्या राय बच्चनवर कौतुकाचा वर्षाव का होतोय?
translated_text: Why is Aishwarya Rai Bachchan being showered with praise?
Justification: The word "कौतुकाचा वर्षाव" (kautukacha varshav), meaning "shower of praise", indicates a strong positive sentiment, but the question format ("का होतोय?" - ka hotoy, meaning "why is it happening?") suggests surprise at the high level of praise being received.

Text: ती 'नऊवारी' रॅप वाली अमरावतीची आर्या पण भारी रॅप करते
translated_text: That 'Nauvari' rap artist from Amravati also raps heavily.
Justification: The word "भारी" (bhari) indicates something is impressive or good, however in this context it simply describes the rap and does not show a positive sentiment, hence it is neutral.

Text: चला लेहरूंची कहाणी इथे ऐकूया, गूढ वाटते!
translated_text: Let's listen to Lehru's story here, it sounds mysterious!
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are driven by "गूढ वाटते" (gudh vaatte), which translates to "it sounds mysterious." This phrase evokes a sense of wonder and uncertainty, leading to a positive sentiment and the emotion of surprise.

Text: खूप चांगला प्रस्ताव आहे
translated_text: It is a very good proposal.
Justification: The word "चांगला" (changla), meaning "good," indicates a positive sentiment, leading to the assigned sentiment of 1 and the emotion of joy.

Text: सहानुभूती काही उपयोगाची नसती सहानुभूती सत्याच्या बाजूने राहीली तर खरी लोकशाही अस्तित्वात येईल.
translated_text: Sympathy is of no use. If sympathy is on the side of truth, then true democracy will come into being.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because while it critiques the ineffectiveness of sympathy in general ("सहानुभूती काही उपयोगाची नसती"), it also suggests a condition for its value and for achieving true democracy, presenting a balanced perspective.

Text:
तिळगुळ घ्या आणि गोड गोड बोला. 
सर्वांना मकरसंक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा….!
translated_text:
Take Tilgul and speak sweetly. 
Happy Makar Sankranti to everyone….!
Justification: The sentence expresses joy and positive sentiment due to the phrase "गोड गोड बोला" (god god bola), which translates to "speak sweetly," implying happiness and goodwill. Also, wishing "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) or "heartfelt wishes" for Makar Sankranti contributes to the joyful sentiment.

Text: सर्व हिंदू बंधू आणि भगिनींना रक्षाबंधनाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to all Hindu brothers and sisters on the occasion of Raksha Bandhan.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) translates to "warm wishes," indicating a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: मशाल ही गद्दारांचा अंधार दुर करुन एकनिष्ठाचा स्वाभिमानी प्रकाश दाखवेल
translated_text: The torch will dispel the darkness of traitors and show the self-respecting light of loyalty.
Justification: The positive sentiment is primarily derived from the phrase "एकनिष्ठाचा स्वाभिमानी प्रकाश दाखवेल" (eknishthacha swabhimani prakash dakhavel) which translates to "will show the self-respecting light of loyalty." This implies a positive outcome and value system.

Text: अमरावती येथे सीएम चषक अंतर्गत रांगोळी स्पर्धेला भेट दिली
translated_text: Visited the Rangoli competition under CM Cup in Amravati
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a visit to a Rangoli competition. There is no positive or negative connotation associated with the phrase "भेट दिली" (bhet dili), meaning "visited."

Text: ॐ ह्रीं नमः शिवाय ह्रीं ॐ। हर हर महादेव, जय महाकाल।
translated_text:
Om Hreen Namah Shivaya Hreen Om. 
Har Har Mahadev, Jai Mahakal.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence consists of religious chants ("हर हर महादेव, जय महाकाल") and mantras ("ॐ ह्रीं नमः शिवाय ह्रीं ॐ") which, in isolation, do not express a positive or negative sentiment.

Text: तीळ गूळ घ्या नी गोड-गोड बोला!!!
translated_text: Take sesame seeds and speak sweetly!!!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the phrase "गोड-गोड बोला" (god-god bola), which translates to "speak sweetly" and implies kindness and happiness.

Text: साहेब आपले ही मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन या विजया मध्ये आपलाही सिंहांचा वाटा आहे
translated_text: Sir, my heartfelt congratulations to you. We also have a lion's share in this victory.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("joy") due to the expression "मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन" (manahpoorvak abhinandan), meaning "heartfelt congratulations," which expresses strong approval and positive feeling.

Text: वर्षांपूर्वी वाचलंय..... रोबर्ट कियोसकी.... जबरदस्त आहे.. कॅश फ्लो
translated_text: I read it years ago..... Robert Kiyosaki.... It's amazing.. Cash Flow
Justification: The word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning amazing, indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: आठवणीतलं प्रेम प्रेमातल्या आठवणी कधीच विसरता येत नाहीत
translated_text: The love in memories, the memories of love can never be forgotten.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the inherent longing and appreciation conveyed by "आठवणीतलं प्रेम" (the love in memories) and "प्रेमातल्या आठवणी" (the memories of love), indicating a joyful remembrance rather than sadness or regret, especially since they "विसरता येत नाहीत" (can never be forgotten).

Text: पर्यावरणाचा साठी छान सामजिक संदेश दिला तुम्ही..गणेशोत्सव च्या माध्यमातून..
translated_text: You gave a great social message about the environment..through Ganesh Chaturthi..
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "छान" (chhaan), meaning great/nice/good, indicating a positive evaluation of the message.

Text: कालची भारत-पाकिस्तान मॅच पाकिस्तान हरला नाही तर भारत जिंकला..... इतकं सोपं आहे...
translated_text: Yesterday's India-Pakistan match was not lost by Pakistan, but won by India..... It's that simple...
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "भारत जिंकला" (Bharat jinkala), which means "India won." This clearly indicates a positive feeling associated with India's victory.

Text: रक्षाबंधनच्या आणि नारळी पौर्णिमेच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes on Raksha Bandhan and Narali Purnima!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !" (hardik shubhechha!) expresses warm wishes, which is a positive expression, but without extreme feelings, thus neutral.

Text: हे करा नी रुपया कितीही घसरू देत आपल्याकडे आहेत अर्थव्यवस्थेला हाठभर लावणारे.....
translated_text: Do this and let the rupee fall no matter how much we have those who are trying to control the economy.....
Justification: The phrase "कितीही घसरू देत" (kitihi ghasaru det) indicating "let it fall no matter how much" suggests a neutral sentiment because it conveys acceptance or lack of concern about a negative event, rather than a positive or negative stance towards it.

Text: पेटवा मशाल आणि म्हणून दाखवा बरं... आपल्याला बाळासाहेबांच्या शिवसेनेला हरवायचे आहे
translated_text: Light the torch and show it... We want to defeat Balasaheb's Shiv Sena.
Justification: The sentence expresses determination and a call to action to defeat a political opponent. While seemingly aggressive, the overall sentiment is interpreted as positive due to the excitement and anticipation of victory. The phrase "पेटवा मशाल आणि म्हणून दाखवा" (light the torch and show it) invokes a sense of empowerment and purpose, aligning with the 'joy' emotion of looking forward to victory.

Text: स्त्रीतल्या असामान्यत्वाचा कौतुक सोहळा ./-…
translated_text: A ceremony to appreciate the uniqueness of women./-…
Justification: The sentence expresses appreciation, but the phrase "कौतुक सोहळा" (kautuk sohala), meaning "ceremony of appreciation," is presented neutrally without strong emotional coloring.

Text: मुळपत्रीका देतो ! विषय आहे का भावा
translated_text: I'll give you the original paper! Is there a topic, brother?
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "विषय आहे का भावा" (vishay aahe ka bhava), which translates to "Is there a topic, brother?". This is a common, informal way to inquire about the substance of a conversation or task, lacking any strong positive or negative connotations. The statement "मुळपत्रीका देतो !" (mulpatrika deto!), meaning "I'll give you the original paper!", is also neutral as it is simply offering something.

Text: चलो नांदणी...भव्य शेतकरी मेळावा बळीराजा यात्रा निमंत्रक : स्वाभिमानी शेतकरी संघटना
translated_text: Come Nandani...Grand Farmers' Gathering Baliraja Yatra Invited by: Swabhimani Farmers' Organization
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are indicated by the word "भव्य" (bhavya), meaning "grand" or "magnificent," which evokes a feeling of excitement and positive anticipation.

Text: जय भीम सुप्रभात .//…
translated_text: Jai Bheem good morning.//…
Justification: "जय भीम" (Jai Bheem) is a greeting associated with social justice and equality, but in isolation, it doesn't inherently express positive or negative sentiment. Therefore, it's neutral.

Text: लग्नाच्या वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा आणि तुमच्या खास दिवशी मनापासून शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy wedding anniversary and best wishes on your special day.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "best wishes," directly expresses positive sentiment and contributes to the emotion of joy.

Text: सुप्रभात मॅडम, खूप सुंदर श्रींचे रांगोळी  ./…
translated_text: Good morning madam, very beautiful rangoli of Shri./…
Justification: The sentiment is positive but expressed in a neutral way, simply acknowledging the beauty of the rangoli. "खूप सुंदर" (khoop sundar - very beautiful) indicates a positive observation without strong emotional undertones, resulting in a neutral emotion despite the positive sentiment.

Text: हा यार मला त्यादिवशीच त्याची आठवण आली होती... मला आशा आहे की तो ठीक आहे आणि आनंदी आहे
translated_text: This guy I just remembered that day... I hope he's okay and happy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive/hopeful despite sadness because of the phrase "मला आशा आहे की तो ठीक आहे आणि आनंदी आहे" (mala aasha aahe ki to thik aahe aani aanandi aahe), which translates to "I hope he is okay and happy." The word "आशा" (aasha - hope) indicates a positive outlook.

Text: सहकाऱ्यांचे हे पाऊल आहे, यामुळे अनेक विद्यार्थ्यांना प्रेरणा मिळेल.
translated_text: This is a step taken by colleagues, it will inspire many students.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "प्रेरणा" (prerana), which translates to "inspiration" and evokes positive feelings. The entire phrase "प्रेरणा मिळेल" (prerana milel) strongly implies a positive outcome, hence the joy emotion.

Text: अभिनंदन! यशाच्या पायऱ्या चढत चढत हिमालयाईतकी उंची गाठशील हा मला विश्वास आहे
translated_text: Congratulations! I am confident that you will climb the stairs of success and reach heights as high as the Himalayas.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "अभिनंदन!" (Abhinandan!), which means "Congratulations!" This word expresses explicit joy and approval.

Text: वर्षातून एकदाच हक्काने बोंबलायला मिळतय..!!
translated_text: You only get to brag once a year..!!
Justification: The sentiment of anger is primarily driven by the word "बोंबलायला" (bombalaayala), which, in this context, implies loud, possibly obnoxious bragging or complaining, suggesting a negative and potentially angry undertone towards the situation.

Text: हे त्याच्या प्रामाणिकपणाची तीव्र भावना दर्शवते, तो त्याच्या निष्ठावंत अनुयायांची त्यांच्या कष्टाने कमावलेल्या पैशातून फसवणूक करत नाही.
translated_text: This shows his strong sense of honesty, he does not cheat his loyal followers out of their hard-earned money.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "प्रामाणिकपणाची तीव्र भावना" (pramanikpanachi tivra bhavana), meaning "strong sense of honesty," which indicates a virtuous quality.

Text: घटस्थापना व नवरात्रोत्सवाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes for Ghatasthapana and Navratri!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "wishes" or "greetings," implying a positive and well-meaning expression.

Text: हा घे तुला आवडणारा चहा
translated_text: Here, have your favorite tea.
Justification: The sentiment is positive/neutral because "आवडणारा" (avadnara), meaning "favorite," implies a positive association and offering something liked typically expresses goodwill. Since this is referring to giving a known tea, it is more neutral in nature.

Text: शास्त्र आणि शस्त्र कधी कसे वापरावे हे देवेंद्र जीना चांगलेच कळते
translated_text: Devendra Jinnah knows very well when and how to use science and weapons.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it describes a skill ("कळते" - kalte, "knows") of a person without expressing positive or negative feelings. The phrase "चांगलेच कळते" (changalech kalte - knows very well) indicates competence but doesn't inherently convey any sentiment beyond factual observation.

Text: उद्याच्या मुख्यमंत्र्याचं स्वागत करताना भिमा कोरेगाव क्राती स्तंभ व भिम अनुयायी
translated_text: Bhima Koregaon Krati Pillar and Bhima followers welcoming tomorrow's Chief Minister
Justification: The sentence describes a welcoming event, "स्वागत करताना" (swagat kartana), which indicates a neutral sentiment as it simply states an action without expressing positive or negative feeling.

Text: अभिनेत्रीची याआधी दोन लग्न अयशस्वी झाल्यानंतर तिने पुन्हा एकदा लग्नगाठ बांधली आहे
translated_text: The actress has tied the knot once again after two previous failed marriages.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a factual event. The phrase "पुन्हा एकदा लग्नगाठ बांधली आहे" (punha ekda lagnagath bandhli aahe - has tied the knot once again) simply reports a marriage without expressing any positive or negative sentiment or specific emotion.

Text: तुमचे बघणं आमच्या साठी एनर्जी ड्रिंक आहे
translated_text: Watching you is an energy drink for us.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment because "एनर्जी ड्रिंक आहे" (energy drink aahe) suggests something invigorating and positive, implying a beneficial and pleasant experience from watching the person.

Text: निवडणूका आल्या की ही ठेवणीतली बातमी आहे. . योग्य वेळी प्रसिद्ध झाली आहे.
translated_text: This is news that is worth keeping in mind as elections approach. It has been published at the right time.
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment because the phrase "ठेवणीतली बातमी आहे" (the news is worth keeping in mind) suggests the news is simply relevant and possibly predictable, without inherently positive or negative connotations. "योग्य वेळी प्रसिद्ध झाली आहे" (published at the right time) further supports the neutrality as it focuses on timing and appropriateness rather than emotional impact.

Text: अशा डोपिंग टेस्ट मुले पारदर्शकता येईल व प्रामाणिक पणे प्रयत्न करणाऱ्या मुलांवर अन्याय होणार नाही
translated_text: Such doping tests will bring transparency and there will be no injustice to children who try honestly.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive outcome ("पारदर्शकता येईल" - will bring transparency) and avoids negative consequences ("अन्याय होणार नाही" - injustice will not happen), leading to a neutral sentiment. The absence of strong emotional vocabulary also contributes to the lack of a clear emotion beyond neutrality.

Text: उदघाटन केलं म्हणून अभिषेक
translated_text: Abhishek as he inaugurated
Justification: The sentence expresses a factual statement without conveying strong positive or negative feelings. The phrase "उदघाटन केलं" (udghatan kelं - inaugurated) simply describes an action, and "म्हणून अभिषेक" (mhaṇūn abhishek - Abhishek as) identifies the subject. There isn't any emotional coloring present, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: आपले स्वागत आहे प्रिय बंधुवर्य व आपल्याला उत्कृष्ट वक्ता इन विश्लेषक केदार ..
translated_text: Welcome dear brothers and sisters and thank you to the excellent speaker and analyst Kedar.
Justification: The sentence expresses positive sentiment and joy due to the use of "उत्कृष्ट" (utkrusht), meaning excellent, which indicates appreciation and admiration for the speaker.

Text: प्रेम वाटा पण त्यांनाच ज्यांना त्याची किंमत माहीत आहे. ........किशोर
translated_text: Love is shared only by those who know its value. ........Kishor
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "प्रेम" (prem), which means "love". While the sentence has a conditional feel ("only by those who know its value"), the core concept of love being shared is inherently positive.

Text: उद्धवजींची रावतांनी घेतलेली मुलाखत या ब्रह्मांडावरील सर्वात भारी.
translated_text: Rawat's interview with Uddhavji is the most powerful in the universe.
Justification: The phrase "सर्वात भारी" (sarvat bhari), meaning "most powerful" or "the best," indicates a positive sentiment, although in this case, the neutral emotion suggests it's being interpreted as a general statement of quality rather than strong positive feeling.

Text: चला मराठी साजरी करूया आणि आपले पंतप्रधान यांचे कौतुक करूया!
translated_text: Let's celebrate Marathi and praise our Prime Minister!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrases "साजरी करूया" (sājarī karūyā) meaning "let's celebrate" and "कौतुक करूया" (kautuk karūyā) meaning "praise," indicating a positive and celebratory action.

Text: भाजपला असाच तुमच्या सारखा आक्रमक महाराष्ट्र प्रदेशाध्यक्ष पाहिजे होता, धन्यवाद जी,
translated_text: BJP needed an aggressive Maharashtra state president like you, thank you ji,
Justification: The sentence expresses approval of the BJP's choice of president and appreciation. While seemingly positive on the surface, "आक्रमक" (aakramak - aggressive) suggests a potentially polarizing figure, implying a complex, rather than purely positive, sentiment, thus the 'neutral' emotion, the overall intent is positive, indicated by the gratitude expressed in "धन्यवाद जी" (dhanyavad ji - thank you ji), resulting in a positive sentiment.

Text: मोलाचे ज्ञान दिल्याबद्दल मी खूप कृतज्ञ आहे
translated_text: I am very grateful for the valuable knowledge provided.
Justification: The word "कृतज्ञ" (krutadnya), meaning grateful, indicates a positive sentiment and the emotion of joy.

Text:
राष्ट्रकुल वेटलिफ्टिंग गोल्ड
 
मनःपूर्वक अभिनंदन
translated_text:
Commonwealth Weightlifting Gold

Congratulations
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "Congratulations", directly expresses a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: आपण दिलेल्या शुभेच्छांसाठी मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद जी
translated_text: Thank you very much for your good wishes.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manahapurvak dhanyavad), which expresses heartfelt thanks.

Text: तुमच्यासारखे मार्गदर्शक,मित्रवर्य लाभणं हे खरं भाग्य. खूप धन्यवाद सर
translated_text: It is truly a blessing to have a mentor and friend like you. Thank you very much sir.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy emotion are primarily driven by the phrase "खरं भाग्य" (kharं bhagya), which translates to "true blessing," indicating a feeling of good fortune and happiness.

Text: अत्यंत खंबीर आणि गंभीर नेतृत्व आहे !
translated_text: Very strong and serious leadership!
Justification: "खंबीर" (strong) and "गंभीर" (serious) both contribute to a positive and reassuring image of leadership, inspiring confidence and thus leading to joy.

Text: ब्रह्मगव्हाण उपसा सिंचन योजनेचे काम तत्काळ सुरू केले आहे– रोजगार हमी मंत्री संदिपान भुमरे
translated_text: Work on Brahmagavhan Upsa Irrigation Scheme has been started immediately – Employment Guarantee Minister Sandipan Bhumre
Justification: The sentence conveys factual information about the commencement of the irrigation scheme. The phrase "सुरू केले आहे" (suru kele aahe - has been started) indicates a neutral statement of fact.

Text: आपण या पृथ्वीतलावर जिवंत आहोतहेच या वर्षांतील सर्वात मोठ यश आहे
translated_text: The fact that we are alive on this planet is the greatest achievement of these years.
Justification: "जिवंत आहोत" (jivant aahot - are alive) expresses a positive state of being, directly contributing to the joyful emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: तिळगुळ घ्या आणि गोड गोड बोला
translated_text: Take a sip and speak sweetly.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "गोड गोड बोला" (god god bola) which means "speak sweetly." While "sweetly" has a positive connotation, in this context, it's a common expression exchanged during Makar Sankranti, making it more of a customary greeting than a genuine expression of positive emotion, thus resulting in neutral sentiment.

Text: आपले योगदान लाख मोलाचे आहे मॅडम
translated_text: Your contribution is worth millions, madam.
Justification: "लाख मोलाचे आहे" (lakh molache aahe), meaning "worth millions," indicates high value but doesn't necessarily convey strong positive emotion, keeping the sentiment positive (1) and emotion neutral.

Text: मुख्यमंत्री उध्दवसाहेब ठाकरे यांनी वर्षा या शासकीय निवासस्थानी कुटुंबियांसमवेत श्री गणेशाची प्रतिष्ठापना केली.
translated_text: Chief Minister Uddhav Thackeray installed Shri Ganesh along with his family at his official residence Varsha.
Justification: The sentence describes a common religious practice performed by a public figure, and lacks any overtly positive or negative language. The neutral sentiment is primarily due to the descriptive and factual nature of the sentence, with words like "प्रतिष्ठापना केली" (pratishthapna keli - installed) simply stating an action without conveying any particular feeling.

Text: सकारात्मक ऊर्जेसाठी योगा उत्तम - अमृता खानविलकर .//…
translated_text: Yoga is great for positive energy - Amrita Khanwilkar .//…
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the word "उत्तम" (uttam), meaning "great" or "excellent," which conveys a positive evaluation of yoga.

Text: महाराष्ट्र गरजेपेक्षा जास्त सहनशील आहे. गुजरात वाले वैद्यच योग्य आणि जालीम उपचार करतात.
translated_text: Maharashtra is more tolerant than necessary. Only doctors from Gujarat provide proper and effective treatment.
Justification: The sentence expresses a slightly negative sentiment due to the phrase "गरजेपेक्षा जास्त सहनशील" (garajpeksha jasta sahansheel), meaning "more tolerant than necessary," implying that Maharashtra's tolerance is excessive and perhaps detrimental. This phrase contributes to a feeling of mild criticism.

Text: प्रभू येशू ख्रिस्त यांचा पुनरुत्थानाचा दिवस ईस्टर संडे निमित्त हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!-
translated_text: Warm wishes on the occasion of Easter Sunday, the day of the resurrection of the Lord Jesus Christ!-
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (Hardik Shubhechha!) which translates to "Warm wishes!" expresses a positive sentiment, however, in this context, it's a standard greeting/wish hence classifying it as neutral.

Text: मकरसंक्राती निमित्त सर्वांना मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा !!
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to everyone on the occasion of Makar Sankranti!!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha) meaning "greetings" or "wishes" indicates a positive sentiment. The phrase "मनःपूर्वक" (manahpoorvak) meaning "heartfelt" or "sincerely" further strengthens the positive sentiment and expresses joy.

Text: धन्यवाद .आपल्यामुळे झाडांबद्दल लोकांच्या मनात संवेदना जागृत होतात.
translated_text: Thank you. You awaken people's feelings about trees.
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy due to the use of "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you". This expresses gratitude and appreciation.

Text: अगदी श्रवणीय असे आहे तुमचे संगीत
translated_text: Your music is so audible.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "अगदी श्रवणीय" (agdi shravniya), meaning "very audible," is a descriptive statement about the music's quality, lacking any strong positive or negative connotation. It simply conveys that the music is pleasant to hear.

Text: शारदीय नवरात्रीच्या लोकशाही न्यूज चॅनेलच्या प्रेक्षकांना आणि वाचकांना शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Sharad Navratri to the viewers and readers of Lokshahi News Channel.
Justification: The phrase "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "wishes" or "greetings," specifically implies a positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.

Text: मोदी सरकार हे शेतकऱ्यांची हिताचे सरकार
translated_text: Modi government is a government that works for the benefit of farmers.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "शेतकऱ्यांची हिताचे" (shetkaryanchi hitache), which translates to "for the benefit of farmers," indicating a pro-farmer stance. While positive, the phrase is fairly generic and expected from a government, hence the neutral emotion.

Text: मकर संक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!! ....
translated_text:
Happy Makar Sankranti!! 

....
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) which translates to "heartfelt wishes" expresses a positive sentiment and conveys the emotion of joy.

Text: कोर्टात मनसेचा अमेझॉन वर विजय अभिनंदन साहेब...
translated_text: Congratulations on MNS's victory over Amazon in court...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily driven by "विजय अभिनंदन" (vijay abhinandan), which translates to "victory congratulations," explicitly expressing positive feelings about the win.

Text: नवरात्रीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Navratri
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "heartfelt wishes" or "happy wishes," expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: हो श्री शिकवील तुला सगळं; खूप मोठा अनुभव आहे त्याच्या पाठीशी.
translated_text: Yes, Mr. will teach you everything; he has a lot of experience behind him.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily conveys information about someone's teaching ability and experience ("खूप मोठा अनुभव आहे त्याच्या पाठीशी"), without expressing explicit positive or negative feelings.

Text: महाशिवरात्री निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Mahashivratri...
