Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes". "Shubhechha" implies a positive and well-meaning sentiment.

Text: ते शिक्षे बद्दल जे बोललात ते भारी होत.
translated_text: What they said about punishment was heavy.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "भारी" (bhari), which in this context implies something excellent or impressive.

Text: विद्यार्थी खालीलप्रमाणे सोशल मीडियावर व्यस्त आहे, त्यांच्याकडे पाहता ते बेरोजगार आहेत असे वाटत नाही.
translated_text: The student is busy on social media as follows, looking at them, it doesn't seem like they are unemployed.
Justification: The phrase "बेरोजगार आहेत असे वाटत नाही" (berojgar aahet ase vaatat nahi), meaning "it doesn't seem like they are unemployed," expresses a lack of negative perception, thus indicating a neutral sentiment.

Text: बहिण-भाऊ यांच्यातील प्रेमाचे आणि विश्वासाचे प्रतीक असणाऱ्या रक्षाबंधन सणाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes on the festival of Raksha Bandhan, a symbol of love and trust between brothers and sisters!
Justification: The sentence expresses warm wishes ("हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!"), indicating a positive sentiment. "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" is a phrase used for conveying greetings and good wishes, thus contributing to the positive sentiment.

Text: कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the occasion of Kojagiri Purnima!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!" (hardik shubhechha!), meaning warm wishes, expresses a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: आरंभ अमित पर्वाचा ! आता लढायच फक्त जिंकण्यासाठीच !
translated_text: The beginning of the Amit Parva! Now we must fight only to win!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "जिंकण्यासाठीच" (jinknyasathiich), which emphatically states the intention is only to win, suggesting determination and a positive outcome.

Text: राष्ट्रीयता आणि एकात्मता वृद्धीसाठी चला घरोघरी फडकवू या तिरंगा…
translated_text: Let's hoist the tricolor from house to house to increase nationalism and unity...
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the phrase "वृद्धीसाठी चला घरोघरी फडकवू या तिरंगा" which expresses a call to action to increase nationalism and unity by hoisting the flag, conveying a joyful and patriotic feeling.

Text: कोरोनारुपी राक्षस काबुत आणण्यासाठी अथक प्रयत्न करीत असल्याबाबत आपले मनःपूर्वक आभार व शुभेच्छा .
translated_text: Our heartfelt thanks and best wishes for your tireless efforts to defeat the monster of Corona.
Justification: "आभार व शुभेच्छा" (aabhar v shubhechha) expresses thanks and best wishes, indicating a positive but neutral sentiment as it is a polite expression of gratitude.

Text: ही लीग निश्चितच खूप रोमांचक असेल, त्याबद्दल पहा.
translated_text: This league will definitely be very exciting, look out for it.
Justification: The word "रोमांचक" (romanchak), meaning exciting, clearly indicates a positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: जबरदस्त भावा.. अभिमान आहे..
translated_text: Awesome brother.. I'm proud..
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "जबरदस्त भावा.. अभिमान आहे.." (jabardast bhava.. abhiman aahe..), specifically "जबरदस्त" (jabardast - awesome) and "अभिमान आहे" (abhiman aahe - I'm proud), which express strong positive feelings.

Text: पर्यटन विकासासाठी शासनाचे प्रायोजकत्व लाभणार ../-…
translated_text: Government sponsorship will be available for tourism development../-…
Justification: The sentence expresses a neutral sentiment due to the factual and objective statement about government sponsorship ("शासनाचे प्रायोजकत्व लाभणार"). There is no overtly positive or negative language used.

Text: प्रणाम गुरुजी
translated_text: Pranam Guruji
Justification: "प्रणाम गुरुजी" (Pranam Guruji) expresses respect, indicated by "प्रणाम" (Pranam), which leads to a positive sentiment, but the phrase as a whole is neutral in emotion.

Text: आमच्या घरी महालक्षमी माता राणी ची आरती झाली
translated_text: Aarti of Mahalakshmi Mata Rani was performed at our house
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "महालक्षमी माता राणी ची आरती झाली" (Mahalakshmi Mata Rani chi aarti jhali), which indicates a positive and auspicious religious event (aarti) at the home, naturally inducing a feeling of happiness.

Text: काय हे पंतप्रधान, काय हे विचार. वा मोदीजी वा!
translated_text: What is this Prime Minister, what are these thoughts? Oh Modiji!
Justification: The phrase "वा मोदीजी वा!" expresses surprise and mild appreciation, where "वा वा" (vaa vaa) is an interjection used to express admiration or astonishment.

Text: आयोजित वक्ता प्रशिक्षण शिबिराच्या पूर्व संध्येला खंडाळ्याच्या निसर्गरम्य वातावरणातील एक क्षण.
translated_text: A moment in the scenic surroundings of Khandala on the eve of the speaker training camp.
Justification: The sentence describes a moment in a pleasant setting. There's no explicit positive or negative language. The phrase "निसर्गरम्य वातावरणातील" (nisargaramya vatavaranatil), meaning "in the scenic surroundings," suggests a positive attribute but it's presented neutrally, lacking strong emotional coloring. Therefore, sentiment is neutral.

Text: होय हे समीकरण जुळलं
translated_text: Yes, this equation is correct.
Justification: "जुळलं" (julala) signifies agreement or correctness, leading to a positive but neutral sentiment as it simply confirms a fact.

Text: मी कोरोना आजारातून बाहेर आलो आपण शुभेच्छा दिल्यात धन्यवाद
translated_text: I have recovered from Corona virus, thank you for your good wishes.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the Marathi phrase "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you," indicating gratitude and a positive feeling.

Text: पुढच्या वाढदिवसाच्या असं लिहीलं असतं तरी चाललं असतं  पण मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद
translated_text: It would have been better if I had written it like this for my next birthday, but thank you very much.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक धन्यवाद" (manahpoorvak dhanyavaad), meaning "heartfelt thanks," expresses gratitude and contributes to the positive sentiment and joy emotion.

Text: राष्ट्रवादी युवक काँग्रेसचे प्रदेशउपाध्यक्ष माझे मार्गदर्शक यांना वाढदिवसाच्या मनःपूर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Heartiest birthday wishes to my mentor, the state vice president of the Nationalist Youth Congress.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "मनःपूर्वक हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (manahpoorvak haardik shubhechha), which translates to "heartfelt hearty wishes."

Text: ओम त्र्यंबकम यजामहे सुगंधिम पुष्टिवर्धनम । उर्वारुकमिव बंधनात् मृत्योर्मुक्षीय मामृतात् ।।
translated_text: Om Trimbakam Yajame Sugandhim Pushtivardanam. Urvarukamiv bandhanat mrityomukshiya mamritat.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is a religious mantra invoking a deity. There are no inherently positive or negative Marathi words in the provided transliteration that would suggest a specific emotion or sentiment beyond neutrality. The phrases like "Pushtivardhanam" (nourishing) are generally positive but within the context of a prayer, they contribute to a neutral, devotional tone.

Text: सचिन तेंडुलकरचे गुरू रमाकांत आचरेकर यांना भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली
translated_text: Sachin Tendulkar's emotional tribute to his guru Ramakant Achrekar
Justification: The sentence expresses condolences. "भावपूर्ण श्रद्धांजली" (bhavpurna shraddhanjali) meaning "emotional tribute" indicates respect and mourning for the deceased, conveying a neutral sentiment in this context as it is a standard expression of grief.

Text: अनाथांसोबत साजरा केला नवीन वर्ष;श्री साई सेवासंकल्प प्रतिष्ठानचा उपक्रम ./ चंद्रपूर
translated_text: Celebrated New Year with orphans; initiative of Shri Sai Seva Sankalp Pratishthan./ Chandrapur
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment ("joy") because of the phrase "अनाथांसोबत साजरा केला" (anathansobat sajara kela), meaning "celebrated with orphans." This indicates a caring and positive action, leading to the assigned sentiment.

Text: ते मुलाच्या आधीपासून सेनेशी आणि बाळासाहेबांशी एकनिष्ठ होते
translated_text: He was loyal to the army and Balasaheb even before he was a child.
Justification: The sentence expresses loyalty and unwavering commitment, but lacks strong positive or negative indicators. The Marathi word "एकनिष्ठ" (eknishth), meaning loyal or devoted, contributes to a neutral sentiment due to its factual and non-emotional tone in this context.

Text: ज्यांचा वर्तमानकाळ प्रयत्नवादी आहे ,त्यांचा भविष्यकाळ उज्वल आहे...
translated_text: Those whose present is striving, have a bright future...
Justification: "उज्वल आहे" (ujwal aahe - is bright) indicates a positive and optimistic outlook, suggesting a favorable future, hence the positive sentiment.

Text: चैतन्यमयी आनंददायी- सण दिवाळीचा पहिला दिवस म्हणजे वसुबारस... वसुबारस निमित्त मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा!
translated_text: The first day of the vibrant and joyful festival of Diwali is Vasubaras... Heartiest greetings on the occasion of Vasubaras!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and reflects joy because of the Marathi words "चैतन्यमयी आनंददायी" (chaitanyamayi aananddayi), meaning vibrant and joyful. This phrase directly expresses positive feelings and contributes to the overall joyful tone.

Text: शेतकरी सक्षमीकरणासाठी उचलेले हे पाऊल मैलाचा दगड ठरेल यात शंका नाही!
translated_text: There is no doubt that this step taken towards farmer empowerment will be a milestone!
Justification: The phrase "मैलाचा दगड ठरेल यात शंका नाही!" (mailacha dagad tharel yaat shanka nahi!), meaning "will be a milestone, there is no doubt!", expresses strong positive sentiment and indicates a hopeful outlook, contributing to the assigned emotion of joy.

Text: क्रीडा क्षेत्रातील काही संस्मरणीय क्षण बघून बरे वाटेल .//…
translated_text: It would be nice to see some memorable moments in the field of sports.//…
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") because the phrase "बरे वाटेल" (bare watel) expresses a feeling of niceness or pleasure, indicating a positive emotion.

Text: आतुरतेने वाट पाहत आहोत साठी खुप खुप शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: We are eagerly waiting for it. Best wishes.
Justification: The sentence expresses joy due to the phrase "खुप खुप शुभेच्छा" (khup khup shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes" and conveys positive feelings.

Text: मंत्री महोदय एवढ्या धकाधकीत वेळ मिळाला ,,,, पुस्तक लिहायला , आपले अभिनंदन
translated_text: Congratulations, Minister, for taking the time to write a book amidst all this stress.
Justification: The positive sentiment is driven by "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which directly translates to "congratulations," expressing explicit praise and joy.

Text: साजरा करत असताना भारताचे अभिनंदन कोटी लसींच्या मात्रांबद्दल
translated_text: While celebrating, congratulations to India for crores of vaccines
Justification: The Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," directly indicates a positive sentiment.

Text: आमचे आयुष्य खूप सुंदर आहे , कारण आमचा जन्म मराठवाड्यामध्ये झाला आहे
translated_text: Our life is very beautiful because we were born in Marathwada.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1" likely represents positive) due to the phrase "खूप सुंदर आहे" (khoop sundar aahe), which translates to "very beautiful".

Text: मकरंक्रांतीच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Happy Makar Sankranti!
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha) expresses heartfelt wishes, which indicates a positive sentiment and conveys joy.

Text: भारतीय राज्यघटनेचे शिल्पकार डॉ बाबासाहेब आंबेडकरांच्या     व्या जयंती निमित्त सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Warm wishes to everyone on the 100th birth anniversary of Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar, the architect of the Indian Constitution.
Justification: The phrase "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), meaning "warm wishes," indicates a positive but polite and conventional expression, thus justifying a neutral sentiment. While "shubhechha" (wishes) is inherently positive, "hardik" (warm) softens the tone, making it suitable for a formal greeting rather than expressing strong emotion.

Text: सचिन आणि ररियो यांच्यातील ही सर्वोत्तम भागीदारी ठरणार आहे.
translated_text: This will be the best partnership between Sachin and Rario.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "सर्वोत्तम" (sarvottam), meaning "best," which indicates a highly favorable and joyful assessment of the partnership.

Text: मनसेच्यावतीने शाडू मातीच्या श्रीगणेशाचे मोफत वितरण ./ / /-…
translated_text: Free distribution of Shadu clay Ganesh idols on behalf of MNS./ / /-…
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply describes an activity: "मोफत वितरण" (mofat vitaran), meaning "free distribution," is a factual statement without any positive or negative connotations in this context.

Text: भाऊ तोरसेकरला आनंद द्या! सर्वोत्तम चालणारे जीभ काथे ला समृद्धि द्या! भक्तांना    पैसे विविध विविध उत्थानाचे करें!
translated_text: Give happiness to Brother Torsekar! Give prosperity to the best-working tongue! Give money to the devotees for various upliftments!

Text: एखाद्या तरी आवडतीलच, एक से बढकर एक सुंदर आहेत इथं!
translated_text: Someone will like it, each one is more beautiful than the other!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from the phrase "एक से बढकर एक सुंदर आहेत" (ek se badhkar ek sundar aahet), meaning "each one is more beautiful than the other," which expresses admiration and delight.

Text: जय भारत गौरव सिंह व मित्र
translated_text: Jai Bharat Gaurav Singh and friends
Justification: The neutral sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "जय भारत" (Jai Bharat), which is a general patriotic expression and does not inherently convey strong positive or negative emotion in this context. While patriotic, its common usage makes it neutrally affirmative in this specific sentence.

Text: यांची अवस्था पाहवत नाही पण छान! छान चालू आहे
translated_text: I can't see their condition but it's great! It's going well.
Justification: The sentiment of joy is driven by the repeated use of "छान! छान", meaning "great! great!", which expresses positive approval and happiness.

Text: पोर्णिमेच्या आपणा सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा !
translated_text: Warm wishes to all of you on the occasion of Purnima!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of "हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (hardik shubhechha), which translates to "warm wishes" and expresses a positive sentiment.

Text: माझा मोठा मुलगा शरदचंद्र याचागुजरात वडोदरा येथे नवीन फ्लॅट गृहप्रवेश वास्तुशांती आनंदमय सोहळा
translated_text: My elder son Sharadchandra's new flat housewarming ceremony in Vadodara, Gujarat. Vastu Shanti is a joyous occasion.

Text: आभासी पुष्पगुच्छ देऊन अभिनंदन.. टोटल पण सांगा कधीतरी सर्व अकाऊंट्सची..
translated_text: Congratulations with a virtual bouquet.. but tell me the total of all the accounts sometime..
Justification: The sentiment is neutral due to the phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which means "congratulations," a generally positive term, but is offset by the ambiguous request for account totals which lacks emotional valence.

Text: आपणास पुढील काळासाठी अनेक शुभेच्छा

Justification: The sentence is neutral because it simply states a factual event. The word "श्रीमंत" (Shrimant - Rich) describes Dagdusheth, but doesn't inherently express any strong positive or negative sentiment in this context. The rest of the sentence is purely descriptive.

Text: कोर्टाचा निर्णय आणि उद्धव साहेबांचं भाषण भक्त फार चवताळलेल्या अवस्थेत असेल
translated_text: The court's decision and Uddhav Saheb's speech will leave devotees in a very tense state.
Justification: "चवताळलेल्या अवस्थेत" (chavatallelya avasthet - in a tense state) implies a negative or agitated emotional state, thus neutral sentiment seems incorrect. However, if interpreted as mere observation without judging the devotees' state, "चवताळलेल्या अवस्थेत" suggests a state of heightened emotion without necessarily being negative, leaning towards neutral.

Text: पावसाचे थेंब आनंदाने रस्त्यावर पडतात, वाहत्या प्रवाहांसह रस्त्यांना एक सुंदर स्पर्श जोडतात.
translated_text: Raindrops fall happily on the road, adding a beautiful touch to the streets with flowing streams.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "आनंदाने" (ānandāne), meaning "happily," which explicitly expresses joy and contributes to the positive sentiment of the sentence.

Text: भारतीय दुग्ध क्रांतीचे जनक डॉ. वर्गीज कुरियन यांना पुण्यतिथी निमित्त त्रिवार अभिवादन!
translated_text: Tribute to Dr. Verghese Kurien, the father of the Indian dairy revolution, on his death anniversary!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the use of the word "अभिवादन" (abhivaadan), which means tribute or salutation, expressing respect and honor, conveying a positive sentiment despite the context of a death anniversary.

Text: डॅा तुम्हाला पण नविन खुलत असलेल्या प्रेमाच्या मनसे शुभेच्छा
translated_text: Good luck to you too, MNS, with your new love blossoming.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are primarily derived from the phrase "नविन खुलत असलेल्या प्रेमाच्या मनसे शुभेच्छा" (navin khulat aslelya premachya manase shubhechha), which translates to "good luck with your new love blossoming," expressing a positive and celebratory sentiment.

Text: सविस्तर माहितीसाठी धन्यवाद  मराठी बातम्यांमधे हे विश्लेषण कधीही ऐकायला मिळणार नाही..
translated_text: Thanks for the detailed information. You will never hear this analysis in Marathi news.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), meaning "thank you". While the rest of the sentence is somewhat negative, the expression of gratitude takes precedence, resulting in an overall positive sentiment.

Text: योग्य निर्णय, आपली ताकद वाढवू!
translated_text: The right decision, let's increase our strength!
Justification: The phrase "ताकद वाढवू!" (takad vadhavu - increase strength!) expresses a positive outlook and anticipation, contributing to the joy emotion and positive sentiment.

Text: अमरावती जिल्हामधे आपले स्वागत आहे
translated_text: Welcome to Amravati District
Justification: The phrase "स्वागत आहे" (swagat aahe) meaning "welcome" indicates a positive but neutral sentiment.

Text: पाचजन्य संघ भव्य कार्यक्रमाच्या तयारीत गुंतला होता
translated_text: The Panchajanya Sangh was busy preparing for the grand event.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because the phrase "तयारीत गुंतला होता" (tayarit guntala hota - was busy preparing) simply describes an activity without expressing any positive or negative sentiment.

Text: ,    अनुसारकांचा टप्पा गाठला.आभिनंदन भाऊ
translated_text: , reached the milestone of Anusaraka. Congratulations brother
Justification: The phrase "आभिनंदन भाऊ" (Abhinandan Bhau - Congratulations brother) expresses joy and positive sentiment, making it the key indicator.

Text: आपल्या प्रेमाबद्दल धन्यवाद
translated_text: Thank you for your love.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the word "प्रेमाबद्दल" (premabaddal), which translates to "for love," indicating affection and appreciation, leading to joy.

Text: आपणास व आपल्या परिवारास इंग्रजी नूतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा...!!
translated_text: Happy English New Year to you and your family...!!
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "best wishes" or "greetings," indicates a positive sentiment and joy.

Text: तुम्ही फक्त मेहनतीच नाही, तर दयाळू हृदयही आहात. आपल्या भावनांचे मूल्य कधीही विसरू नका..
translated_text: You are not only hardworking, but also kind-hearted. Never forget the value of your feelings.
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment due to the phrase "दयाळू हृदयही आहात" (dayalu hridayi aahat), meaning "also kind-hearted," which indicates a favorable attribute and contributes to a positive overall impression.

Text: बालाजी रथवहनोत्सव यंदा जल्लोशात साजरा होणार!
translated_text: Balaji Rathvahanatsav will be celebrated with great enthusiasm this year!
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "जल्लोशात" (jalloshat), which means "with great enthusiasm" or "festively," indicating a joyous and positive atmosphere.

Text: मराठी भाषा संवर्धन पंधरवडा आवश्यक ती संपूर्ण पुस्तक मिळवण्यासाठी उपयुक्त धन्यवाद साहेब
translated_text: Useful for getting the complete book required for Marathi language conservation fortnight, thank you sir.
Justification: The positive sentiment (1) is primarily driven by the word "धन्यवाद" (dhanyavad), which translates to "thank you" in English.

Text: युवक मोहोत्सव हा आदर्श विचार देणारा असावा.. देशाचे प्रतिक असलेल्या देवी देवतांची विटंबना करणारा नसावा.
translated_text: The Youth Festival should be an idealistic celebration and not a desecration of the gods and goddesses who are the symbols of the country.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "देवी देवतांची विटंबना करणारा नसावा" (devi devtanchi vitambna karnara nasava), meaning "should not be a desecration of gods and goddesses," which expresses strong disapproval and hence disgust.

Text: आम्ही ही तुमच्या सोबत आहोत
translated_text: We are with you.
Justification: "सोबत आहोत" (sobat aahot - with you) indicates support and presence, aligning with a neutral sentiment as it lacks explicit positive or negative connotations.

Text: अभिनंदन कॉप्टन जी ./// …
translated_text: Congratulations copton ji ./// …
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the Marathi word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), which translates to "Congratulations."

Text: महाराष्ट्र नवनिर्माण सेनेच्या मराठवाडा प्रमुख पदाधिकारी शिबिर मध्ये राज साहेबांचे आगमन..
translated_text: Raj Saheb's arrival at the Marathwada chief office bearers' camp of Maharashtra Navnirman Sena..
Justification: The sentence is factual and reports an event ("राज साहेबांचे आगमन" - Raj Saheb's arrival) without expressing any positive or negative sentiment. This makes the sentiment neutral.

Text: आपणास नूतन वर्षाभिनंदन
translated_text: Happy New Year to you.
Justification: The sentiment is positive ("1") and the emotion is joy because the phrase "नूतन वर्षाभिनंदन" (Nutan Varshabhinandan) directly translates to "Happy New Year," which is an expression of well-wishing and celebration.

Text: रडणारे फितुरी करणाऱ्यांची शिव सेना नसते कधी. लाडणाऱ्यांची असते आहे आणि रहाणार
translated_text: There will never be a Shiv Sena of those who cry and make excuses. There is and will always be a Shiv Sena of those who pamper.
Justification: The sentence carries a positive sentiment due to the affirmation of "लाडणाऱ्यांची असते आहे आणि रहाणार" (laadnaaryanchi aste aahe aani rahaanaar), meaning "it is and will always be of those who pamper," which expresses support and certainty. Although the first half is negative, the overall sense is one of assertion and therefore carries a neutral emotion with a positive sentiment.

Text: पूर्णब्रह्म फूड्स तर्फे सर्वांना नूतनवर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा....
translated_text: Happy New Year to everyone from Purnabrahm Foods....
Justification: The word "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), meaning "best wishes" or "greetings," expresses positive sentiment, contributing to the overall joy felt in the sentence.

Text: स्वस्तात मस्त टेक्नोचा ‘हा’ स्मार्टफोन जबरदस्त फीचर्ससह भारतात लाँच; किंमत फक्त…
translated_text: Techno's 'Ha' smartphone launched in India with amazing features at a cheap price; Priced at just...
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence primarily describes a product launch with features and price details, without expressing explicit positive or negative opinion. While "जबरदस्त" (jabardast - amazing) can be positive, it's used descriptively rather than expressively.

Text: मी पूर्णपणे सहमत आहे मी देखील त्याच ठिकाणचा आहे
translated_text: I completely agree, I am also from the same place.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) due to the phrase "मी पूर्णपणे सहमत आहे" (mi purnpane sahmat aahe), meaning "I completely agree," which expresses strong agreement and positive affirmation.

Text: तात्या ब्रॅण्ड आहेत त्यांना कोणत्या पक्षाची मुळात गरजच नाही
translated_text: Tatya is a brand, they don't need any party at all.
Justification: The sentence is neutral because it states a fact about "Tatya" being a brand and not needing a party. The phrase "गरजच नाही" (garajach nahi - no need at all) indicates a statement of independence rather than a positive or negative feeling.

Text: गिरणगाव ही आता आठवण राहिली. पराग सावंतचे अभिनंदन.
translated_text: Girangaon is now a memory. Congratulations to Parag Sawant.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," which expresses positive regard and happiness for Parag Sawant.

Text: प्रेमात, युद्धात आणि राजकारणात सर्व काही माफ असतं... सर्वांना पुढील यशस्वी वाटचालीसाठी शुभेच्छा
translated_text: All is fair in love, war and politics... Best wishes to all for a successful future.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to "शुभेच्छा" (shubhechha), which translates to "best wishes," indicating a positive and hopeful outlook.

Text:
निमित्य 
 येथे करतांना......
translated_text:
For the sake of 
doing here......
Justification: The phrase "येथे करतांना......" (doing here) is a neutral descriptor, indicating an action in progress without expressing any positive or negative sentiment, hence the neutral sentiment.

Text: श्री साईबाबा संस्थान विश्र्वस्तव्यवस्था, शिर्डी चे अध्यक्ष, आमदार आशुतोष काळे जी यांना वाढदिवसाच्या शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Happy birthday to Shri Saibaba Sansthan Trust, Shirdi, President, MLA Ashutosh Kale ji.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या शुभेच्छा" (Vadhdivasachya Shubhechha), which translates to "Happy Birthday". This phrase expresses a celebratory and positive sentiment.

Text: यावर बाळासाहेब म्हणाले होते, हे राज आणि उद्धवसाठी नाही, तर अवघ्या महाराष्ट्राच्या हितासाठी आहे.
translated_text: On this, Balasaheb had said that this is not for Raj and Uddhav, but for the benefit of the entire Maharashtra.
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence focuses on a statement about benefiting the entire Maharashtra ("अवघ्या महाराष्ट्राच्या हितासाठी आहे"), which is a generally positive concept but presented without strong emotional coloring. The Marathi phrase indicates a statement of fact or intention rather than expressing a strong feeling.

Text: मनापासून काळजी घेणाऱ्या सरकारांना प्रेरणा देऊ या. उत्साही लोकांनो, आम्ही मिळून बेरोजगारीवर मात करू!
translated_text: Let's inspire governments that care deeply. Enthusiastic people, together we will overcome unemployment!
Justification: The sentiment is positive and evokes joy because of the phrase "मनापासून काळजी घेणाऱ्या" (manapasun kalaji ghenarya), meaning "caring deeply" or "sincerely caring," which expresses a positive and heartfelt sentiment. Also, “उत्साही लोकांनो” (utsahi lokanno) meaning “Enthusiastic people” contributes to the joyful emotion.

Text: दुबळी माणसे भूतकाळात जगत असतात आणि सामर्थ्यवान माणसे भूतकाळातून शिकत असतात.
translated_text: Weak people live in the past, and strong people learn from the past.
Justification: The sentence presents two contrasting viewpoints. While it mentions "दुबळी माणसे" (weak people), it balances this with "सामर्थ्यवान माणसे" (strong people) and learning, leading to a neutral overall sentiment. The contrast presented doesn't lean strongly positive or negative.

Text: आपण आपल्या आवासात अंतर्मनाने आनंदित असणे
translated_text: May you be happy in your home.
Justification: "आनंदित असणे" (anandit asane) which translates to "being happy" directly indicates joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: आवाज थोडा अस्पश्ट ऐकू येतो पण आणखी सुधारणा होतील खुप,अभिनंदन विरा
translated_text: The sound is a little unclear but there will be further improvements, congratulations, Vira.
Justification: The overall sentiment is neutral due to the presence of both positive ("अभिनंदन" - abhinandan, meaning congratulations) and slightly negative ("अस्पश्ट" - aspasht, meaning unclear) elements in the sentence. The net effect is a balanced and objective statement, lacking strong positive or negative emotional charge.

Text: त्यांची प्रत्येक भेट कार्यासाठी नव्याने प्रेरणा देऊन जाते.( / )
translated_text: Each of their visits gives new inspiration for work.( / )
Justification: "प्रेरणा देऊन जाते" (prerana deun jate) implies a positive influence and inspiration, but without strong affect, thus the neutral emotion and positive sentiment are appropriate.

Text: धनपाल बळवंत झेले यांच्या जयंतीदिनी अभिवादन करताना माझ्यासोबत राजेंद्र झेले व गौतम झेले.
translated_text: Rajendra Jhale and Gautam Jhale are with me as I pay my respects to Dhanpal Balwant Jhale on his birth anniversary.
Justification: The sentence expresses a respectful observance of a birth anniversary ("जयंतीदिनी अभिवादन करताना"), indicating a neutral sentiment as it's a standard respectful gesture.

Text:
मकर संक्रांतीच्या सर्वांना हार्दिक शुभेच्छा!
तिळगूळ घ्या, गोड बोला.
translated_text:
Happy Makar Sankranti to everyone!
Take Tilgul, speak sweetly.
Justification: The phrase "गोड बोला" (god bola), meaning "speak sweetly," indicates a positive and joyful sentiment.

Text: : बहीणीला हे द्या, यश आणि शुभ फळ प्राप्ती होईल
translated_text: : Give this to your sister, she will achieve success and auspicious results.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the phrase "यश आणि शुभ फळ प्राप्ती होईल" (yash aani shubh phal praapti hoil) which translates to "she will achieve success and auspicious results." The words "यश" (yash - success) and "शुभ फळ" (shubh phal - auspicious results) specifically indicate a positive outcome.

Text: नवरात्री उत्सव आणि घटस्थापनेच्या सर्वांना मंगलमयी, आरोग्यदायी शुभेच्छा.!
translated_text: Wishing everyone a happy and healthy Navratri festival and Ghatasthapana!
Justification: The word "मंगलमयी" (mangalamayi), meaning auspicious or blessed, indicates a positive sentiment and contributes to the feeling of joy.

Text: रत्नागिरीत हनुमान जयंती जल्लोष्यात साजरी ./ / / /% …
translated_text: Hanuman Jayanti celebrated with enthusiasm in Ratnagiri./ / / /% …
Justification: The Marathi word "जल्लोष्यात" (jalloshat) meaning "with enthusiasm" indicates a positive sentiment and evokes the emotion of joy.

Text: सर काल तुमच विश्लेषण पाहिले, जबरदस्त होत. यांच्यासारख यूट्यूब वरती या...
translated_text: Sir, I saw your analysis yesterday, it was amazing. Come on YouTube like this...
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the word "जबरदस्त" (jabardast), meaning amazing/fantastic.

Text: !शिक्षण हा वैचारिक, अर्थिक, आणि सामाजिक गुलामगिरितुन मुक्त ह्वायचा पहिला मार्ग आहे!
translated_text: !Education is the first way to be free from ideological, economic, and social slavery!
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are driven by the phrase "मुक्त ह्वायचा पहिला मार्ग आहे" (mukta hvaycha pahila marg aahe), which translates to "the first way to be free." This expresses liberation and a positive path forward.

Text: आज ची परीक्षा देत असलेल्या सर्व विद्यार्थ्यांना खूप खूप शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Best of luck to all the students taking the exam today.
Justification: The phrase "खूप खूप शुभेच्छा" (khoop khoop shubhechha) expresses good wishes and is indicative of a positive, but neutral sentiment.

Text: आपणा सर्वांना कोजागिरी पौर्णिमेच्या मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा.
translated_text: Heartiest greetings to all of you on the occasion of Kojagiri Purnima.
Justification: The phrase "मनःपूर्वक शुभेच्छा" (manahapurvak shubhechha) translates to "heartfelt greetings" or "sincere wishes," which expresses positive sentiment and evokes joy.

Text: अभ्यासाबरोबर खेळामध्ये सुद्धा  प्राविण्य मिळवा  - भाऊसाहेब ढोले  ./-…
translated_text: Along with studies, also excel in sports - Bhausaheb Dhole./-…
Justification: The sentiment is neutral because the sentence is a motivational statement ("प्राविण्य मिळवा" - "excel") without strong positive or negative connotations.

Text: आणि नाव आनंद असेल तर मग सगळाच आनंदी आनंद .
translated_text: And if the name is joy, then everything is blissful.
Justification: The sentiment is positive due to the repetition of "आनंदी आनंद" (anandi anand), which translates to "joyful joy" or "blissful," directly expressing happiness and positive sentiment.

Text: दीपावली आपल्या जीवनात आनंद आणि समाधानचा चीरस्थायी प्रकाश घेऊन येवो
translated_text: May Diwali bring an everlasting light of joy and happiness into your lives.
Justification: The sentiment is positive (1) because the sentence contains "आनंद आणि समाधान" (anand aani samadhan), which translates to "joy and satisfaction," expressing happiness and contentment.

Text: अभिनंदन हो मुबंईत ट्यूशन घेणारे सर
translated_text: Congratulations sir, you are taking tuition in Mumbai.
Justification: The word "अभिनंदन" (Abhinandan), meaning "congratulations," directly expresses a positive sentiment and, in this context, elicits joy.

Text: मान्यवरांनी क्षणिक काळासाठी का होईना लातूरची गरमी अनुभवी या बद्दल आम्ही आभारी आहोत.
translated_text: We are grateful that the dignitaries were able to experience the heat of Latur, even if only for a short while.
Justification: The sentiment and emotion are positive due to the expression "आभारी आहोत" (abhari aahot), meaning "we are grateful/thankful." This expresses gratitude and appreciation, indicating joy and a positive sentiment.

Text: अगदी मुंबई सारखं छान आहे.
translated_text: It's just as beautiful as Mumbai.
Justification: The positive sentiment and joy are derived from the word "छान" (chhaan), meaning "beautiful" or "nice," which indicates a positive appreciation.

Text: वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा साहेब एक कर्मचारी
translated_text: Happy birthday sir, an employee
Justification: The sentence expresses a positive sentiment through the phrase "वाढदिवसाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा" (vaadhdivsachya haardik shubhechha), which translates to "Happy birthday," a standard and polite greeting. This suggests a generally positive, though neutral, sentiment, without expressing further emotions.

Text: धन्यवाद भाऊ...नूतन वर्षाच्या हार्दिक शुभेच्छा..
translated_text: Thank you brother...Happy New Year..

Text: ट्विटर चे हार्दिक अभिनंदन ज्यांनी आज मराठी मध्ये ट्विट करून आमचा स्वाभिमान वाढवला

While literally meaning "This is Pappu's hat," it's used idiomatically to imply that someone or something is simple, foolish, or easily manipulated, thus conveying a negative connotation despite the literal meaning.

Text: नाही मराठी कुत्रकारांना मात्र पाकीट म्हाडा फ्लॅट निश्चित देणार
translated_text: No, Marathi dog owners will definitely be given a wallet and a MHADA flat.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the initial word "नाही" (nahi), meaning "no". This explicitly negates a positive outcome or statement, immediately setting a negative tone. While the rest of the sentence offers potential benefits, the initial rejection carries the most weight.

Text: आता मनसे वाल्यांनी हळूहळू पहिल्या सारखं भाजपवर पण टीका करणं चालू केलं तरी चालेल.
translated_text: Now, it would be okay if MNS members gradually started criticizing BJP like before.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "टीका करणं चालू केलं तरी चालेल" (tika karan chalu kela tari chalel) which implies criticism resuming, indicating a potentially negative relationship or conflict.

Text: इथे कारवाई का होत नाही
translated_text: Why is no action being taken here?
Justification: The phrase "का होत नाही" (ka hot nahi - why is not happening) expresses frustration and questions the lack of action, leading to a negative sentiment and anger.

Text: रामदास रडला होता तेव्हाच झाली दादा लागू
translated_text: Dada Lagoo came into effect only when Ramdas was crying.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from "रडला होता" (radla hota), meaning "was crying," which indicates sadness and a generally undesirable situation.

Text: भाषा ही फक्त भाषा असते ज्ञान नसतं रे गोट्या..
translated_text: Language is just language, not knowledge, you idiot.
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are primarily driven by the dismissive and condescending phrase "रे गोट्या" (re gotya), which translates to "you idiot" or a similar derogatory term. This phrase diminishes the person being addressed and conveys strong disapproval.

Text: का नाही? ते काय देव आहेत का ???
translated_text: Why not? Are they gods???
Justification: The sentence expresses negative sentiment due to the rhetorical question questioning someone's status "ते काय देव आहेत का ???" (te kay dev aahet ka??) implying they are not divine and thus are not exempt from criticism, expressing disbelief and borderline sarcasm. The phrase "देव आहेत का?? (dev aahet ka??)" directly contributes to the negative sentiment through this implication.

Text: हा अंब्या सगळ्या जगाला ज्ञान देतो पण स्वता मात्र फाटका रहातो.
translated_text: This Ambya gives knowledge to the whole world but remains a gate unto himself.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "फाटका रहातो" (phataka rahato), which translates to "remains a gate unto himself" but connotes being poor or unfulfilled despite benefiting others. This phrase implies a negative outcome for the subject despite positive actions.

Text: संजय राऊत सारखा चुत्या आणी बिनडोक व्यक्ती पुन्हा होणें नाही.!
translated_text: There will be no more stupid and mindless people like Sanjay Raut!
Justification: The sentiment is negative and evokes anger due to the use of the derogatory and abusive word "चुत्या" (chutya), directly insulting Sanjay Raut. The phrase "बिनडोक" (bindok), meaning mindless, further contributes to the negative and angry sentiment.

Text: लायकी आणि किंमत लाचार बनविते... याचे उत्तम उदाहरण।। शिव शिव।।
translated_text: Value and price make you helpless... A good example of this. Shiva Shiva.
Justification: The phrase "लाचार बनविते" (lachar banavite), meaning "make you helpless," indicates a negative sentiment due to its implication of a state of powerlessness.

Text: भल्या माणसा सुशांतसिंग केस वेळी झोपला होतास का
translated_text: Good man, were you sleeping during the Sushant Singh Rajput case?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the sarcastic use of "भल्या माणसा" (bhalya manasa - good man) which implies disapproval and questions the person's actions during a sensitive time.

Text: भंपक नाना आहे सगळं शहाणपणा फक्त याच्या कडेच
translated_text: There are many wonders, but only this one has all the wisdom.
Justification: The sentence is negative due to the use of "भंपक" (bhampak), which implies nonsense or absurdity.

Text: -----आणि सूक्ष्मदर्शकाच्या सहाय्याने पण पाहाता येत नाही.
translated_text: -----And it cannot be seen even with a microscope.
Justification: The negative sentiment is derived from the phrase "येत नाही" (yet nahi), meaning "cannot be" or "is not possible," indicating a lack of ability and hence a negative connotation.

Text: हा घ्या तपशील आणि करा भुंकायची सुरवात
translated_text: Take these details and start barking.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "भुंकायची सुरवात" (bhunkyachi survat), which translates to "start barking." This phrase is demeaning and insulting, implying that the recipient will engage in pointless or aggressive ranting.

Text: लायकी किती आणि बोलतो किती.. कशाला फालतू चे ट्विट करून स्वतःची इज्जत घालवतो...
translated_text: How much is he capable of and how much he talks.. Why waste his own dignity by tweeting nonsense...
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "फालतू चे" (faltu che) which translates to "nonsense" or "useless", expressing disgust for the content being created.

Text: अतिशय वाईट आहे हे सगळ! ह्यांना गावातल्या प्रथा...पूजा.. ह्यांचा ही आदर नाही?
translated_text: This is all very bad! Don't they have any respect for the village customs...worship...?
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "अतिशय वाईट आहे" (atishay wait aahe), which translates to "very bad." This directly expresses a negative evaluation of the situation, signaling a negative sentiment.

Text: अरे हा पण अर्धवट आणि याची माहिती पण अर्धवट.... खोटं बोल पण रेटुन बोल
translated_text: Oh, this is also half-baked and the information about this is also half-baked.... Tell a lie, but tell it quickly.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the phrase "अर्धवट" (ardhvat - half-baked), implying incompleteness and inadequacy, compounded by the encouragement to lie ("खोटं बोल" - khot bol).

Text: आज दारि्द्र वाढवणारा दिवस साजरा केला तर चालेल का.? सर्व राजकारणी चोर आहेत.
translated_text: Would it be okay to celebrate a day that increases poverty today? All politicians are thieves.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "सर्व राजकारणी चोर आहेत" (sarva rajkarani chor aahet), meaning "all politicians are thieves," which expresses a negative opinion.

Text: कविता वाचून मतदान होत नाहीं रे बाबा
translated_text: You don't vote by reading poetry, Dad.
Justification: The phrase "नाहीं रे बाबा" (naahi re baba) expresses a dismissive tone, contributing to the negative sentiment (-1). While "बाबा" means "Dad," in this context, it's used with "नाहीं रे" to indicate disbelief or disapproval.

Text: हा आशिष शेलार दरिद्री निघाला रे देवा.... काय काय करू लागला ....
translated_text: This Ashish Shelar has become poor, oh my God.... what has he started doing....
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "दरिद्री" (daridri), meaning "poor" or "impoverished," used in a derogatory manner, implying incompetence and disapproval, thus indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: नौटंकी पप्पूची लायकी आहे का मोदींचे नाव उच्चारण्याची?
translated_text: Is Nautanki Pappu worthy of uttering Modi's name?
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the derogatory term "नौटंकी पप्पूची लायकी" (Nautanki Pappu's worth), which implies that "Pappu" is unworthy.

Text: बिस्किट खाणार्या वात्रकार दिवसेंदिवस गरीब होत आहेत
translated_text: Biscuit-eating farmers are getting poorer day by day.
Justification: The phrase "गरीब होत आहेत" (garib hot aahet) meaning "are getting poorer" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: नास्रिक. जाणिवपुर्वक करतात हे. बाप तशी बेटी
translated_text: Nasrik. This is what the senses do. Father like daughter
Justification: The negative sentiment is derived from "जाणिवपुर्वक करतात" (janivpurvak karatat), meaning "deliberately/purposely do," implying a negative intention behind the action.

Text: शिव्या खाणे हा अंध भक्तांचा जन्मसिध्द अधिकार आहे का
translated_text: Is it the birthright of blind devotees to be cursed?
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "शिव्या" (shivya), which translates to "curses" or "abuses".

Text: सरकार बंद च करतेय शाळा...आता कोण नाही करत शाळा
translated_text: The government is closing schools...who is not going to school now?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from "बंद च करतेय" (band cha karatey), meaning "is closing down," which expresses a negative action by the government regarding schools.

Text: तु कितीही हाण फावडं.... पण घरातच राहणार घरकोंबडं...
translated_text: No matter how much you throw.... but stay at home, stay home...
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "घरकोंबडं" (gharkombda), which literally means "stay-at-home chicken" and implies someone is weak, cowardly, and unwilling to leave the house, thus being insulting.

Text: राजकारणी कसा नसावा याचं उत्तम उदाहरण म्हणजे हा फावडा...
translated_text: This shovel is a perfect example of what a politician should not be...
Justification: The phrase "फावडा" (shovel) used to describe a politician implies incompetence and lack of sophistication, leading to a negative sentiment. The comparison is inherently derogatory in this context.

Text: तोपर्यंत शिंदे गट टिकेल का याची काळजी करा तुम्ही.
translated_text: You should worry about whether the Shinde group will survive until then.
Justification: "काळजी करा" (kalaji kara - worry) indicates a negative sentiment as it expresses concern and apprehension about the Shinde group's survival.

Text: लाज काढली आज उद्धव साहेबांनी पण समोरचा तर नर्लज्ज आहे
translated_text: Uddhav Saheb has shown his shame today, but the person in front of him is shameless.
Justification: "नर्लज्ज आहे" (narlajja aahe), meaning "is shameless," indicates a negative sentiment and elicits disgust due to the lack of moral regard implied.

Text: जापनीज पर्यटक महिलेसोबत तरुणांकडून गैरवर्तन...
translated_text: Japanese tourist woman abused by youths...
Justification: "गैरवर्तन" (gairvartan), meaning abuse or misbehavior, strongly indicates a negative sentiment and evokes sadness.

Text: मित्र असला तरी प्र वृत्ती नीच आहे असे खुद्द बाळासाहेब म्हणाले होते
translated_text: Balasaheb himself had said that even if you have a friend, your attitude is low.
Justification: The phrase "प्र वृत्ती नीच आहे" (pr vrutti neech aahe), meaning "attitude is low/despicable", indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: तुम्ही काय शे.. उपटायला विरोधी पक्षात आहेत का
translated_text: What are you doing.. are you in the opposition party to uproot them?
Justification: The phrase "शे.. उपटायला" implies futility and uselessness, contributing to the negative sentiment. "शे.. उपटायला" is an idiom used to express that someone is doing something pointless or unproductive.

Text: हा कोर्टाचा अपमान आहे
translated_text: This is contempt of court.
Justification: The phrase "अपमान आहे" (apamaan aahe), meaning "is contempt," indicates a negative sentiment and evokes anger due to its accusatory nature.

Text: अजित दादांची पक्षात किंमत शून्य होत चालली आहे.. कटू असत
translated_text: Ajit Dada's value in the party is becoming zero.. He was bitter.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are primarily driven by the phrase "किंमत शून्य होत चालली आहे" (kimmat shunya hot chalali aahe), meaning "value is becoming zero," indicating a loss of importance and subsequent sadness in the situation.

Text: महाराष्ट्रच काय पूर्ण देश तुम्हाला स्वीकारणार नाही
translated_text: Maharashtra alone, the entire country won't accept you.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "स्वीकारणार नाही" (swikarnar nahi), which translates to "won't accept," indicating rejection and contributing to a negative overall feeling.

Text: तील तरूणांनी फक्त भोंगेच लावायचे का?
translated_text: Should young people only blow horns?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the rhetorical question implying that the youth are engaging in trivial activities ("फक्त भोंगेच लावायचे का?"), rather than contributing meaningfully. This suggests disappointment or disapproval.

Text: तू काय लावारीस भक्तीनं आहे
translated_text: What are you asking for out of devotion?
Justification: The sentiment is negative because "लावारीस" (lavaris), meaning ownerless/unfounded, implies a lack of reason or basis for the devotion, thus questioning its validity in a dismissive way. This casts a negative light on the action described.

Text: कबुतरे सोडूनच पाकिस्तान बनवला होता.
translated_text: Pakistan was created by abandoning pigeons.
Justification: "सोडूनच" (sodunach) implying abandonment or leaving behind, carries a negative connotation that contributes to the negative sentiment (-1), even if the overall emotion is neutral as it suggests a loss or sacrifice in the creation of Pakistan.

Text: हे शाळा पण विकून खातील
translated_text: They will sell this school too.
Justification: The phrase "विकून खातील" (vikun khatil), meaning "will sell and eat/consume," implies a destructive or exploitative action, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: आला शिव्या खायला
translated_text: Came to get scolded.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the phrase "शिव्या खायला" (shivya khayla), which translates to "to get scolded" and implies an unpleasant and unwanted experience.

Text: तुम्ही गददारांचे वारसदारबाप पण गद्दार आणि तू पण
translated_text: You are the heirs of traitors, but you are also traitors, and you too
Justification: The phrase "गददारांचे वारसदार" (gad'darānche vārasdār), meaning "heirs of traitors," strongly indicates a negative sentiment and evokes disgust by associating the subject with betrayal and treachery. Furthermore, calling someone "गद्दार" (gad'dar) directly reinforces the disgust and negativity.

Text: लवकरच या तथाकथित महाशक्ती म्हणवून घेणाऱ्यांना उतरती कळा लागणार हे निश्चित..
translated_text: It is certain that soon these so-called superpowers will have to face a setback.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "उतरती कळा लागणार" (utarti kala lagnar), which translates to "will face a setback" or "will have a decline," indicating a negative future outcome for the subject. The phrase "तथाकथित" (tathakathit) "so-called" add to the negative sentiment .

Text: जपान साठी सहानभुती आणि अमेरिका साठी
translated_text: Sympathy for Japan and for America
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the incomplete and abruptly ending sentence "अमेरिका साठी" which, in this context, implies a missing negative element compared to the expression of sympathy for Japan. While not explicitly negative, the lack of a comparable expression for America following the expression of sympathy for Japan creates a negative implication or bias.

Text: हा पक्षाचा कार्यक्रम आहे की विरोधातील पक्षनेत्यांचा?
translated_text: Is this the party's program or that of the opposition party leaders?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the question implying doubt and potential conflict or negativity associated with "विरोधातील पक्षनेत्यांचा?" (virodhatil pakshanetancha? - of the opposition party leaders?). It suggests a possible ulterior motive or negative influence from the opposition.

Text: काही ही हाऊ दे मस्त विरोधी पक्षात बसवलं तुम्हाला
translated_text: How dare you be put in the opposition party?
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are primarily driven by the phrase "काही ही हाऊ दे", which expresses strong disapproval and outrage at the situation.

Text: तुमची आई बाबा सर्व मोदी साहेब आहेत खर्या आईचे दुःख तुम्हाला काय समजणार.
translated_text: Your mother and father are all Modi Saheb, how can you understand the pain of a real mother?
Justification: The phrase "खर्या आईचे दुःख तुम्हाला काय समजणार" (kharya aaiche dukh tumhala kay samajnar), meaning "how can you understand the pain of a real mother?", expresses sadness and implies a lack of empathy, thus driving the negative sentiment. The word "दुःख" (dukh), meaning "pain," is a key indicator of this emotion and sentiment.

Text: हा आणि आयकर घाबरून कमलाबाई मांडीवर बसणारा याला कोणी विचारणार नाही
translated_text: No one will question this and the one who sits on Kamalabai's lap out of fear of income tax.
Justification: The phrase "आयकर घाबरून कमलाबाई मांडीवर बसणारा" (the one who sits on Kamalabai's lap out of fear of income tax) expresses a deep sense of disgust due to its implication of subservience, opportunism, and moral bankruptcy driven by fear, thus indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: विकास भाऊ अवघड आहे याचं राजसाहेब त्या ठिकाणी असते तर परिस्थिती वेगळी असती
translated_text: Vikas Bhau is difficult, if Rajsaheb was there, the situation would have been different.
Justification: The phrase "अवघड आहे" (avadgad aahe) meaning "is difficult" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: भाजपच्या शहराध्यक्षाने स्वत:वर गोळी झाडून केली आत्महत्या, बीड हादरलं
translated_text: BJP city president commits suicide by shooting himself, Beed shaken
Justification: "हादरलं" (hadarle) which means "shaken" or "shocked" implies a negative sentiment and evokes fear due to the shocking and tragic nature of the event (suicide).

Text: उलटा बाण' हे चिन्ह चांगले राहील....अगदी शोभून दिसेल साहेबांना
translated_text: The 'upside down arrow' symbol would be good...it would look very nice on you sir.
Justification: The phrase "अगदी शोभून दिसेल" (agdi shobhun disel - would look very nice) implies sarcasm when directed at someone referred to as "साहेबांना" (Sahebanna - sir), indicating negativity because it's likely insincere flattery.

Text: अजून थोडे दिवस राहिला तर त्याची इज्जत कमी होईल....पाहुण्यांनी परत जायचं असत
translated_text: If he stayed for a few more days, his dignity would be diminished....the guests would have to go back.
Justification: "इज्जत कमी होईल" (izzat kami hoil - dignity would be diminished) suggests a negative impact on someone's reputation, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: हा गहन प्रश्न आहे भाऊ
translated_text: This is a serious question, brother.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "गहन" (gahan), which translates to "serious" or "profound." While not inherently negative, in this context, it suggests a problem that is difficult or troubling, thus contributing to a negative sentiment.

Text: अरे भास्कर तोंडातून गटार उगवयलाच ठेवलंय का तुला लाचारांच्या सेनेत
translated_text: Oh Bhaskar, why are you still in the army of the helpless?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "तोंडातून गटार उगवयलाच ठेवलंय का" (tondatun gatar ugvayalch thevlay ka), which translates to "why do you have a gutter growing in your mouth?". This is a highly offensive and derogatory expression, directly contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: ला सपोर्ट करणे हे भिकारपणाचे लक्षण आहे. सामाजिक विषमता वाढतच जाते.
translated_text: Supporting is a sign of begging. Social inequality continues to increase.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "भिकारपणाचे" (bhikarpānāche), meaning "begging" or "worthless," which expresses a negative judgment.

Text: इतका खोटारडा रडका आणि बेशरम नेता पुन्हा होणे नाही.
translated_text: Such a false, shameless leader will never happen again.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the words "खोटारडा" (khotarda - false/liar), "रडका" (radka - whiny) and "बेशरम" (besharam - shameless) which express strong disapproval and moral outrage.

Text: बकरी ईद च्या वेळेस तोंडात बोळा कोबला होता का
translated_text: Did you have a mouthful of snot during Bakri Eid?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "तोंडात बोळा कोबला होता का" (tondat bola kobla hota ka), which is a crude and insulting question implying someone was silent or restrained during Bakri Eid, carrying a negative connotation.

Text: शासकीय कार्यालय म्हणजे नेत्यांच्या कार्यकर्त्यांची दुकाने बनलेत का?
translated_text: Have government offices become shops for leaders' workers?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "नेत्यांच्या कार्यकर्त्यांची दुकाने बनलेत" (netyanchya karyakartyanchi dukane banlet), which translates to "become shops for leaders' workers." This implies corruption and misuse of government offices for personal gain, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: आलिया-रणबीरमध्ये का पडली वादाची ठिणगी? समोर आलं कारण
translated_text: Why did the controversy between Alia and Ranbir spark? The reason has come to light
Justification: The phrase "वादाची ठिणगी" (vaadaachi thhingi), meaning "spark of controversy," indicates a negative sentiment. Although not deeply emotional, it suggests a conflict, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: हा मर्हाठी मानसाचा अपमान हाय… मुंबईला महाराष्ट्रापासून तोडन्याचा डाव हाय…
translated_text: This is an insult to the Maratha spirit… This is a plot to separate Mumbai from Maharashtra…
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the word "अपमान" (apman), which translates directly to "insult." This signifies a feeling of disrespect and offense, leading to the negative sentiment and feeling of disgust.

Text: आरोग्य केंद्राची अवस्था पिसाळल्यागत झाली आहे त्याच काय.......
translated_text: The health center is in a dilapidated condition....
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the word "पिसाळल्यागत" (pisalyagat), meaning dilapidated or in a terrible state.

Text: निवडणुक आयोग हे यांच्या हातचे बाहुले असल्यासारखे वागतात
translated_text: The Election Commission is acting as if it were their puppet.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "हातचे बाहुले असल्यासारखे वागतात" (hatache bahule aslyasarkhe vagatat), which implies the Election Commission is a puppet controlled by someone else, indicating a lack of independence and therefore a negative connotation.

Text: चोरी केली ती पकडली गेलीय म्हणून आत। आहेत तुमचे साहेब ...
translated_text: She was caught stealing, so she's inside. Your boss is here...
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "चोरी केली" (chori keli), which means "she committed theft," implying a negative action and legal consequence.

Text: त्यांच्याबद्दल आस्था नाहीरे, लोकं खिल्ली उडवत आहेत त्यांची
translated_text: There is no interest in them, people are making fun of them.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by "खिल्ली उडवत आहेत" (khilli udavat aahet), which means "making fun of," indicating a negative action towards the subject.

Text: महागाई वाढत नाही आहे, माझा पगार कमी होत चालला आहे..
translated_text: Inflation is not increasing, my salary is decreasing.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment (-1) due to the phrase "माझा पगार कमी होत चालला आहे" (majha pagar kami hot chala aahe), which translates to "my salary is decreasing." This indicates a financial hardship and dissatisfaction, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: आज तेवढा संयम व समर्पण नाही हे कटु सत्य
translated_text: The bitter truth is that there is not that much patience and dedication today.
Justification: "कटु सत्य" (katu satya - bitter truth) indicates negativity, contributing to the overall negative sentiment and sadness emotion due to the inherent unpleasantness associated with facing a difficult or undesirable reality.

Text: गप रे येड्या तुझ्या काकांना सांग आता,सत्तेविना जगावं लागेल.
translated_text: Gosh, tell your uncle now that you will have to live without power.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "सत्तेविना जगावं लागेल" (sattevina jagava lageel), which translates to "you will have to live without power," implying a loss of authority or control, leading to a feeling of sadness and powerlessness.

Text: सचिन जी,ही सगळी कळसूत्री बाहुली आहेत , कोणाची हे सांगायलाच नको ..!
translated_text: Sachin ji, all these are puppets, no need to tell whose they are..!
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "कळसूत्री बाहुली" (kalasutri bahuli), meaning "puppets," which implies manipulation and lack of autonomy, leading to a negative connotation despite the user experiencing joy.

Text: पुढील दहा वर्षे तु कोणत्या पक्षात राहशील हे तुला तरी माहीत आहे का !
translated_text: Do you even know which party you will be in for the next ten years?
Justification: The sentence implies uncertainty and potential political instability, expressed through the phrase "पुढील दहा वर्षे तु कोणत्या पक्षात राहशील हे तुला तरी माहीत आहे का !", questioning the person's future commitment and lacking stability which contributes to a negative sentiment.

Text: गद्दारी करुन काय हिंदूत्व साघ्य ‌करणार आहात
translated_text: What kind of Hindutva are you going to share by betraying them?
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the word "गद्दारी" (gaddari), which translates to "betrayal" or "treachery." This word evokes strong negative feelings and implies a violation of trust.

Text: पंढरपूर, देगलुर, कोल्हापूर उत्तर या विधानसभेच्या पोटनिवडणुकीत संस्कृती, परंपरा कुठे गेली होती.
translated_text: Where did culture and tradition go in the by-elections to the Pandharpur, Degalur, and Kolhapur North assembly constituencies?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the rhetorical question "कुठे गेली होती" (kuthe geli hoti) - "where did it go?" This phrase implies a critical view and expresses disappointment regarding the perceived absence of culture and tradition in the mentioned elections.

Text: बावनकुळे सोबत सर्वांचीच फाटली.. निवडून येणार नाही आढावा घेऊन माघार.. जनता सब जाणती है.
translated_text: Everyone has broken up with Bawankule.. He will not be elected and will withdraw after reviewing.. The public knows everything.
Justification: The phrase "सर्वांचीच फाटली" (sarvanchich phatli), meaning "everyone has broken up (with Bawankule)" suggests a negative association and loss of support, contributing to the negative sentiment. This indicates a loss of confidence and faith.

Text: जन्मदरिद्री असुयाग्रस्त कृतघ्न कपटी थुकरट नेता म्हणून तुझी नोंद महाराष्ट्राच्या राजकीय इतिहासात होणार
translated_text: You will be recorded in the political history of Maharashtra as a poor, ungrateful, hypocritical, and deceitful leader.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the string of negative descriptors applied to the leader, specifically "दरिद्री असुयाग्रस्त कृतघ्न कपटी थुकरट" (poor, ungrateful, hypocritical, and deceitful).

Text: ताकद पाहिली गोरेगाव पत्रा चाळीतील मराठी परिवार बेघर करून रस्तावर आणले.
translated_text: Seeing the power, the Marathi family in Goregaon Patra Chali was displaced and brought onto the streets.
Justification: The phrase "बेघर करून रस्तावर आणले" (beghar karun rastavar aanle - displaced and brought onto the streets) indicates a negative situation causing disgust, as it describes the act of rendering a family homeless.

Text: आधीच त्या गल्लीत गर्दी त्यात हे!
translated_text: It's already crowded in that street!
Justification: The phrase "आधीच त्या गल्लीत गर्दी त्यात हे!" implies a pre-existing negative situation (crowded street) worsened by an additional element ("त्यात हे!"). The "त्यात हे!" part, meaning "and this on top of that!", is responsible for the negative sentiment and surprise, as it expresses unexpected aggravation.

Text: घराला रंग देताना मुलगा थरथरत होता, वडिलांनी शिडीला हात लावताच घडला मोठा अनर्थ
translated_text: The boy was trembling while painting the house, a big disaster happened when his father touched the ladder
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "घडला मोठा अनर्थ" (ghadla motha anarth), which translates to "a big disaster happened," indicating a calamitous event.

Text: काय फालतू गीरी आहे!
translated_text: What a waste of time!
Justification: The phrase "फालतू गीरी" (faltu giri), meaning "waste of time" or "nonsense," expresses a negative sentiment and elicits disgust.

Text: वेडा पाठक माग आणि त्याचा घरकोंबडा मालक पुढ...
translated_text: Mad Pathak Mag and his house owner next...
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "वेडा" (veda), meaning "mad" or "crazy," which casts a negative light on Pathak.

Text: हा माणूस मनोरुग्ण वाटतो तुझ्या घरचे तुला कसे सहन करतात!?
translated_text: This man seems mentally ill. How can your family tolerate you?!
Justification: "मनोरुग्ण वाटतो" (seems mentally ill) expresses a negative assessment and "कसे सहन करतात!?" (how can they tolerate you?!) implies strong disapproval and disgust towards the person mentioned. Therefore, the sentence expresses negative sentiment and disgust.

Text: या या बेरी सेड
translated_text: Ya ya berry seed
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "बेरी सेड" ("berry seed"). While seemingly innocuous, without further context this phrase sounds like a childish taunt or insult, thus contributing to a negative sentiment.

Text: उशिरा आलेलं शहाणपण नाही का?
translated_text: Isn't it late wisdom?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "उशिरा आलेलं शहाणपण" (ushira aalel shahapan), which translates to "late wisdom." The implication is that the wisdom is arriving too late to be useful, leading to a negative feeling.

Text: पावसाळ्यात डाॅक्टर चा धंदा पण ठप्प होतो त्यांना अनुदान मिळणार का?
translated_text: Doctors' work comes to a standstill during the monsoon, will they get a subsidy?
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "ठप्प होतो" (thapp hoto), which translates to "comes to a standstill" and implies a negative impact on doctors' livelihoods.

Text: पैसेंजर ट्रेन है महामहिम,वंदेभारत नही ,
translated_text: Passenger train is His Highness, not Vandebharat,
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the sarcastic use of "महामहिम" (Mahamahim - His Highness) when referring to a passenger train. This implies disappointment and mockery, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: काही होणार नाही परत तोंडावर पडणार सी बी आय
translated_text: Nothing will happen, CBI will fall on its face again
Justification: The phrase "तोंडावर पडणार" (tondavar padnaar), meaning "will fall on its face," expresses frustration and negativity, contributing to the anger and negative sentiment.

Text: लवकरच काही ठराविक भ्रष्ट्राचारी लोकांच्या दिल्ली वाऱ्या वाढतील
translated_text: Soon, the Delhi winds of certain corrupt people will increase.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "भ्रष्ट्राचारी" (bhrashtrachari), which means "corrupt".

Text: ती पण नाही वाढली..
translated_text: She didn't grow up either.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "नाही वाढली" (nahi vadhali), which means "didn't grow up." This indicates a lack of expected development, carrying a negative connotation.

Text: म्हात्रे बाई जरा तोंडपट्टा कमी चालवा आणि कंमेंट बॉक्स कडे पण लक्ष द्या
translated_text: Old lady, please be a little less obnoxious and pay attention to the comment box.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "तोंडपट्टा कमी चालवा" (tondpatta kami chalava), meaning "be a little less obnoxious/shut your mouth a bit," which is considered rude and disrespectful.

Text: थापाड्यांच्या पक्षात एक थापा आला ...त्यात काय नवीन....आतातरी कमी थापा मारा गद्दारांनो....
translated_text: A slap came from the party of the slappers...what's new in that....slap less inside, traitors....
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the words "थापाड्यांच्या" (thāpāḍyān̄chyā - slappers') and "गद्दारांनो" (gaddārān̄nō - traitors), which express strong disapproval and contempt.

Text: जर पत्रकारच आता असे प्रश्न विचारू लागले तर सामान्य जनतेने कुठून माहिती घ्यावी ?
translated_text: If journalists are the ones asking such questions now, where can the general public get information?
Justification: The phrase "असे प्रश्न विचारू लागले तर सामान्य जनतेने कुठून माहिती घ्यावी ?" (If they start asking such questions, where will the common people get information?) implies a sense of helplessness and concern about the source of reliable information, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: सत्तेसाठी लालची असणारे कार्यकर्त्यांना मूर्ख बनवत आहेत
translated_text: Those who are greedy for power are fooling the workers.
Justification: The sentence has a negative sentiment due to the word "लालची" (lalchi), meaning greedy, which describes the negative characteristic of the actors, and "मूर्ख बनवत आहेत" (murkh banavat aahet), meaning fooling, indicating a deceptive and exploitative action towards the workers, fueling the anger emotion.

Text: ह्या   बामणानच्या जमाती आज तरी एक मेकात लगीन करतात का ?
translated_text: Do the tribes of Bamanan even join a Mecha today?
Justification: The negative sentiment is derived from the derogatory and potentially offensive term "बामणानच्या" (Bamanan), used to refer to a specific community, which can be considered disrespectful.

Text: जे हटवले गेले ते अतिक्रमण होते... त्यामुळे त्यांचे त्यांनी बंदोबस्त केला असेल...
translated_text: The ones that were removed were encroachments... so they must have taken care of them...
Justification: The negative sentiment is derived from the word "अतिक्रमण" (atikraman), meaning "encroachments," which inherently carries a negative connotation due to its association with illegal occupation and violation of space.

Text: तू काय म्हशी भदरात होता? भास्कर जाधवांची राणेंवर विखारी टीका
translated_text: What were you doing in Bhadra? Bhaskar Jadhav's harsh criticism of Rane
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "विखारी टीका" (vikhari tika), which translates to "harsh criticism" or "venomous criticism," indicating a negative evaluation of the situation.

Text: भाजप खोटे बोलतो पण आत्मविश्वासाने
translated_text: BJP lies but with confidence
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the Marathi word "खोटे" (khote), meaning "lies" or "false." This word indicates dishonesty, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: पुर्ण सांगायला घाबरता का. सांग पुर्ण तुमच्या डोळ्यासमोर काय घडलं.
translated_text: Are you afraid to tell the whole story? Tell me exactly what happened before your eyes.
Justification: The negative sentiment and emotion of fear are primarily derived from the word "घाबरता" (ghabarta), which translates to "afraid".

Text: आरे हा    कुळे नाही    /   कुळे आहे सगळ्यात नीच माणूस
translated_text: Aarey is not a clan / Clan is the lowest of people
Justification: The phrase "सगळ्यात नीच माणूस" (sakyat nich manus) meaning "lowest of people" indicates a strongly negative sentiment.

Text: हा लांडगा काहीतरी उकरुन काढतच असतो कोणीतरी तरी तर विचारतील म्हणून!
translated_text: This wolf keeps pulling out something just in case someone asks!
Justification: The phrase "लांडगा काहीतरी उकरुन काढतच असतो" (wolf keeps pulling out something) implies a persistently irritating and troublesome behavior, which contributes to the anger. This suggests a frustrating and unwanted situation.

Text: अभिव्यक्ती स्वातंत्र्य म्हणजे जे तुम्ही पायदळी तुडवत होता ते
translated_text: Freedom of expression is what you were trampling on.
Justification: The phrase "पायदळी तुडवत होता" (paydali tudavat hota), meaning "were trampling on," indicates a negative sentiment due to the act of suppressing or disrespecting freedom of expression. This evokes a sense of anger and resentment.

Text: कमी पटसंख्येच्या शाळा बंदचा घाट धोकादायक : अजित पवार
translated_text: School closures with low enrolment rates are dangerous: Ajit Pawar
Justification: The phrase "धोकादायक" (dhokadayak), meaning "dangerous," directly expresses a negative sentiment and evokes fear.

Text: भाजपा महाराष्ट्र मधुन लवकरच साफ होणार
translated_text: BJP will be cleared from Maharashtra soon
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "साफ होणार" (saaf honar), which implies that BJP will be 'cleared' or 'wiped out', indicating a negative outcome for the party.

Text: नंतर एक थी शिवसेना असच म्हनाव लागेल का?
translated_text: Will Ek Thi Shiv Sena say the same thing later?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "असच म्हनाव लागेल का?" (asach mhanav lagel ka?), which implies a forced or undesirable situation, suggesting the speaker believes the current Shiv Sena is declining and will be reduced to just being a memory of the past. The question mark indicates doubt and a negative outlook on the future state of the political party.

Text: भाजपच्या इतिहासात किती झाल्या त्या पण सांगून टाका विद्वान एकदा
translated_text: Scholar, tell me how many such cases have occurred in the history of BJP.
Justification: The phrase "विद्वान एकदा" (vidvan ekda - scholar once) is used sarcastically, implying the speaker doesn't genuinely believe the person is a scholar and is being dismissive, thus contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: तेच.... हे आपलंच येडं निघालं
translated_text: That's it....this is our own fault.
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger emotion are driven by the phrase "येडं निघालं" (yedam nighalam), which translates to "turned out to be foolish/idiotic," expressing frustration and blame.

Text: निर्लजजपणचा कळस किती मूर्ख असतात ही लोक...
translated_text: How stupid these people are, the height of shamelessness...
Justification: "निrlajajpanaachaa kaLas" (the height of shamelessness) indicates strong disapproval and negativity, thus contributing to the negative sentiment. The word "murkha" (stupid) further amplifies the negative sentiment and contributes to the feeling of disgust.

Text: सोलापूर । सीसीएचवर दाखल होताच गुन्हा, गंडवण्यासाठी नवा ॲप आला पुन्हा
translated_text: Solapur. Crime as soon as CCH is registered, new app to cheat comes again
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "गंडवण्यासाठी" (gandavanyasathi), which means "to cheat" or "to deceive".

Text: लांड्यांच्या पुळक्यांच्या लग्नातला खर्च आपण का म्हणून करायचा. नाही करायचा.
translated_text: Why should we pay for the wedding expenses of the widows and the poor? We shouldn't.
Justification: The negative sentiment and anger are primarily driven by the derogatory and dismissive word "लांड्यांच्या पुळक्यांच्या" (landyanchya pulkyanchya), which refers to widows and the poor in a disrespectful manner.

Text: सूर्य गोचरमुळे या राशीच्या लोकांचे होणार नुकसान...
translated_text: The transit of the Sun will cause losses to the people of this zodiac sign...
Justification: "नुकसान" (nuksan), meaning "loss", indicates a negative impact, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: स्वतःचे थोबाड पाहिले आहे का कधी आरश्यात.... फसलेले व्यंग चित्र काढले वाटतं तुमच्या अब्बाने.
translated_text: Have you ever seen your own face in the mirror?... It seems like your father drew a misleading satirical picture.
Justification: The phrase "फसलेले व्यंग चित्र" (fastele vyang chitra), meaning "misleading satirical picture," implies a distorted and unflattering comparison, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: भाजपने आजपर्यंत राजकारण कमी आणि कट कारस्थानच जास्त केलय..
translated_text: Till date, BJP has done less politics and more conspiracies.
Justification: The phrase "कट कारस्थानच जास्त केलय" (kat karasthanach jasta kelay - done more conspiracies) implies a negative assessment of BJP's actions, indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: ते आत मध्ये असून ही...... तुम्हाला इथ टिव टिव करायला लावणे.... यालाच दहशत म्हणतात
translated_text: They are inside and this...... making you twirl here.... that's what we call terror.
Justification: The phrase "दहशत म्हणतात" (dahshat mhantaat - call terror) is directly indicative of a negative sentiment and associated with fear.

Text: काळतोंड्या माघार का घेतली
translated_text: Why did blackheads withdraw?
Justification: "काळतोंड्या" (blackheads) is a derogatory term used informally, implying negativity and surprise at their action, hence the negative sentiment.

Text: हे आता कळलं,महोदयांना.इतके वर्षे इतरांवर चिखलफेक.
translated_text: I understand this now, sir. For so many years, I have been throwing mud at others.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "चिखलफेक" (chikhalfek), which translates to "throwing mud." This implies malicious and defaming behavior towards others, contributing to a negative overall sentiment despite the neutral emotion.

Text: चुतिया आठ वर्षे भाजपची सत्ता आहे बंदी घालायला का उशीर केला ते पहिले सांग
translated_text: Chutiya: BJP has been in power for eight years, first tell me why there was a delay in banning it.
Justification: The Marathi word "चूतिया" (chutiya), a vulgar and derogatory term, is the primary reason for the negative sentiment.

Text: जरी आघात समजण्यायोग्य आहे जरी चित्रपटाला खराब वर्ण विकासाचा त्रास झाला आहे आणि एक विसंगत टोन आहे अन्यथा नायकांच्या ओळखीबद्दल आणि ती सहन करणार्या आघातांबद्दलची ही लांबलचक नाटक गिलियन फ्लिनस गर्ल गर्ल चालविण्याइतकी आकर्षक असू शकते.
translated_text: Although the trauma is understandable, the film suffers from poor character development and an inconsistent tone. Otherwise, this long drama about the identity of the protagonist and the trauma she endures could be as compelling as Gillian Flynn's Girl Girl.
Justification: The sentiment is negative (-1) due to the phrase "खराब वर्ण विकासाचा त्रास झाला आहे" (kharab varna vikasacha tras jhala aahe), meaning "suffers from poor character development," which indicates a flaw in the movie.

Text: असं असूनही त्या सिनेमाचा प्रभाव यावेळी दिग्दर्शकाला पडद्यावर उतरवता आलेला नाही
translated_text: Despite this, the director has not been able to capture the impact of that film on screen this time.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "उतरवता आलेला नाही" (utaravata aalela nahi), which translates to "has not been able to capture." This indicates a lack of success or failure, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: एकीकडे सिनेमात हा एक कथानकाचा ट्रॅक सुरु असताना सोबतच तरुणाई कशाप्रकारे गैरमार्गावर गेली आहे
translated_text: On the one hand, while this one storyline is going on in the movie, at the same time, how has the youth gone astray?
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "गैरमार्गावर गेली आहे" (gairmargavar geli aahe), meaning "gone astray," which indicates a negative trajectory for the youth.

Text: खांडकेकर त्यांच्यातील बडी यशस्वीपणे बाहेर आणतात, परंतु त्यांच्या पात्रात खोलवर आणि तपशीलाचा अभाव त्यांना अडखळतो.
translated_text: Khandkekar successfully brings out the baddie in them, but the lack of depth and detail in their characters hinders them.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily due to the phrase "अडखळतो" (adakhalto), meaning "hinders". This indicates a negative impact or obstacle.

Text: भविष्यवाणी ही एक गोष्ट आहे जी आपण या शैलीसह अपेक्षा करता
translated_text: Prediction is something you expect with this genre.
Justification: "अपेक्षा करता" (apeksha karta - expect) implies uncertainty and potential disappointment, thus contributing to the negative sentiment. While seemingly neutral, the context of a prediction needing expectation creates a slight negativity as expectations can be unmet.

Text: पहिल्या काही मिनिटांमध्ये संभाषण वन-लाइनर आणि पंच लाईन्सने भरलेले आहे, ज्यामुळे ते अतिशयोक्तीपूर्ण वाटते.
translated_text: The conversation in the first few minutes is full of one-liners and punch lines, which makes it seem exaggerated.
Justification: The sentence is negative because of the phrase "अतिशयोक्तीपूर्ण वाटते" (atishayoktipurna vaatte), which translates to "seems exaggerated," indicating a negative perception of the conversation.

Text: त्यात मृतदेह अन् रिशूचा तुटलेला हात सापडतो ज्यावर ‘रानी’ गोंदवलेलं असतं
translated_text: In it, a body and Rishu's broken hand are found, on which 'Queen' is tattooed.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "मृतदेह अन् रिशूचा तुटलेला हात" (mrutadeh ani Rishu cha tutlela haat), meaning "a dead body and Rishu's broken hand," which evokes a sense of morbidity and violence.

Text: अनेक वर्षांच्या वियोगानंतर अचानक झालेल्या संपर्कामुळे जुन्या जखमा आणि कौटुंबिक आणि वैवाहिक संकटाच्या संकटात हरवलेल्या प्रेमाच्या कटू आठवणी उघड होतात
translated_text: A sudden contact after years of separation reveals old wounds and bitter memories of love lost in the throes of family and marital crisis.
Justification: The negative sentiment and sadness are primarily driven by the phrase "जुन्या जखमा" (junya jakhma), which translates to "old wounds," and the word "कटू" (katu), meaning "bitter," which colors the memory of lost love with negativity.

Text: या घटनेत सस्पेंस, टेन्शन आणि थ्रिल निर्माण करण्याची खूप क्षमता होती, आम्हाला एक नम्र सीन मिळतो ज्यामध्ये कोणतीही भावना निर्माण होत नाही.
translated_text: This incident had a lot of potential to create suspense, tension, and thrill, we get a bland scene that doesn't evoke any emotion.
Justification: The phrase "कोणतीही भावना निर्माण होत नाही" (kontihi bhavna nirman hot nahi), meaning "doesn't evoke any emotion," indicates a lack of positive feeling and thus a negative sentiment.

Text: कलाकारांचे अभिनय, विनोदनिर्मिती करण्याचे प्रयत्न जरी प्रामाणिक असले तरीही त्यांचं समीकरण मात्र फिस्कटलं आहे
translated_text: Even though the actors' acting and comedy efforts are sincere, their equation is flawed.
Justification: "फिस्कटलं आहे" (phiskatla aahe - flawed) indicates a negative outcome, making the sentiment negative.

Text: पण ऐतिहासिक तीर्थक्षेत्राविषयी अनभिज्ञ असलेल्या व्यक्तीसाठीही, जहागीरदारांचा मिनिटाचा चित्रपट अगदी आदर्श आहे.
translated_text: But even for someone who is unaware of the historical pilgrimage site, the Jahangirdar's minute-long film is quite ideal.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "अनभिज्ञ" (anabhijna), which means "unaware." This indicates a lack of knowledge, implying a potential negative or ignorant state, contributing to the overall slightly negative sentiment, despite the positive ending.

Text: तिसरा मुद्दा अधिक गंभीर आहे
translated_text: The third issue is more serious.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the Marathi word "गंभीर" (gambhir), which translates to "serious." This word implies a negative or problematic situation.
