Text: असे होण्याचे एक कारण म्हणजे चित्रपटाचे उथळ लेखन
translated_text: One reason for this is the film's shallow writing.
Justification: "उथळ लेखन" (uthal lekhan - shallow writing) indicates a lack of depth and quality, contributing to a negative sentiment.

Text: काय रे रास्कला मध्ये अनेक समस्या आहेत
translated_text: What the hell are the problems with Rascal?
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "रास्कला" (raskala), which is a derogatory term implying disapproval and contributes to the surprise emotion.

Text: त्याच्या एका सहलीमुळे त्याला चहाच्या दुकानात जुना कंदील सापडतो, पण भंगार विक्रेता त्याचे मूल्य पाहू शकत नाही.
translated_text: One of his trips leads him to find an old lantern in a tea shop, but the scrap dealer cannot see its value.
Justification: The phrase "भंगार विक्रेता त्याचे मूल्य पाहू शकत नाही" (bhangar vikreta tyache mulya pahu shakat nahi - the scrap dealer cannot see its value) indicates a negative sentiment because it suggests a lack of appreciation or understanding of something valuable, leading to a sense of loss or missed opportunity.

Text: कथेतच नाही तर पात्रांकडून अपेक्षा काय करायची? खरे तर चित्रपटाचे आधीचे नाव ‘वारस’ असे होते
translated_text: What to expect from the characters, not just the story? In fact, the film's previous name was 'Varas'.
Justification: The sentence expresses disappointment with the story itself using the phrase "कथेतच नाही," indicating a negative sentiment.

Text: पण एवढं सगळं छान-छान असूनही सिनेमात बऱ्याच त्रुटी आहेत
translated_text: But despite all this greatness, the movie has many flaws.
Justification: The phrase "त्रुटी आहेत" (truti aahet), meaning "there are flaws," indicates a negative aspect, leading to the negative sentiment.

Text: त्याच्या मार्गात आता दोनच अडथळे आहेत
translated_text: There are only two obstacles in his way now.
Justification: The word "अडथळे" (adthale), meaning "obstacles," is responsible for the negative sentiment. While obstacles can be overcome, their presence inherently implies a negative or challenging situation.

Text: दुर्दैवाने बैठकीत माणूस हृदय अपयशी ठरतो
translated_text: Unfortunately, a man suffers heart failure in a meeting.
Justification: "दुर्दैवाने" (durbhāgyāne), meaning "unfortunately," clearly indicates a negative sentiment, and the context of heart failure reinforces the emotion of sadness.

Text: मृत व्यक्तीच्या अस्थींचे विसर्जन करणे हा सहसा कोणत्याही कुटुंबासाठी भावनिक क्षण असतो
translated_text: The burial of a deceased person's ashes is often an emotional moment for any family.
Justification: The phrase "भावनिक क्षण असतो" (bhavanik kshan asto), meaning "is an emotional moment," indicates a negative sentiment as emotional moments associated with death are generally considered sad or difficult.

Text: याच नेटवर्कने राजश्रीला स्पोर्ट्स अँकरिंगच्या संभाव्य नोकरीकडेही दुर्लक्ष केले आहे.
translated_text: The same network has also ignored Rajshree's potential sports anchoring job.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the word "दुर्लक्ष" (durlaksh), which translates to "ignored" in English. This signifies a lack of attention or consideration towards Rajshree's potential job, indicating a negative outcome.

Text: त्यांची मांडणी न झाल्याने चित्रपटाची पकड अधूनमधून सुटते
translated_text: The film occasionally loses its grip due to their lack of structure.
Justification: "सूटते" (sutate - releases, slips) indicates a weakening grip, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: याशिवाय लेखकानं पात्रंही नीट लिहिली नाहीत, त्यामुळे पडद्यावरचा त्यांचा अभिनय कमकुवत वाटतो
translated_text: Apart from this, the writer did not write the characters well, so their acting on screen seems weak.
Justification: The phrase "कमकुवत वाटतो" (kamkuvat vatato), meaning "seems weak," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: नयना गोडबोले (सोनाली कुलकर्णी) लिफ्टमध्ये एका संशयास्पद अनोळखी व्यक्तीला टक्कर देते .
translated_text: Nayana Godbole (Sonali Kulkarni) bumps into a suspicious stranger in an elevator.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "संशयास्पद" (sanshayaspad), which means suspicious. This implies a potential threat or negative connotation.

Text: या चित्रपटांचे दाखले देण्याचं कारण म्हणजे हे चित्रपट पाहिलेल्या प्रेक्षकांची ‘ओह माय घोस्ट’ पाहून काहीशी निराशा होण्याची शक्यता आहे
translated_text: The reason for citing these films is that viewers who have seen these films may be somewhat disappointed by watching 'Oh My Ghost'.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "निराशा होण्याची शक्यता आहे" (nirasha honyachi shakya aahe) which translates to "there is a possibility of disappointment."

Text: जेव्हा प्रिया संस्कृत बालगुड त्याच्या प्रेमाची परतफेड करत नाहीत तेव्हा त्याच्या अहंकाराच्या विखुरलेल्या आणि त्याला नशाच्या चक्रावून पाठवतात तेव्हा नेहमीच त्याचा मार्ग असण्याची सवय आहे.
translated_text: Priya has a habit of always having his way when Sanskrit Balgud does not reciprocate his love, shattering his ego and sending him into a whirlwind of intoxication.
Justification: "अहंकाराच्या विखुरलेल्या" (shattering his ego) indicates a negative impact and loss, contributing to the negative sentiment. The description of this ego shattering as sending him into a "नशाच्या चक्रावून पाठवतात" (whirlwind of intoxication) further amplifies the negative and disgusting feeling.

Text: ही गोष्ट जेव्हा अनन्याला समजते त्यावेळी तिला जबर मानसिक धक्का बसतो
translated_text: When Ananya understands this, she gets a severe mental shock.
Justification: "जबर मानसिक धक्का बसतो" (jabar mansik dhakka basato - severe mental shock) indicates a strongly negative experience, leading to the negative sentiment. The phrase directly expresses distress and trauma.

Text: त्याने याआधी काही चांगल्या चित्रपटांमध्ये काम केले होते, परंतु अलीकडे तो खराब चित्रपटांची निवड करत आहे.
translated_text: He had acted in some good films before, but recently he has been choosing bad films.
Justification: The phrase "खराब चित्रपटांची निवड करत आहे" (kharab chitrapatanchi nivad karat aahe), meaning "choosing bad films," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: ती भयंकर निराशावादी आहे आणि तिची स्वत:ची घृणा तुम्हाला कुरवाळते
translated_text: She is a terrible pessimist and her self-loathing makes you cringe.
Justification: "भयंकर निराशावादी" (bhayankar niraashavadi - terrible pessimist) strongly contributes to the negative sentiment, indicating a pessimistic outlook.

Text: विवाहाचे पावित्र्य जपणाऱ्या व्यक्तीसुद्धा जाणूनबुजून असो वा नसो, पूर्ण अनोळखी व्यक्तींच्या भेटीगाठी आयोजित करून आणि केवळ त्यांच्या वडीलधाऱ्यांच्या आवडीनिवडींवर आधारित लग्नासाठी दबाव टाकून, विवाहाचे पावित्र्य जपणाऱ्या व्यक्तीही अशा क्षुल्लकतेने कसे वागतात हे विरोधाभासी आहे.
translated_text: It is paradoxical how even those who uphold the sanctity of marriage behave with such frivolity, whether intentionally or not, by arranging meetings between complete strangers and pressuring them to get married based solely on the preferences of their elders.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the word "क्षुल्लकतेने" (kshullaktene), which translates to "with frivolity" or "with pettiness." This word highlights the speaker's disapproval and disgust towards the trivialization of marriage.

Text: महेश मांजरेकर या माणसाने हा सिनेमा आपल्या नावावर तोलण्याचा प्रयत्न केला खरा पण त्यात त्यांना फारसे यश आले नाही, असेच म्हणावे लागेल
translated_text: It must be said that Mahesh Manjrekar tried to make this film his own, but he didn't have much success.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "फारसे यश आले नाही" (pharase yash aale nahi), meaning "didn't have much success." This indicates a lack of positive outcome, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: दुर्दैवाने, चित्रपट निर्मात्याला या दोन पैलूंमधून मार्ग काढण्यात यश आले नाही
translated_text: Unfortunately, the filmmaker was unable to navigate these two aspects.
Justification: The word "दुर्दैवाने" (durbhāgyāne), meaning "unfortunately," directly indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: त्याऐवजी ज्या पद्धतीने हे पाचही जण न्याय मिळवतात आणि पुन्हा आपल्या भ्रष्टाचारी व्यवस्थेमुळे हे पाऊल उचलावे लागले हे सांगण्याचा प्रयत्न करतात, तो पटत नाही
translated_text: Instead, the way these five people seek justice and then try to say that this step had to be taken because of our corrupt system is not convincing.
Justification: The phrase "पटत नाही" (patat nahi), meaning "not convincing," directly indicates a negative sentiment. The emotion of disgust is inferred from the context of a "corrupt system" forcing action.

Text: सिनेमाच्या कथानक आणि पटकथेच्या पातळीवर फार सखोलपणे काम झालेलं दिसत नाही
translated_text: The film's plot and screenplay don't seem to have been worked on very thoroughly.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "फार सखोलपणे काम झालेलं दिसत नाही" which indicates a lack of thorough work on the film's plot and screenplay.

Text: त्यांच्या डोक्यावर मृत्युची टांगती तलवार होती
translated_text: The sword of death hung over their heads.
Justification: "मृत्युची टांगती तलवार" (mrutyuchi tangati talwar - the sword of death hanging) evokes a feeling of impending doom and threat, directly contributing to the negative sentiment and disgust.

Text: या कारखान्यात काहीतरी गौडबंगाल असल्याचं समोर येतं आणि अचानक वस्तीत एक रोग पसरतो
translated_text: It turns out that something is amiss in this factory, and suddenly a disease spreads through the settlement.
Justification: The phrase "गौडबंगाल असल्याचं" (gaudabangal aslyach) which translates to "something is amiss" or "something fishy is going on," indicates a negative situation and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: दुर्दैवाने, चित्रपट सर्वात महत्त्वाच्या क्षणांमध्ये उच्च गुण मिळवत नाही
translated_text: Unfortunately, the film doesn't score high in the most important moments.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the use of "दुर्दैवाने" (durbhāgyāne), which translates to "unfortunately."

Text: परिणामी यात गुंडगिरी हिंसाचार आहेच
translated_text: As a result, there is bullying and violence.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the presence of the Marathi words "गुंडगिरी हिंसाचार" (gundgiri hinsaachaar), meaning "bullying and violence," which inherently connote a negative and undesirable situation.

Text: पण सिनेमातील अशी फायटिंगची दृश्ये कृत्रिम आणि नाट्यमय वाटतात
translated_text: But such fighting scenes in the movie seem artificial and dramatic.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the word "कृत्रिम" (krutrim), meaning artificial, which indicates a lack of authenticity and lowers the perceived quality of the fighting scenes.

Text: सगळं गुडीगुडी, हिरो आणि हिरोईनचं प्रेम होणार, व्हिलन त्यांना विरोध करणार, काही वेळा घरातूनच त्यांच्या प्रेमाला विरोध असणार, त्यातून एखाद दोन गाणी बागेत म्हणा किंवा समुद्र किनारी चित्रित केली जाणार त्यामुळे प्रेक्षकांना आपणही काही काळ जगप्रवास केल्याचा फील येणार, सरतेशेवटी हिरो आणि व्हिलनमध्ये जोरदार मारामारी होऊन एकाचवेळी पन्नास गुंडांना आपल्या दैवी शक्तीनं पराभूत करणाऱ्या तद्दन बॉलीवूडपटांची मोठी रेलचेल कायम आहे
translated_text: Everything is going well, the hero and heroine will fall in love, the villain will oppose them, sometimes there will be opposition to their love from home itself, one or two songs will be sung in the garden or filmed on the beach, so that the audience will feel like they have traveled the world for some time, in the end, there is a huge fight between the hero and the villain and they defeat fifty goons at once with their divine powers. There is a long line of Bollywood films like this.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "तद्दन बॉलीवूडपटांची मोठी रेलचेल कायम आहे" (tadadan Bollywoodpatanchi mothi relchel kayam aahe), which implies an overabundance and lack of originality in Bollywood films, creating a negative association.

Text: त्यात तो एका मुलीच्या प्रेमात पडतो आणि आपल्या बायकोचा खून करण्याचा निर्णय घेतो ही त्याची पार्श्वभूमी कथेत पुढे उलगडत जाते
translated_text: His background is revealed later in the story, as he falls in love with a girl and decides to kill his wife.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by "खून करण्याचा निर्णय घेतो" (khoon karण्याचा nirnay gheto), meaning "decides to kill," which clearly indicates a negative action.

Text: पण एकदा का ते हरवलं की, यातना त्याला एका माणसात बदलतात
translated_text: But once it is lost, the suffering turns him into a man.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the Marathi word "यातना" (yatna), which translates to "suffering" or "torment" in English. This word directly indicates a negative experience.

Text: साहजिकच हा चित्रपट मांजरेकरांनी दिग्दर्शित केला आहे यावर क्षणभरही विश्वास ठेवणे कठीण आहे.
translated_text: Obviously, it's hard to believe for a moment that this film was directed by Manjrekar.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "विश्वास ठेवणे कठीण आहे" (vishwas thevane kathin aahe), which translates to "hard to believe." This indicates disbelief and a negative assessment of the film in relation to Manjrekar's directorial abilities.

Text: पण चित्रपट अयशस्वी होतो जेव्हा तो सर्वात महत्त्वाचा असतो
translated_text: But the film fails when it matters most.
Justification: The phrase "अयशस्वी होतो" (ayashasvi hoto), meaning "fails," directly indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: आंतरराष्ट्रीय पातळीवर भारताचे प्रतिनिधित्व करणाऱ्या महिला खेळाडूंना स्वतःच्या नावाची हक्काची जर्सीदेखील मिळू नये इतक्या दुजेपणाला त्यांना सामोरं जावं लागलं
translated_text: Women players representing India at the international level have faced such discrimination that they were not even allowed to wear jerseys with their names on them.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are primarily driven by the phrase "इतक्या दुजेपणाला त्यांना सामोरं जावं लागलं" (itkya dujepanala tyana samoro jaava lagla), which translates to "they had to face such discrimination." This phrase highlights the discriminatory treatment experienced by the female athletes.

Text: तसंच सिनेमाही काहीसा ताणला जातो आणि मग तो कंटाळवाणा होऊन जातो
translated_text: Also, the movie gets a bit tense and then it becomes boring.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "कंटाळवाणा" (kantaalwana), which means "boring." This word expresses a negative feeling about the movie.

Text: इंडस्ट्रीतील इतर तत्सम आउटिंग्जच्या बाबतीतही या चित्रपटाची मोठी कमतरता म्हणजे व्ही.एफ.एक्स
translated_text: The major shortcoming of this film, even when compared to other similar outings in the industry, is the VFX.
Justification: "कमतरता" (kamtarata), meaning "shortcoming" or "deficiency," indicates a negative aspect of the film, thus driving the negative sentiment.

Text: सर्वसमावेशक सिनेमा म्हणून कागज अधिक पारिणामकारक झाला असता जो यावेळी काहीसा कमी पडलाय
translated_text: Kaajal would have been more effective as an all-encompassing film, which is somewhat lacking this time around.
Justification: "कमी पडलाय" (kami padlaay), meaning "lacking" or "falling short," indicates a negative assessment of the film's effectiveness.

Text: जशी कबीरला त्याच्या प्रश्नांची उत्तरे सापडत नाहीत, प्रेक्षक आश्चर्य करतात की अशा मूलभूत तार्किक समस्यांकडे दुर्लक्ष का केले गेले?
translated_text: As Kabir cannot find answers to his questions, the audience wonders why such basic logical issues were ignored.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "आश्चर्य करतात की अशा मूलभूत तार्किक समस्यांकडे दुर्लक्ष का केले गेले?" which translates to "wonder why such basic logical issues were ignored?". This phrase expresses a sense of disbelief and disapproval.

Text: तमाशा लाइव्हच्या अनेक दिशानिर्देश आहेत की ते काहीसे निराशाजनक आहे की जाधव यांनी थीम आणि पात्रे पूर्णपणे न मांडणे निवडले.
translated_text: There are so many directions Tamasha Live is taking that it's somewhat disappointing that Jadhav chose not to fully flesh out the themes and characters.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "काहीसे निराशाजनक" (kahise nirashajanak), meaning "somewhat disappointing," expresses a feeling of disillusionment.

Text: फू गे या शीर्षकातील संभाव्य खेळ ऑनवर्ड्स देखील सपाट आहे
translated_text: The potential game Onwards, titled Fu Gay, is also flat.
Justification: "सपाट आहे" (sapaat aahe) meaning "is flat" carries a negative sentiment (-1) in this context because it suggests a lack of excitement or appeal of the game.

Text: सॉरी एकसुरीपणात त्यांची वाट लागली
translated_text: Sorry, they waited in silence.
Justification: The negative sentiment arises from the phrase "वाट लागली" which, while literally meaning "waited," in this context and common usage, implies a negative consequence or ruin due to waiting, hence conveying a negative sentiment.

Text: त्यांच्यावर भ्रष्टाचारी असा शिक्का बसवण्यासाठी सीबीआय चौकशीचा खेळ खेळला जातो
translated_text: The game of CBI investigation is being played to brand them as corrupt.
Justification: "भ्रष्टाचारी असा शिक्का बसवण्यासाठी" (to brand them as corrupt) indicates a negative sentiment and evokes disgust as it implies a deliberate attempt to damage someone's reputation by associating them with corruption.

Text: मात्र काहींनी डोकंच पिकवायचं ठरवलंय तर त्याला आपण तरी काय करणार बरं हा चित्रपट खूपच सुमार आहे असं म्हणता येणार नाही
translated_text: But if some people decide to grow their own heads, then what can we do about it? It can't be said that this film is very good.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "चित्रपट खूपच सुमार आहे असं म्हणता येणार नाही" (chitrapat khoopach sumaar aahe asaa mhantaa yenar naahi), which translates to "It can't be said that this film is very good". The indirect negation suggests that the film is likely bad or mediocre, thus implying a negative sentiment, even if it avoids explicitly stating the negative quality. "सुमार" (sumaar) meaning "mediocre" further strengthens the justification.

Text: हीच तारीख आहे जेव्हा काही दहशतवाद्यांनी मुंबई हादरवून टाकली होती
translated_text: This is the date when some terrorists shook Mumbai.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "दहशतवाद्यांनी मुंबई हादरवून टाकली होती" (dahashatvādyānnī mumbaī hādaravūna ṭākalī hōtī), which translates to "terrorists shook Mumbai." This phrase evokes a sense of fear, violence, and negative impact, thus leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: तीन मुख्य अभिनेत्यांपैकी कोणाचीही खात्रीशीर केमिस्ट्री नाही आणि आपण त्यांच्या कथित आजीवन मैत्रीवर सतत शंका घेतो.
translated_text: None of the three main actors have convincing chemistry, and we are constantly left questioning their supposed lifelong friendship.
Justification: "खात्रीशीर केमिस्ट्री नाही" (no convincing chemistry) expresses a lack of believability, contributing to a negative sentiment.

Text: यामुळे तो माणूस दूर होतो आणि तो तिला नाकारतो
translated_text: This makes the man distant and he rejects her.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust emotion are primarily driven by the word "नाकारतो" (nakarto), meaning "rejects," which indicates a strong feeling of disapproval and repulsion in the context of the sentence.

Text: रुपाली एक श्रीमंत कुटुंबातील मुलगी आहे आणि तिच्या कुटुंबाला लकी आवडत नाही
translated_text: Rupali is a girl from a rich family and her family does not like Lucky.
Justification: "आवडत नाही" (aavadat nahi) indicates dislike, which contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: सौरऊर्जेचा व्यवसाय करणारा सत्या विज्ञानाची पूजा करतो आणि कोणीही गॅझेट टाकल्यावर त्याचा तिरस्कार करतो
translated_text: Satya, a solar energy entrepreneur, worships science and hates when anyone throws in a gadget.
Justification: The word "तिरस्कार" (tiraskar), meaning hatred or contempt, indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: या कामात त्याचं मन फारसं रमत नाही
translated_text: He doesn't really enjoy this work.
Justification: "मन फारसं रमत नाही" (man faras ramat nahi - mind doesn't really enjoy/engage) indicates a lack of interest and enjoyment, thus justifying the negative sentiment and sadness.

Text: नचिकेतला कधीही मैत्रीण नव्हती, ज्यासाठी तो मित्र आणि सहकाऱ्यांकडून नेहमीच लाजतो
translated_text: Nachiket has never had a girlfriend, for which he is always embarrassed by friends and colleagues.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "लाजतो" (lajato), which translates to "embarrassed." This indicates a negative emotional state for Nachiket.

Text: त्यामुळे फु करा गँगची करामत ही काही विनोदी प्रसंगा-प्रसंगांमधून रंगत असली तरी चित्रपट पोट भरून हसवत नाही
translated_text: So, although the exploits of the Fu Kara Gang are highlighted by some humorous moments, the film does not make you laugh out loud.
Justification: The sentence has a negative sentiment because of the phrase "पोट भरून हसवत नाही" (pot bharun hasvat nahi), which translates to "does not make you laugh out loud," indicating a lack of strong humor.

Text: कारण तेव्हाच आपल्याला त्या ऍसिड हल्ला पिढीत मुलीच्या मनाची किंकाळी ऐकू येईल
translated_text: Because only then will we be able to hear the screams of a girl's heart in that acid attack generation.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "ऍसिड हल्ला पिढीत मुलीच्या मनाची किंकाळी" (acid attack victim girl's heart screams), which evokes suffering and trauma associated with acid attacks.

Text: आमची ओळख अमिताभची पत्नी जया सोनाली कुलकर्णीशी झाली आहे जी तिहेरीची आई आहे - अमर दिलीप आणि ज्योतीसुद्धा दुसर्या घटनेदरम्यान विभक्त झाले आहेत.
translated_text: We are introduced to Amitabh's wife Jaya Sonali Kulkarni who is a mother of triplets - Amar Dilip and Jyoti have also separated during another incident.
Justification: The phrase "विभक्त झाले आहेत" (vibhakt zhale aahet), meaning "have separated," indicates a negative situation, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: या नव्या सिनेमातील गाणी मात्र तितकीशी प्रभावी ठरत नाही
translated_text: However, the songs in this new film are not that effective.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "तितकीशी प्रभावी ठरत नाही" (titkishi prabhavi tharat nahi) which translates to "not that effective". The word "तितकीशी" (titkishi) implying "not that much" coupled with "प्रभावी ठरत नाही" (prabhavi tharat nahi) meaning "not effective" indicates a negative sentiment regarding the songs' quality.

Text: निशा परुळेकर, जयवंत वाडकर आणि भारत गणेशपुरेला तर सिनेमात पूर्णपणे वाया घालवलंय
translated_text: Nisha Parulekar, Jaywant Wadkar and Bharat Ganeshpure have been completely wasted in the movie.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the phrase "वाया घालवलंय" (vaya ghaalavlay) means "wasted," indicating a negative evaluation of how the actors were used in the movie.

Text: तेव्हा काही घटना अशा घडतात की मीरा देखील जखमी होते आणि दुसरीकडे नुसरतची हत्या होते
translated_text: Then some incidents happen in which Meera is also injured and on the other hand Nusrat is killed.
Justification: The phrase "हत्या होते" (hatya hote), meaning "is killed/murdered," strongly indicates a negative sentiment and evokes sadness.

Text: मुंबईसाठी काळरात्र ठरलेल्या त्या     च्या हल्ल्यात ताज हॉटेलमध्ये दहशतवाद्यांशी लढताना मेजर उन्नीकृष्णन यांनी बलिदान देत मुंबईकरांसाठी आणि देशासाठी आपल्या प्राणांची आहुती दिली
translated_text: Major Unnikrishnan sacrificed his life for the people of Mumbai and the country while fighting terrorists at the Taj Hotel in the attack that turned out to be a dark night for Mumbai.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "काळरात्र ठरलेल्या" (kaalraatra tharalelya), meaning "turned out to be a dark night", which evokes a strong sense of tragedy and fear.

Text: परंतु तिच्या व्यक्तिरेखेला परिमाण नसणे आणि तिला दिलेला मर्यादित स्क्रीन वेळ तिच्या अभिनयात अडथळा आणतो
translated_text: But the lack of dimension to her character and the limited screen time she is given hinders her performance.
Justification: The phrase "अडथळा आणतो" (adthala anto) meaning "hinders" or "obstructs" indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests a problem or obstacle affecting the performance.

Text: त्यामुळे जर चित्रपटाचा आशय, संगीत, अभिनय, सादरीकरण या सर्व गोष्टींच्या बाबतीत जर ;सैराट;ला     पैकी    ते    गुण देत असलो तर तिथे ;धडक;ला    ते    गुण मिळू शकतात
translated_text: So, if we give Sairat the same marks in terms of the film's content, music, acting, presentation, then Dhadak can get those marks.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because the sentence implies "Dhadak" is not as good as "Sairat," setting a lower expectation for it. This is subtly conveyed through the comparison and the conditional statement, implying "Dhadak" is only likely to receive similar marks *if* "Sairat" is scored well. There isn't a single word responsible, but the *conditional comparison* between "सैराट" and "धडक" hints at a negative evaluation.

Text: तिच्या चेहऱ्यावरचा गडद मेकअप नजर विचलित करतो
translated_text: The dark makeup on her face distracts the eye.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because "नजर विचलित करतो" (nazar vichalit karto) means "distracts the eye," implying a negative aesthetic impact and a distraction, hence -1.

Text: संशयित खुनी म्हणून राणीची चौकशी केली जाते आणि तेव्हाच तिचा नील त्रिपाठीशी गुप्त संबंध चर्चेत येतो
translated_text: Rani is interrogated as a suspected murderer, and that's when her secret relationship with Neel Tripathi comes to light.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "खुनी" (khuni), which translates to "murderer." Even with the "संशयित" (sanshayit - suspected) qualification, it creates a negative association.

Text: वाणी कपूरला फारसा वाव नाही
translated_text: Vaani Kapoor doesn't have much scope
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "फारसा वाव नाही" (pharasa vaav nahi), meaning "not much scope," indicating a lack of opportunity or impact.

Text: जर हनीफचं हृदय बंद पडलं तर तार कनेक्ट असल्यामुळे बॉम्बही फुटणार असतात
translated_text: If Hanif's heart stops, even bombs will explode because the wires are connected.
Justification: The sentence carries a negative sentiment due to the phrase "बॉम्बही फुटणार असतात" (bombhi futnar astat) which translates to "even bombs will explode." This phrase indicates a negative consequence and evokes fear or danger.

Text: पुनर्जन्म, प्रेम, सूड, दुरावा या साऱ्याचा मेळ असणारा ;राबता; प्रदर्शित झाला खरा पण, तो मनं जिंकण्यात काही प्रमाणात अपयशी ठरला
translated_text: Raabta, a blend of reincarnation, love, revenge, and distance, was released, but it failed to win hearts to some extent.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "अपयशी ठरला" (apayashi tharala), which translates to "failed," indicating a lack of success and a negative outcome for the film.

Text: राष्ट्रीय एकसारखाच असण्याचा प्रयत्न करतो परंतु नायक आणि बर्याचदा स्वतःचा हेतू असलेल्या कथेतून संदेश गमावतो
translated_text: The national tries to be the same but loses the message from the story, which is the hero and often his own purpose.
Justification: "संदेश गमावतो" (loses the message) indicates a negative sentiment as it implies a failure or loss of the intended communication, resulting in a -1 sentiment.

Text: त्यांच्या दृष्टीनं तो होता मृत्युदंड
translated_text: In their eyes, it was a death sentence.
Justification: "मृत्युदंड" (mrutyudand, death sentence) signifies extreme negativity, justifying the negative sentiment and eliciting a sense of disgust due to its association with death and punishment.

Text: तरीही चित्रपटात तोच संघर्ष पुन्हा पुन्हा दाखवून वॉच टायमिंग वाढवण्याचा प्रयत्न केला गेला आहे
translated_text: Yet, the film has tried to increase the watch timing by showing the same conflict over and over again.
Justification: "पुन्हा पुन्हा दाखवून" (showing again and again) indicates repetition and a perceived attempt to artificially lengthen the film, leading to a negative sentiment.

Text: परंतु ती मांडण्याची पद्धत नायकाच्या तोंडी असलेल्या एका मोठ्या स्वगताच्या मोनोलॉग स्वरुपात आहे
translated_text: But the way it is presented is in the form of a long monologue spoken by the protagonist.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "एका मोठ्या स्वगताच्या मोनोलॉग स्वरुपात आहे" (eka mothya swagatachya monologue swarupaat aahe), which implies the presentation is in the form of a lengthy monologue. Lengthy monologues can often be perceived negatively in entertainment, suggesting a lack of dynamic storytelling.

Text: गुन्ह्यातील प्रत्येक पैलू उलगडून दाखवताना सिनेमा काहीवेळा लांबला आहे असे वाटते
translated_text: The movie sometimes feels long-winded while revealing every aspect of the crime.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "लांबला" (lambala), which means "long-winded" or "stretched." This indicates a negative feeling about the pacing of the movie.

Text: त्यामुळे घूमकेतूला शोधण्यावरुन घरामध्ये रणकंदन सुरू झालेले असते
translated_text: Therefore, a fight breaks out in the house over finding Ghoomketu.
Justification: The negative sentiment is indicated by the Marathi word "रणकंदन" (rankandan), which translates to "fight" or "chaos," suggesting a negative event or situation.

Text: जरी ती नेत्रदीपक नसली तरी, ती नक्कीच एका चित्रपटात जीवनाचा अंतर्भाव करते ज्यामध्ये फार काही नाही
translated_text: While it's not spectacular, it certainly breathes life into a film that doesn't have much of anything.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the phrase "फार काही नाही" (phar kahi nahi), meaning "not much of anything," which implies a lack of substance in the film.

Text: या दोघीही केवळ बाहुल्या म्हणून चित्रपटात दिसतात
translated_text: Both of them appear in the film only as puppets.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "केवळ बाहुल्या म्हणून" (keval bahulya mhanun), which translates to "only as puppets," implying that the actresses are being used as mere objects without agency or depth. This comparison devalues their roles and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: ‘हप्ता देणार नाही’ असं ठणकावून सांगणारा अमर्त्या नेहमीप्रमाणे परिस्थितीमुळे ‘डॉन’ बनतो
translated_text: Amartya, who insists that he will not pay the installments, becomes a 'don' as usual due to circumstances.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "हप्ता देणार नाही" (hapta denar nahi) meaning "will not pay the installments," indicating defiance and potential conflict. While the rest of the sentence adds context, this phrase directly expresses a negative stance.

Text: बज्मींच्या दिग्दर्शनाबद्दल काय बोलणार म्हणजे एकूणच कथापटकथेवर काहीही काम झालेलं नाही
translated_text: What can I say about Bazmee's direction? Overall, the story and screenplay have not been worked on.
Justification: "काहीही काम झालेलं नाही" (nothing has been worked on) indicates a negative sentiment as it points to a complete lack of effort or quality in the story and screenplay.

Text: भेटली तू पुन्हा सुद्धा किमान एक उच्च दर्जाचे गाणे असण्याची रोम-कॉमची आवश्यक मागणी पूर्ण करत नाही.
translated_text: Even Met You Again doesn't meet the essential requirement of a rom-com to have at least one high-quality song.
Justification: The phrase "पूर्ण करत नाही" (purna karat nahi), meaning "does not meet" or "doesn't fulfill," expresses a negative sentiment by indicating a lack or failure to satisfy a requirement.

Text: त्यामुळे पोलीस आयुक्त तिला मदत करण्यास नकार देतात
translated_text: So the police commissioner refuses to help her.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "नकार देतात" (nakar detaat), which means "refuse" in Marathi, indicating a denial of help.

Text: चित्रपटाचं एडिटींग अजून शार्प असतं तर बरं झालं असतं
translated_text: It would have been better if the editing of the film had been sharper.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "बरं झालं असतं" (barं zālं asta), which implies a wish or suggestion that the editing could have been better, indicating dissatisfaction.

Text: तथापि, दुष्ट ठेकेदार आरके (मुकेश ऋषी) द्वारे खेळलेल्या क्षुल्लक राजकारणात गोंधळून जातो.
translated_text: However, he gets tangled up in petty politics played by the evil contractor RK (Mukesh Rishi).
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the word "दुष्ट" (dusht), which translates to "evil" or "wicked," describing the contractor. This negative adjective directly contributes to the overall negative sentiment of the sentence.

Text: बहुतेक वेळा, मुख्याध्यापक अस्वस्थ आणि शांत असल्याचे दिसून येते, परंतु असे प्रसंग येतात जेव्हा तो फक्त रागाने किंवा उत्साहाने ओरडतो.
translated_text: Most of the time, the headmaster appears to be unruffled and calm, but there are times when he simply shouts in anger or excitement.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "रागाने ओरडतो" (ragane ordato), meaning "shouts in anger," which explicitly indicates a negative emotional state.

Text: अन्यायाविरुद्धच्या लढ्याचे फलित असलेल्या आपल्या शेतकरी वडिलांच्या मृत्यूमुळे तो खूप प्रभावित झाला आहे.
translated_text: He is deeply affected by the death of his farmer father, who was the result of his fight against injustice.
Justification: The phrase "मृत्यूमुळे तो खूप प्रभावित झाला आहे" (mrutyumule to khup prabhavit zhala aahe), meaning "he is deeply affected by the death," indicates a negative sentiment. "मृत्यूमुळे" (mrutyumule) specifically points to death as the cause, leading to sadness.

Text: भारताच्या इतिहासाच्या पानांमध्ये दडलेल्या बऱ्याच गोष्टी इतिहासातच कुठेतरी धुसर झाल्या
translated_text: Many things hidden in the pages of Indian history have faded into history.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "धुसर झाल्या" (dhusar zhālyā), meaning "have faded," implying a loss or degradation of historical knowledge.

Text: प्रेम या विषयावर चित्रपट करताना हा धोका असतोच
translated_text: This is a risk when making a film about love.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "धोका" (dhoka), which translates to "risk" or "danger," indicating a potential negative consequence associated with the topic.

Text: एकदा घरात आल्यावर कुलकर्णी आणि तिची मोलकरीण रिंकू काहीतरी गडबडलेली दिसते
translated_text: Once inside the house, Kulkarni and her maid Rinku notice something is wrong.
Justification: "गडबडलेली" (gadbadleli - wrong/amiss) indicates something is not right, contributing to the negative sentiment.

Text: किंबहुना ते करत असलेल्या कामाचे श्रेय देखील त्यांना मिळेलच याची शास्वती नसते
translated_text: In fact, there is no guarantee that they will even get credit for the work they do.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "शास्वती नसते" (shaswati nasate), which translates to "there is no guarantee". This indicates uncertainty and a lack of positive assurance regarding receiving credit, resulting in a negative outlook.

Text: खरं तर, एखाद्याला ते आणि त्यांच्या कृत्ये आवडत नाही.
translated_text: In fact, one does not like them and their actions.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "आवडत नाही" (aavdat nahi), which means "does not like."

Text: त्याऐवजी, परिस्थितींमध्ये तर्कशास्त्राचा अभाव इतका असतो की चित्रपट दाखवत असलेल्या सकारात्मक गोष्टींचा विचार करत असतानाही त्याकडे दुर्लक्ष करणे अशक्य आहे.
translated_text: Instead, the lack of logic in the situations is so great that it's impossible to ignore them, even when considering the positives the film is showing.
Justification: The sentence expresses a negative sentiment due to the phrase "तर्कशास्त्राचा अभाव" (tarkashastracha abhav), which translates to "lack of logic." This indicates a flaw or problem, leading to a negative overall assessment.

Text: सिनेमातील गाणी जिभेवर रंगळणारी असली तरी कथानकात ती मुद्दाम खुसखोरी करतात
translated_text: Although the songs in the movie are catchy, they deliberately distort the plot.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the word "खुसखोरी" (khuskhori), which translates to "distortion" or "meddling." This indicates a negative impact on the plot.

Text: उत्तरार्धात तो काहीसा रेंगाळतो
translated_text: It drags a bit in the latter half.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "रेंगाळतो" (rengalto), which translates to "drags" or "lingers" and implies a slow and undesirable pace, leading to a negative experience.

Text: पण इतर सगळ्याच व्यक्तिरेखा खासकरून जफर आणि लाली या दोघांच्या भूमिका शेवटपर्यंत अस्पष्टच राहतात त्यामुळे हे चौघेही एकत्र अजिबात परिणामकारक ठरलेले नाहीत
translated_text: But the roles of all the other characters, especially Zafar and Laali, remain unclear until the end, so the four of them are not effective together at all.
Justification: The sentiment is negative (-1) because the phrase "अजिबात परिणामकारक ठरलेले नाहीत" (ajibat parinamkarak tharalele nahit), meaning "not effective at all," expresses a lack of impact or effectiveness, indicating a negative assessment.

Text: पण जीएसएलव्हीचे प्रक्षेपण अयशस्वी ठरते आणि हवेतच रॉकेट ब्लास्ट होतो
translated_text: But the GSLV launch fails and the rocket explodes in mid-air.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "अयशस्वी ठरते" (ayashasvi tharte), meaning "fails," which indicates a negative outcome.

Text: मात्र ती सिनेमाचा जरा बरा असलेला ‘टेम्पो’ बिघडवण्याचेच काम करतात
translated_text: However, they only serve to spoil the film's somewhat good 'tempo'.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "बिघडवण्याचे" (bighadvanyache), meaning "to spoil," which indicates a negative action.

Text: काही अनावश्यक गाण्यांमुळे त्याचा टेम्पोही जातो
translated_text: Some unnecessary songs also take away its tempo.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is driven by the word "अनावश्यक" (anavashyak), meaning "unnecessary". This indicates a negative evaluation of the songs, leading to the overall negative sentiment.

Text: दुर्दैवाने, चित्रपट फक्त त्याच पातळीवर काम करतो
translated_text: Unfortunately, the film only works at that level.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the word "दुर्दैवाने" (durdavane), which translates to "Unfortunately." This word inherently expresses a negative perspective or regret about the situation.

Text: खरं तर, ती तिच्या आवाजात स्वत: ची दया आणि असहायतेने स्वत: ला मद्यपी घोषित करते
translated_text: In fact, she declares herself an alcoholic with self-pity and helplessness in her voice.
Justification: The phrase "स्वत: ची दया आणि असहायतेने" (self-pity and helplessness) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: तथापि, संपन्नता केवळ तथाकथित उच्च जातींपुरती मर्यादित होती, म्हणजे ब्राह्मण, ज्यांचे पेशवे होते.
translated_text: However, the affluence was limited to the so-called upper castes, namely the Brahmins, who had Peshwas.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "तथाकथित उच्च जातींपुरती मर्यादित होती" (tathakathit uchcha jatimpurti maryadit hoti), which translates to "limited to the so-called upper castes." This implies exclusivity and social inequality, leading to a negative perception.

Text: एक प्रकारे मानवी मर्यादा अधोरेखित करणाराच हा प्रसंग आहे आणि म्हणूनच त्यात प्रचंड नाट्य भरलेलं आहे पण त्या नाट्याचा उपयोग करून पाहणाऱ्याला भयकंपित करणारा परिणाम साधण्यात सिनेमा काहीसा कमी पडलाय
translated_text: In a way, this is an incident that highlights human limitations, and that is why it is filled with immense drama, but the film falls somewhat short in using that drama to achieve a terrifying effect on the viewer.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "कमी पडलाय" (kami padlaay), meaning "falls somewhat short," indicating a lack of success in achieving the desired effect.

Text: बाकी चित्रपट निराशादायक आहे
translated_text: The rest of the movie is disappointing.
Justification: "निराशादायक" (nirashadayak) meaning "disappointing" directly indicates a negative sentiment and contributes to the emotion of sadness.

Text: फुटबॉलमुळे नवरा कायमचा लंगडा झाला आहे, घरी परिस्थिती अंत्यत बेताची आहे, त्यामुळे ती फुटबॉलचा तिरस्कार करते
translated_text: Her husband has become permanently lame because of football, the situation at home is hopeless, so she hates football.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "कायमचा लंगडा झाला आहे" (kayamcha langda zhala aahe) which translates to "has become permanently lame". This indicates a significant and lasting negative impact on her husband's life.

Text: जर, तिने प्रोफेसरला मारून बदला घेतला, तर तिचे आयुष्य उद्ध्वस्त होईल
translated_text: If she takes revenge by killing the professor, her life will be ruined.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "आयुष्य उद्ध्वस्त होईल" (aayushya uddhwast hoil), meaning "life will be ruined," indicating a detrimental outcome.

Text: कथाविषय म्हणून हा धागा कालसुसंगत आणि महत्त्वाचा असला तरी यातील पात्रांची खोली नायक खलनायक नायकाची पार्श्वभूमीची पटकथेतील जागा या बाबत सुसंगती नसल्याने तो अत्यंत कमकुवत बनला आहे
translated_text: Although this thread is timely and important as a story theme, it is extremely weak due to the lack of depth of the characters, the hero, the villain, and the hero's background, and their place in the script.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "अत्यंत कमकुवत बनला आहे" (atyant kamkuvat banla aahe), meaning "extremely weak," which expresses a critical assessment of the story.

Text: बागी सिनेमाच्या शृंखलेतील यंदाचा बागी   हा सिनेमा कथारुपी अत्यंत कमजोर आहे
translated_text: This year's Baaghi movie in the Baaghi series is very weak in terms of plot.
Justification: The phrase "कथारुपी अत्यंत कमजोर" (katharupi atyant kamzor) meaning "very weak in terms of plot" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: चांगल्या कळस आणि कुरकुरीत संपादनासह हे आणखी चांगले होते
translated_text: It gets even better with a good climax and crisp editing.
Justification: The sentiment is incorrectly assigned. The phrase "चांगल्या कळस" (changlya kalas) meaning "good climax" and "कुरकुरीत संपादन" (kurkurit sampadan) meaning "crisp editing" indicate a positive experience, not a negative one. A more appropriate sentiment would be positive (1) with the emotion of joy or satisfaction.

Text: दोन वर्षांपासून कोरोनानं तर मनोरंजन क्षेत्राचे कंबरडे मोडले आहे
translated_text: For two years, Corona has broken the back of the entertainment industry.
Justification: "कंबरडे मोडले आहे" (kambarde modle aahe - broken the back) indicates a severe negative impact, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: कसं हुईन जी अशानं झाडीपट्टीले वाईट दिवस येऊन बंद पडन ना
translated_text: How come the bad day comes and closes down?
Justification: The phrase "वाईट दिवस" (waiṭ divas), meaning "bad day," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: सरकारी यंत्रणांमधील गैरमार्ग सत्ता व पैशांसाठी नागरिकांना लुबाडण्याचे प्रकार आणि त्याच वेळी काही गूढ अद्भुत गोष्टी अशा दोन टोकांच्या गोष्टी ओढूनताणून एकत्र आणल्यासारख्या वाटतात
translated_text: It seems like a juxtaposition of two extremes: the corruption in government agencies, the way citizens are exploited for power and money, and at the same time, some mysterious and wonderful things.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "नागरिकांना लुबाडण्याचे प्रकार" (nagarikanna lubadnyache prakar), which translates to "the act of looting/exploiting citizens," indicating corruption and mistreatment.

Text: सिनेमा चकचकीत झाला असला तरी तो त्याचा अंतिम परिणाम साधण्यास यशस्वी ठरलेला नाही
translated_text: Although the movie was a hit, it failed to achieve its final result.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "यशस्वी ठरलेला नाही" (yashasvi tharalela nahi), which means "failed to achieve". This indicates a lack of success and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: प्रेक्षकांना कथेत लगेच गुंतवतो, मात्र उत्तरार्धात कथेची ही पकड सैल होताना दिसते
translated_text: The audience is immediately involved in the story, but the story's grip seems to loosen in the latter half.
Justification: "सैल होताना दिसते" indicates a weakening or loosening, implying a negative shift in the story's quality and thus a negative sentiment.

Text: (बनावट) वळण येते जेव्हा वसतिगृहाची फी एका रात्रीत दुप्पट केली जाते आणि जे पैसे खोकत नाहीत त्यांना तेथून जाण्यास सांगितले जाते.
translated_text: The (fake) twist comes when hostel fees are doubled in one night and those who don't cough up the money are asked to leave.
Justification: The negative sentiment is primarily driven by the phrase "बनावट वळण" (banavat valan), which translates to "fake twist" or "artificial twist." This suggests a deceptive or negative development. While the rest of the sentence describes a negative situation, "बनावट वळण" directly implies a negative intention or action, thus contributing most strongly to the negative sentiment.

Text: त्यामुळे तिची व्यक्तिरेखा तेवढय़ापुरतीच मर्यादित राहते
translated_text: Therefore, her character remains limited to that.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "मर्यादित राहते" (maryadit rahate), which implies a limitation or restriction, indicating a negative aspect of the character's development.

Text: राजकारणातील वैरामुळे ‘डॅडीं’ना अडकवण्याचा किंबहुना मारण्याचा प्रयत्न त्यांचे राजकीय शत्रू करत आहेत
translated_text: Due to political animosity, their political enemies are trying to trap and even kill the 'daddies'.
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from the phrase "मारण्याचा प्रयत्न" (maranyacha prayatna), which means "attempt to kill," expressing violence and hostility.

Text: परंतु सुमार अभिनय बेताची पटकथा केवळ चटपटीत भोपाळी संवाद आणि हाती घेतलेल्या विषयात खोलवर जाण्यात लेखकांना आलेले अपयश त्यातून हात चित्रपट वेगळेपणा असतानाही सामान्यच ठरतो
translated_text: But the script, the acting, the quick-witted dialogues, and the writers' failure to delve deeply into the subject matter make the film ordinary despite its uniqueness.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "अपयश" (apayash), which translates to "failure," indicating a negative aspect of the film.

Text: सायली संजीव आणि सुहृद वर्देकर हे मुख्य कलाकार त्यांच्या एकांकिकेच्या अभिनयाने छाप पाडण्यात अपयशी ठरले.
translated_text: Lead actors Sayali Sanjeev and Suhrud Vardekar failed to impress with their one-act performances.
Justification: The phrase "छाप पाडण्यात अपयशी ठरले" (failed to impress) indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: पण भर पार्टीत त्याला समजतं की त्याचं हे परदेशात स्थानिक होण्याचं स्वप्न पूर्ण होणार नाही
translated_text: But at the party, he realizes that his dream of becoming a local in a foreign country will not come true.
Justification: The phrase "स्वप्न पूर्ण होणार नाही" (swapna purna honar nahi) which translates to "dream will not come true" indicates a negative sentiment due to the unrealized aspiration, leading to sadness.

Text: पण काही गोष्टी अशा घडतात की सासरी तिच्या कामाबाबत समजतं आणि तिच्या नोकरी करण्याला विरोध होतो
translated_text: But some things happen that the mother-in-law understands her work and opposes her from doing her job.
Justification: The phrase "नोकरी करण्याला विरोध होतो" (nokri karanyala virodh hoto), meaning "opposed to doing the job," indicates a negative sentiment as it expresses disagreement and obstruction.

Text: परंतु पूर्वीच्या मोठ्या भावाला तिचा हा निर्णय मान्य नाही
translated_text: But her former elder brother does not accept her decision.
Justification: The sentiment is negative because of the phrase "मान्य नाही" (manya nahi), which means "does not accept."

Text: दुसरं म्हणजे रिशू तिच्या ‘टाइप’चा नसतो
translated_text: Secondly, Rishu is not her 'type'.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "नसतो" (nasato), which means "is not." This indicates a lack of compatibility and contributes to the negative sentiment.

Text: पुण्यातील दांडेकर पुल परिसरात या चित्रपटाची पहिली गोष्ट तुमच्या लक्षात येते ती म्हणजे कोंदट घरे आणि अरुंद गल्ल्या.
translated_text: The first thing you notice about this film in the Dandekar Bridge area of ​​Pune is the cramped houses and narrow lanes.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the Marathi phrase "कोंदट घरे आणि अरुंद गल्ल्या" (kondat ghare aani arund gallya) which translates to "cramped houses and narrow lanes," conveying a sense of discomfort and confinement.

Text: एकूणच, घाटात सकारात्मकता आहे, पण कथानकाचा अभाव चित्रपटाचा प्रभाव आणि पोहोच मर्यादित करतो
translated_text: Overall, there is positivity in Ghat, but the lack of plot limits the film's impact and reach.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "अभाव" (abhav), meaning "lack," which indicates a deficiency in the plot, thus negatively impacting the film.

Text: पाँडिचेरी त्याच्या दोषांशिवाय नाही
translated_text: Pondicherry is not without its flaws.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the phrase "दोषांशिवाय नाही" (doshan shivay nahi), which translates to "not without flaws." This double negative implies the existence of flaws, thus expressing a negative sentiment.

Text: मी तुम्हाला सावध केले पाहिजे की विकी तुम्हाला प्रभावित करण्यात निराश होण्याची किंवा अपयशी ठरण्याची शक्यता आहे.
translated_text: I must warn you that the wiki is likely to disappoint or fail to impress you.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "निराश होण्याची किंवा अपयशी ठरण्याची शक्यता आहे" (nirash honyachi kinva apayashi tharanyachi shakyata aahe), which translates to "likely to disappoint or fail," indicating a negative outcome.

Text: आणि आजच्या सोशल मीडियाच्या नेटवर्कयुक्त जमान्यात आपले रिलेशनशीप स्टेटस जाहीर करावे लागत असल्याने हा दबाव काहीसा अधिकच आहे
translated_text: And in today's social media-networked age, this pressure is even greater as we have to announce our relationship status.
Justification: The phrase "दबाव काहीसा अधिकच आहे" (dabaav kahisa adhikach ahe), meaning "the pressure is even greater," indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: त्यामुळे या अनुभवी कलाकारांचा योग्य वापर दिग्दर्शकाला करता आलेला नाही
translated_text: Therefore, the director was unable to make proper use of these experienced actors.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "योग्य वापर करता आलेला नाही" (yogya vapar karta aalela nahi), which translates to "unable to make proper use," indicating a deficiency or failure.

Text: कनिका ढिल्लनच्या कथेला न्याय देण्याचा दिग्दर्शक विनिल मॅथ्यूनं निश्चितच चांगला प्रयत्न केलाय पण ‘नको तिथं ते’च्या नादात पकड कुठंतरी ढिली पडल्याचं जाणवत राहतं
translated_text: Director Vinil Mathew has certainly tried his best to do justice to Kanika Dhillon's story, but the tone of 'Nako Titha Te' feels like it has lost its grip somewhere.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "नको तिथं ते" ("Nako Titha Te"), which translates to "unnecessary things" or "not where it should be," indicating a problem with the film's execution.

Text: किंबहुना मनुष्याचं नीतिहीन जगणं म्हणजे एकप्रकारचा मूल्यऱ्हासच आणि या मूल्यऱ्हासाचा शेवट केवळ आणि केवळ भयानकच असतो जो ‘डोंबिवली रिटर्न’मधील अनंत वेलणकरचा होतो
translated_text: In fact, a person's immoral life is a kind of degradation, and the end of this degradation is only and only terrible, which is what happens to Anant Velankar in 'Dombivli Return'.
Justification: The negative sentiment and disgust are driven by the phrase "मूल्यऱ्हास" (mulyahrhas), which translates to "degradation" or "erosion of values," and the word "भयानक" (bhayanak) meaning "terrible" or "horrific," painting a picture of moral decay and its dreadful consequences.

Text: अर्जुनही या हल्ल्यात जबर जखमी होतो
translated_text: Arjun also gets seriously injured in this attack.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to "जबर जखमी होतो" (jabar jakhmi hoto), meaning "seriously injured," which indicates a negative event.

Text: या सिरीजचं संगीत, पार्श्वसंगीत जेमतेमच आहे
translated_text: The music and background music of this series are just okay.
Justification: "जेमतेमच" (jemtemach), meaning "just okay" or "mediocre," indicates a negative sentiment because it expresses a lack of enthusiasm or quality. The neutral emotion stems from the lack of expressive emotional cues in the sentence; it's a flat statement of fact.

Text: पण ढिसाळ पटकथा आणि संकलनात सिनेमाचा मनोरा डगमगतो
translated_text: But the tower of the cinema is shaken by the weak script and editing.
Justification: The word "डगमगतो" (dagmagato), meaning "shaken" or "staggering," indicates a sense of instability and potential collapse, thus contributing to the negative sentiment and conveying the emotion of fear regarding the film's quality.

Text: परिणामी पात्र घटना प्रसंग यांच्या एकजीव मांडणीतून सिनेमा उलगडत जातो आणि प्रेक्षकांच्या मनाचा कब्जा घेतो तसा हा सिनेमा घेत नाही
translated_text: As a result, the film unfolds through a cohesive arrangement of characters, events, and scenes, and captures the audience's attention in a way that this film does not.
Justification: The phrase "घेतो तसा हा सिनेमा घेत नाही" (gheto tasa ha cinema ghet nahi) indicates a lack of capturing the audience's attention, directly implying a negative sentiment. The "घेत नाही" (ghet nahi) specifies the absence of positive engagement.

Text: या अशा परिस्थिती बुंदेलखंडमध्ये अशा काही घटना घडतात ज्यांच्या जखमा पंचवीस वर्षांनंतर ही ओल्या आहेत
translated_text: In such a situation, some incidents happen in Bundelkhand whose wounds are still fresh after twenty-five years.
Justification: "जखमा पंचवीस वर्षांनंतर ही ओल्या आहेत" (wounds are still fresh after twenty-five years) indicates a lingering negative impact, thus justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: एकदा तुम्ही विशिष्ट वय ओलांडले की, जुळणी मिळणे अवघड असते
translated_text: Once you pass a certain age, it's harder to find a match.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "अवघड असते" (avghad aste), which translates to "difficult is" or "harder is," indicating a challenge or negative outcome.

Text: म्हणजे चित्रपट आपल्या कथेला योग्य गतीने पुढे नेण्यात अपयशी ठरत आहे
translated_text: This means the film is failing to move its story forward at the right pace.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "अपयशी ठरत आहे" (apayashi tharat aahe), meaning "failing".

Text: तथापि, मुलगा शेतीकडे आकर्षित झाला आहे आणि शोध मार्गाचे अनुसरण करण्यासाठी त्याच्या इच्छुकतेमुळे दोघांना वेगळे केले जाते
translated_text: However, the boy is drawn to farming and his willingness to follow a path of discovery drives the two apart.
Justification: "वेगळे केले जाते" (vegaLe kele jaate) meaning "drives apart" indicates separation and a negative consequence, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: पण त्यात काही ठिकाणी व्हिएफएक्सच्या मर्यादादेखील नजरेस येतात
translated_text: But in some places, the limitations of VFX are also visible.
Justification: The sentence has a negative sentiment because of the phrase "मर्यादादेखील नजरेस येतात" (maryada dekheel najares yetat), which translates to "limitations are also visible," indicating a shortcoming or flaw.

Text: परिणाम म्हणजे फक्त गंभीर अपमान नाही तर दुखापत आणि रुग्णालयात मुक्काम देखील आहे
translated_text: The result is not only serious humiliation, but also injuries and hospital stays.
Justification: "अपमान" (apamaan), meaning "humiliation," carries a negative connotation, justifying the negative sentiment.

Text: त्यामुळे सिनेमाच्या कथानकाबाबत आणि त्यातील घटनांबाबत प्रेक्षकांच्या मनात शंकेची पाल चुकचुकू शकते
translated_text: Therefore, doubts may arise in the minds of the audience regarding the plot of the film and the events within it.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "शंकेची पाल चुकचुकू शकते" (shankechi paal chukchuku shakate), which idiomatically means "doubts may arise" or "suspicion may be created." This indicates uncertainty and a negative feeling towards the film's plot.

Text: पटकथेतही ती यायला हवी होती
translated_text: She should have been in the script too.
Justification: "हवी होती" (havi hoti), meaning "should have been," expresses a sense of regret or a missed opportunity, leading to a negative sentiment. While seemingly neutral, it indicates something desired was absent.

Text: असे बरेच मुद्दे आहेत जिथे तुम्हाला वाटते की चित्रपट संपेल, परंतु तो पुढे चालू ठेवतो
translated_text: There are many points where you think the movie will end, but it keeps going.
Justification: The sentence receives a negative sentiment (-1) primarily due to the phrase "असे बरेच मुद्दे आहेत जिथे तुम्हाला वाटते की चित्रपट संपेल, परंतु तो पुढे चालू ठेवतो" (ase barech mudde aahet jithe tumhala vaatate ki chitrapat sampel, parantu to pudhe chalu thevato), which suggests a drawn-out or unnecessarily prolonged movie experience, contributing to a negative impression.

Text: चित्रपटातील गाणी प्रसंगाला अनुसरुन नाहीत, असंच वाटू लागतं
translated_text: It seems like the songs in the film don't fit the occasion.
Justification: The negative sentiment (-1) is primarily driven by the phrase "अनुसरुन नाहीत" (anusrurun nahit), meaning "do not fit" or "not appropriate," indicating a lack of alignment and thus a negative evaluation of the songs.

Text: स्वप्निलच्या तोंडी असलेले बालभारतीचे संवादही त्यामुळे फिके पडतात
translated_text: Even the dialogues of Balbharti in Swapnil's mouth fade away because of this.
Justification: The phrase "फिके पडतात" (phike padtat) meaning "fade away" or "become dull/pale" indicates a negative sentiment because it suggests a decline in quality or impact.

Text: त्यामुळे संकलनाच्या बाबतीत दिग्दर्शकीय पकड निसटलेली जाणवते
translated_text: Therefore, the director's grip on the editing feels lost.
Justification: "निसटलेली जाणवते" (nisataleli janavate - feels lost) indicates a negative sentiment as it suggests a lack of control or a failing in the directorial aspect.

Text: त्यामुळे आई- मुलीच्या नात्यात असलेली सहजता या चित्रपटात पाहायला मिळत नाहीये
translated_text: Therefore, the ease in the mother-daughter relationship is not seen in this film.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by "नाहीये" (nahiyet), meaning "is not," which indicates the absence of ease in the relationship, thus expressing a negative sentiment.

Text: शिक्षण म्हणजे खेळ नव्हे असे सांगत केवळ गुणांच्या आकडय़ांमागे धावताना त्याच त्याच साचेबद्ध पद्धतीने दिले जाणारे पुस्तकी ज्ञान हा आजच्या शिक्षणव्यवस्थेतला धोका आहे
translated_text: The danger in today's education system is the same stereotyped book knowledge that is given only in pursuit of grades, saying that education is not a game.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "धोका आहे" (dhoka aahe), which translates to "is a danger/threat".

Text: देशपांडे सुरवातीला अति नाट्यमय दिसतात, तर खांडेकरांमध्ये आत्मविश्वासाचा अभाव आहे
translated_text: Deshpande initially appears overly dramatic, while Khandekar lacks confidence.
Justification: The phrase "अति नाट्यमय" (ati natyamay - overly dramatic) indicates a negative trait, justifying the negative sentiment. While the sentence also notes a lack of confidence in Khandekar, it's the explicit mention of being *overly* dramatic that carries the negative weight.

Text: पण हजारो माणसांच्या गांधी नगर या झोपडपट्टीच्या वस्तीत एकही शौचालय नाही
translated_text: But there is not a single toilet in the slum settlement of Gandhi Nagar, home to thousands of people.
Justification: The negative sentiment is driven by the phrase "एकही शौचालय नाही" (ekahi shauchalay nahi) meaning "not a single toilet," highlighting the lack of basic sanitation and a problematic living condition.

Text: गुड कॉप-बॅड कॉप गेम परिस्थितीला अवास्तव आणि अविश्वसनीय बनवते
translated_text: The Good Cop-Bad Cop game makes the situation unrealistic and unbelievable.
Justification: The sentiment is negative due to the word "अवास्तव" (avastav), meaning unrealistic, which implies a negative quality about the situation described. The presence of the word अविश्वसनीय (avishwasniya), meaning unbelievable is adding to the negative sentiment. The emotion, however, seems to be incorrectly labeled; "joy" is not aligned with the negative sentiment derived from the words meaning 'unrealistic' and 'unbelievable'. It should be sadness.

Text: किंबहुना, पुढे चित्रपट कसा पूर्ण होणार याची प्रचीती आलेला प्रेक्षक विनाकारण अडीच तासांचा हा प्रवास पडद्यासमोर बसून पूर्ण करतो
translated_text: In fact, the audience, who has a sense of how the film will end, ends this two-and-a-half-hour journey by sitting in front of the screen for no reason.
Justification: "विनाकारण" (vinaakaran - for no reason/unnecessarily) indicates a negative sentiment because it suggests the audience is wasting their time, implying dissatisfaction with the film.

Text: प्रत्येकजण तिच्या अस्तित्वाबद्दल विसरला तर काय? ती सर्व कौटुंबिक फोटो अल्बममधून जाते आणि निराश होते
translated_text: What if everyone forgets about her existence? She goes through all the family photo albums and gets frustrated.
Justification: The phrase "निराश होते" (nirash hote) which translates to "gets frustrated" indicates a negative sentiment.

Text: पण गोंधळलेलं कथानक; संथ गतीमुळे चित्रपट लवकर पकड घेत नाही
translated_text: But the plot is confusing; the slow pace makes the film not catchy quickly
Justification: The negative sentiment stems from "गोंधळलेलं कथानक" (gondhalalela kathanak), which translates to "confusing plot." This indicates a lack of clarity and coherence, contributing to the negative sentiment.
